   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | CEaContext g_Context; // The single source of truth for the EA
   16 | 
   17 | //--- Central Analysis & Signal Modules ---
   18 | CMarketAnalysisManager*   g_MarketAnalysisManager = NULL;
   19 | CSonicRScoutEntry*        g_SonicRScoutEntry = NULL;
   20 | CSonicRIntegration*       g_SonicRIntegration = NULL;
   21 | 
   22 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   23 | //| Expert initialization function                                   |
   24 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   25 | int OnInit()
   26 | {
   27 |     // --- Create Core Services ---
   28 |     g_Context.pLogger = new CLogger();
   29 |     if(!g_Context.pLogger)
   30 |     {
   31 |         printf("Critical Error: Could not create Logger.");
   32 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   33 |     }
   34 |     
   35 |     // Load all input parameters into the context
   36 |     LoadInputParameters(g_Context.Inputs);
   37 |     
   38 |     // Initialize the logger with the loaded inputs
   39 |     if(!g_Context.pLogger.Initialize(g_Context.Inputs))
   40 |     {
   41 |         printf("Critical Error: Could not initialize Logger.");
   42 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   43 |     }
   44 | 
   45 |     g_Context.pLogger.LogInfo("OnInit: EA Initializing...");
   46 | 
   47 |     g_Context.pErrorHandler = new CErrorHandler();
   48 |     g_Context.pTimeManager = new CTimeManager(g_Context.pLogger);
   49 |     g_Context.pSymbolInfo = new CSymbolInfo(g_Context.pLogger, _Symbol);
   50 |     g_Context.pSessionManager = new CSessionManager(g_Context.pLogger);
   51 | 
   52 |     // --- Create Core Managers ---
   53 |     g_Context.pIndicators = new CIndicators();
   54 |     g_Context.pTradeManager = new CTradeManager();
   55 |     g_Context.pRiskManager = new CRiskManager();
   56 |     g_Context.pSignalEngine = new CSignalEngine();
   57 |     g_Context.pPerformanceTracker = new CPerformanceTracker();
   58 | 
   59 |     // --- Create instances of strategy-specific modules ---
   60 |     g_MarketAnalysisManager = new CMarketAnalysisManager();
   61 |     g_SonicRScoutEntry = new CSonicRScoutEntry();
   62 |     g_SonicRIntegration = new CSonicRIntegration();
   63 | 
   64 |     // --- Initialize all modules with the context ---
   65 |     if (!InitializeModules(&g_Context))
   66 |     {
   67 |         LOG_FATAL("Module initialization failed. EA will be deinitialized.");
   68 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   69 |     }
   70 | 
   71 |     LOG_INFO("OnInit: EA Initialized Successfully.");
   72 |     return(INIT_SUCCEEDED);
   73 | }
   74 | 
   75 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   76 | //| Initialize all EA modules                                        |
   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | bool InitializeModules(CEaContext* context)
   79 | {
   80 |     if (!context->pErrorHandler->Initialize(context)) return false;
   81 |     if (!context->pSymbolInfo->Initialize(context)) return false;
   82 |     if (!context->pTimeManager->Initialize(context)) return false;
   83 |     if (!context->pTradeManager->Initialize(context)) return false;
   84 |     if (!context->pRiskManager->Initialize(context)) return false;
   85 |     if (!context->pPerformanceTracker->Initialize(context)) return false;
   86 |     if (!context->pIndicators->Initialize(context)) return false;
   87 | 
   88 |     // Initialize Market Analysis Manager
   89 |     if (!g_MarketAnalysisManager->Initialize(context))
   90 |     {
   91 |         context->pLogger->LogError("Failed to initialize Market Analysis Manager.");
   92 |         return false;
   93 |     }
   94 | 
   95 | 
   96 | 
   97 |     // Initialize Sonic R Signal Modules
   98 |     if (!g_SonicRScoutEntry->Initialize(context, g_MarketAnalysisManager))
   99 |     {
  100 |         context->pLogger->LogError("Failed to initialize Scout Entry module.");
  101 |         return false;
  102 |     }
  103 | 
  104 |     // Initialize Sonic R Integration Layer
  105 |     if (!g_SonicRIntegration->Initialize(context, g_MarketAnalysisManager, g_SonicRScoutEntry))
  106 |     {
  107 |         context->pLogger.LogError("Failed to initialize SonicR Integration layer.");
  108 |         return false;
  109 |     }
  110 |     g_SonicRIntegration->SetMinConfidence(context->Inputs.SonicRConfidenceThreshold);
  111 | 
  112 |     // Signal Engine
  113 |     if (!context->pSignalEngine->Initialize(context)) return false;
  114 |     context->pSignalEngine->RegisterStrategy(g_SonicRIntegration);
  115 |     context->pSignalEngine->SelectStrategy("SonicR_Unified");
  116 | 
  117 |     return true;
  118 | }
  119 | 
  120 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  121 | //| Expert deinitialization function                                 |
  122 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  123 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
  124 | {
  125 |     if(g_Context.pLogger != NULL) g_Context.pLogger->LogInfo("Deinitializing EA...");
  126 | 
  127 |     // Delete strategy-specific modules first
  128 |     delete g_SonicRIntegration;
  129 |     delete g_SonicRScoutEntry;
  130 |     delete g_MarketAnalysisManager; // This deletes all analysis modules
  131 | 
  132 |     // Delete core services and managers from the context
  133 |     delete g_Context.pPerformanceTracker;
  134 |     delete g_Context.pSignalEngine;
  135 |     delete g_Context.pRiskManager;
  136 |     delete g_Context.pTradeManager;
  137 |     delete g_Context.pIndicators;
  138 |     delete g_Context.pSessionManager;
  139 |     delete g_Context.pSymbolInfo;
  140 |     delete g_Context.pTimeManager;
  141 |     delete g_Context.pErrorHandler;
  142 |     delete g_Context.pLogger; // Logger is last
  143 | }
  144 | 
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | //| Expert tick function                                             |
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | void OnTick()
  149 | {
  150 |     // On a new bar, run the main trading logic
  151 |     if (g_Context.pTimeManager->IsNewBar())
  152 |     {
  153 |         // 1. Update all market analysis for the new bar
  154 |         g_MarketAnalysisManager->Update();
  155 | 
  156 |         // 2. Run Signal Engine to check for trading signals
  157 |         if (g_Context.pSignalEngine->CheckForSignal() != SIGNAL_TYPE_NONE)
  158 |         {
  159 |             SSignalInfo signalInfo;
  160 |             if (g_Context.pSignalEngine->GetSignalInfo(signalInfo))
  161 |             {
  162 |                 // 3. Calculate Risk for the potential trade
  163 |                 double lotSize = g_Context.pRiskManager->CalculatePositionSize(signalInfo.stopLossPrice, signalInfo.entryPrice);
  164 | 
  165 |                 // 4. Execute Trade if risk is acceptable
  166 |                 if (lotSize > 0)
  167 |                 {
  168 |                     g_Context.pTradeManager->ExecuteTrade(signalInfo, lotSize);
  169 |                 }
  170 |             }
  171 |         }
  172 | 
  173 |         // 5. Manage open positions
  174 |         g_Context.pTradeManager->ManageOpenPositions();
  175 |     }
  176 | }
  177 |

  183 |     // Handle timer-based events if any

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                     Analysis_BrokerHealth.mqh                    |
    3 | //|                  APEX Pullback EA v4.0 - Analysis Module         |
    4 | //|                  TпҝҪc gi?: CпҝҪo GiпҝҪ & пҝҪ?i BпҝҪng                     |
    5 | //|                        NgпҝҪy: 2024-12-31                          |
    6 | //|   Ch?a: CBrokerHealthMonitor - GiпҝҪm sпҝҪt s?c kh?e broker          |
    7 | //|   Phase 4.1: Real-time Broker Performance Analysis              |
    8 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    9 | 
   10 | #ifndef ANALYSIS_BROKERHEALTH_MQH
   11 | #define ANALYSIS_BROKERHEALTH_MQH
   12 | 
   13 | // Include management handled by Includes.mqh - no direct includes needed
   14 | 
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | //| Broker Health Status Levels                                     |
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | enum ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH {
   19 |     HEALTH_EXCELLENT = 0,       // 90-100 score - Optimal conditions
   20 |     HEALTH_GOOD = 1,           // 75-89 score - Good conditions
   21 |     HEALTH_WARNING = 2,        // 60-74 score - Caution advised
   22 |     HEALTH_POOR = 3,           // 40-59 score - High risk
   23 |     HEALTH_CRITICAL = 4        // 0-39 score - Trading not recommended
   24 | };
   25 | 
   26 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   27 | //| Broker Health Metrics                                           |
   28 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   29 | struct BrokerHealthMetrics {
   30 |     // Overall Health
   31 |     double              healthScore;            // Overall health score (0-100)
   32 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH  healthStatus;         // Health status level
   33 |     double              healthTrend;           // Trend direction (+/-)
   34 |     
   35 |     // Component Scores (0-100)
   36 |     double              executionScore;        // Order execution performance
   37 |     double              latencyScore;          // Connection speed performance
   38 |     double              slippageScore;         // Price slippage performance
   39 |     double              requoteScore;          // Requote frequency performance
   40 |     double              uptimeScore;           // Connection uptime performance
   41 |     
   42 |     // Raw Metrics
   43 |     double              averageLatencyMs;      // Average execution time (ms)
   44 |     double              averageSlippagePips;   // Average slippage (pips)
   45 |     double              requoteRate;           // Requote rate (%)
   46 |     double              successRate;           // Order success rate (%)
   47 |     double              uptimeRate;           // Connection uptime (%)
   48 |     
   49 |     // Sample Counts
   50 |     int                 totalExecutions;       // Total order attempts
   51 |     int                 successfulExecutions;  // Successful orders
   52 |     int                 totalRequotes;         // Total requotes
   53 |     int                 connectionDrops;       // Connection failures
   54 |     
   55 |     void Initialize() {
   56 |         healthScore = 100.0;
   57 |         healthStatus = HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
   58 |         healthTrend = 0.0;
   59 |         executionScore = 100.0;
   60 |         latencyScore = 100.0;
   61 |         slippageScore = 100.0;
   62 |         requoteScore = 100.0;
   63 |         uptimeScore = 100.0;
   64 |         averageLatencyMs = 0.0;
   65 |         averageSlippagePips = 0.0;
   66 |         requoteRate = 0.0;
   67 |         successRate = 100.0;
   68 |         uptimeRate = 100.0;
   69 |         totalExecutions = 0;
   70 |         successfulExecutions = 0;
   71 |         totalRequotes = 0;
   72 |         connectionDrops = 0;
   73 |     }
   74 | };
   75 | 
   76 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   77 | //| Enhanced Broker Health Monitor Class                            |
   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | class CBrokerHealthMonitor
   80 | {
   81 | private:
   82 |     bool                        m_initialized;
   83 |     BrokerHealthMetrics         m_currentMetrics;
   84 |     
   85 |     // Monitoring State  
   86 |     datetime                    m_lastUpdateTime;
   87 |     datetime                    m_connectionStartTime;
   88 |     bool                        m_isConnected;
   89 |     
   90 |     // Performance Tracking
   91 |     double                      m_totalLatency;
   92 |     double                      m_totalSlippage;
   93 |     
   94 | public:
   95 |     //--- Constructor & Destructor (RAII Pattern) - inline implementations
   96 |     CBrokerHealthMonitor()
   97 |     {
   98 |         m_initialized = false;
   99 |         m_lastUpdateTime = 0;
  100 |         m_connectionStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  101 |         m_isConnected = true;
  102 |         m_totalLatency = 0.0;
  103 |         m_totalSlippage = 0.0;
  104 |         
  105 |         // Initialize structures
  106 |         m_currentMetrics.Initialize();
  107 |         
  108 |         Print("[APEX_v4] Broker Health Monitor created - awaiting initialization");
  109 |     }
  110 |     
  111 |     ~CBrokerHealthMonitor()
  112 |     {
  113 |         if(m_initialized)
  114 |         {
  115 |             string healthReport = GenerateQuickReport();
  116 |             Print("[APEX_v4] Broker Health Monitor destroyed.\n" + healthReport);
  117 |         }
  118 |     }
  119 |     
  120 |     //--- Initialization Methods - inline implementations
  121 |     bool Initialize()
  122 |     {
  123 |         // Basic initialization without context dependencies
  124 |         if(m_initialized) return true;
  125 |         
  126 |         // Initialize baseline metrics
  127 |         UpdateBaseline();
  128 |         
  129 |         m_initialized = true;
  130 |         Print("[APEX_v4] Broker Health Monitor initialized successfully");
  131 |         return true;
  132 |     }
  133 |     
  134 |     bool SetContext(EAContext& ctx)
  135 |     {
  136 |         if(m_initialized) return true;
  137 |         
  138 |         // Initialize state
  139 |         m_currentMetrics.Initialize();
  140 |         m_connectionStartTime = TimeCurrent();
  141 |         m_isConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  142 |         
  143 |         m_initialized = true;
  144 |         Print("[APEX_v4] Broker Health Monitor initialized successfully");
  145 |         return true;
  146 |     }
  147 |     
  148 |     void Deinitialize()
  149 |     {
  150 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
  151 |         
  152 |         string finalReport = GenerateDetailedReport();
  153 |         Print("[APEX_v4] Broker Health Monitor deinitialized.\nFinal Report:\n" + finalReport);
  154 |         m_initialized = false;
  155 |     }
  156 |     
  157 |     //--- Core Monitoring Methods - inline implementations
  158 |     void OnTick()
  159 |     {
  160 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
  161 |         
  162 |         // Update connection status
  163 |         bool currentlyConnected = TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED);
  164 |         if(currentlyConnected != m_isConnected)
  165 |         {
  166 |             OnConnectionStatusChanged(currentlyConnected);
  167 |         }
  168 |         
  169 |         // Update metrics periodically (every 10 seconds)
  170 |         if(TimeCurrent() - m_lastUpdateTime >= 10)
  171 |         {
  172 |             UpdateMetrics();
  173 |             m_lastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  174 |         }
  175 |     }
  176 |     
  177 |     void OnTradeExecution(double requestedPrice, double executedPrice, 
  178 |                          bool wasSuccessful, bool wasRequoted)
  179 |     {
  180 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
  181 |         
  182 |         // Calculate slippage
  183 |         double slippagePips = CalculateSlippagePips(requestedPrice, executedPrice);
  184 |         
  185 |         // Update metrics
  186 |         m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions++;
  187 |         if(wasSuccessful)
  188 |         {
  189 |             m_currentMetrics.successfulExecutions++;
  190 |         }
  191 |         if(wasRequoted)
  192 |         {
  193 |             m_currentMetrics.totalRequotes++;
  194 |         }
  195 |         
  196 |         // Update cumulative metrics
  197 |         m_totalSlippage += MathAbs(slippagePips);
  198 |         
  199 |         // Calculate averages
  200 |         if(m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions > 0)
  201 |         {
  202 |             m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips = m_totalSlippage / m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions;
  203 |             m_currentMetrics.successRate = (double)m_currentMetrics.successfulExecutions / 
  204 |                                           m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions * 100.0;
  205 |             m_currentMetrics.requoteRate = (double)m_currentMetrics.totalRequotes / 
  206 |                                          m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions * 100.0;
  207 |         }
  208 |         
  209 |         // Recalculate health scores
  210 |         CalculateHealthScores();
  211 |         
  212 |         Print(StringFormat("[APEX_v4] Trade recorded: Slippage=%.1f pips, Success=%s",
  213 |                           slippagePips, wasSuccessful ? "Yes" : "No"));
  214 |     }
  215 |     
  216 |     //--- Query Methods - inline implementations
  217 |     BrokerHealthMetrics GetCurrentMetrics() const { return m_currentMetrics; }
  218 |     
  219 |     double GetHealthScore() const { return m_currentMetrics.healthScore; }
  220 |     
  221 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH GetHealthStatus() const { return m_currentMetrics.healthStatus; }
  222 |     
  223 |     //--- Risk Management Integration - inline implementations
  224 |     double GetRiskAdjustmentFactor() const
  225 |     {
  226 |         // Return risk adjustment factor based on health status
  227 |         switch(m_currentMetrics.healthStatus)
  228 |         {
  229 |             case HEALTH_EXCELLENT:  return 1.0;    // No adjustment
  230 |             case HEALTH_GOOD:       return 0.9;    // Slight reduction
  231 |             case HEALTH_WARNING:    return 0.7;    // Moderate reduction
  232 |             case HEALTH_POOR:       return 0.5;    // Significant reduction
  233 |             case HEALTH_CRITICAL:   return 0.2;    // Minimal risk only
  234 |             default:                return 1.0;
  235 |         }
  236 |     }
  237 |     
  238 |     bool ShouldReduceRisk() const
  239 |     {
  240 |         return m_currentMetrics.healthStatus >= HEALTH_WARNING;
  241 |     }
  242 |     
  243 |     bool ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker() const
  244 |     {
  245 |         return m_currentMetrics.healthStatus == HEALTH_CRITICAL;
  246 |     }
  247 |     
  248 |     //--- Reporting Methods - inline implementations
  249 |     string GenerateQuickReport() const
  250 |     {
  251 |         return StringFormat("Health: %.1f%% (%s), Success: %.1f%%, Slippage: %.1f pips",
  252 |                            m_currentMetrics.healthScore,
  253 |                            GetHealthStatusString(m_currentMetrics.healthStatus),
  254 |                            m_currentMetrics.successRate,
  255 |                            m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips);
  256 |     }
  257 |     
  258 |     string GenerateDetailedReport() const
  259 |     {
  260 |         string report = "=== BROKER HEALTH DETAILED REPORT ===\n";
  261 |         report += StringFormat("Overall Health Score: %.2f%% (%s)\n", 
  262 |                               m_currentMetrics.healthScore,
  263 |                               GetHealthStatusString(m_currentMetrics.healthStatus));
  264 |         
  265 |         report += "\n--- Performance Metrics ---\n";
  266 |         report += StringFormat("Average Slippage: %.2f pips\n", m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips);
  267 |         report += StringFormat("Success Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_currentMetrics.successRate);
  268 |         report += StringFormat("Requote Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_currentMetrics.requoteRate);
  269 |         report += StringFormat("Uptime Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_currentMetrics.uptimeRate);
  270 |         
  271 |         report += "\n--- Statistics ---\n";
  272 |         report += StringFormat("Total Executions: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions);
  273 |         report += StringFormat("Successful Executions: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.successfulExecutions);
  274 |         report += StringFormat("Total Requotes: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.totalRequotes);
  275 |         report += StringFormat("Connection Drops: %d\n", m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops);
  276 |         
  277 |         report += "\n--- Risk Assessment ---\n";
  278 |         report += StringFormat("Risk Adjustment Factor: %.2f\n", GetRiskAdjustmentFactor());
  279 |         report += StringFormat("Reduce Risk Recommended: %s\n", ShouldReduceRisk() ? "YES" : "NO");
  280 |         report += StringFormat("Circuit Breaker Trigger: %s\n", ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker() ? "YES" : "NO");
  281 |         
  282 |         report += "====================================";
  283 |         return report;
  284 |     }
  285 |     
  286 | private:
  287 |     //--- Internal Update Methods - inline implementations
  288 |     void UpdateMetrics()
  289 |     {
  290 |         // Update connection metrics
  291 |         UpdateConnectionMetrics();
  292 |         
  293 |         // Calculate component scores
  294 |         CalculateHealthScores();
  295 |     }
  296 |     
  297 |     void UpdateConnectionMetrics()
  298 |     {
  299 |         // Calculate uptime percentage
  300 |         double totalTime = (double)(TimeCurrent() - m_connectionStartTime);
  301 |         if(totalTime > 0)
  302 |         {
  303 |             double uptimeTime = totalTime - (m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops * 60.0); // Assume 1 min per drop
  304 |             m_currentMetrics.uptimeRate = MathMax(0.0, (uptimeTime / totalTime) * 100.0);
  305 |         }
  306 |     }
  307 |     
  308 |     void CalculateHealthScores()
  309 |     {
  310 |         // Calculate individual component scores
  311 |         m_currentMetrics.executionScore = CalculateExecutionScore();
  312 |         m_currentMetrics.slippageScore = CalculateSlippageScore();
  313 |         m_currentMetrics.requoteScore = CalculateRequoteScore();
  314 |         m_currentMetrics.uptimeScore = CalculateUptimeScore();
  315 |         
  316 |         // Calculate weighted overall score (simplified)
  317 |         m_currentMetrics.healthScore = (m_currentMetrics.executionScore * 0.4 +
  318 |                                        m_currentMetrics.slippageScore * 0.3 +
  319 |                                        m_currentMetrics.requoteScore * 0.2 +
  320 |                                        m_currentMetrics.uptimeScore * 0.1);
  321 |         
  322 |         m_currentMetrics.healthScore = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, m_currentMetrics.healthScore));
  323 |         m_currentMetrics.healthStatus = DetermineHealthStatus(m_currentMetrics.healthScore);
  324 |     }
  325 |     
  326 |     double CalculateExecutionScore()
  327 |     {
  328 |         if(m_currentMetrics.totalExecutions == 0) return 100.0;
  329 |         return m_currentMetrics.successRate;
  330 |     }
  331 |     
  332 |     double CalculateSlippageScore()
  333 |     {
  334 |         if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 0) return 100.0;
  335 |         if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 1.0) return 100.0;
  336 |         if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 2.0) return 80.0;
  337 |         if(m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips <= 3.0) return 60.0;
  338 |         return MathMax(0.0, 60.0 - (m_currentMetrics.averageSlippagePips - 3.0) * 10.0);
  339 |     }
  340 |     
  341 |     double CalculateRequoteScore()
  342 |     {
  343 |         if(m_currentMetrics.requoteRate <= 0) return 100.0;
  344 |         if(m_currentMetrics.requoteRate <= 2.0) return 100.0;
  345 |         if(m_currentMetrics.requoteRate <= 5.0) return 80.0;
  346 |         return MathMax(0.0, 80.0 - (m_currentMetrics.requoteRate - 5.0) * 5.0);
  347 |     }
  348 |     
  349 |     double CalculateUptimeScore()
  350 |     {
  351 |         return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, m_currentMetrics.uptimeRate));
  352 |     }
  353 |     
  354 |     void OnConnectionStatusChanged(bool isConnected)
  355 |     {
  356 |         if(isConnected && !m_isConnected)
  357 |         {
  358 |             Print("[APEX_v4] Broker connection restored");
  359 |         }
  360 |         else if(!isConnected && m_isConnected)
  361 |         {
  362 |             m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops++;
  363 |             Print("[APEX_v4] Broker connection lost (total drops: " + 
  364 |                   IntegerToString(m_currentMetrics.connectionDrops) + ")");
  365 |         }
  366 |         
  367 |         m_isConnected = isConnected;
  368 |     }
  369 |     
  370 |     //--- Utility Methods - inline implementations
  371 |     double CalculateSlippagePips(double requested, double executed)
  372 |     {
  373 |         if(requested == 0.0 || executed == 0.0) return 0.0;
  374 |         
  375 |         double pipValue = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  376 |         if(SymbolInfoInteger(Symbol(), SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 5 || 
  377 |            SymbolInfoInteger(Symbol(), SYMBOL_DIGITS) == 3)
  378 |         {
  379 |             pipValue *= 10; // Account for 5-digit brokers
  380 |         }
  381 |         
  382 |         return MathAbs(executed - requested) / pipValue;
  383 |     }
  384 |     
  385 |     ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH DetermineHealthStatus(double healthScore)
  386 |     {
  387 |         if(healthScore >= 90.0) return HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
  388 |         if(healthScore >= 75.0) return HEALTH_GOOD;
  389 |         if(healthScore >= 60.0) return HEALTH_WARNING;
  390 |         if(healthScore >= 40.0) return HEALTH_POOR;
  391 |         return HEALTH_CRITICAL;
  392 |     }
  393 |     
  394 |     string GetHealthStatusString(ENUM_BROKER_HEALTH status) const
  395 |     {
  396 |         switch(status)
  397 |         {
  398 |             case HEALTH_EXCELLENT:  return "EXCELLENT";
  399 |             case HEALTH_GOOD:       return "GOOD";
  400 |             case HEALTH_WARNING:    return "WARNING";
  401 |             case HEALTH_POOR:       return "POOR";
  402 |             case HEALTH_CRITICAL:   return "CRITICAL";
  403 |             default:                return "UNKNOWN";
  404 |         }
  405 |     }
  406 | };
  407 | 
  408 | #endif // ANALYSIS_BROKERHEALTH_MQH

================================================================================

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                  Analysis_Indicators.mqh - v5.0                  |
    3 | //|            APEX Pullback EA - Universal Indicator Manager        |
    4 | //|      "A centralized hub for all technical indicator needs"       |

    6 | #ifndef ANALYSIS_INDICATORS_MQH
    7 | #define ANALYSIS_INDICATORS_MQH

   10 | #include "Core_Logger.mqh"
   11 | #include "Core_SymbolInfo.mqh"

   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| CAppIndicators - Universal Indicator Manager                     |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | class CAppIndicators : public CObject
   18 | {
   19 | private:
   20 |     CLogger*                m_pLogger;
   21 |     CSymbolInfo*            m_pSymbolInfo;
   22 |     
   23 |     // Dynamic handle management
   24 |     CArrayObj*              m_indicatorList; // Stores SIndicatorHandle objects
   25 |     
   26 |     struct SIndicatorHandle : public CObject
   27 |     {
   28 |         string      unique_id;
   29 |         int         handle;
   30 |     };
   31 | 
   32 |     int      GetIndicatorHandle(const string unique_id, const MqlIndicator &indicator_def);
   33 |     string   GenerateUniqueID(const MqlIndicator &indicator_def);
   34 | 
   35 | public:
   36 |     CAppIndicators();
   37 |     ~CAppIndicators();
   38 | 
   39 |     bool     Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CAppSymbolInfo* pSymbolInfo);
   40 |     void     Deinitialize();
   41 |     
   42 |     // --- Public Indicator Accessors ---
   43 |     int      GetMA(ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied_price, int period, int ma_shift, int ma_method, const int shift, double &result_buffer[]);
   44 |     int      GetATR(int period, const int shift, double &result_buffer[]);
   45 |     int      GetEMAOnArray(const double &in_array[], const int total, const int period, const int shift, double &out_array[]);
   46 |     int      FindHighestValue(const double &buffer[], int start_bar, int range, double &value, int &index);
   47 |     int      FindLowestValue(const double &buffer[], int start_bar, int range, double &value, int &index);
   48 | };
   49 | 
   50 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   51 | //| Implementation                                                   |
   52 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   53 | CAppIndicators::CAppIndicators()
   54 | {
   55 |     m_indicatorList = new CArrayObj();
   56 | }
   57 | 
   58 | CAppIndicators::~CAppIndicators()
   59 | {
   60 |     if(CheckPointer(m_indicatorList) == POINTER_VALID)
   61 |     {
   62 |         m_indicatorList->FreeMode(true);
   63 |         delete m_indicatorList;
   64 |     }
   65 | }
   66 | 
   67 | bool CAppIndicators::Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CSymbolInfo* pSymbolInfo)
   68 | {
   69 |     if(!pLogger || !pSymbolInfo) return false;
   70 |     m_pLogger = pLogger;
   71 |     m_pSymbolInfo = pSymbolInfo;
   72 |     m_indicatorList->FreeMode(true);
   73 |     m_indicatorList->Clear();
   74 |     return true;
   75 | }
   76 | 
   77 | void CAppIndicators::Deinitialize()
   78 | {
   79 |     if(CheckPointer(m_indicatorList) == POINTER_VALID)
   80 |     {
   81 |         for(int i = m_indicatorList->Total() - 1; i >= 0; i--)
   82 |         {
   83 |             SIndicatorHandle* ind_handle = m_indicatorList->At(i);
   84 |             if(CheckPointer(ind_handle) == POINTER_VALID)
   85 |             {
   86 |                 IndicatorRelease(ind_handle->handle);
   87 |             }
   88 |         }
   89 |         m_indicatorList->Clear();
   90 |     }
   91 | }
   92 | 
   93 | string CAppIndicators::GenerateUniqueID(const MqlIndicator &indicator_def)
   94 | {
   95 |     string id = indicator_def.name;
   96 |     for(uint i = 0; i < indicator_def.num_parameters; i++)
   97 |     {
   98 |         id += "|" + (string)indicator_def.parameters[i].integer_value;
   99 |     }
  100 |     return id;
  101 | }
  102 | 
  103 | int CAppIndicators::GetIndicatorHandle(const string unique_id, const MqlIndicator &indicator_def)
  104 | {
  105 |     for(int i = 0; i < m_indicatorList->Total(); i++)
  106 |     {
  107 |         SIndicatorHandle* ind_handle = m_indicatorList->At(i);
  108 |         if(ind_handle->unique_id == unique_id)
  109 |         {
  110 |             return ind_handle->handle;
  111 |         }
  112 |     }
  113 | 
  114 |     int new_handle = iCustom(m_pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), m_pSymbolInfo->Timeframe(), indicator_def.name, indicator_def.parameters);
  115 |     if(new_handle != INVALID_HANDLE)
  116 |     {
  117 |         SIndicatorHandle* new_ind_handle = new SIndicatorHandle();
  118 |         new_ind_handle->unique_id = unique_id;
  119 |         new_ind_handle->handle = new_handle;
  120 |         m_indicatorList->Add(new_ind_handle);
  121 |         return new_handle;
  122 |     }
  123 |     return INVALID_HANDLE;
  124 | }
  125 | 
  126 | int CAppIndicators::GetMA(ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied_price, int period, int ma_shift, int ma_method, const int shift, double &result_buffer[])
  127 | {
  128 |     MqlIndicator id = {};
  129 |     id.name = "Moving Average";
  130 |     id.num_parameters = 4;
  131 |     id.parameters[0].integer_value = period;
  132 |     id.parameters[1].integer_value = ma_shift;
  133 |     id.parameters[2].integer_value = ma_method;
  134 |     id.parameters[3].integer_value = applied_price;
  135 |     
  136 |     string unique_id = GenerateUniqueID(id);
  137 |     int handle = GetIndicatorHandle(unique_id, id);
  138 |     if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return -1;
  139 |     
  140 |     return CopyBuffer(handle, 0, shift, ArraySize(result_buffer), result_buffer);
  141 | }
  142 | 
  143 | int CAppIndicators::GetATR(int period, const int shift, double &result_buffer[])
  144 | {
  145 |     MqlIndicator id = {};
  146 |     id.name = "ATR";
  147 |     id.num_parameters = 1;
  148 |     id.parameters[0].integer_value = period;
  149 |     
  150 |     string unique_id = GenerateUniqueID(id);
  151 |     int handle = GetIndicatorHandle(unique_id, id);
  152 |     if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return -1;
  153 |     
  154 |     return CopyBuffer(handle, 0, shift, ArraySize(result_buffer), result_buffer);
  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | int CAppIndicators::GetEMAOnArray(const double &in_array[], const int total, const int period, const int shift, double &out_array[])
  158 | {
  159 |     // iMAOnArray doesn't need a handle, it's a direct calculation
  160 |     return iMAOnArray(in_array, total, period, 0, MODE_EMA, out_array);
  161 | }
  162 | 
  163 | int CAppIndicators::FindHighestValue(const double &buffer[], int start_bar, int range, double &value, int &index)
  164 | {
  165 |     if(start_bar < 0 || range <= 0 || start_bar + range > ArraySize(buffer)) return -1;
  166 |     
  167 |     int max_idx = -1;
  168 |     double max_val = -DBL_MAX;
  169 |     
  170 |     for(int i = start_bar; i < start_bar + range; i++)
  171 |     {
  172 |         if(buffer[i] > max_val)
  173 |         {
  174 |             max_val = buffer[i];
  175 |             max_idx = i;
  176 |         }
  177 |     }
  178 |     value = max_val;
  179 |     index = max_idx;
  180 |     return max_idx;
  181 | }
  182 | 
  183 | int CAppIndicators::FindLowestValue(const double &buffer[], int start_bar, int range, double &value, int &index)
  184 | {
  185 |     if(start_bar < 0 || range <= 0 || start_bar + range > ArraySize(buffer)) return -1;
  186 | 
  187 |     int min_idx = -1;
  188 |     double min_val = DBL_MAX;
  189 | 
  190 |     for(int i = start_bar; i < start_bar + range; i++)
  191 |     {
  192 |         if(buffer[i] < min_val)
  193 |         {
  194 |             min_val = buffer[i];
  195 |             min_idx = i;
  196 |         }
  197 |     }
  198 |     value = min_val;
  199 |     index = min_idx;
  200 |     return min_idx;
  201 | }

   99 |         // Deinitialization is handled by the main EA file
  100 |     }
  101 | 
  102 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  103 |     //| Khб»ҹi tбәЎo Manager vГ  tбәҘt cбәЈ cГЎc module con                      |
  104 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  105 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* context)
  106 |     {
  107 |         m_context = context;
  108 |         if(CheckPointer(m_context) == POINTER_INVALID)
  109 |         {
  110 |             printf("Error: EA Context is null in CMarketAnalysisManager");
  111 |             return false;
  112 |         }
  113 |         m_logger = m_context->pLogger;
  114 | 
  115 |         // --- Create and Initialize all analysis modules ---
  116 |         m_sonic_r_wave_pattern = new CSonicRWavePattern();

  119 |         m_sonic_r_dragon_band = new CSonicRDragonBand();

  129 |         if(!m_sonic_r_support_resistance || !m_sonic_r_support_resistance.Initialize(m_context)) { if(m_logger) m_logger.LogError("Failed to initialize CSonicRSupportResistance"); return false; }

  140 |         }

  143 |         return true;
  144 |     }

  146 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  161 |     //| Cбәӯp nhбәӯt tбәҘt cбәЈ cГЎc module phГўn tГӯch (gб»Қi mб»—i New Bar)          |
  162 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  163 |     void Update()
  164 |     {
  165 |         if(!m_context || !m_context->pTimeManager->IsNewBar(m_last_update_time))
  166 |             return;
  167 | 
  168 |         // Update all analysis modules
  169 |         if(m_sonic_r_wave_pattern) m_sonic_r_wave_pattern.Update();
  170 |         if(m_sonic_r_dragon_band) m_sonic_r_dragon_band.Update();
  171 |         if(m_sonic_r_oscillator) m_sonic_r_oscillator.Update();
  172 |         if(m_sonic_r_pvsra) m_sonic_r_pvsra.Update();
  173 |         if(m_sonic_r_support_resistance) m_sonic_r_support_resistance.Update();
  174 |         if(m_smc_analysis) m_smc_analysis.Update();
  175 |         if(m_market_profile) m_market_profile.Update();
  176 | 
  177 |         // Consolidate results into m_market_context
  178 |         ConsolidateMarketContext();
  179 | 
  180 |         if(m_logger) m_logger.LogDebug("CMarketAnalysisManager updated all modules.");
  181 |     }

  187 |     {
  188 |         m_market_context.Reset();

  192 |         m_market_context.pvsra = m_sonic_r_pvsra ? m_sonic_r_pvsra.GetContext() : NULL;
  193 |         m_market_context.support_resistance = m_sonic_r_support_resistance ? m_sonic_r_support_resistance.GetContext() : NULL;
  194 |         m_market_context.market_profile = m_market_profile;
  195 |         m_market_context.smc_analysis = m_smc_analysis;
  196 |     }
  197 | 
  198 | public:
  199 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  200 |     //| LбәҘy bб»‘i cбәЈnh thб»Ӣ trЖ°б»қng Д‘ГЈ Д‘Ж°б»Јc phГўn tГӯch                        |

  106 | {

  108 |

  110 |     // In MQL5, '.' is used to access members of a pointed-to object.
  111 |     if(m_pContext.pTimeManager.IsNewBar())
  112 |     {
  113 |         CalculateProfile();
  114 |         DetermineMarketRegime();
  115 |     }
  116 | }

  118 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  119 | //| CalculateProfile                                                 |
  120 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  121 | void CAnalysisMarketProfile::CalculateProfile()
  122 | {
  123 |     // Placeholder for TPO or Volume Profile calculation logic
  124 |     // This is a complex calculation and will be implemented based on specific rules.
  125 |     // For now, we can use a simplified logic.
  126 | 
  127 |     // Example: Find the price level with the highest volume in the last m_profilePeriod bars
  128 |     // This requires access to tick volume data.
  129 |     LOG_DEBUG(m_pLogger, "Calculating Market Profile...");
  130 |     
  131 |     // --- Simplified POC/VA Calculation (Example) ---
  132 |     // This is a placeholder and should be replaced with a proper implementation.
  133 |     long tick_volume[];
  134 |     double high[], low[];
  135 |     // Corrected access to context members
  136 |     if(CheckPointer(m_pContext) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_pContext.pSymbolInfo) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_pContext.pTimeManager) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  137 | 
  138 |     CopyTickVolume(m_pContext.pSymbolInfo.Name(), m_pContext.pTimeManager.Timeframe(), 0, m_profilePeriod, tick_volume);
  139 |     CopyHigh(m_pContext.pSymbolInfo.Name(), m_pContext.pTimeManager.Timeframe(), 0, m_profilePeriod, high);
  140 |     CopyLow(m_pContext.pSymbolInfo.Name(), m_pContext.pTimeManager.Timeframe(), 0, m_profilePeriod, low);
  141 | 
  142 |     // Simple POC: Price of the bar with the highest volume
  143 |     long max_volume = 0;
  144 |     int max_vol_index = -1;
  145 |     for(int i = 0; i < m_profilePeriod; i++)
  146 |     {
  147 |         if(tick_volume[i] > max_volume)
  148 |         {
  149 |             max_volume = tick_volume[i];
  150 |             max_vol_index = i;
  151 |         }
  152 |     }
  153 | 
  154 |     if(max_vol_index != -1)
  155 |     {
  156 |         m_poc = (high[max_vol_index] + low[max_vol_index]) / 2.0;
  157 |         // Placeholder for VAH/VAL
  158 |         m_valueAreaHigh = m_poc + m_pContext.pSymbolInfo.GetPipSize() * 50;
  159 |         m_valueAreaLow = m_poc - m_pContext.pSymbolInfo.GetPipSize() * 50;
  160 |     }
  161 | }

  170 |     LOG_DEBUG(m_pLogger, "Determining Market Regime...");
  171 |     m_currentRegime = REGIME_TRENDING_BULL; // Placeholder
  172 | }

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                    Analysis_POIScoring.mqh |
    3 | //|                        Copyright 2024, MQL5-SOLUTIONS.IO |
    4 | //|                               https://www.mql5-solutions.io |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Copyright 2024, MQL5-SOLUTIONS.IO"
    7 | #property link      "https://www.mql5-solutions.io"
    8 | #property version   "1.00"
    9 | 
   10 | #include "Shared_DataStructures.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| Scoring Criteria Weights (can be made inputs later)              |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | #define WEIGHT_LIQUIDITY_SWEEP 25
   16 | #define WEIGHT_IMBALANCE 20
   17 | #define WEIGHT_FRESHNESS 15
   18 | #define WEIGHT_PD_ARRAY 15
   19 | #define WEIGHT_VOLUME_PROFILE 10
   20 | #define WEIGHT_CONFLUENCE 15
   21 | 
   22 | 
   23 | 
   24 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   25 | //| POI Scoring Engine Class                                         |
   26 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   27 | class CPOIScoringEngine
   28 | {
   29 | private:
   30 |     // Helper methods for calculating individual scores
   31 |     int CalculateLiquiditySweepScore(const OrderBlock &ob, const SwingPoint &structure[]);
   32 |     int CalculateImbalanceScore(const OrderBlock &ob, const FairValueGap &fvgs[]);
   33 |     int CalculateFreshnessScore(const OrderBlock &ob);
   34 |     int CalculatePDArrayScore(const OrderBlock &ob, const SwingPoint &leg_start, const SwingPoint &leg_end);
   35 |     int CalculateVolumeProfileScore(const OrderBlock &ob);
   36 |     int CalculateConfluenceScore(const OrderBlock &ob);
   37 | 
   38 | public:
   39 |     // Main method to score a given Point of Interest (Order Block)
   40 |     POIScore ScoreOrderBlock(const OrderBlock &ob, const MqlRates &rates[], const SwingPoint &structure[], const FairValueGap &fvgs[]);
   41 | 
   42 |     // Method to score a Fair Value Gap (can be added later)
   43 |     // POIScore ScoreFVG(const FairValueGap &fvg);
   44 | };
   45 | 
   46 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   47 | //| Main Scoring Method Implementation                               |
   48 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   49 | POIScore CPOIScoringEngine::ScoreOrderBlock(const OrderBlock &ob, const MqlRates &rates[], const SwingPoint &structure[], const FairValueGap &fvgs[])
   50 | {
   51 |     POIScore score;
   52 | 
   53 |     // Find the leg that the OB belongs to for context
   54 |     SwingPoint leg_start, leg_end;
   55 |     for(int i = ArraySize(structure) - 2; i >= 0; i--)
   56 |     {
   57 |         if(structure[i].time < ob.time && structure[i+1].time > ob.time)
   58 |         {
   59 |             leg_start = structure[i];
   60 |             leg_end = structure[i+1];
   61 |             break;
   62 |         }
   63 |     }
   64 | 
   65 |     score.liquiditySweepScore = CalculateLiquiditySweepScore(ob, structure);
   66 |     score.imbalanceScore = CalculateImbalanceScore(ob, fvgs);
   67 |     score.freshnessScore = CalculateFreshnessScore(ob);
   68 |     score.pdArrayScore = CalculatePDArrayScore(ob, leg_start, leg_end);
   69 |     score.volumeProfileScore = CalculateVolumeProfileScore(ob);
   70 |     score.confluenceScore = CalculateConfluenceScore(ob);
   71 | 
   72 |     // Calculate total weighted score
   73 |     score.totalScore = (score.liquiditySweepScore * WEIGHT_LIQUIDITY_SWEEP +
   74 |                         score.imbalanceScore * WEIGHT_IMBALANCE +
   75 |                         score.freshnessScore * WEIGHT_FRESHNESS +
   76 |                         score.pdArrayScore * WEIGHT_PD_ARRAY +
   77 |                         score.volumeProfileScore * WEIGHT_VOLUME_PROFILE +
   78 |                         score.confluenceScore * WEIGHT_CONFLUENCE) / 100;
   79 | 
   80 |     return score;
   81 | }
   82 | 
   83 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   84 | //| Individual Score Calculations Implementation                     |
   85 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   86 | int CPOIScoringEngine::CalculateLiquiditySweepScore(const OrderBlock &ob, const SwingPoint &structure[]) 
   87 | {
   88 |     // TODO: Find the swing point that this OB is supposed to have swept.
   89 |     // For now, placeholder.
   90 |     return 50; 
   91 | }
   92 | 
   93 | int CPOIScoringEngine::CalculateImbalanceScore(const OrderBlock &ob, const FairValueGap &fvgs[]) 
   94 | {
   95 |     // Check if the OB is directly followed by or adjacent to an FVG
   96 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(fvgs); i++)
   97 |     {
   98 |         // Bullish OB: FVG should be right after
   99 |         if(ob.type == 1 && fvgs[i].start_bar_index == ob.bar_index - 1)
  100 |         {
  101 |             // Check if the FVG is significant (e.g., larger than the OB body)
  102 |             return 100; // High score for clear imbalance
  103 |         }
  104 |         // Bearish OB: FVG should be right after
  105 |         if(ob.type == -1 && fvgs[i].start_bar_index == ob.bar_index - 1)
  106 |         {
  107 |             return 100; // High score for clear imbalance
  108 |         }
  109 |     }
  110 |     return 10; // Low score if no immediate FVG
  111 | }
  112 | 
  113 | int CPOIScoringEngine::CalculateFreshnessScore(const OrderBlock &ob) 
  114 | {
  115 |     // 100 if not mitigated, 0 if it is.
  116 |     return ob.is_mitigated ? 0 : 100; 
  117 | }
  118 | 
  119 | int CPOIScoringEngine::CalculatePDArrayScore(const OrderBlock &ob, const SwingPoint &leg_start, const SwingPoint &leg_end) 
  120 | {
  121 |     if(leg_start.time == 0 || leg_end.time == 0) return 50; // Neutral if leg not found
  122 | 
  123 |     double equilibrium = (leg_start.price + leg_end.price) / 2.0;
  124 | 
  125 |     // For a Bullish OB (demand), we want it to be in the discount zone.
  126 |     if(ob.type == 1)
  127 |     {
  128 |         if(ob.price_low < equilibrium) return 100; // Prime location
  129 |         else return 20; // Poor location
  130 |     }
  131 |     // For a Bearish OB (supply), we want it to be in the premium zone.
  132 |     else if(ob.type == -1)
  133 |     {
  134 |         if(ob.price_high > equilibrium) return 100; // Prime location
  135 |         else return 20; // Poor location
  136 |     }
  137 | 
  138 |     return 50; // Should not happen
  139 | }
  140 | 
  141 | int CPOIScoringEngine::CalculateVolumeProfileScore(const OrderBlock &ob) 
  142 | {
  143 |     // TODO: Requires integration with a Volume Profile indicator.
  144 |     // Check if the OB overlaps with a High Volume Node (HVN) or Point of Control (POC).
  145 |     return 50; // Placeholder
  146 | }
  147 | 
  148 | int CPOIScoringEngine::CalculateConfluenceScore(const OrderBlock &ob) 
  149 | {
  150 |     // TODO: Check for confluence with other factors like:
  151 |     // - MTF High/Low levels
  152 |     // - Major round numbers
  153 |     // - Other indicator signals (e.g., moving averages)
  154 |     return 50; // Placeholder
  155 | }

   47 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   48 |     //| Destructor                                                       |
   49 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   50 |    ~CAnalysisSMC(void)
   51 |     {
   52 |         Deinitialize();
   53 |     }
   54 | 
   55 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   56 |     //| Initialization                                                   |
   57 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   58 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* context)
   59 |     {
   60 |         m_Context = context;
   61 |         if(CheckPointer(m_Context) == POINTER_INVALID)
   62 |         {
   63 |             printf("CAnalysisSMC::Initialize - EA Context is null");
   64 |             return false;
   65 |         }
   66 | 
   67 |         // Load configurations from settings or use defaults
   68 |         LoadConfigurations();
   69 | 
   70 |         // Initialize analysis modules
   71 |         m_MarketStructure = new CMarketStructure();
   72 |         if(!m_MarketStructure.Initialize(m_ms_config, m_Context.Symbol.Name(), m_Context.TimeManager.Timeframe()))
   73 |         {
   74 |             m_Context.ErrorHandler.HandleError(__FUNCTION__, "Failed to initialize Market Structure module", ERR_INIT_FAILED, SEVERITY_CRITICAL);
   75 |             return false;
   76 |         }
   77 | 
   78 |         m_OrderBlocks = new COrderBlocks();
   79 |         if(!m_OrderBlocks.Initialize(m_ob_config, m_Context.Symbol.Name(), m_Context.TimeManager.Timeframe(), GetPointer(m_MarketStructure)))
   80 |         {
   81 |             m_Context.ErrorHandler.HandleError(__FUNCTION__, "Failed to initialize Order Blocks module", ERR_INIT_FAILED, SEVERITY_CRITICAL);
   82 |             return false;
   83 |         }
   84 | 
   85 |         m_FairValueGaps = new CFairValueGaps();
   86 |         if(!m_FairValueGaps.Initialize(m_fvg_config, m_Context.Symbol.Name(), m_Context.TimeManager.Timeframe()))
   87 |         {
   88 |             m_Context.ErrorHandler.HandleError(__FUNCTION__, "Failed to initialize Fair Value Gaps module", ERR_INIT_FAILED, SEVERITY_CRITICAL);
   89 |             return false;
   90 |         }
   91 | 
   92 |         m_Context.pLogger.LogInfo(__FUNCTION__, "SMC Analysis modules initialized successfully.");
   93 |         return true;
   94 |     }
   95 | 
   96 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   97 |     //| Deinitialization                                                 |
   98 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   99 |     void Deinitialize()
  100 |     {
  101 |         if(CheckPointer(m_MarketStructure) != POINTER_INVALID) delete m_MarketStructure;
  102 |         if(CheckPointer(m_OrderBlocks) != POINTER_INVALID) delete m_OrderBlocks;
  103 |         if(CheckPointer(m_FairValueGaps) != POINTER_INVALID) delete m_FairValueGaps;
  104 | 
  105 |     }
  106 | 
  107 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  108 |     //| Update all SMC analysis modules                                  |
  109 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  110 |     void Update()
  111 |     {
  112 |         if(CheckPointer(m_Context) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  113 | 
  114 |         // The order of updates is critical for SMC analysis.
  115 |         // 1. Analyze the foundational market structure.
  116 |         if(!AnalyzeMarketStructure())
  117 |             return; // Stop if structure analysis fails
  118 | 
  119 |         // 2. Scan for Order Blocks within the current structure.
  120 |         ScanForOrderBlocks();
  121 | 
  122 |         // 3. Detect Fair Value Gaps.
  123 |         DetectFairValueGaps();
  124 | 
  125 | 
  126 |     }
  127 | 
  128 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  129 |     //| Market Structure Analysis Engine                                 |
  130 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  131 |     bool AnalyzeMarketStructure()
  132 |     {
  133 |         if(CheckPointer(m_MarketStructure) == POINTER_INVALID) return false;
  134 |         m_MarketStructure.Update();
  135 |         return true;
  136 |     }
  137 | 
  138 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  139 |     //| Order Block Detection System                                     |
  140 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  141 |     void ScanForOrderBlocks()
  142 |     {
  143 |         if(CheckPointer(m_OrderBlocks) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  144 |         m_OrderBlocks.Update();
  145 |     }
  146 | 
  147 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 |     //| Fair Value Gap Analysis Module                                   |
  149 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 |     void DetectFairValueGaps()
  151 |     {
  152 |         if(CheckPointer(m_FairValueGaps) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  153 |         m_FairValueGaps.Update();
  154 |     }
  155 | 
  156 | 
  157 | 
  158 | private:
  159 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  160 |     //| Load Configurations                                              |
  161 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  162 |     void LoadConfigurations()
  163 |     {
  164 |         // TODO: Load these settings from the EA's input parameters or a config file
  165 |         // For now, we use default values.
  166 |         m_ms_config.SetDefaults();
  167 |         m_ob_config.SetDefaults();
  168 |         m_fvg_config.SetDefaults();
  169 | 
  170 |     }
  171 | };

  156 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  157 | //| Enhanced Sonic R Dragon Initialization                          |
  158 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  159 | bool CSonicRDragon::Initialize(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, int dragonPeriod, int trendPeriod, CLogger* pLogger)
  160 | {
  161 |     m_symbol = symbol;
  162 |     m_timeframe = timeframe;
  163 |     m_dragonPeriod = dragonPeriod;
  164 |     m_trendPeriod = trendPeriod;
  165 |     m_pLogger = pLogger;
  166 |     
  167 |     // Create main Dragon indicator handle
  168 |     m_dragonHandle = iCustom(m_symbol, m_timeframe, "Indicator_SonicR_Dragon", m_dragonPeriod, m_trendPeriod);
  169 |     m_handle = m_dragonHandle; // Legacy compatibility
  170 |     
  171 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  172 |     {
  173 |         if (m_pLogger != NULL)
  174 |             m_pLogger->Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to create Enhanced Sonic R Dragon indicator handle");
  175 |         return false;
  176 |     }
  177 |     
  178 |     // Initialize higher timeframe analysis
  179 |     if (m_timeframe < PERIOD_H1)
  180 |         m_higherTimeframe = PERIOD_H1;
  181 |     else if (m_timeframe < PERIOD_D1)
  182 |         m_higherTimeframe = PERIOD_D1;
  183 |     else
  184 |         m_higherTimeframe = PERIOD_W1;
  185 |     
  186 |     InitializeMultiTimeframe(m_higherTimeframe);
  187 |     
  188 |     m_initialized = true;
  189 |     
  190 |     if (m_pLogger != NULL)
  191 |         m_pLogger->Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Enhanced Sonic R Dragon initialized successfully with multi-timeframe support");
  192 |     
  193 |     return true;
  194 | }
  195 | 
  196 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  197 | //| Initialize Multi-timeframe Analysis                             |
  198 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  199 | bool CSonicRDragon::InitializeMultiTimeframe(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES higherTf)
  200 | {
  201 |     m_higherTimeframe = higherTf;
  202 |     
  203 |     // Create higher timeframe Dragon handle
  204 |     m_higherTfHandle = iCustom(m_symbol, m_higherTimeframe, "Indicator_SonicR_Dragon", m_dragonPeriod, m_trendPeriod);
  205 |     
  206 |     if (m_higherTfHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  207 |     {
  208 |         if (m_pLogger != NULL)
  209 |             m_pLogger->Log(LOG_LEVEL_WARN, "Failed to create higher timeframe Dragon handle - continuing without MTF analysis");
  210 |         return false;
  211 |     }
  212 |     
  213 |     if (m_pLogger != NULL)
  214 |         m_pLogger->Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, StringFormat("Multi-timeframe Dragon analysis initialized for %s", EnumToString(higherTf)));
  215 |     
  216 |     return true;
  217 | }

  219 | void CSonicRDragon::Deinitialize()
  220 | {
  221 |     if (m_dragonHandle != INVALID_HANDLE)
  222 |     {
  223 |         IndicatorRelease(m_dragonHandle);
  224 |         m_dragonHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  225 |     }
  226 |     
  227 |     if (m_higherTfHandle != INVALID_HANDLE)
  228 |     {
  229 |         IndicatorRelease(m_higherTfHandle);
  230 |         m_higherTfHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  231 |     }
  232 |     
  233 |     m_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; // Legacy compatibility
  234 |     m_initialized = false;
  235 | 
  236 |     // Reset context
  237 |     ZeroMemory(m_context);
  238 | }

  240 | bool CSonicRDragon::CreateIndicator()
  241 | {
  242 |     // TГӘn file chб»ү bГЎo tГ№y chб»үnh (sбәҪ Д‘Ж°б»Јc tбәЎo б»ҹ bЖ°б»ӣc tiбәҝp theo)
  243 |     string indicator_path = "Indicator_SonicR_Dragon";
  244 | 
  245 |     m_handle = iCustom(m_symbol, m_timeframe, indicator_path, m_dragonPeriod, m_trendPeriod);
  246 | 
  247 |     return (m_handle != INVALID_HANDLE);
  248 | }
  249 | 
  250 | bool CSonicRDragon::GetDragonValues(const int shift, double &upper, double &middle, double &lower)
  251 | {
  252 |     if (m_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  253 | 
  254 |     double bufferUpper[1], bufferMiddle[1], bufferLower[1];
  255 | 
  256 |     // Copy data tб»« cГЎc buffer cб»§a chб»ү bГЎo
  257 |     // Buffer 0: Dragon Upper, Buffer 1: Dragon Middle, Buffer 2: Dragon Lower
  258 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_handle, 0, shift, 1, bufferUpper) <= 0 ||
  259 |         CopyBuffer(m_handle, 1, shift, 1, bufferMiddle) <= 0 ||
  260 |         CopyBuffer(m_handle, 2, shift, 1, bufferLower) <= 0)
  261 |     {
  262 |         return false;
  263 |     }
  264 | 
  265 |     upper = bufferUpper[0];
  266 |     middle = bufferMiddle[0];
  267 |     lower = bufferLower[0];
  268 | 
  269 |     return true;
  270 | }
  271 | 
  272 | bool CSonicRDragon::GetTrendValue(const int shift, double &trend)
  273 | {
  274 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  275 | 
  276 |     double bufferTrend[1];
  277 | 
  278 |     // Buffer 3: Trend Line
  279 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 3, shift, 1, bufferTrend) <= 0)
  280 |     {
  281 |         return false;
  282 |     }
  283 | 
  284 |     trend = bufferTrend[0];
  285 |     return true;
  286 | }
  287 | 
  288 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  289 | //| Enhanced Adaptive Dragon Angle Calculation                      |
  290 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  291 | double CSonicRDragon::CalculateAdaptiveDragonAngle(int lookback)
  292 | {
  293 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || !m_initialized)
  294 |         return 0.0;
  295 |     
  296 |     // Copy Dragon Middle buffer
  297 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 1, 0, lookback + 1, m_dragonMiddle) <= 0)
  298 |         return 0.0;
  299 |     
  300 |     // Get ATR for volatility adjustment
  301 |     int atrHandle = iATR(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_atrPeriod);
  302 |     double atrValues[];
  303 |     ArraySetAsSeries(atrValues, true);
  304 |     
  305 |     if (atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE && CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, atrValues) > 0)
  306 |     {
  307 |         double currentATR = atrValues[0];
  308 |         double avgPrice = (iHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0) + iLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0)) / 2.0;
  309 |         
  310 |         if (avgPrice > 0)
  311 |             m_adaptiveAngleFactor = 1.0 + (currentATR / avgPrice) * 10.0; // Volatility adjustment
  312 |         
  313 |         IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
  314 |     }
  315 |     
  316 |     // Calculate slope with adaptive factor
  317 |     double currentValue = m_context.dragonMiddle[0];
  318 |     double pastValue = m_context.dragonMiddle[lookback];
  319 |     
  320 |     if (pastValue == 0.0)
  321 |         return 0.0;
  322 |     
  323 |     // Enhanced slope calculation
  324 |     double slope = (currentValue - pastValue) / lookback;
  325 |     double adaptiveSlope = slope * m_adaptiveAngleFactor;
  326 |     
  327 |     // Calculate angle in degrees
  328 |     double angle = MathArctan(adaptiveSlope) * 180.0 / M_PI;
  329 |     
  330 |     // Smooth the angle for stability
  331 |     m_context.currentAngle = angle;
  332 |     m_context.smoothedAngle = (m_context.smoothedAngle * 0.7) + (angle * 0.3); // EMA smoothing
  333 |     
  334 |     // Calculate angle strength (0.0-1.0)
  335 |     m_context.angleStrength = MathMin(MathAbs(angle) / 45.0, 1.0); // Normalize to 45 degrees
  336 |     
  337 |     return m_context.smoothedAngle;
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  341 | //| Calculate Dragon Band Width                                     |
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | double CSonicRDragon::CalculateDragonWidth(int index)
  344 | {
  345 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || !m_initialized)
  346 |         return 0.0;
  347 |     
  348 |     // Copy Dragon buffers
  349 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 0, index, 1, m_context.dragonUpper) <= 0 ||
  350 |         CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 2, index, 1, m_context.dragonLower) <= 0)
  351 |         return 0.0;
  352 |     
  353 |     double width = m_context.dragonUpper[0] - m_context.dragonLower[0];
  354 |     
  355 |     if (index == 0)
  356 |     {
  357 |         m_context.dragonWidth = width;
  358 |         
  359 |         // Update average width (simple moving average)
  360 |         static double widthHistory[20];
  361 |         static int widthIndex = 0;
  362 |         
  363 |         widthHistory[widthIndex % 20] = width;
  364 |         widthIndex++;
  365 |         
  366 |         double totalWidth = 0.0;
  367 |         int count = MathMin(widthIndex, 20);
  368 |         for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
  369 |             totalWidth += widthHistory[i];
  370 |         
  371 |         m_context.avgDragonWidth = totalWidth / count;
  372 |     }
  373 |     
  374 |     return width;
  375 | }
  376 | 
  377 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  378 | //| Detect Dragon Squeeze (Bands Converging)                       |
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | bool CSonicRDragon::DetectDragonSqueeze(int lookback)
  381 | {
  382 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || !m_initialized)
  383 |         return false;
  384 |     
  385 |     // Calculate current and historical widths
  386 |     double currentWidth = CalculateDragonWidth(0);
  387 |     double pastWidth = CalculateDragonWidth(lookback);
  388 |     
  389 |     if (currentWidth <= 0.0 || pastWidth <= 0.0)
  390 |         return false;
  391 |     
  392 |     // Check if bands are converging
  393 |     double widthRatio = currentWidth / pastWidth;
  394 |     bool isConverging = widthRatio < 0.8; // 20% reduction in width
  395 |     
  396 |     // Check if current width is below average
  397 |     bool isBelowAverage = currentWidth < (m_context.avgDragonWidth * 0.7);
  398 |     
  399 |     m_context.isDragonSqueeze = isConverging && isBelowAverage;
  400 |     
  401 |     if (m_context.isDragonSqueeze && m_pLogger != NULL)
  402 |         m_pLogger->Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Dragon Squeeze detected - bands converging");
  403 |     
  404 |     return m_isDragonSqueeze;
  405 | }
  406 | 
  407 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  408 | //| Detect Dragon Breakout                                         |
  409 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  410 | bool CSonicRDragon::DetectDragonBreakout(int index)
  411 | {
  412 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || !m_initialized)
  413 |         return false;
  414 |     
  415 |     // Get current price and Dragon levels
  416 |     double currentClose = iClose(m_symbol, m_timeframe, index);
  417 |     
  418 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 0, index, 1, m_context.dragonUpper) <= 0 ||
  419 |         CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 2, index, 1, m_context.dragonLower) <= 0)
  420 |         return false;
  421 |     
  422 |     double upperLevel = m_context.dragonUpper[0];
  423 |     double lowerLevel = m_context.dragonLower[0];
  424 |     
  425 |     // Check for breakout
  426 |     bool bullishBreakout = currentClose > upperLevel;
  427 |     bool bearishBreakout = currentClose < lowerLevel;
  428 |     
  429 |     m_context.isDragonBreakout = bullishBreakout || bearishBreakout;
  430 |     
  431 |     if (m_context.isDragonBreakout && m_pLogger != NULL)
  432 |     {
  433 |         string breakoutType = bullishBreakout ? "Bullish" : "Bearish";
  434 |         m_pLogger->Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, StringFormat("%s Dragon Breakout detected at %.5f", breakoutType, currentClose));
  435 |     }
  436 |     
  437 |     return m_isDragonBreakout;
  438 | }
  439 | 
  440 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  441 | //| Get Dragon Strength Based on Multiple Factors                  |
  442 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  443 | double CSonicRDragon::GetDragonStrength(int index)
  444 | {
  445 |     if (m_dragonHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || !m_initialized)
  446 |         return 0.0;
  447 |     
  448 |     double strength = 0.0;
  449 |     
  450 |     // Factor 1: Angle strength (40%)
  451 |     strength += m_context.angleStrength * 0.4;
  452 |     
  453 |     // Factor 2: Width relative to average (30%)
  454 |     double currentWidth = CalculateDragonWidth(index);
  455 |     if (m_context.avgDragonWidth > 0)
  456 |     {
  457 |         double widthRatio = currentWidth / m_context.avgDragonWidth;
  458 |         double widthStrength = MathMin(widthRatio, 2.0) / 2.0; // Normalize to 0-1
  459 |         strength += widthStrength * 0.3;
  460 |     }
  461 |     
  462 |     // Factor 3: Trend consistency (30%)
  463 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_dragonHandle, 3, index, 5, m_context.trendLine) > 0)
  464 |     {
  465 |         bool trendConsistent = true;
  466 |         for (int i = 1; i < 5; i++)
  467 |         {
  468 |             if ((m_context.trendLine[0] > m_context.trendLine[i-1] && m_context.trendLine[i] < m_context.trendLine[i-1]) ||
  469 |                 (m_context.trendLine[0] < m_context.trendLine[i-1] && m_context.trendLine[i] > m_context.trendLine[i-1]))
  470 |             {
  471 |                 trendConsistent = false;
  472 |                 break;
  473 |             }
  474 |         }
  475 |         strength += (trendConsistent ? 1.0 : 0.5) * 0.3;
  476 |     }
  477 |     
  478 |     return MathMin(strength, 1.0);
  479 | }
  480 | 
  481 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  482 | //| Multi-timeframe Analysis Methods                                |
  483 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  484 | bool CSonicRDragon::IsHigherTimeframeBullish()
  485 | {
  486 |     if (m_higherTfHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  487 |         return true; // Default to true if no higher TF data
  488 |     
  489 |     double htfTrend;
  490 |     if (GetTrendValue(0, htfTrend))
  491 |     {
  492 |         return htfTrend > 0;
  493 |     }
  494 |     
  495 |     return true;
  496 | }
  497 | 
  498 | bool CSonicRDragon::IsHigherTimeframeBearish()
  499 | {
  500 |     if (m_higherTfHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  501 |         return true; // Default to true if no higher TF data
  502 |     
  503 |     double htfTrend;
  504 |     if (GetTrendValue(0, htfTrend))
  505 |     {
  506 |         return htfTrend < 0;
  507 |     }
  508 |     
  509 |     return true;
  510 | }
  511 | 
  512 | double CSonicRDragon::GetHigherTfTrend()
  513 | {
  514 |     if (m_higherTfHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  515 |         return 0.0;
  516 |     
  517 |     double bufferTrend[1];
  518 |     if (CopyBuffer(m_higherTfHandle, 3, 0, 1, bufferTrend) > 0)
  519 |     {
  520 |         return bufferTrend[0];
  521 |     }
  522 |     
  523 |     return 0.0;
  524 | }
  525 | 
  526 | // End of namespace removal
  527 |

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|           Analysis_SonicR_DragonBand.mqh - Dragon Band Module    |
    3 | //|                  APEX Pullback EA v4.6 - Refactored              |
    4 | //|      "Refactored for Flat Architecture and DSI Pattern"          |

    7 | #ifndef APEX_ANALYSIS_SONICR_DRAGONBAND_MQH_
    8 | #define APEX_ANALYSIS_SONICR_DRAGONBAND_MQH_

   10 | #include "Core_Defines.mqh"
   11 | #include "Core_Logger.mqh"
   12 | #include "Analysis_Indicators.mqh" // Corrected path if needed

   14 | // Namespace removed for global scope compatibility
   15 | 
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | //| CSonicRDragonBand - Refactored for Dependency Injection          |
   18 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   19 | class CSonicRDragonBand
   20 | {
   21 | private:
   22 |     bool                    m_initialized;
   23 |     CLogger*                m_pLogger;
   24 |     CIndicators*            m_pIndicators; // Using the correct class name CIndicators
   25 |     
   26 |     // Configuration from Core_Inputs.mqh (passed via methods)
   27 |     int                     m_emaPeriod;
   28 |     int                     m_atrPeriod;
   29 |     double                  m_volatilityMultiplier;
   30 |     int                     m_anglePeriod;
   31 |     double                  m_minAngle;
   32 | 
   33 |     // Buffers for storing indicator data retrieved from CAppIndicators
   34 |     double                  m_bufEMAHigh[];
   35 |     double                  m_bufEMALow[];
   36 |     double                  m_bufEMAClose[];
   37 |     double                  m_bufATR[];
   38 | 
   39 |     // Internal state
   40 |     SDragonBandInfo         m_dragonBandInfo;
   41 | 
   42 | public:
   43 |     CSonicRDragonBand() : m_initialized(false), m_pLogger(NULL), m_pIndicators(NULL),
   44 |                           m_emaPeriod(34), m_atrPeriod(14), m_volatilityMultiplier(2.0),
   45 |                           m_anglePeriod(5), m_minAngle(1.5)
   46 |     {
   47 |         // Set buffers to be used as series arrays
   48 |         ArraySetAsSeries(m_bufEMAHigh, true);
   49 |         ArraySetAsSeries(m_bufEMALow, true);
   50 |         ArraySetAsSeries(m_bufEMAClose, true);
   51 |         ArraySetAsSeries(m_bufATR, true);
   52 |     }
   53 |     
   54 |     ~CSonicRDragonBand() {}
   55 |     
   56 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   57 |     //| Initialize with dependencies                                     |
   58 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   59 |     bool Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CIndicators* pIndicators)
   60 |     {
   61 |         if(!pLogger || !pIndicators)
   62 |         {
   63 |             Print("ERROR: CSonicRDragonBand::Initialize - NULL pointers received");
   64 |             return false;
   65 |         }
   66 |         
   67 |         m_pLogger = pLogger;
   68 |         m_pIndicators = pIndicators;
   69 |         
   70 |         // Configuration can be set via a dedicated method after initialization
   71 |         
   72 |         m_initialized = true;
   73 |         LOG_INFO("CSonicRDragonBand initialized successfully");
   74 |         return true;
   75 |     }
   76 |     
   77 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 |     //| Set configuration parameters                                     |
   79 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   80 |     void SetConfig(int emaPeriod, int atrPeriod, double volMultiplier, int anglePeriod, double minAngle)
   81 |     {
   82 |         m_emaPeriod = emaPeriod;
   83 |         m_atrPeriod = atrPeriod;
   84 |         m_volatilityMultiplier = volMultiplier;
   85 |         m_anglePeriod = anglePeriod;
   86 |         m_minAngle = minAngle;
   87 |     }
   88 | 
   89 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   90 |     //| Main analysis method                                             |
   91 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   92 |     bool Update(const int shift)
   93 |     {
   94 |         return Analyze(shift, m_dragonBandInfo);
   95 |     }
   96 | 
   97 |     // Data Access
   98 |     SDragonBandInfo* GetContext() { return &m_dragonBandInfo; }
   99 | 
  100 | private:
  101 |     bool Analyze(const int shift, SDragonBandInfo& bandInfo)
  102 |     {
  103 |         if(!m_initialized || !m_pIndicators)
  104 |         {
  105 |             return false;
  106 |         }
  107 | 
  108 |         // 1. Get required data from the Indicators module
  109 |         // This part needs to be adapted to the actual methods available in CIndicators
  110 |         // For now, we assume direct access to buffers after CIndicators::OnTick() is called.
  111 |         m_pIndicators.RefreshData(); // Ensure data is fresh
  112 | 
  113 |         // We will use the getter methods from CIndicators
  114 |         bandInfo.upperBand = m_pIndicators.GetDragonHigh(shift);
  115 |         bandInfo.lowerBand = m_pIndicators.GetDragonLow(shift);
  116 |         bandInfo.middleBand = m_pIndicators.GetDragonClose(shift);
  117 |         // ATR is not part of the current CIndicators, this will need to be added or handled differently.
  118 |         // For now, we'll use a placeholder.
  119 |         bandInfo.currentVolatility = 0.0; // Placeholder
  120 | 
  121 | 
  122 |         // 2. Populate the core values
  123 |         bandInfo.upperBand = m_bufEMAHigh[shift];
  124 |         bandInfo.lowerBand = m_bufEMALow[shift];
  125 |         bandInfo.middleBand = m_bufEMAClose[shift];
  126 |         bandInfo.currentVolatility = m_bufATR[shift];
  127 |         bandInfo.bandWidth = bandInfo.upperBand - bandInfo.lowerBand;
  128 |         
  129 |         // 3. Update dynamic state (expansion/contraction)
  130 |         double prev_width = m_bufEMAHigh[shift+1] - m_bufEMALow[shift+1];
  131 |         if(prev_width > 0)
  132 |         {
  133 |             bandInfo.isExpanding = bandInfo.bandWidth > prev_width;
  134 |             bandInfo.isContracting = bandInfo.bandWidth < prev_width;
  135 |         }
  136 | 
  137 |         // 4. Analyze Trend Angle
  138 |         double current_price = m_bufEMAClose[shift];
  139 |         double past_price = m_bufEMAClose[shift + m_anglePeriod];
  140 |         if(current_price > 0 && past_price > 0)
  141 |         {
  142 |             double slope = (current_price - past_price) / m_anglePeriod;
  143 |             bandInfo.angle = MathArctan(slope / current_price * 10000) * 180 / M_PI;
  144 |         }
  145 | 
  146 |         if(bandInfo.angle > m_minAngle) bandInfo.trendState = DRAGON_TREND_UP;
  147 |         else if(bandInfo.angle < -m_minAngle) bandInfo.trendState = DRAGON_TREND_DOWN;
  148 |         else bandInfo.trendState = DRAGON_TREND_NONE;
  149 | 
  150 |         // 5. Detect Breakouts
  151 |         MqlRates rates[];
  152 |         if(CopyRates(Symbol(), Period(), shift, 2, rates) == 2)
  153 |         {
  154 |             if(rates[0].close > bandInfo.upperBand && rates[1].close <= m_bufEMAHigh[shift+1])
  155 |                 bandInfo.breakoutState = DRAGON_BREAKOUT_UP;
  156 |             else if(rates[0].close < bandInfo.lowerBand && rates[1].close >= m_bufEMALow[shift+1])
  157 |                 bandInfo.breakoutState = DRAGON_BREAKOUT_DOWN;
  158 |             else
  159 |                 bandInfo.breakoutState = DRAGON_BREAKOUT_NONE;
  160 |         }
  161 | 
  162 |         return true;
  163 |     }
  164 | };
  165 | 
  166 | // End of removed namespace
  167 | #endif // APEX_ANALYSIS_SONICR_DRAGONBAND_MQH_
  168 |

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                    Analysis_SonicR_MarketStructure.mqh |
    3 | //|                            Sonic R Market Structure Analysis            |
    4 | //|                     Based on Sonic R System Documentation               |

    6 | #ifndef ANALYSIS_SONICR_MARKETSTRUCTURE_MQH
    7 | #define ANALYSIS_SONICR_MARKETSTRUCTURE_MQH
