   10 | #include "SMC_Structures.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| Market Structure States                                          |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | enum ENUM_MARKET_STRUCTURE_STATE {
   16 |     STRUCTURE_UNDEFINED = 0,
   17 |     STRUCTURE_UPTREND,          // Higher Highs, Higher Lows
   18 |     STRUCTURE_DOWNTREND,        // Lower Highs, Lower Lows  
   19 |     STRUCTURE_RANGING,          // Sideways movement
   20 |     STRUCTURE_TRANSITIONAL      // Changing structure
   21 | };
   22 | 
   23 | enum ENUM_STRUCTURE_BREAK_TYPE {
   24 |     BREAK_NONE = 0,
   25 |     BREAK_BULLISH,              // Break of previous high
   26 |     BREAK_BEARISH,              // Break of previous low
   27 |     BREAK_FALSE                 // False breakout
   28 | };
   29 | 
   30 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   31 | //| Structure Point Definition                                       |
   32 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   33 | struct SStructurePoint {
   34 |     datetime time;
   35 |     double price;
   36 |     bool isHigh;
   37 |     double strength;
   38 |     bool isConfirmed;
   39 |     bool isBroken;
   40 |     datetime breakTime;
   41 | };
   42 | 
   43 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   44 | //| Sonic R Market Structure Analyzer                              |
   45 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   46 | class CSonicRMarketStructure {
   47 | private:
   48 |     // Configuration
   49 |     int m_swingStrength;
   50 |     int m_lookbackPeriods;
   51 |     double m_minStrengthThreshold;
   52 |     
   53 |     // Structure tracking
   54 |     SStructurePoint m_structurePoints[];
   55 |     ENUM_MARKET_STRUCTURE_STATE m_currentState;
   56 |     ENUM_STRUCTURE_BREAK_TYPE m_lastBreakType;
   57 |     
   58 |     // Analysis buffers
   59 |     double m_highs[];
   60 |     double m_lows[];
   61 |     datetime m_times[];
   62 |     
   63 | public:
   64 |     CSonicRMarketStructure();
   65 |     ~CSonicRMarketStructure();
   66 |     
   67 |     // Initialization
   68 |     bool Initialize(int swingStrength = 5, int lookback = 100);
   69 |     void Deinitialize();
   70 |     
   71 |     // Main analysis functions
   72 |     bool AnalyzeMarketStructure();
   73 |     bool UpdateStructurePoints();
   74 |     bool DetectStructureBreaks();
   75 |     
   76 |     // Structure identification
   77 |     bool IsSwingHigh(int shift);
   78 |     bool IsSwingLow(int shift);
   79 |     double CalculateSwingStrength(int shift, bool isHigh);
   80 |

   84 |

   87 |     bool IsStructureSupporting(ENUM_SIGNAL_DIRECTION direction);
   88 |

   91 |     ENUM_STRUCTURE_BREAK_TYPE GetLastBreakType() const { return m_lastBreakType; }
   92 |     SStructurePoint GetLastStructurePoint();

   98 | 
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | //| Constructor                                                      |

  102 | CSonicRMarketStructure::CSonicRMarketStructure() {
  103 |     m_swingStrength = 5;

  105 |     m_minStrengthThreshold = 0.5;
  106 |     m_currentState = STRUCTURE_UNDEFINED;
  107 |     m_lastBreakType = BREAK_NONE;

  116 | 
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | //| Initialize Market Structure Analysis                             |
  119 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  120 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::Initialize(int swingStrength = 5, int lookback = 100) {
  121 |     m_swingStrength = swingStrength;
  122 |     m_lookbackPeriods = lookback;
  123 |     
  124 |     // Resize arrays
  125 |     ArrayResize(m_structurePoints, 0);
  126 |     ArrayResize(m_highs, lookback);
  127 |     ArrayResize(m_lows, lookback);
  128 |     ArrayResize(m_times, lookback);
  129 |     
  130 |     APEX_LOG_INFO("Market Structure analyzer initialized - Swing: " + IntegerToString(swingStrength));
  131 |     return true;
  132 | }
  133 | 
  134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  135 | //| Analyze Market Structure - Main Function                        |
  136 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  137 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::AnalyzeMarketStructure() {
  138 |     if (!UpdateStructurePoints()) {
  139 |         return false;
  140 |     }
  141 |     
  142 |     if (!DetectStructureBreaks()) {
  143 |         return false;
  144 |     }
  145 |     
  146 |     m_currentState = DetermineMarketState();
  147 |     return true;
  148 | }
  149 | 
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | //| Update Structure Points                                          |
  152 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  153 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::UpdateStructurePoints() {
  154 |     for (int i = m_swingStrength; i < m_lookbackPeriods - m_swingStrength; i++) {
  155 |         // Check for swing high
  156 |         if (IsSwingHigh(i)) {
  157 |             SStructurePoint point;
  158 |             point.time = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  159 |             point.price = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  160 |             point.isHigh = true;
  161 |             point.strength = CalculateSwingStrength(i, true);
  162 |             point.isConfirmed = true;
  163 |             point.isBroken = false;
  164 |             
  165 |             if (point.strength >= m_minStrengthThreshold) {
  166 |                 int size = ArraySize(m_structurePoints);
  167 |                 ArrayResize(m_structurePoints, size + 1);
  168 |                 m_structurePoints[size] = point;
  169 |             }
  170 |         }
  171 |         
  172 |         // Check for swing low
  173 |         if (IsSwingLow(i)) {
  174 |             SStructurePoint point;
  175 |             point.time = iTime(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  176 |             point.price = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, i);
  177 |             point.isHigh = false;
  178 |             point.strength = CalculateSwingStrength(i, false);
  179 |             point.isConfirmed = true;
  180 |             point.isBroken = false;
  181 |             
  182 |             if (point.strength >= m_minStrengthThreshold) {
  183 |                 int size = ArraySize(m_structurePoints);
  184 |                 ArrayResize(m_structurePoints, size + 1);
  185 |                 m_structurePoints[size] = point;
  186 |             }
  187 |         }
  188 |     }
  189 |     
  190 |     return true;
  191 | }
  192 | 
  193 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  194 | //| Check if bar is swing high                                      |
  195 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  196 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::IsSwingHigh(int shift) {
  197 |     double centerHigh = iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift);
  198 |     
  199 |     // Check left side
  200 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_swingStrength; i++) {
  201 |         if (iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift + i) >= centerHigh) {
  202 |             return false;
  203 |         }
  204 |     }
  205 |     
  206 |     // Check right side
  207 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_swingStrength; i++) {
  208 |         if (iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift - i) >= centerHigh) {
  209 |             return false;
  210 |         }
  211 |     }
  212 |     
  213 |     return true;
  214 | }
  215 | 
  216 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  217 | //| Check if bar is swing low                                       |
  218 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  219 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::IsSwingLow(int shift) {
  220 |     double centerLow = iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift);
  221 |     
  222 |     // Check left side
  223 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_swingStrength; i++) {
  224 |         if (iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift + i) <= centerLow) {
  225 |             return false;
  226 |         }
  227 |     }
  228 |     
  229 |     // Check right side
  230 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_swingStrength; i++) {
  231 |         if (iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift - i) <= centerLow) {
  232 |             return false;
  233 |         }
  234 |     }
  235 |     
  236 |     return true;
  237 | }
  238 | 
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | //| Calculate swing strength                                         |
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | double CSonicRMarketStructure::CalculateSwingStrength(int shift, bool isHigh) {
  243 |     double strength = 0.0;
  244 |     double referencePrice = isHigh ? iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift) : 
  245 |                                    iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift);
  246 |     
  247 |     // Calculate based on price difference and volume
  248 |     double avgPrice = 0.0;
  249 |     for (int i = 1; i <= m_swingStrength; i++) {
  250 |         avgPrice += (iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift + i) + 
  251 |                     iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift + i)) / 2.0;
  252 |         avgPrice += (iHigh(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift - i) + 
  253 |                     iLow(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, shift - i)) / 2.0;
  254 |     }
  255 |     avgPrice /= (m_swingStrength * 2);
  256 |     
  257 |     strength = MathAbs(referencePrice - avgPrice) / (avgPrice * 0.01); // Normalize to percentage
  258 |     
  259 |     return MathMin(strength, 1.0); // Cap at 1.0
  260 | }
  261 | 
  262 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  263 | //| Determine Market State                                           |
  264 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  265 | ENUM_MARKET_STRUCTURE_STATE CSonicRMarketStructure::DetermineMarketState() {
  266 |     int pointsCount = ArraySize(m_structurePoints);
  267 |     if (pointsCount < 4) {
  268 |         return STRUCTURE_UNDEFINED;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     // Analyze last 4 structure points for trend
  272 |     bool higherHighs = true, higherLows = true;
  273 |     bool lowerHighs = true, lowerLows = true;
  274 |     
  275 |     for (int i = pointsCount - 3; i < pointsCount; i++) {
  276 |         if (i <= 0) continue;
  277 |         
  278 |         SStructurePoint current = m_structurePoints[i];
  279 |         SStructurePoint previous = m_structurePoints[i-1];
  280 |         
  281 |         if (current.isHigh == previous.isHigh) {
  282 |             if (current.isHigh) {
  283 |                 // Comparing highs
  284 |                 if (current.price <= previous.price) higherHighs = false;
  285 |                 if (current.price >= previous.price) lowerHighs = false;
  286 |             } else {
  287 |                 // Comparing lows
  288 |                 if (current.price <= previous.price) higherLows = false;
  289 |                 if (current.price >= previous.price) lowerLows = false;
  290 |             }
  291 |         }
  292 |     }
  293 |     
  294 |     if (higherHighs && higherLows) {
  295 |         return STRUCTURE_UPTREND;
  296 |     } else if (lowerHighs && lowerLows) {
  297 |         return STRUCTURE_DOWNTREND;
  298 |     } else {
  299 |         return STRUCTURE_RANGING;
  300 |     }
  301 | }
  302 | 
  303 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  304 | //| Check if trend is confirmed for Sonic R                         |
  305 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  306 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::IsTrendConfirmed(ENUM_SIGNAL_DIRECTION direction) {
  307 |     if (direction == SIGNAL_DIRECTION_BUY) {
  308 |         return (m_currentState == STRUCTURE_UPTREND);
  309 |     } else if (direction == SIGNAL_DIRECTION_SELL) {
  310 |         return (m_currentState == STRUCTURE_DOWNTREND);
  311 |     }
  312 |     
  313 |     return false;
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 | //| Check if structure supports signal direction                    |
  318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::IsStructureSupporting(ENUM_SIGNAL_DIRECTION direction) {
  320 |     if (m_currentState == STRUCTURE_RANGING) {
  321 |         return false; // No clear structure in ranging market
  322 |     }
  323 |     
  324 |     return IsTrendConfirmed(direction);
  325 | }
  326 | 
  327 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  328 | //| Get state as string                                              |
  329 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  330 | string CSonicRMarketStructure::GetStateString() const {
  331 |     switch(m_currentState) {
  332 |         case STRUCTURE_UPTREND: return "UPTREND";
  333 |         case STRUCTURE_DOWNTREND: return "DOWNTREND";
  334 |         case STRUCTURE_RANGING: return "RANGING";
  335 |         case STRUCTURE_TRANSITIONAL: return "TRANSITIONAL";
  336 |         default: return "UNDEFINED";
  337 |     }
  338 | }
  339 | 
  340 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  341 | //| Detect Structure Breaks                                         |
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | bool CSonicRMarketStructure::DetectStructureBreaks() {
  344 |     double currentPrice = iClose(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
  345 |     int pointsCount = ArraySize(m_structurePoints);
  346 |     
  347 |     if (pointsCount < 2) return false;
  348 |     
  349 |     // Check recent structure points for breaks
  350 |     for (int i = pointsCount - 1; i >= MathMax(0, pointsCount - 5); i--) {
  351 |         SStructurePoint &point = m_structurePoints[i];
  352 |         
  353 |         if (!point.isBroken) {
  354 |             if (point.isHigh && currentPrice > point.price) {
  355 |                 point.isBroken = true;
  356 |                 point.breakTime = TimeCurrent();
  357 |                 m_lastBreakType = BREAK_BULLISH;
  358 |                 APEX_LOG_INFO("Bullish structure break at " + DoubleToStr(point.price, _Digits));
  359 |             } else if (!point.isHigh && currentPrice < point.price) {
  360 |                 point.isBroken = true;
  361 |                 point.breakTime = TimeCurrent();
  362 |                 m_lastBreakType = BREAK_BEARISH;
  363 |                 APEX_LOG_INFO("Bearish structure break at " + DoubleToStr(point.price, _Digits));
  364 |             }
  365 |         }
  366 |     }
  367 |     
  368 |     return true;
  369 | }
  370 | 
  371 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  372 | //| Log structure analysis                                          |
  373 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  374 | void CSonicRMarketStructure::LogStructureAnalysis() const {
  375 |     string message = "Market Structure: " + GetStateString() + 
  376 |                     " | Points: " + IntegerToString(ArraySize(m_structurePoints)) +
  377 |                     " | Last Break: " + IntegerToString(m_lastBreakType);
  378 |     
  379 |     APEX_LOG_DEBUG(message);
  380 | }
  381 | 
  382 | #endif // ANALYSIS_SONICR_MARKETSTRUCTURE_MQH

  157 |                                          m_signalPeriod(9),
  158 |                                          m_overboughtLevel(0.005), // Adjusted for MACD-style values
  159 |                                          m_oversoldLevel(-0.005),
  160 |                                          m_divergenceLookback(50)

  164 |     ArraySetAsSeries(m_signalBuffer, true);

  179 | bool CSonicROscillator::Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CAppIndicators* pIndicators, CAppSymbolInfo* pSymbolInfo, CSonicRWavePattern* pWavePattern)
  180 | {
  181 |     if(!pLogger || !pIndicators || !pSymbolInfo || !pWavePattern)
  182 |     {
  183 |         Print("ERROR: CSonicROscillator::Initialize - NULL pointers received");
  184 |         return false;
  185 |     }
  186 |     m_pLogger = pLogger;
  187 |     m_pIndicators = pIndicators;
  188 |     m_pSymbolInfo = pSymbolInfo;
  189 |     m_pWavePattern = pWavePattern;
  190 | 
  191 |     LOG_INFO("CSonicROscillator initialized successfully.");
  192 |     return true;
  193 | }

  199 | {
  200 |     // Buffers are automatically managed
  201 | }
  202 | 
  203 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  204 | //| SetPeriods                                                       |
  205 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  206 | void CSonicROscillator::SetPeriods(int fast, int slow, int signal)
  207 | {
  208 |     m_fastPeriod = fast;
  209 |     m_slowPeriod = slow;
  210 |     m_signalPeriod = signal;
  211 | }
  212 | 
  213 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  214 | //| Update                                                           |
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | bool CSonicROscillator::Update(const int shift)
  217 | {
  218 |     if(!CalculateOscillator(shift)) return false;
  219 |     UpdateOscillatorState(shift);
  220 |     DetectDivergence(shift);
  221 |     return true;
  222 | }
  223 | 
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | //| CalculateOscillator                                              |
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | bool CSonicROscillator::CalculateOscillator(const int shift)
  228 | {
  229 |     int needed_bars = m_pSymbolInfo.Bars() - shift;
  230 |     if (needed_bars <= m_slowPeriod + m_signalPeriod) return false;
  231 | 
  232 |     if(m_pIndicators.GetEMA(PRICE_CLOSE, m_fastPeriod, shift, needed_bars, m_fastEmaBuffer) < needed_bars ||
  233 |        m_pIndicators.GetEMA(PRICE_CLOSE, m_slowPeriod, shift, needed_bars, m_slowEmaBuffer) < needed_bars)
  234 |     {
  235 |         LOG_WARN(*m_pLogger, "Could not get EMA data.", __FUNCTION__);
  236 |         return false;
  237 |     }
  238 | 
  239 |     for(int i = 0; i < needed_bars; i++)
  240 |     {
  241 |         m_mainBuffer[i] = m_fastEmaBuffer[i] - m_slowEmaBuffer[i];
  242 |     }
  243 |     
  244 |     if(m_pIndicators.GetEMAOnArray(m_mainBuffer, needed_bars, m_signalPeriod, 0, m_signalBuffer) < needed_bars)
  245 |     {
  246 |         LOG_WARN(*m_pLogger, "Could not calculate signal line.", __FUNCTION__);
  247 |         return false;
  248 |     }
  249 | 
  250 |     for(int i = 0; i < needed_bars; i++)
  251 |     {
  252 |         m_histogramBuffer[i] = m_mainBuffer[i] - m_signalBuffer[i];
  253 |     }
  254 | 
  255 |     return true;
  256 | }
  257 | 
  258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  259 | //| UpdateOscillatorState                                            |
  260 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  261 | void CSonicROscillator::UpdateOscillatorState(const int shift)
  262 | {
  263 |     m_context.oscillator.value = m_mainBuffer[shift];
  264 |     m_context.oscillator.signal = m_signalBuffer[shift];
  265 |     m_context.oscillator.histogram = m_histogramBuffer[shift];
  266 |     m_context.oscillator.lastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  267 | 
  268 |     m_context.oscillator.isBullish = m_context.oscillator.value > m_context.oscillator.signal;
  269 |     m_context.oscillator.isBearish = m_context.oscillator.value < m_context.oscillator.signal;
  270 | 
  271 |     m_context.oscillator.isOverbought = m_context.oscillator.value > m_overboughtLevel;
  272 |     m_context.oscillator.isOversold = m_context.oscillator.value < m_oversoldLevel;
  273 | 
  274 |     if(m_context.oscillator.isOverbought) m_context.oscillator.state = OSC_OVERBOUGHT;
  275 |     else if(m_context.oscillator.isOversold) m_context.oscillator.state = OSC_OVERSOLD;
  276 |     else if(m_context.oscillator.isBullish) m_context.oscillator.state = OSC_BULLISH_MOMENTUM;
  277 |     else if(m_context.oscillator.isBearish) m_context.oscillator.state = OSC_BEARISH_MOMENTUM;
  278 |     else m_context.oscillator.state = OSC_NEUTRAL;
  279 | }
  280 | 
  281 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  282 | //| DetectDivergence                                                 |
  283 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  284 | bool CSonicROscillator::DetectDivergence(const int shift)
  285 | {
  286 |     if(!m_pWavePattern) return false;
  287 | 
  288 |     m_context.divergence.isActive = false;
  289 |     m_context.divergence.type = DIV_NONE;
  290 | 
  291 |     CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePoint swingPoints[4];
  292 |     if(m_pWavePattern.GetSwingPoints(swingPoints, 4) < 4) return true; 
  293 | 
  294 |     CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePoint lastHigh, prevHigh, lastLow, prevLow;
  295 |     int highsFound = 0, lowsFound = 0;
  296 | 
  297 |     for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
  298 |     {
  299 |         if(swingPoints[i].isHigh)
  300 |         {
  301 |             if(highsFound == 0) lastHigh = swingPoints[i];
  302 |             else if(highsFound == 1) prevHigh = swingPoints[i];
  303 |             highsFound++;
  304 |         }
  305 |         if(swingPoints[i].isLow)
  306 |         {
  307 |             if(lowsFound == 0) lastLow = swingPoints[i];
  308 |             else if(lowsFound == 1) prevLow = swingPoints[i];
  309 |             lowsFound++;
  310 |         }
  311 |     }
  312 | 
  313 |     int searchWindow = 3;
  314 | 
  315 |     if(highsFound >= 2)
  316 |     {
  317 |         double lastHighOsc = FindOscillatorPeak(lastHigh.barIndex, searchWindow, true);
  318 |         double prevHighOsc = FindOscillatorPeak(prevHigh.barIndex, searchWindow, true);
  319 | 
  320 |         if (lastHigh.price > prevHigh.price && lastHighOsc < prevHighOsc)
  321 |         {
  322 |             m_context.divergence.isActive = true;
  323 |             m_context.divergence.type = DIV_BEARISH_REGULAR;
  324 |             m_context.divergence.startTime = prevHigh.time;
  325 |             m_context.divergence.endTime = lastHigh.time;
  326 |             m_context.divergence.priceStart = prevHigh.price;
  327 |             m_context.divergence.priceEnd = lastHigh.price;
  328 |             m_context.divergence.oscStart = prevHighOsc;
  329 |             m_context.divergence.oscEnd = lastHighOsc;
  330 |             m_context.divergence.strength = 0.75; // Placeholder strength
  331 |             LOG_INFO("Regular Bearish Divergence Detected.");
  332 |             return true;
  333 |         }
  334 |     }
  335 | 
  336 |     if(lowsFound >= 2)
  337 |     {
  338 |         double lastLowOsc = FindOscillatorPeak(lastLow.barIndex, searchWindow, false);
  339 |         double prevLowOsc = FindOscillatorPeak(prevLow.barIndex, searchWindow, false);
  340 | 
  341 |         if (lastLow.price < prevLow.price && lastLowOsc > prevLowOsc)
  342 |         {
  343 |             m_context.divergence.isActive = true;
  344 |             m_context.divergence.type = DIV_BULLISH_REGULAR;
  345 |             m_context.divergence.startTime = prevLow.time;
  346 |             m_context.divergence.endTime = lastLow.time;
  347 |             m_context.divergence.priceStart = prevLow.price;
  348 |             m_context.divergence.priceEnd = lastLow.price;
  349 |             m_context.divergence.oscStart = prevLowOsc;
  350 |             m_context.divergence.oscEnd = lastLowOsc;
  351 |             m_context.divergence.strength = 0.75; // Placeholder strength
  352 |             LOG_INFO("Regular Bullish Divergence Detected.");
  353 |             return true;
  354 |         }
  355 |     }
  356 | 
  357 |     return true;
  358 | }
  359 | 
  360 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  361 | //| FindOscillatorPeak (Helper function)                             |
  362 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  363 | double CSonicROscillator::FindOscillatorPeak(int startIdx, int window, bool findMax)
  364 | {
  365 |     double peakValue = findMax ? -DBL_MAX : DBL_MAX;
  366 |     int searchStart = MathMax(0, startIdx - window);
  367 |     int searchEnd = MathMin(ArraySize(m_mainBuffer) - 1, startIdx + window);
  368 | 
  369 |     for(int i = searchStart; i <= searchEnd; i++)
  370 |     {
  371 |         if(findMax)
  372 |         {
  373 |             if(m_mainBuffer[i] > peakValue) peakValue = m_mainBuffer[i];
  374 |         }
  375 |         else
  376 |         {
  377 |             if(m_mainBuffer[i] < peakValue) peakValue = m_mainBuffer[i];
  378 |         }
  379 |     }
  380 |     return peakValue;
  381 | }
  382 | 
  383 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  384 | //| GetOscillatorInfo                                                |
  385 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  386 | 
  387 | 
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | //| GetDivergenceInfo                                                |
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | 
  392 | 
  393 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  394 | //| LogOscillatorState                                               |
  395 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  396 | void CSonicROscillator::LogOscillatorState()
  397 | {
  398 |     string stateStr = EnumToString(m_context.oscillator.state);
  399 |     string message = StringFormat("Oscillator State: %s | Val: %.5f | Sig: %.5f | Hist: %.5f",
  400 |                                   stateStr, m_context.oscillator.value, m_context.oscillator.signal, m_context.oscillator.histogram);
  401 |     LOG_INFO(message);
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 |

рҹ“„ File: Analysis_SonicR_PVSRA.mqh
рҹ”— ДҗЖ°б»қng dбә«n Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\Sonic R_MC\01_SONIC R_MC_FINAL\Analysis_SonicR_PVSRA.mqh

рҹ“Ҡ Thб»‘ng kГӘ: 229 dГІng, 9088 kГҪ tб»ұ, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|       Analysis_SonicR_PVSRA.mqh - Volume Price Swing Rhythm      |
    3 | //|                  APEX Pullback EA v4.6 - Refactored              |
    4 | //|      "Refactored for Flat Architecture and DSI Pattern"          |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | 
    7 | #ifndef APEX_ANALYSIS_SONICR_PVSRA_MQH_
    8 | #define APEX_ANALYSIS_SONICR_PVSRA_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | #include "Core_Defines.mqh"
   11 | #include "Core_Logger.mqh"
   12 | #include "Core_SymbolInfo.mqh" // Dependency for Symbol/Period info
   13 | #include "Analysis_SonicR_WavePattern.mqh" // Dependency for swing points
   14 | 
   15 | // Define the rhythm state between price and volume
   16 | enum ENUM_VPSRA_RHYTHM_STATE
   17 | {
   18 |     RHYTHM_UNKNOWN,                 // Not enough data or undefined state
   19 |     RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BULLISH,     // Strong up-move confirmed by high volume
   20 |     RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BEARISH,     // Strong down-move confirmed by high volume
   21 |     RHYTHM_DIVERGENCE_BULLISH,      // Down-move on low volume (potential reversal)
   22 |     RHYTHM_DIVERGENCE_BEARISH,      // Up-move on low volume (potential reversal)
   23 |     RHYTHM_EXHAUSTION_TOP,          // Climax volume on up-move (potential top)
   24 |     RHYTHM_EXHAUSTION_BOTTOM        // Climax volume on down-move (potential bottom)
   25 | };
   26 | 
   27 | // Structure to hold the final analysis result
   28 | struct SVPSRAInfo
   29 | {
   30 |     ENUM_VPSRA_RHYTHM_STATE rhythmState;    // The determined market rhythm
   31 |     double                  rhythmScore;    // A numerical score of the rhythm's strength/confidence
   32 |     bool                    isHighVolume;   // Is current volume significantly high?
   33 |     bool                    isLowVolume;    // Is current volume significantly low?
   34 |     double                  swingStrength;  // Strength of the last price swing
   35 |     double                  volumeStrength; // Strength of the volume during the last swing
   36 | };
   37 | 
   38 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   39 | //| CSonicRPVSRA - Analyzes the rhythm between price and volume      |
   40 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   41 | class CSonicRPVSRA
   42 | {
   43 | private:
   44 |     bool                    m_initialized;
   45 |     CLogger*                m_pLogger;
   46 |     CSonicRWavePattern*     m_pWavePattern; // Dependency to get swing points
   47 |     CSymbolInfo*            m_pSymbolInfo;  // Dependency for symbol info
   48 | 
   49 |     // Configuration
   50 |     int                     m_volumeAvgPeriod;
   51 |     double                  m_highVolFactor;
   52 |     double                  m_lowVolFactor;
   53 | 
   54 |     // Data Buffers
   55 |     long                    m_bufVolume[];
   56 | 
   57 |     // State
   58 |     SVPSRAInfo              m_currentRhythm;
   59 | 
   60 | public:
   61 |     CSonicRPVSRA() : m_initialized(false), m_pLogger(NULL), m_pWavePattern(NULL), m_pSymbolInfo(NULL),
   62 |                      m_volumeAvgPeriod(20), m_highVolFactor(1.8), m_lowVolFactor(0.8)
   63 |     {
   64 |         ArraySetAsSeries(m_bufVolume, true);
   65 |     }
   66 | 
   67 |     ~CSonicRPVSRA() {}
   68 | 
   69 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 |     //| Initialize                                                       |
   71 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 |     bool Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CSonicRWavePattern* pWavePattern, CSymbolInfo* pSymbolInfo)
   73 |     {
   74 |         if(!pLogger || !pWavePattern || !pSymbolInfo)
   75 |         {
   76 |             Print("ERROR: CSonicRPVSRA::Initialize - NULL pointers received");
   77 |             return false;
   78 |         }
   79 |         m_pLogger = pLogger;
   80 |         m_pWavePattern = pWavePattern;
   81 |         m_pSymbolInfo = pSymbolInfo;
   82 | 
   83 |         m_initialized = true;
   84 |         LOG_INFO("CSonicRPVSRA initialized successfully.");
   85 |         return true;
   86 |     }
   87 | 
   88 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   89 |     //| Deinitialize                                                     |
   90 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 |     void Deinitialize()
   92 |     {
   93 |         m_initialized = false;
   94 |     }
   95 | 
   96 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   97 |     //| Main analysis method                                             |
   98 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   99 |     bool Update(const int shift)
  100 |     {
  101 |         return AnalyzeRhythm(shift);
  102 |     }
  103 | 
  104 |     // Data Access
  105 |     SVPSRAInfo* GetContext() { return &m_currentRhythm; }
  106 | 
  107 | private:
  108 |     bool AnalyzeRhythm(const int shift)
  109 |     {
  110 |         if(!m_initialized) return false;
  111 | 
  112 |         ZeroMemory(m_currentRhythm);
  113 | 
  114 |         // 1. Analyze Volume
  115 |         if(!AnalyzeVolume(shift))
  116 |             return false;
  117 | 
  118 |         // 2. Analyze Price Swing
  119 |         double swingStrength;
  120 |         bool isUpSwing;
  121 |         if(!AnalyzePriceSwing(swingStrength, isUpSwing))
  122 |             return false;
  123 | 
  124 |         // 3. Determine Rhythm State and Correlation
  125 |         DetermineRhythmState(swingStrength, isUpSwing);
  126 | 
  127 |         return true;
  128 |     }
  129 | 
  130 | private:
  131 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  132 |     //| 1. Analyze current and average volume                            |
  133 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 |     bool AnalyzeVolume(const int shift)
  135 |     {
  136 |         int barsToCopy = shift + m_volumeAvgPeriod + 1;
  137 |         if(CopyTickVolume(m_pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), m_pSymbolInfo->Timeframe(), shift, barsToCopy, m_bufVolume) < barsToCopy)
  138 |         {
  139 |             LOG_WARN(*m_pLogger, __FUNCTION__, "Could not copy volume data.");
  140 |             return false;
  141 |         }
  142 | 
  143 |         double volSum = 0;
  144 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_volumeAvgPeriod; i++)
  145 |         {
  146 |             volSum += m_bufVolume[i+1]; // Average of previous bars, not including current
  147 |         }
  148 |         double avgVolume = volSum / m_volumeAvgPeriod;
  149 |         if(avgVolume == 0) avgVolume = 1; // Avoid division by zero
  150 | 
  151 |         long currentVolume = m_bufVolume[shift];
  152 |         m_currentRhythm.isHighVolume = currentVolume > avgVolume * m_highVolFactor;
  153 |         m_currentRhythm.isLowVolume = currentVolume < avgVolume * m_lowVolFactor;
  154 |         m_currentRhythm.volumeStrength = currentVolume / avgVolume;
  155 | 
  156 |         return true;
  157 |     }
  158 | 
  159 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  160 |     //| 2. Analyze the most recent price swing                           |
  161 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  162 |     bool AnalyzePriceSwing(double& swingStrength, bool &isUpSwing)
  163 |     {
  164 |         CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePoint swingPoints[2];
  165 |         if(m_pWavePattern->GetSwingPoints(swingPoints, 2) < 2)
  166 |         {
  167 |             LOG_DEBUG("Not enough swing points available yet.");
  168 |             return false;
  169 |         }
  170 |         
  171 |         CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePoint lastPoint = swingPoints[0];
  172 |         CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePoint prevPoint = swingPoints[1];
  173 | 
  174 |         double swingRange = MathAbs(lastPoint.price - prevPoint.price);
  175 |         int swingDuration = (int)MathAbs(lastPoint.barIndex - prevPoint.barIndex);
  176 |         if(swingDuration == 0) swingDuration = 1;
  177 | 
  178 |         swingStrength = swingRange / swingDuration;
  179 |         m_currentRhythm.swingStrength = swingStrength;
  180 |         isUpSwing = lastPoint.price > prevPoint.price;
  181 | 
  182 |         return true;
  183 |     }
  184 | 
  185 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  186 |     //| 3. Determine the rhythm state by correlating price and volume    |
  187 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  188 |     void DetermineRhythmState(const double swingStrength, const bool isUpSwing)
  189 |     {
  190 |         m_currentRhythm.rhythmState = RHYTHM_UNKNOWN;
  191 |         m_currentRhythm.rhythmScore = 0.0;
  192 | 
  193 |         // Convergence (Trend continuation)
  194 |         if(m_currentRhythm.isHighVolume)
  195 |         {
  196 |             if(isUpSwing)
  197 |                 m_currentRhythm.rhythmState = RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BULLISH;
  198 |             else
  199 |                 m_currentRhythm.rhythmState = RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BEARISH;
  200 |             m_currentRhythm.rhythmScore = m_currentRhythm.volumeStrength * swingStrength;
  201 |         }
  202 |         // Divergence (Potential reversal)
  203 |         else if(m_currentRhythm.isLowVolume)
  204 |         {
  205 |             if(isUpSwing)
  206 |                 m_currentRhythm.rhythmState = RHYTHM_DIVERGENCE_BEARISH; // Up-move on low volume is weak
  207 |             else
  208 |                 m_currentRhythm.rhythmState = RHYTHM_DIVERGENCE_BULLISH; // Down-move on low volume is weak
  209 |             m_currentRhythm.rhythmScore = (1 / fmax(0.1, m_currentRhythm.volumeStrength)) * swingStrength;
  210 |         }
  211 |     }
  212 | 
  213 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  214 |     //| Calculate correlation between price and volume swings (Advanced) |
  215 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 |     double CalculateCorrelation()
  217 |     {
  218 |         // Placeholder for a more advanced statistical correlation calculation
  219 |         // This would involve getting the last N swings (price strength) and the
  220 |         // corresponding average volume for each swing (volume strength) and then
  221 |         // calculating a Pearson correlation coefficient.
  222 |         return 0.0; // Not implemented in this version
  223 |     }
  224 | };
  225 | 
  226 | #endif // APEX_ANALYSIS_SONICR_PVSRA_MQH_
  227 | 
  228 |

   22 |     SR_DYNAMIC_RESISTANCE,          // Dynamic resistance (trendline)
   23 |     SR_PSYCHOLOGICAL_LEVEL,         // Round number/psychological

  319 | 
  320 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  321 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | CSonicRSupportResistance::CSonicRSupportResistance()
  324 | {
  325 |     m_logger = NULL;
  326 |     m_lookback_period = 500;
  327 |     m_min_touches = 2;
  328 |     m_touch_tolerance_pips = 3.0;
  329 |     m_break_confirmation_pips = 5.0;
  330 |     m_min_strength_threshold = 40.0;
  331 |     m_max_levels_display = 20;
  332 |     m_show_psychological_levels = true;
  333 |     m_show_fibonacci_levels = true;
  334 |     m_use_volume_confirmation = true;
  335 |     
  336 |     ZeroMemory(m_context);
  337 |     
  338 |     // Initialize Fibonacci levels
  339 |     m_fib_levels[0] = 0.0;      // 0%
  340 |     m_fib_levels[1] = 0.236;    // 23.6%
  341 |     m_fib_levels[2] = 0.382;    // 38.2%
  342 |     m_fib_levels[3] = 0.5;      // 50%
  343 |     m_fib_levels[4] = 0.618;    // 61.8%
  344 |     m_fib_levels[5] = 0.786;    // 78.6%
  345 |     m_fib_levels[6] = 1.0;      // 100%
  346 |     m_fib_levels[7] = 1.272;    // 127.2%
  347 |     m_fib_levels[8] = 1.414;    // 141.4%
  348 |     m_fib_levels[9] = 1.618;    // 161.8%
  349 |     m_fib_levels[10] = 2.0;     // 200%
  350 |     m_fib_levels[11] = 2.618;   // 261.8%
  351 |     m_fib_levels[12] = 4.236;   // 423.6%
  352 | }
  353 | 
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  356 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  357 | bool CSonicRSupportResistance::Initialize(CLogger* logger)
  358 | {
  359 |     if(logger == NULL)
  360 |     {
  361 |         Print("CSonicRSupportResistance::Initialize - Logger is NULL");
  362 |         return false;
  363 |     }
  364 |     
  365 |     m_logger = logger;
  366 |     m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Sonic R Support/Resistance initialized");
  367 |     
  368 |     // Initialize buffers
  369 |     int bars_available = iBars(Symbol(), Period());
  370 |     if(bars_available < m_lookback_period)
  371 |     {
  372 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_WARNING, "Insufficient bars for S/R analysis");
  373 |         return false;
  374 |     }
  375 |     
  376 |     ArrayResize(m_high_buffer, bars_available);
  377 |     ArrayResize(m_low_buffer, bars_available);
  378 |     ArrayResize(m_close_buffer, bars_available);
  379 |     ArrayResize(m_volume_buffer, bars_available);
  380 |     
  381 |     return UpdateBuffers();
  382 | }
  383 | 
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  386 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  387 | void CSonicRSupportResistance::Deinitialize()
  388 | {
  389 |     if(m_logger != NULL)
  390 |     {
  391 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Sonic R Support/Resistance deinitialized");
  392 |     }
  393 | 
  394 |     // Clean up arrays
  395 |     ArrayFree(m_context.support_levels);
  396 |     ArrayFree(m_context.resistance_levels);
  397 |     ArrayFree(m_context.reactions);
  398 |     ArrayFree(m_context.liquidity_zones);
  399 |     ArrayFree(m_context.supply_zones);
  400 |     ArrayFree(m_context.demand_zones);
  401 | 
  402 |     // Clean up buffers
  403 |     ArrayFree(m_high_buffer);
  404 |     ArrayFree(m_low_buffer);
  405 |     ArrayFree(m_close_buffer);
  406 |     ArrayFree(m_volume_buffer);
  407 | }
  408 | 
  409 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  410 | //| Main Support/Resistance Analysis                                 |
  411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  412 | bool CSonicRSupportResistance::AnalyzeSupportResistance()
  413 | {
  414 |     if(m_logger == NULL)
  415 |         return false;
  416 |     
  417 |     // Update market data
  418 |     if(!UpdateBuffers())
  419 |     {
  420 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to update market data");
  421 |         return false;
  422 |     }
  423 |     
  424 |     // Identify all types of levels
  425 |     if(!IdentifyHorizontalLevels())
  426 |     {
  427 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to identify horizontal levels");
  428 |         return false;
  429 |     }
  430 |     
  431 |     if(m_show_psychological_levels && !IdentifyPsychologicalLevels())
  432 |     {
  433 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to identify psychological levels");
  434 |         return false;
  435 |     }
  436 |     
  437 |     if(m_show_fibonacci_levels && !IdentifyFibonacciLevels())
  438 |     {
  439 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to identify Fibonacci levels");
  440 |         return false;
  441 |     }
  442 |     
  443 |     if(!IdentifyInstitutionalLevels())
  444 |     {
  445 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to identify institutional levels");
  446 |         return false;
  447 |     }
  448 |     
  449 |     // Analyze reactions and liquidity
  450 |     if(!AnalyzeReactions())
  451 |     {
  452 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to analyze reactions");
  453 |         return false;
  454 |     }
  455 |     
  456 |     if(!AnalyzeLiquidity())
  457 |     {
  458 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to analyze liquidity");
  459 |         return false;
  460 |     }
  461 |     
  462 |     if(!IdentifySupplyDemandZones())
  463 |     {
  464 |         m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, "Failed to identify supply/demand zones");
  465 |         return false;
  466 |     }
  467 |     
  468 |     // Update current market state
  469 |     UpdateLevelStatus();
  470 |     
  471 |     // Clean up old/invalid levels
  472 |     CleanupExpiredLevels();
  473 |     
  474 |     m_logger.Log(LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG, "S/R analysis completed successfully");
  475 |     return true;
  476 | }
  477 | 
  478 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  479 | //| Identify Horizontal Support/Resistance Levels                   |
  480 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  481 | bool CSonicRSupportResistance::IdentifyHorizontalLevels()
  482 | {
  483 |     // Clear existing levels
  484 |     ArrayResize(m_context.support_levels, 0);
  485 |     ArrayResize(m_context.resistance_levels, 0);
  486 |     
  487 |     // Find swing highs and lows
  488 |     for(int i = 3; i < ArraySize(m_high_buffer) - 3; i++)
  489 |     {
  490 |         // Check for swing high
  491 |         bool is_swing_high = true;
  492 |         for(int j = i - 3; j <= i + 3; j++)
  493 |         {
  494 |             if(j != i && m_high_buffer[j] >= m_high_buffer[i])
  495 |             {
  496 |                 is_swing_high = false;
  497 |                 break;
  498 |             }
  499 |         }
  500 |         
  501 |         if(is_swing_high)
  502 |         {
  503 |             // Count touches at this level
  504 |             int touches = 0;
  505 |             double level_price = m_high_buffer[i];
  506 |             double tolerance = PipsToPrice(m_touch_tolerance_pips);
  507 |             
  508 |             for(int k = 0; k < ArraySize(m_high_buffer); k++)
  509 |             {
  510 |                 if(MathAbs(m_high_buffer[k] - level_price) <= tolerance)
  511 |                     touches++;
  512 |             }
  513 |             
  514 |             if(touches >= m_min_touches)
  515 |             {
  516 |                 SSupportResistanceLevel level;
  517 |                 level.price = level_price;
  518 |                 level.type = SR_HORIZONTAL_RESISTANCE;
  519 |                 level.strength = (ENUM_SR_STRENGTH)MathMin(4, touches / 2 + 1);
  520 |                 level.status = SR_STATUS_ACTIVE;
  521 |                 level.formation_time = iTime(Symbol(), Period(), i);
  522 |                 level.touch_count = touches;
  523 |                 level.bounce_count = 0;
  524 |                 level.break_count = 0;
  525 |                 level.is_major_level = (touches >= 4);
  526 |                 level.is_valid = true;
  527 |                 level.tolerance_pips = m_touch_tolerance_pips;
  528 |                 level.description = StringFormat("Horizontal Resistance %.5f (%d touches)", 
  529 |                                                 level_price, touches);
  530 |                 
  531 |                 // Add to resistance levels
  532 |                 int size = ArraySize(m_context.resistance_levels);
  533 |                 ArrayResize(m_context.resistance_levels, size + 1);
  534 |                 m_context.resistance_levels[size] = level;
  535 |             }
  536 |         }
  537 |         
  538 |         // Check for swing low
  539 |         bool is_swing_low = true;
  540 |         for(int j = i - 3; j <= i + 3; j++)
  541 |         {
  542 |             if(j != i && m_low_buffer[j] <= m_low_buffer[i])
  543 |             {
  544 |                 is_swing_low = false;
  545 |                 break;
  546 |             }
  547 |         }
  548 |         
  549 |         if(is_swing_low)
  550 |         {
  551 |             // Count touches at this level
  552 |             int touches = 0;
  553 |             double level_price = m_low_buffer[i];
  554 |             double tolerance = PipsToPrice(m_touch_tolerance_pips);
  555 |             
  556 |             for(int k = 0; k < ArraySize(m_low_buffer); k++)
  557 |             {
  558 |                 if(MathAbs(m_low_buffer[k] - level_price) <= tolerance)
  559 |                     touches++;
  560 |             }
  561 |             
  562 |             if(touches >= m_min_touches)
  563 |             {
  564 |                 SSupportResistanceLevel level;
  565 |                 level.price = level_price;
  566 |                 level.type = SR_HORIZONTAL_SUPPORT;
  567 |                 level.strength = (ENUM_SR_STRENGTH)MathMin(4, touches / 2 + 1);
  568 |                 level.status = SR_STATUS_ACTIVE;
  569 |                 level.formation_time = iTime(Symbol(), Period(), i);
  570 |                 level.touch_count = touches;
  571 |                 level.bounce_count = 0;
  572 |                 level.break_count = 0;
  573 |                 level.is_major_level = (touches >= 4);
  574 |                 level.is_valid = true;
  575 |                 level.tolerance_pips = m_touch_tolerance_pips;
  576 |                 level.description = StringFormat("Horizontal Support %.5f (%d touches)", 
  577 |                                                 level_price, touches);
  578 |                 
  579 |                 // Add to support levels
  580 |                 int size = ArraySize(m_context.support_levels);
  581 |                 ArrayResize(m_context.support_levels, size + 1);
  582 |                 m_context.support_levels[size] = level;
  583 |             }
  584 |         }
  585 |     }
  586 |     
  587 |     return true;
  588 | }
  589 | 
  590 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  591 | //| Identify Psychological Levels                                    |
  592 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  593 | bool CSonicRSupportResistance::IdentifyPsychologicalLevels()
  594 | {
  595 |     double current_price = m_close_buffer[0];
  596 |     double price_range = PipsToPrice(1000);  // Look within 1000 pips
  597 |     
  598 |     // Generate round number levels
  599 |     double start_price = current_price - price_range;
  600 |     double end_price = current_price + price_range;
  601 |     
  602 |     // Major psychological levels (00, 50)
  603 |     double major_increment = PipsToPrice(500);  // 500 pips
  604 |     for(double price = start_price; price <= end_price; price += major_increment)
  605 |     {
  606 |         // Round to nearest major level
  607 |         double rounded_price = MathRound(price / major_increment) * major_increment;
  608 |         
  609 |         if(IsPsychologicalLevel(rounded_price))
  610 |         {
  611 |             SSupportResistanceLevel level;
  612 |             level.price = rounded_price;
  613 |             level.type = SR_PSYCHOLOGICAL_LEVEL;
  614 |             level.strength = SR_STRENGTH_MODERATE;
  615 |             level.status = SR_STATUS_ACTIVE;
  616 |             level.formation_time = TimeCurrent();
  617 |             level.is_psychological = true;
  618 |             level.is_valid = true;
  619 |             level.tolerance_pips = m_touch_tolerance_pips * 2;  // Wider tolerance
  620 |             level.description = StringFormat("Psychological Level %.5f", rounded_price);
  621 |             
  622 |             // Determine if support or resistance based on current price
  623 |             if(rounded_price > current_price)
  624 |             {
  625 |                 // Add to resistance
  626 |                 int size = ArraySize(m_context.resistance_levels);
  627 |                 ArrayResize(m_context.resistance_levels, size + 1);
  628 |                 m_context.resistance_levels[size] = level;
  629 |             }
  630 |             else
  631 |             {
  632 |                 // Add to support
  633 |                 int size = ArraySize(m_context.support_levels);
  634 |                 ArrayResize(m_context.support_levels, size + 1);
  635 |                 m_context.support_levels[size] = level;
  636 |             }
  637 |         }
  638 |     }
  639 |     
  640 |     return true;
  641 | }
  642 | 
  643 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  644 | //| Get Support/Resistance Analysis Summary                          |
  645 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  646 | string CSonicRSupportResistance::GetSRAnalysisSummary()
  647 | {
  648 |     string summary = "";
  649 |     
  650 |     summary += "=== SONIC R SUPPORT/RESISTANCE ===\n";
  651 |     summary += StringFormat("Support Levels: %d\n", ArraySize(m_context.support_levels));
  652 |     summary += StringFormat("Resistance Levels: %d\n", ArraySize(m_context.resistance_levels));
  653 |     summary += StringFormat("Current Support: %.5f\n", m_context.current_support);
  654 |     summary += StringFormat("Current Resistance: %.5f\n", m_context.current_resistance);
  655 |     summary += StringFormat("Nearest Support: %.5f\n", m_context.nearest_support);
  656 |     summary += StringFormat("Nearest Resistance: %.5f\n", m_context.nearest_resistance);
  657 |     summary += StringFormat("At Major Support: %s\n", m_context.at_major_support ? "YES" : "NO");
  658 |     summary += StringFormat("At Major Resistance: %s\n", m_context.at_major_resistance ? "YES" : "NO");
  659 |     summary += StringFormat("Supply Zones: %d\n", ArraySize(m_context.supply_zones));
  660 |     summary += StringFormat("Demand Zones: %d\n", ArraySize(m_context.demand_zones));
  661 |     summary += StringFormat("Liquidity Zones: %d\n", ArraySize(m_context.liquidity_zones));
  662 |     
  663 |     if(IsSupportBounceSignal())
  664 |         summary += ">>> SUPPORT BOUNCE SIGNAL <<<\n";
  665 |     else if(IsResistanceBounceSignal())
  666 |         summary += ">>> RESISTANCE BOUNCE SIGNAL <<<\n";
  667 |     else if(IsBreakoutSignal())
  668 |         summary += ">>> BREAKOUT SIGNAL <<<\n";
  669 |     else if(IsRetestSignal())
  670 |         summary += ">>> RETEST SIGNAL <<<\n";
  671 |     
  672 |     return summary;
  673 | }

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                 Analysis_SonicR_WavePattern.mqh |
