  124 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  125 | //| CErrorHandler - Enhanced Error Management for APEX EA            |
  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | class CErrorHandler
  128 | {
  129 | private:
  130 |     // Context Integration
  131 |     bool                m_initialized;
  132 |     int                 m_totalErrorCount;
  133 |     int                 m_consecutiveErrors;
  134 |     datetime            m_lastErrorTime;
  135 |     int                 m_lastMql5Error;
  136 |     
  137 |     // Error Statistics by Severity & Category
  138 |     int                 m_errorCountBySeverity[5];  // Index matches ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY
  139 |     int                 m_errorCountByCategory[7];  // Index matches ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY
  140 |     
  141 |     // Recent Errors (for debugging and stack trace)
  142 |     ErrorRecord         m_recentErrors[20];         // Increased from 10 to 20
  143 |     int                 m_recentErrorIndex;         // Circular buffer index
  144 |     
  145 |     // Circuit Breaker Integration
  146 |     int                 m_criticalErrorThreshold;   // Max critical errors before circuit breaker
  147 |     int                 m_consecutiveErrorLimit;    // Max consecutive errors
  148 |     bool                m_emergencyStop;            // Emergency stop triggered
  149 |     
  150 |     // Phase 5.1.2: Enhanced Features
  151 |     RecoveryStrategy    m_recoveryStrategies[35];   // 5 severities Г— 7 categories
  152 |     int                 m_recoveryStrategiesCount;
  153 |     int                 m_totalRecoveryAttempts;
  154 |     int                 m_successfulRecoveries;
  155 |     double              m_averageRecoveryTime;
  156 |     
  157 |     // Performance Impact Monitoring
  158 |     datetime            m_performanceMonitorStart;
  159 |     int                 m_errorsInTimeWindow;
  160 |     int                 m_timeWindowSeconds;
  161 |     double              m_performanceImpactThreshold;
  162 |     
  163 |     // Error Pattern Detection
  164 |     string              m_lastErrorPattern;
  165 |     int                 m_patternOccurrences;
  166 |     datetime            m_patternFirstSeen;
  167 |     
  168 |     // Context Integration
  169 |     CEaContext*         m_pContext;
  170 | 
  171 | public:
  172 |     // Constructor vГ  Destructor
  173 |     CErrorHandler() : 
  174 |         m_totalErrorCount(0),
  175 |         m_consecutiveErrors(0),
  176 |         m_lastErrorTime(0),
  177 |         m_lastMql5Error(0),
  178 |         m_recentErrorIndex(0),
  179 |         m_criticalErrorThreshold(5),
  180 |         m_consecutiveErrorLimit(10),
  181 |         m_emergencyStop(false),
  182 |         
  183 |         // Phase 5.1.2: Enhanced initialization
  184 |         m_recoveryStrategiesCount(0),
  185 |         m_totalRecoveryAttempts(0),
  186 |         m_successfulRecoveries(0),
  187 |         m_averageRecoveryTime(0.0),
  188 |         
  189 |         // Performance monitoring
  190 |         m_performanceMonitorStart(TimeCurrent()),
  191 |         m_errorsInTimeWindow(0),
  192 |         m_timeWindowSeconds(300), // 5 minutes
  193 |         m_performanceImpactThreshold(0.1), // 10% performance impact
  194 |         
  195 |         // Pattern detection
  196 |         m_lastErrorPattern(""),
  197 |         m_patternOccurrences(0),
  198 |         m_patternFirstSeen(0),
  199 |         m_pContext(NULL), // Initialize context pointer
  200 |         
  201 |         // Initialize counters
  202 |         ArrayInitialize(m_errorCountBySeverity, 0),
  203 |         ArrayInitialize(m_errorCountByCategory, 0),
  204 |         
  205 |         // Initialize recent errors array
  206 |         for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
  207 |             m_recentErrors[i].Initialize();
  208 |         }
  209 |         
  210 |         // Initialize recovery strategies
  211 |         InitializeRecoveryStrategies()
  212 |     {
  213 |         // This initial print is okay, as logger is not yet available.
  214 |         Print("[APEX_v4] Enhanced ErrorHandler v5.1.2 constructed.");
  215 |     }
  216 |     
  217 |     ~CErrorHandler()
  218 |     {
  219 |         if(m_initialized && m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger)
  220 |         {
  221 |             string stats = GetDetailedStats();
  222 |             LOG_INFO("Enhanced ErrorHandler destroyed. Final Stats:\n" + stats);
  223 |         }
  224 |     }
  225 |     
  226 |     // Khб»ҹi tбәЎo vГ  Dб»Қn dбә№p
  227 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* context)
  228 |     {
  229 |         m_pContext = context;
  230 |         if(m_pContext == NULL || m_pContext->pLogger == NULL)
  231 |         {
  232 |             Print("FATAL: CErrorHandler received a NULL context or logger pointer during initialization.");
  233 |             m_initialized = false;
  234 |             return false;
  235 |         }
  236 | 
  237 |         m_initialized = true;
  238 |         LOG_INFO("Enhanced ErrorHandler v5.1.2 initialized and linked with Context.");
  239 |         return m_initialized;
  240 |     }
  241 |     
  242 |     void Deinitialize()
  243 |     {
  244 |         if(m_initialized && m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger)
  245 |         {
  246 |             string stats = GetDetailedStats();
  247 |             LOG_INFO("Enhanced ErrorHandler deinitialized.\nFinal Statistics:\n" + stats);
  248 |         }
  249 |         m_initialized = false;
  250 |         m_pContext = NULL;
  251 |     }
  252 |     
  253 |     //--- Enhanced Error Handling Methods
  254 |     void HandleError(string function, string message, 
  255 |                     ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity = ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR,
  256 |                     ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category = ERROR_CATEGORY_GENERAL,
  257 |                     int internalCode = 0,
  258 |                     string module = "")
  259 |     {
  260 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
  261 |         
  262 |         // Get MQL5 error if available
  263 |         int mql5Error = GetLastError();
  264 |         
  265 |         // Create enhanced error record
  266 |         ErrorRecord errorRecord;
  267 |         errorRecord.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  268 |         errorRecord.severity = severity;
  269 |         errorRecord.category = category;
  270 |         errorRecord.mql5Code = mql5Error;
  271 |         errorRecord.internalCode = internalCode;
  272 |         errorRecord.function = function;
  273 |         errorRecord.module = (StringLen(module) > 0) ? module : ExtractModuleFromFunction(function);
  274 |         errorRecord.message = message;
  275 |         errorRecord.stackTrace = GenerateEnhancedStackTrace(function);
  276 |         
  277 |         // Phase 5.1.2: Enhanced error processing
  278 |         errorRecord.isRecoverable = DetermineRecoverability(errorRecord);
  279 |         errorRecord.recoveryAction = DetermineRecoveryAction(errorRecord);
  280 |         errorRecord.performanceImpact = CalculatePerformanceImpact(errorRecord);
  281 |         
  282 |         // Record and process the error
  283 |         RecordError(errorRecord);
  284 |         
  285 |         // Pattern detection
  286 |         DetectErrorPatterns(errorRecord);
  287 |         
  288 |         // Performance impact monitoring
  289 |         MonitorPerformanceImpact(errorRecord);
  290 |         
  291 |         // Handle based on severity with enhanced logic
  292 |         switch(severity) {
  293 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL:
  294 |                 HandleCriticalError(errorRecord);
  295 |                 break;
  296 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL:
  297 |                 HandleFatalError(errorRecord);
  298 |                 break;
  299 |             default:
  300 |                 LogErrorWithRecovery(errorRecord);
  301 |                 break;
  302 |         }
  303 |         
  304 |         // Attempt automatic recovery if applicable
  305 |         if(errorRecord.isRecoverable) {
  306 |             AttemptAutoRecovery(errorRecord);
  307 |         }
  308 |         
  309 |         // Reset last error to prevent duplicate processing
  310 |         ResetLastError();
  311 |     }
  312 |     
  313 |     void HandleMql5Error(string function, string operation,
  314 |                         ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category = ERROR_CATEGORY_GENERAL,
  315 |                         string module = "")
  316 |     {
  317 |         int mql5Error = GetLastError();
  318 |         if(mql5Error == ERR_SUCCESS) return;
  319 |         
  320 |         ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity = ClassifyMql5Error(mql5Error);
  321 |         string message = "MQL5 Error after " + operation + ": " + IntegerToString(mql5Error) + 
  322 |                         " (" + GetMql5ErrorDescription(mql5Error) + ")";
  323 |         
  324 |         HandleError(function, message, severity, category, mql5Error, module);
  325 |     }
  326 |     
  327 |     void HandleCriticalError(string function, string message, 
  328 |                            ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category = ERROR_CATEGORY_GENERAL,
  329 |                            string module = "")
  330 |     {
  331 |         HandleError(function, message, ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL, category, 0, module);
  332 |     }
  333 |     
  334 |     void HandleFatalError(string function, string message,
  335 |                          ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category = ERROR_CATEGORY_GENERAL,
  336 |                          string module = "")
  337 |     {
  338 |         HandleError(function, message, ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL, category, 0, module);
  339 |     }
  340 |     
  341 |     //--- Recovery & Healing Methods
  342 |     bool AttemptRecovery(string function, string operation, ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category)
  343 |     {
  344 |         RecoveryStrategy strategy = GetRecoveryStrategy(ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR, category);
  345 |         
  346 |         ulong startTime = GetMicrosecondCount();
  347 |         bool success = false;
  348 |         
  349 |         for(int retry = 0; retry < strategy.maxRetries; retry++) {
  350 |             if(retry > 0) {
  351 |                 // Wait before retry
  352 |                 Sleep(strategy.retryDelayMs);
  353 |             }
  354 |             
  355 |             // Log retry attempt
  356 |             string retryMsg = "Recovery attempt " + IntegerToString(retry + 1) + "/" + 
  357 |                              IntegerToString(strategy.maxRetries) + " for " + operation;
  358 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING(retryMsg);
  359 |             
  360 |             // Attempt the operation (this would be customized per operation type)
  361 |             // For now, we simulate recovery attempt
  362 |             success = SimulateRecoveryAttempt(category, operation);
  363 |             
  364 |             if(success) {
  365 |                 m_successfulRecoveries++;
  366 |                 double recoveryTime = (GetMicrosecondCount() - startTime) / 1000.0; // ms
  367 |                 UpdateAverageRecoveryTime(recoveryTime);
  368 |                 
  369 |                 string successMsg = "Recovery successful for " + operation + 
  370 |                                    " after " + IntegerToString(retry + 1) + " attempts";
  371 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO(successMsg);
  372 |                 break;
  373 |             }
  374 |         }
  375 |         
  376 |         m_totalRecoveryAttempts++;
  377 |         
  378 |         if(!success) {
  379 |             string failMsg = "Recovery failed for " + operation + " after " + 
  380 |                            IntegerToString(strategy.maxRetries) + " attempts";
  381 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_ERROR(failMsg);
  382 |         }
  383 |         
  384 |         return success;
  385 |     }
  386 |     
  387 |     void TriggerSystemHealing()
  388 |     {
  389 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("System healing initiated...");
  390 |         
  391 |         // Reset consecutive error counter
  392 |         m_consecutiveErrors = 0;
  393 |         
  394 |         // Clear performance impact if it's not too severe
  395 |         if(GetPerformanceImpactPercentage() < 50.0) {
  396 |             m_errorsInTimeWindow = 0;
  397 |             m_performanceMonitorStart = TimeCurrent();
  398 |         }
  399 |         
  400 |         // Reset error patterns that are not critical
  401 |         if(m_patternOccurrences < 10) {
  402 |             m_lastErrorPattern = "";
  403 |             m_patternOccurrences = 0;
  404 |         }
  405 |         
  406 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("System healing completed");
  407 |     }
  408 |     
  409 |     //--- Status and Query Methods
  410 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
  411 |     
  412 |     int GetTotalErrorCount() const { return m_totalErrorCount; }
  413 |     
  414 |     int GetConsecutiveErrorCount() const { return m_consecutiveErrors; }
  415 |     
  416 |     bool IsEmergencyStop() const { return m_emergencyStop; }
  417 |     
  418 |     double GetRecoverySuccessRate() const {
  419 |         if(m_totalRecoveryAttempts == 0) return 0.0;
  420 |         return (double)m_successfulRecoveries / m_totalRecoveryAttempts * 100.0;
  421 |     }
  422 |     
  423 |     double GetAverageRecoveryTime() const { return m_averageRecoveryTime; }
  424 |     
  425 |     double GetPerformanceImpactPercentage() const {
  426 |         datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  427 |         int windowDuration = (int)(currentTime - m_performanceMonitorStart);
  428 |         
  429 |         if(windowDuration == 0) return 0.0;
  430 |         
  431 |         // Calculate error frequency per minute
  432 |         double errorFrequency = (double)m_errorsInTimeWindow / (windowDuration / 60.0);
  433 |         return MathMin(errorFrequency * 10.0, 100.0); // Scale to percentage
  434 |     }
  435 |     
  436 |     void ResetConsecutiveErrors() { 
  437 |         m_consecutiveErrors = 0; 
  438 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("Consecutive error count reset");
  439 |     }
  440 |     
  441 |     void ResetEmergencyStop() {
  442 |         m_emergencyStop = false;
  443 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("Emergency stop reset");
  444 |     }
  445 |     
  446 |     //--- Enhanced Statistics and Reporting
  447 |     string GetDetailedStats() const
  448 |     {
  449 |         string stats = "=== ENHANCED ERROR HANDLER STATISTICS ===\n";
  450 |         stats += "--- Basic Stats ---\n";
  451 |         stats += "Total Errors: " + IntegerToString(m_totalErrorCount) + "\n";
  452 |         stats += "Consecutive Errors: " + IntegerToString(m_consecutiveErrors) + "\n";
  453 |         stats += "Last Error Time: " + TimeToString(m_lastErrorTime) + "\n";
  454 |         stats += "Emergency Stop: " + (m_emergencyStop ? "YES" : "NO") + "\n";
  455 |         
  456 |         stats += "\n--- Recovery Stats ---\n";
  457 |         stats += "Recovery Attempts: " + IntegerToString(m_totalRecoveryAttempts) + "\n";
  458 |         stats += "Successful Recoveries: " + IntegerToString(m_successfulRecoveries) + "\n";
  459 |         stats += "Recovery Success Rate: " + DoubleToString(GetRecoverySuccessRate(), 1) + "%\n";
  460 |         stats += "Average Recovery Time: " + DoubleToString(m_averageRecoveryTime, 2) + "ms\n";
  461 |         
  462 |         stats += "\n--- Performance Impact ---\n";
  463 |         stats += "Performance Impact: " + DoubleToString(GetPerformanceImpactPercentage(), 1) + "%\n";
  464 |         stats += "Errors in Time Window: " + IntegerToString(m_errorsInTimeWindow) + "\n";
  465 |         
  466 |         stats += "\n--- By Severity ---\n";
  467 |         stats += "Info: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountBySeverity[0]) + 
  468 |                  ", Warning: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountBySeverity[1]) +
  469 |                  ", Error: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountBySeverity[2]) + 
  470 |                  ", Critical: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountBySeverity[3]) +
  471 |                  ", Fatal: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountBySeverity[4]) + "\n";
  472 |         
  473 |         stats += "\n--- By Category ---\n";
  474 |         stats += "General: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[0]) + 
  475 |                  ", Trading: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[1]) +
  476 |                  ", MarketData: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[2]) + 
  477 |                  ", Broker: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[3]) + "\n";
  478 |         stats += "Calculation: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[4]) + 
  479 |                  ", Init: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[5]) +
  480 |                  ", Memory: " + IntegerToString(m_errorCountByCategory[6]) + "\n";
  481 |         
  482 |         stats += "========================================";
  483 |         return stats;
  484 |     }
  485 |     
  486 |     string GetRecentErrorsReport() const
  487 |     {
  488 |         string report = "=== RECENT ERRORS (Last 20) ===\n";
  489 |         
  490 |         for(int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
  491 |             int index = (m_recentErrorIndex - i - 1 + 20) % 20;
  492 |             if(m_recentErrors[index].timestamp == 0) continue;
  493 |             
  494 |             string recoveryInfo = "";
  495 |             if(m_recentErrors[index].isRecoverable) {
  496 |                 recoveryInfo = " [Recoverable: " + GetHealingStatusString(m_recentErrors[index].healingStatus) + "]";
  497 |             }
  498 |             
  499 |             report += "[" + TimeToString(m_recentErrors[index].timestamp) + "] " +
  500 |                      m_recentErrors[index].module + "::" + m_recentErrors[index].function + 
  501 |                      " - " + GetSeverityString(m_recentErrors[index].severity) + 
  502 |                      ": " + m_recentErrors[index].message + recoveryInfo + "\n";
  503 |         }
  504 |         
  505 |         report += "===============================";
  506 |         return report;
  507 |     }
  508 |     
  509 |     string GetErrorPatternsReport() const
  510 |     {
  511 |         string report = "=== ERROR PATTERNS ANALYSIS ===\n";
  512 |         
  513 |         if(StringLen(m_lastErrorPattern) > 0) {
  514 |             report += "Current Pattern: " + m_lastErrorPattern + "\n";
  515 |             report += "Pattern Occurrences: " + IntegerToString(m_patternOccurrences) + "\n";
  516 |             report += "Pattern First Seen: " + TimeToString(m_patternFirstSeen) + "\n";
  517 |         } else {
  518 |             report += "No significant error patterns detected\n";
  519 |         }
  520 |         
  521 |         report += "==============================";
  522 |         return report;
  523 |     }
  524 | 
  525 | private:
  526 |     //--- Internal Enhanced Methods
  527 |     void RecordError(ErrorRecord& error)
  528 |     {
  529 |         // Update basic statistics
  530 |         m_totalErrorCount++;
  531 |         m_consecutiveErrors++;
  532 |         m_lastErrorTime = error.timestamp;
  533 |         m_lastMql5Error = error.mql5Code;
  534 |         
  535 |         // Update counters by category and severity
  536 |         if(error.severity >= 0 && error.severity <= 4) {
  537 |             m_errorCountBySeverity[error.severity]++;
  538 |         }
  539 |         if(error.category >= 0 && error.category <= 6) {
  540 |             m_errorCountByCategory[error.category]++;
  541 |         }
  542 |         
  543 |         // Store in recent errors buffer (increased to 20)
  544 |         m_recentErrors[m_recentErrorIndex] = error;
  545 |         m_recentErrorIndex = (m_recentErrorIndex + 1) % 20;
  546 |         
  547 |         // Update performance monitoring
  548 |         m_errorsInTimeWindow++;
  549 |     }
  550 |     
  551 |     void HandleCriticalError(ErrorRecord& error)
  552 |     {
  553 |         LogErrorWithRecovery(error);
  554 |         
  555 |         // Enhanced critical error handling
  556 |         if(m_errorCountBySeverity[ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL] >= m_criticalErrorThreshold) {
  557 |             m_emergencyStop = true;
  558 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, "EMERGENCY STOP TRIGGERED - Too many critical errors!");
  559 |             Alert("APEX EA: Emergency stop triggered due to critical errors!");
  560 |             
  561 |             // Attempt system healing before complete shutdown
  562 |             TriggerSystemHealing();
  563 |         } else {
  564 |             // Try to heal critical errors if possible
  565 |             if(error.isRecoverable) {
  566 |                 error.healingStatus = HEALING_IN_PROGRESS;
  567 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING("Attempting to heal critical error...");
  568 |             }
  569 |         }
  570 |     }
  571 |     
  572 |     void HandleFatalError(ErrorRecord& error)
  573 |     {
  574 |         LogErrorWithRecovery(error);
  575 |         
  576 |         // Fatal errors always trigger emergency stop
  577 |         m_emergencyStop = true;
  578 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, "FATAL ERROR - IMMEDIATE EMERGENCY STOP!");
  579 |         Alert("APEX EA: FATAL ERROR - EA stopped immediately!");
  580 |         
  581 |         // No recovery attempt for fatal errors
  582 |         error.healingStatus = HEALING_FAILED;
  583 |     }
  584 |     
  585 |     void LogErrorWithRecovery(ErrorRecord& error)
  586 |     {
  587 |         string recoveryInfo = "";
  588 |         if(error.isRecoverable) {
  589 |             recoveryInfo = " [Recovery: " + GetRecoveryActionString(error.recoveryAction) + "]";
  590 |         }
  591 |         
  592 |         string logMessage = error.message + recoveryInfo;
  593 | 
  594 |         // Log using the appropriate logger level based on severity
  595 |         switch(error.severity)
  596 |         {
  597 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL:
  598 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, logMessage);
  599 |                 break;
  600 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL:
  601 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, logMessage);
  602 |                 break;
  603 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR:
  604 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_ERROR(logMessage);
  605 |                 break;
  606 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_WARNING:
  607 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING(logMessage);
  608 |                 break;
  609 |             default:
  610 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO(logMessage);
  611 |                 break;
  612 |         }
  613 | 
  614 |         // For critical and fatal errors, also show enhanced stack trace
  615 |         if(error.severity >= ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL && StringLen(error.stackTrace) > 0) {
  616 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING("Stack Trace: " + error.stackTrace);
  617 |         }
  618 |         
  619 |         // Show performance impact if significant
  620 |         if(error.performanceImpact > 0.1) {
  621 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING("Performance Impact: " + DoubleToString(error.performanceImpact * 100, 1) + "%");
  622 |         }
  623 |     }
  624 |     
  625 |     void InitializeRecoveryStrategies()
  626 |     {
  627 |         // Initialize default recovery strategies for different error types
  628 |         m_recoveryStrategiesCount = 0;
  629 |         
  630 |         // Trading errors - retry with exponential backoff
  631 |         RecoveryStrategy tradingStrategy;
  632 |         tradingStrategy.category = ERROR_CATEGORY_TRADING;
  633 |         tradingStrategy.severity = ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR;
  634 |         tradingStrategy.action = RECOVERY_RETRY;
  635 |         tradingStrategy.maxRetries = 3;
  636 |         tradingStrategy.retryDelayMs = 2000;
  637 |         tradingStrategy.enableHealing = true;
  638 |         tradingStrategy.description = "Trading operation retry with delay";
  639 |         m_recoveryStrategies[m_recoveryStrategiesCount++] = tradingStrategy;
  640 |         
  641 |         // Broker connection errors - reset and retry
  642 |         RecoveryStrategy brokerStrategy;
  643 |         brokerStrategy.category = ERROR_CATEGORY_BROKER;
  644 |         brokerStrategy.severity = ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR;
  645 |         brokerStrategy.action = RECOVERY_RESET;
  646 |         brokerStrategy.maxRetries = 5;
  647 |         brokerStrategy.retryDelayMs = 5000;
  648 |         brokerStrategy.enableHealing = true;
  649 |         brokerStrategy.description = "Broker connection reset and retry";
  650 |         m_recoveryStrategies[m_recoveryStrategiesCount++] = brokerStrategy;
  651 |         
  652 |         // Market data errors - fallback to alternative source
  653 |         RecoveryStrategy marketDataStrategy;
  654 |         marketDataStrategy.category = ERROR_CATEGORY_MARKET_DATA;
  655 |         marketDataStrategy.severity = ERROR_SEVERITY_WARNING;
  656 |         marketDataStrategy.action = RECOVERY_FALLBACK;
  657 |         marketDataStrategy.maxRetries = 2;
  658 |         marketDataStrategy.retryDelayMs = 1000;
  659 |         marketDataStrategy.enableHealing = true;
  660 |         marketDataStrategy.description = "Market data fallback mechanism";
  661 |         m_recoveryStrategies[m_recoveryStrategiesCount++] = marketDataStrategy;
  662 |         
  663 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_DEBUG("Initialized " + IntegerToString(m_recoveryStrategiesCount) + " recovery strategies");
  664 |     }
  665 |     
  666 |     string GenerateEnhancedStackTrace(string currentFunction)
  667 |     {
  668 |         // Enhanced stack trace with module information
  669 |         string module = ExtractModuleFromFunction(currentFunction);
  670 |         return "-> " + module + "::" + currentFunction + "() -> Core_ErrorHandler::HandleError()";
  671 |     }
  672 |     
  673 |     string ExtractModuleFromFunction(string functionName)
  674 |     {
  675 |         // Extract module name from function name (e.g., "CLogger::LogInfo" -> "Core_Logger")
  676 |         if(StringFind(functionName, "CLogger") >= 0) return "Core_Logger";
  677 |         if(StringFind(functionName, "CIndicators") >= 0) return "Analysis_Indicators";
  678 |         if(StringFind(functionName, "CTimeManager") >= 0) return "Core_TimeManager";
  679 |         if(StringFind(functionName, "CSignal") >= 0) return "Signal_Pullback";
  680 |         if(StringFind(functionName, "CRisk") >= 0) return "Risk_Manager";
  681 |         if(StringFind(functionName, "CTrade") >= 0) return "Trade_Manager";
  682 |         
  683 |         return "Unknown_Module";
  684 |     }
  685 |     
  686 |     bool DetermineRecoverability(ErrorRecord& error)
  687 |     {
  688 |         // Determine if error is recoverable based on category and severity
  689 |         if(error.severity == ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL) return false;
  690 |         
  691 |         switch(error.category) {
  692 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_TRADING:
  693 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_BROKER:
  694 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_MARKET_DATA:
  695 |                 return true; // Usually recoverable
  696 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_MEMORY:
  697 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_CALCULATION:
  698 |                 return (error.severity <= ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR);
  699 |             default:
  700 |                 return (error.severity <= ERROR_SEVERITY_WARNING);
  701 |         }
  702 |     }
  703 |     
  704 |     ENUM_RECOVERY_ACTION DetermineRecoveryAction(ErrorRecord& error)
  705 |     {
  706 |         // Determine appropriate recovery action
  707 |         RecoveryStrategy strategy = GetRecoveryStrategy(error.severity, error.category);
  708 |         return strategy.action;
  709 |     }
  710 |     
  711 |     double CalculatePerformanceImpact(ErrorRecord& error)
  712 |     {
  713 |         // Calculate performance impact based on error frequency and severity
  714 |         double baseImpact = 0.0;
  715 |         
  716 |         switch(error.severity) {
  717 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL:     baseImpact = 1.0; break;
  718 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL:  baseImpact = 0.5; break;
  719 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR:     baseImpact = 0.2; break;
  720 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_WARNING:   baseImpact = 0.1; break;
  721 |             default:                       baseImpact = 0.05; break;
  722 |         }
  723 |         
  724 |         // Multiply by frequency factor
  725 |         double frequencyFactor = MathMin((double)m_consecutiveErrors / 10.0, 2.0);
  726 |         return MathMin(baseImpact * frequencyFactor, 1.0);
  727 |     }
  728 |     
  729 |     void DetectErrorPatterns(ErrorRecord& error)
  730 |     {
  731 |         // Simple pattern detection - same error recurring
  732 |         string currentPattern = error.module + "::" + error.function + "::" + GetSeverityString(error.severity);
  733 |         
  734 |         if(currentPattern == m_lastErrorPattern) {
  735 |             m_patternOccurrences++;
  736 |             
  737 |             if(m_patternOccurrences >= 5) {
  738 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING("ERROR PATTERN DETECTED: " + currentPattern + " occurred " + IntegerToString(m_patternOccurrences) + " times");
  739 |                 
  740 |                 // Trigger system healing for recurring patterns
  741 |                 if(m_patternOccurrences >= 10) {
  742 |                     TriggerSystemHealing();
  743 |                 }
  744 |             }
  745 |         } else {
  746 |             m_lastErrorPattern = currentPattern;
  747 |             m_patternOccurrences = 1;
  748 |             m_patternFirstSeen = error.timestamp;
  749 |         }
  750 |     }
  751 |     
  752 |     void MonitorPerformanceImpact(ErrorRecord& error)
  753 |     {
  754 |         // Check if we need to reset the monitoring window
  755 |         datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  756 |         if((currentTime - m_performanceMonitorStart) > m_timeWindowSeconds) {
  757 |             m_performanceMonitorStart = currentTime;
  758 |             m_errorsInTimeWindow = 1; // Current error
  759 |         }
  760 |         
  761 |         // Check if performance impact exceeds threshold
  762 |         double currentImpact = GetPerformanceImpactPercentage();
  763 |         if(currentImpact > (m_performanceImpactThreshold * 100)) {
  764 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, "EMERGENCY STOP TRIGGERED - High performance impact!");
  765 |             
  766 |             // Trigger healing for high performance impact
  767 |             TriggerSystemHealing();
  768 |         }
  769 |     }
  770 |     
  771 |     void CheckCircuitBreaker(const ErrorRecord &error)
  772 |     {
  773 |         if(m_emergencyStop) return;
  774 | 
  775 |         // 1. Critical Error Threshold
  776 |         if(m_errorCountBySeverity[ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL] >= m_criticalErrorThreshold) {
  777 |             m_emergencyStop = true;
  778 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, "EMERGENCY STOP TRIGGERED - Too many critical errors!");
  779 |             Alert("APEX EA: Emergency stop triggered due to critical errors!");
  780 |         }
  781 | 
  782 |         // 2. Consecutive Error Limit
  783 |         if(m_consecutiveErrors >= m_consecutiveErrorLimit) {
  784 |             m_emergencyStop = true;
  785 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, "EMERGENCY STOP TRIGGERED - Too many consecutive errors!");
  786 |             Alert("APEX EA: Emergency stop triggered due to consecutive errors!");
  787 |         }
  788 | 
  789 |         // 3. Performance Impact Threshold
  790 |         double currentImpact = GetPerformanceImpactPercentage();
  791 |         if(currentImpact > (m_performanceImpactThreshold * 100)) {
  792 |             m_emergencyStop = true;
  793 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_CRITICAL(*m_pContext->pLogger, "EMERGENCY STOP TRIGGERED - High performance impact!");
  794 |             Alert("APEX EA: Emergency stop triggered due to high performance impact!");
  795 |         }
  796 |     }
  797 |     
  798 |     void AttemptAutoRecovery(ErrorRecord& error)
  799 |     {
  800 |         if(!error.isRecoverable || error.healingStatus != HEALING_NOT_ATTEMPTED) return;
  801 | 
  802 |         RecoveryStrategy strategy = GetRecoveryStrategy(error.category, error.severity);
  803 |         if(strategy.action == RECOVERY_NONE) return;
  804 | 
  805 |         error.healingStatus = HEALING_IN_PROGRESS;
  806 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("Attempting recovery for error " + IntegerToString(error.internalCode));
  807 | 
  808 |         bool recoverySuccess = false;
  809 |         ulong startTime = GetTickCount64();
  810 | 
  811 |         for(int i = 0; i < strategy.maxRetries; i++) {
  812 |             error.retryCount++;
  813 |             error.lastRetryTime = TimeCurrent();
  814 |             m_totalRecoveryAttempts++;
  815 | 
  816 |             // This part needs to be implemented based on the specific action
  817 |             // recoverySuccess = ExecuteRecoveryAction(strategy, error);
  818 |             // For now, using existing simulation logic
  819 |             recoverySuccess = SimulateRecoveryAttempt(error.category, "auto-recovery");
  820 | 
  821 |             if(recoverySuccess) break;
  822 | 
  823 |             Sleep(strategy.retryDelayMs);
  824 |         }
  825 | 
  826 |         ulong endTime = GetTickCount64();
  827 |         if(recoverySuccess)
  828 |         {
  829 |             m_successfulRecoveries++;
  830 |             UpdateAverageRecoveryTime((double)(endTime - startTime));
  831 |             error.healingStatus = HEALING_SUCCESS;
  832 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("Recovery successful for error " + IntegerToString(error.internalCode));
  833 |         } else {
  834 |             error.healingStatus = HEALING_FAILED;
  835 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_ERROR("Recovery failed for error " + IntegerToString(error.internalCode));
  836 |         }
  837 |     }
  838 |     
  839 |     bool ExecuteRecoveryAction(const RecoveryStrategy &strategy, ErrorRecord &error)
  840 |     {
  841 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_INFO("Executing recovery action: " + GetRecoveryActionString(strategy.action));
  842 | 
  843 |         // This is a placeholder. In a real scenario, this would trigger
  844 |         // specific recovery logic based on the action.
  845 |         switch(strategy.action)
  846 |         {
  847 |             case RECOVERY_RETRY:
  848 |                 // Logic to retry the failed operation
  849 |                 return true; // Simulate success
  850 |             case RECOVERY_FALLBACK:
  851 |                 // Logic to switch to a fallback data source or method
  852 |                 return true;
  853 |             case RECOVERY_RESET:
  854 |                 // Logic to reset the state of the affected component
  855 |                 return true;
  856 |             case RECOVERY_RESTART:
  857 |                 // Logic to restart a specific service or the EA
  858 |                 return true;
  859 |             case RECOVERY_EMERGENCY_STOP:
  860 |                 m_emergencyStop = true;
  861 |                 return true;
  862 |             default:
  863 |                 if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) LOG_WARNING("Unknown recovery action for error " + IntegerToString(error.internalCode));
  864 |                 return false;
  865 |         }
  866 |     }
  867 |     
  868 |     bool SimulateRecoveryAttempt(ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category, string operation)
  869 |     {
  870 |         // Simulate recovery attempt with success rate based on category
  871 |         double successRate = 0.8; // 80% default success rate
  872 |         
  873 |         switch(category) {
  874 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_TRADING:    successRate = 0.7; break;
  875 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_BROKER:     successRate = 0.6; break;
  876 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_MARKET_DATA: successRate = 0.9; break;
  877 |             case ERROR_CATEGORY_CALCULATION: successRate = 0.95; break;
  878 |             default:                         successRate = 0.8; break;
  879 |         }
  880 |         
  881 |         // Random simulation
  882 |         return (MathRand() / 32767.0) < successRate;
  883 |     }
  884 |     
  885 |     void UpdateAverageRecoveryTime(double recoveryTime)
  886 |     {
  887 |         if(m_successfulRecoveries == 1) {
  888 |             m_averageRecoveryTime = recoveryTime;
  889 |         } else {
  890 |             // Exponential moving average
  891 |             double alpha = 0.2;
  892 |             m_averageRecoveryTime = alpha * recoveryTime + (1.0 - alpha) * m_averageRecoveryTime;
  893 |         }
  894 |     }
  895 |     
  896 |     RecoveryStrategy GetRecoveryStrategy(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity, ENUM_ERROR_CATEGORY category)
  897 |     {
  898 |         // Find matching recovery strategy
  899 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_recoveryStrategiesCount; i++) {
  900 |             if(m_recoveryStrategies[i].category == category && 
  901 |                m_recoveryStrategies[i].severity == severity) {
  902 |                 return m_recoveryStrategies[i];
  903 |             }
  904 |         }
  905 |         
  906 |         // Return default strategy if no match found
  907 |         RecoveryStrategy defaultStrategy;
  908 |         defaultStrategy.Initialize();
  909 |         return defaultStrategy;
  910 |     }
  911 |     
  912 |     ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY ClassifyMql5Error(int mql5Error)
  913 |     {
  914 |         // Enhanced MQL5 error classification
  915 |         if(mql5Error == 0) return ERROR_SEVERITY_INFO;
  916 |         
  917 |         // Fatal errors (system level)
  918 |         if(mql5Error >= 4000 && mql5Error <= 4999) {
  919 |             return ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL;
  920 |         }
  921 |         
  922 |         // Critical errors (trading restrictions, connection issues)
  923 |         if(mql5Error >= 10000 && mql5Error <= 10999) {
  924 |             switch(mql5Error) {
  925 |                 case 10004: // ERR_REQUOTE  
  926 |                 case 10006: // ERR_REJECT
  927 |                 case 10007: // ERR_CANCEL  
  928 |                 case 10008: // ERR_PLACED
  929 |                 case 10009: // ERR_DONE
  930 |                 case 10010: // ERR_DONE_PARTIAL
  931 |                     return ERROR_SEVERITY_WARNING;
  932 |                 case 10013: // ERR_INVALID_REQUEST
  933 |                 case 10014: // ERR_INVALID_VOLUME  
  934 |                 case 10015: // ERR_INVALID_PRICE
  935 |                 case 10016: // ERR_INVALID_STOPS
  936 |                     return ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR;
  937 |                 case 10018: // ERR_MARKET_CLOSED
  938 |                 case 10019: // ERR_NO_MONEY
  939 |                 case 10020: // ERR_PRICE_CHANGED
  940 |                 case 10021: // ERR_OFF_QUOTES
  941 |                     return ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL;
  942 |                 default:
  943 |                     return ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR;
  944 |             }
  945 |         }
  946 |         
  947 |         // General MQL5 runtime errors
  948 |         if(mql5Error >= 5000 && mql5Error <= 5999) {
  949 |             return ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR;
  950 |         }
  951 |         
  952 |         return ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR;
  953 |     }
  954 |     
  955 |     string GetMql5ErrorDescription(int mql5Error)
  956 |     {
  957 |         // Enhanced error descriptions for common MQL5 errors
  958 |         switch(mql5Error) {
  959 |             case 10004: return "Requote";
  960 |             case 10006: return "Request rejected";
  961 |             case 10007: return "Request canceled by trader";
  962 |             case 10008: return "Order placed";
  963 |             case 10009: return "Request completed";
  964 |             case 10010: return "Request completed partially";
  965 |             case 10013: return "Invalid request";
  966 |             case 10014: return "Invalid volume in request";
  967 |             case 10015: return "Invalid price in request";
  968 |             case 10016: return "Invalid stops in request";
  969 |             case 10018: return "Market is closed";
  970 |             case 10019: return "No money";
  971 |             case 10020: return "Prices changed";
  972 |             case 10021: return "Off quotes";
  973 |             default:    return "Unknown error";
  974 |         }
  975 |     }
  976 |     
  977 |     string GetSeverityString(ENUM_ERROR_SEVERITY severity) const
  978 |     {
  979 |         switch(severity) {
  980 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_INFO:       return "INFO";
  981 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_WARNING:    return "WARNING";
  982 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_ERROR:      return "ERROR";
  983 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_CRITICAL:   return "CRITICAL";
  984 |             case ERROR_SEVERITY_FATAL:      return "FATAL";
  985 |             default:                        return "UNKNOWN";
  986 |         }
  987 |     }
  988 |     
  989 |     string GetRecoveryActionString(ENUM_RECOVERY_ACTION action) const
  990 |     {
  991 |         switch(action) {
  992 |             case RECOVERY_NONE:           return "None";
  993 |             case RECOVERY_RETRY:          return "Retry";
  994 |             case RECOVERY_FALLBACK:       return "Fallback";
  995 |             case RECOVERY_RESET:          return "Reset";
  996 |             case RECOVERY_RESTART:        return "Restart";
  997 |             case RECOVERY_EMERGENCY_STOP: return "Emergency Stop";
  998 |             default:                      return "Unknown";
  999 |         }
 1000 |     }
 1001 |     
 1002 |     string GetHealingStatusString(ENUM_HEALING_STATUS status) const
 1003 |     {
 1004 |         switch(status) {
 1005 |             case HEALING_NOT_ATTEMPTED:   return "Not Attempted";
 1006 |             case HEALING_IN_PROGRESS:     return "In Progress";
 1007 |             case HEALING_SUCCESS:         return "Success";

   15 |

   19 | class CLogger
   20 | {
   21 | private:
   22 |     // --- CбәҘu hГ¬nh & TrбәЎng thГЎi Nб»ҷi tбәЎi ---
   23 |     ENUM_LOG_LEVEL  m_log_level;
   24 |     int             m_log_output;  // Use int for now, can be ENUM later

   28 |     string          m_telegram_chat_id;
   29 |     string          m_order_comment;
   30 | 
   31 |     string          m_symbol_name;      // TГӘn biб»ғu tЖ°б»Јng Д‘Ж°б»Јc lЖ°u trб»Ҝ
   32 |     string          m_log_file_name;    // TГӘn file log Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§
   33 |     int             m_log_file_handle;  // Handle quбәЈn lГҪ file log
   34 |     bool            m_initialized;      // Cб»қ trбәЎng thГЎi khб»ҹi tбәЎo
   35 | 
   36 |     // --- PhЖ°ЖЎng thб»©c Nб»ҷi bб»ҷ Hб»Јp nhбәҘt ---
   37 |     void Log(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string message, const string tags) const;
   38 |     void WriteToFile(const string& formatted_message) const;
   39 |     bool SendTelegramMessage(const string& formatted_message, const bool important) const;
   40 |     string GetLogLevelString(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) const;
   41 | 
   42 | public:
   43 |     // --- Constructor & Destructor ---
   44 |     CLogger();
   45 |     ~CLogger();
   46 |     
   47 |     // --- PhЖ°ЖЎng thб»©c Khб»ҹi tбәЎo & Dб»Қn dбә№p ---
   48 |     bool Initialize();
   49 |     void Deinitialize();
   50 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
   51 |     void OnTick() {}
   52 |     
   53 |     // --- PhЖ°ЖЎng thб»©c Ghi log ChГӯnh ---
   54 |     void Log(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string message, const string tags = "") const;
   55 |     void Info(const string message, const string tags = "") const { Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, message, tags); }
   56 |     void Debug(const string message, const string tags = "") const { Log(LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG, message, tags); }
   57 |     void Warning(const string message, const string tags = "") const { Log(LOG_LEVEL_WARNING, message, tags); }
   58 |     void Error(const string message, const string tags = "") const { Log(LOG_LEVEL_ERROR, message, tags); }
   59 | 
   60 |     // --- PhЖ°ЖЎng thб»©c Tiб»Үn Гӯch ---
   61 |     string GetLogFileName() const { return m_log_file_name; }
   62 | };

   67 | CLogger::CLogger() : 
   68 |     m_log_level(LOG_LEVEL_INFO),
   69 |     m_log_output(2), // LOG_OUTPUT_CONSOLE equivalent
   70 |     m_enable_telegram(false),

   75 |     m_symbol_name(""),

   80 | }

   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | CLogger::~CLogger() 
   86 | {
   87 |     Deinitialize();
   88 | }
   89 | 
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | //| Initialize - Thiбәҝt lбәӯp Logger tб»« EAContext                      |
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | bool CLogger::Initialize()
   94 | {
   95 |     if (m_initialized) return true;
   96 |     // if (context == NULL) return false; // Removed as per edit hint
   97 | 
   98 |     // Use default values for now - can be enhanced later
   99 |     m_log_level = LOG_LEVEL_INFO;
  100 |     m_log_output = 2; // Console output
  101 |     m_enable_telegram = false;
  102 |     m_order_comment = "APEX_EA";
  103 |     
  104 |     m_symbol_name = Symbol();
  105 | 
  106 |     // 2. Setup file logging if needed
  107 |     if (m_log_output == 1 || m_log_output == 3) // FILE or BOTH
  108 |     {
  109 |         string date_str = TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE);
  110 |         StringReplace(date_str, ".", "");
  111 |         m_log_file_name = "Logs\\" + m_order_comment + "_" + m_symbol_name + "_" + date_str + ".log";
  112 | 
  113 |         m_log_file_handle = FileOpen(m_log_file_name, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_ANSI | FILE_SHARE_READ);
  114 | 
  115 |         if (m_log_file_handle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  116 |         {
  117 |             PrintFormat("LOGGER WARNING: Cannot open log file '%s', error: %d. File logging will be disabled.", m_log_file_name, GetLastError());
  118 |         }
  119 |         else
  120 |         {
  121 |             FileSeek(m_log_file_handle, 0, SEEK_END);
  122 |         }
  123 |     }
  124 | 
  125 |     m_initialized = true;
  126 | 
  127 |     // Log initialization message
  128 |     Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Logger initialized. Log file: '" + (m_log_file_handle != INVALID_HANDLE ? m_log_file_name : "N/A") + "'", "Logger");
  129 | 
  130 |     return true;
  131 | }
  132 | 
  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | //| GiбәЈi phГіng tГ i nguyГӘn khi kбәҝt thГәc EA hoбә·c Logger               |
  135 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  136 | void CLogger::Deinitialize() 
  137 | {
  138 |    if(!m_initialized) return;
  139 | 
  140 |    Log(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Logger is shutting down...", "Logger");
  141 |    
  142 |    if(m_log_file_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) 
  143 |    {
  144 |       FileClose(m_log_file_handle);
  145 |       m_log_file_handle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  146 |    }
  147 |    
  148 |    m_initialized = false;
  149 |    // KhГҙng cГІn m_pContext Д‘б»ғ reset
  150 | }
  151 | 
  152 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  153 | //| GetLogLevelString - Chuyб»ғn enum thГ nh chuб»—i Д‘б»ғ hiб»ғn thб»Ӣ        |
  154 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  155 | string CLogger::GetLogLevelString(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level) const
  156 | {
  157 |     switch(level)
  158 |     {
  159 |         case LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG:   return "DEBUG";
  160 |         case LOG_LEVEL_INFO:    return "INFO";
  161 |         case LOG_LEVEL_WARNING: return "WARNING";
  162 |         case LOG_LEVEL_ERROR:   return "ERROR";
  163 |         default:                return "UNKNOWN";
  164 |     }
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| Log - HГ m ghi log cб»‘t lГөi, hб»Јp nhбәҘt                          |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | void CLogger::Log(const ENUM_LOG_LEVEL level, const string message, const string tags) const
  171 | {
  172 |     // 1. Kiб»ғm tra an toГ n vГ  cбәҘp Д‘б»ҷ log
  173 |     if (!m_initialized || level < m_log_level) return;
  174 | 
  175 |     // 2. Дҗб»Ӣnh dбәЎng thГҙng Д‘iб»Үp
  176 |     string level_str = GetLogLevelString(level);
  177 |     string final_tags = tags != "" ? "[" + tags + "] " : "";
  178 |     string formatted_message = StringFormat("%s | %-7s | %s%s",
  179 |                                      TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE | TIME_SECONDS),
  180 |                                      level_str,
  181 |                                      final_tags,
  182 |                                      message);
  183 | 
  184 |     // 3. Xб»ӯ lГҪ Д‘бә§u ra
  185 |     if (m_log_output == 2 || m_log_output == 3) // CONSOLE or BOTH
  186 |     {
  187 |         Print(formatted_message);
  188 |     }
  189 | 
  190 |     if (m_log_output == 1 || m_log_output == 3) // FILE or BOTH
  191 |     {
  192 |         WriteToFile(formatted_message);
  193 |     }
  194 |     
  195 |     // 4. Gб»ӯi Telegram nбәҝu Д‘Ж°б»Јc kГӯch hoбәЎt
  196 |     if(m_enable_telegram)
  197 |     {
  198 |         bool is_important = (level >= LOG_LEVEL_WARNING);
  199 |         if(!m_telegram_important_only || is_important)
  200 |         {
  201 |             SendTelegramMessage(formatted_message, is_important);
  202 |         }
  203 |     }
  204 | }
  205 | 
  206 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  207 | //| Ghi vГ o file log                                                 |
  208 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  209 | void CLogger::WriteToFile(const string& formatted_message) const
  210 | {
  211 |     if (m_log_file_handle != INVALID_HANDLE)
  212 |     {
  213 |         FileWriteString(m_log_file_handle, formatted_message + "\r\n");
  214 |         FileFlush(m_log_file_handle);
  215 |     }
  216 | }
  217 | 
  218 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  219 | //| Gб»ӯi tin nhбәҜn Telegram                                            |
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | bool CLogger::SendTelegramMessage(const string& formatted_message, const bool important) const
  222 | {
  223 |     if(m_telegram_bot_token == "" || m_telegram_chat_id == "") return false;
  224 | 
  225 |     string url = "https://api.telegram.org/bot" + m_telegram_bot_token + "/sendMessage";
  226 |     string headers;
  227 |     char post[], result[];
  228 |     string message_text = (important ? "\U0001F198 " : "") + "[" + m_order_comment + "] " + formatted_message;
  229 |     string post_data = "chat_id=" + m_telegram_chat_id + "&text=" + CharArrayToString(StringToCharArray(message_text, 0, -1, CP_UTF8), 0, -1);
  230 | 
  231 |     StringToCharArray(post_data, post, 0, StringLen(post_data), CP_UTF8);
  232 | 
  233 |     int res = WebRequest("POST", url, NULL, NULL, 5000, post, ArraySize(post), result, headers);
  234 | 
  235 |     if (res == -1)
  236 |     {       
  237 |         // KhГҙng ghi log lб»—i б»ҹ Д‘Гўy Д‘б»ғ trГЎnh vГІng lбә·p vГҙ hбәЎn
  238 |         PrintFormat("LOGGER ERROR: Failed to send Telegram message. Error code: %d", GetLastError());
  239 |         return false;
  240 |     }
  241 |     
  242 |     return true;
  243 | }
  244 | 
  245 | } // KбәҫT THГҡC NAMESPACE
  246 | 
  247 | #endif // APEX_LOGGER_MQH_
================================================================================

    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | 
    7 | #ifndef CORE_SESSIONMANAGER_MQH_
    8 | #define CORE_SESSIONMANAGER_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | #include "Core_Defines.mqh"
   11 | #include "Core_Context.mqh"
   12 | 
   13 | // Namespace has been removed.
   14 | 
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | //| Session Enumeration & Structure                                  |
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | 
   19 | enum ENUM_SESSION {
   20 |     SESSION_UNKNOWN = 0,       // PhiГӘn khГҙng xГЎc Д‘б»Ӣnh
   21 |     SESSION_ASIAN = 1,        // PhiГӘn ГҒ (Tokyo)
   22 |     SESSION_EUROPEAN = 2,     // PhiГӘn London (ГӮu)
   23 |     SESSION_AMERICAN = 3,     // PhiГӘn New York (Mб»№)
   24 |     SESSION_SYDNEY = 4,       // PhiГӘn Sydney
   25 |     SESSION_OVERNIGHT = 5,    // PhiГӘn qua Д‘ГӘm
   26 |     SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN, // PhiГӘn giao thoa ГӮu-Mб»№ (thanh khoбәЈn cao nhбәҘt)
   27 |     SESSION_LONDON_NY,         // PhiГӘn giao thoa London-NY (tЖ°ЖЎng tб»ұ EUROPEAN_AMERICAN)
   28 |     SESSION_CLOSING            // PhiГӘn Д‘Гіng cб»ӯa (Гӯt thanh khoбәЈn)
   29 | };
   30 | 
   31 | struct SSessionInfo {
   32 |     ENUM_SESSION        CurrentSession;
   33 |     bool                IsActive;
   34 |     bool                IsWeekend;
   35 |     bool                IsDST;
   36 |     datetime            SessionStartTime;
   37 |     datetime            SessionEndTime;
   38 |     int                 SecondsToNextSession;
   39 |     string              SessionName;
   40 | };
   41 | 
   42 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   43 | //| Modern Session Manager Class - GP-DSI Architecture               |
   44 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   45 | class CSessionManager {
   46 | private:
   47 |     // Core dependencies (GP-DSI pattern)
   48 |     CEaContext*         m_pContext; // Pointer to the global EA context
   49 |     
   50 |     // Session configuration
   51 |     bool                m_enableSessionFilter;
   52 |     ENUM_SESSION_FILTER m_sessionFilter;
   53 |     int                 m_gmtOffset;
   54 |     bool                m_autoAdjustDST;
   55 |     
   56 |     // Session times (GMT)
   57 |     int                 m_asianStart;       // 0
   58 |     int                 m_asianEnd;         // 8
   59 |     int                 m_londonStart;      // 8
   60 |     int                 m_londonEnd;        // 16
   61 |     int                 m_newYorkStart;     // 13
   62 |     int                 m_newYorkEnd;       // 21
   63 |     int                 m_overlapStart;     // 13
   64 |     int                 m_overlapEnd;       // 16
   65 |     
   66 |     // Current state
   67 |     ENUM_SESSION        m_currentSession;
   68 |     bool                m_isWeekend;
   69 |     bool                m_isDST;
   70 |     datetime            m_lastUpdate;
   71 |     
   72 |     // Opening time tracking
   73 |     bool                m_tradeLondonOpen;
   74 |     bool                m_tradeNewYorkOpen;
   75 |     int                 m_openWindowMinutes;
   76 |     datetime            m_londonOpenTime;
   77 |     datetime            m_newYorkOpenTime;
   78 |     
   79 |     // Performance optimization
   80 |     datetime            m_lastDateCheck;
   81 |     bool                m_verboseLogging;
   82 |     
   83 | public:
   84 |     // Constructor & Destructor
   85 |     CSessionManager();
   86 |     ~CSessionManager();
   87 |     
   88 |     // Initialization
   89 |     bool Initialize(CLogger* logger, CSettings* settings);
   90 |     void Deinitialize();
   91 |     
   92 |     // Core functionality
   93 |     void Update();
   94 |     bool IsSessionActive();
   95 |     bool IsMarketOpen();
   96 |     
   97 |     // Session queries
   98 |     ENUM_SESSION GetCurrentSession() const { return m_currentSession; }
   99 |     string GetCurrentSessionName();
  100 |     SSessionInfo GetSessionInfo();
  101 |     
  102 |     // Opening time checks
  103 |     bool IsLondonOpening();
  104 |     bool IsNewYorkOpening();
  105 |     bool IsSessionOpening(ENUM_SESSION session);
  106 |     
  107 |     // Time calculations
  108 |     datetime GetAdjustedGMT();
  109 |     datetime GetNextSessionStart(ENUM_SESSION session);
  110 |     int GetSecondsToNextSession(ENUM_SESSION session);
  111 |     
  112 |     // Configuration
  113 |     void SetSessionFilter(ENUM_SESSION_FILTER filter) { m_sessionFilter = filter; }
  114 |     void SetGMTOffset(int offset) { m_gmtOffset = offset; }
  115 |     void EnableSessionFilter(bool enable) { m_enableSessionFilter = enable; }
  116 |     
  117 |     // Getters
  118 |     bool IsSessionFilterEnabled() const { return m_enableSessionFilter; }
  119 |     ENUM_SESSION_FILTER GetSessionFilter() const { return m_sessionFilter; }
  120 |     bool IsWeekend() const { return m_isWeekend; }
  121 |     bool IsDST() const { return m_isDST; }
  122 |     
  123 | private:
  124 |     // Internal methods
  125 |     void UpdateCurrentSession();
  126 |     void UpdateDateInfo();
  127 |     bool DetectDST();
  128 |     void AdjustSessionTimesForDST();
  129 |     bool IsInSession(int startHour, int endHour);
  130 |     bool IsSessionActiveNow(ENUM_SESSION_FILTER filter);
  131 |     void LogSessionChange(ENUM_SESSION oldSession, ENUM_SESSION newSession);
  132 | };
  133 | 
  134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  135 | //| Constructor                                                       |
  136 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  137 | CSessionManager::CSessionManager() {
  138 |     // Initialize pointers
  139 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  140 |     
  141 |     // Default configuration
  142 |     m_enableSessionFilter = false;
  143 |     m_sessionFilter = FILTER_ALL_SESSIONS;
  144 |     m_gmtOffset = 0;
  145 |     m_autoAdjustDST = true;
  146 |     
  147 |     // Default session times (GMT)
  148 |     m_asianStart = 0;
  149 |     m_asianEnd = 8;
  150 |     m_londonStart = 8;
  151 |     m_londonEnd = 16;
  152 |     m_newYorkStart = 13;
  153 |     m_newYorkEnd = 21;
  154 |     m_overlapStart = 13;
  155 |     m_overlapEnd = 16;
  156 |     
  157 |     // Initialize state
  158 |     m_currentSession = SESSION_CLOSING;
  159 |     m_isWeekend = false;
  160 |     m_isDST = false;
  161 |     m_lastUpdate = 0;
  162 |     
  163 |     // Opening time settings
  164 |     m_tradeLondonOpen = true;
  165 |     m_tradeNewYorkOpen = true;
  166 |     m_openWindowMinutes = 30;
  167 |     m_londonOpenTime = 0;
  168 |     m_newYorkOpenTime = 0;
  169 |     
  170 |     // Performance
  171 |     m_lastDateCheck = 0;
  172 |     m_verboseLogging = false;
  173 | }
  174 | 
  175 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  176 | //| Destructor                                                        |
  177 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  178 | CSessionManager::~CSessionManager() {
  179 |     Deinitialize();
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  183 | //| Initialize Session Manager                                        |
  184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  185 | bool CSessionManager::Initialize(CEaContext* context) {
  186 |     m_pContext = context;
  187 |     if(m_pContext == NULL || m_pContext->pLogger == NULL) {
  188 |         Print("SessionManager: Context or Logger is NULL");
  189 |         return false;
  190 |     }
  191 |     
  192 |     // Load configuration from settings if available
  193 |     if(m_pContext->pSettings != NULL) {
  194 |         // TODO: Load session settings from CSettings when implemented
  195 |         m_verboseLogging = true; // Default for now
  196 |     }
  197 |     
  198 |     // Detect DST if auto-adjust is enabled
  199 |     if(m_autoAdjustDST) {
  200 |         m_isDST = DetectDST();
  201 |         if(m_isDST) {
  202 |             AdjustSessionTimesForDST();
  203 |         }
  204 |     }
  205 |     
  206 |     // Initial update
  207 |     Update();
  208 |     
  209 |     LOG_INFO(StringFormat("SessionManager initialized - GMT Offset: %d, DST: %s, Filter: %s",
  210 |                                      m_gmtOffset, m_isDST ? "Yes" : "No", EnumToString(m_sessionFilter)));
  211 |     
  212 |     return true;
  213 | }
  214 | 
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | //| Deinitialize                                                      |
  217 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  218 | void CSessionManager::Deinitialize() {
  219 |     if(m_pLogger != NULL) {
  220 |         LOG_DEBUG("SessionManager deinitialized");
  221 |     }
  222 |     
  223 |     m_pLogger = NULL;
  224 |     m_pSettings = NULL;
  225 | }
  226 | 
  227 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  228 | //| Update Session Information                                        |
  229 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  230 | void CSessionManager::Update() {
  231 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  232 |     
  233 |     // Optimize: Only update if significant time has passed
  234 |     if(currentTime - m_lastUpdate < 60) return; // Update every minute
  235 |     
  236 |     m_lastUpdate = currentTime;
  237 |     
  238 |     // Update date info (DST detection, weekend check)
  239 |     UpdateDateInfo();
  240 |     
  241 |     // Update current session
  242 |     ENUM_SESSION oldSession = m_currentSession;
  243 |     UpdateCurrentSession();
  244 |     
  245 |     // Log session changes
  246 |     if(oldSession != m_currentSession) {
  247 |         LogSessionChange(oldSession, m_currentSession);
  248 |     }
  249 | }
  250 | 
  251 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  252 | //| Check if current session is active for trading                   |
  253 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  254 | bool CSessionManager::IsSessionActive() {
  255 |     // If session filter is disabled, always allow trading
  256 |     if(!m_enableSessionFilter) return true;
  257 |     
  258 |     // No trading on weekends
  259 |     if(m_isWeekend) return false;
  260 |     
  261 |     // Check specific session filter
  262 |     return IsSessionActiveNow(m_sessionFilter);
  263 | }
  264 | 
  265 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  266 | //| Check if market is open                                          |
  267 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  268 | bool CSessionManager::IsMarketOpen() {
  269 |     // Basic market open check
  270 |     if(m_isWeekend) return false;
  271 |     
  272 |     // Market is open during any major session
  273 |     return (m_currentSession == SESSION_ASIAN ||
  274 |             m_currentSession == SESSION_EUROPEAN ||
  275 |             m_currentSession == SESSION_AMERICAN ||
  276 |             m_currentSession == SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN);
  277 | }
  278 | 
  279 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  280 | //| Get current session name                                         |
  281 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  282 | string CSessionManager::GetCurrentSessionName() {
  283 |     switch(m_currentSession) {
  284 |         case SESSION_ASIAN: return "Asian";
  285 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN: return "European";
  286 |         case SESSION_AMERICAN: return "American";
  287 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN: return "EUR-USD Overlap";
  288 |         case SESSION_CLOSING: return "Closing";
  289 |         case SESSION_OVERNIGHT: return "Overnight";
  290 |         default: return "Unknown";
  291 |     }
  292 | }
  293 | 
  294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  295 | //| Get comprehensive session information                             |
  296 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  297 | SSessionInfo CSessionManager::GetSessionInfo() {
  298 |     SSessionInfo info;
  299 |     info.CurrentSession = m_currentSession;
  300 |     info.IsActive = IsSessionActive();
  301 |     info.IsWeekend = m_isWeekend;
  302 |     info.IsDST = m_isDST;
  303 |     info.SessionName = GetCurrentSessionName();
  304 |     info.SecondsToNextSession = GetSecondsToNextSession(SESSION_EUROPEAN); // Default to London
  305 |     
  306 |     return info;
  307 | }
  308 | 
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | //| Check if London market is opening                                |
  311 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  312 | bool CSessionManager::IsLondonOpening() {
  313 |     if(!m_tradeLondonOpen) return false;
  314 |     
  315 |     datetime currentTime = GetAdjustedGMT();
  316 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  317 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, dt);
  318 |     
  319 |     return (dt.hour == m_londonStart && dt.min < m_openWindowMinutes);
  320 | }
  321 | 
  322 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  323 | //| Check if New York market is opening                              |
  324 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  325 | bool CSessionManager::IsNewYorkOpening() {
  326 |     if(!m_tradeNewYorkOpen) return false;
  327 |     
  328 |     datetime currentTime = GetAdjustedGMT();
  329 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  330 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, dt);
  331 |     
  332 |     return (dt.hour == m_newYorkStart && dt.min < m_openWindowMinutes);
  333 | }
  334 | 
  335 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  336 | //| Check if any session is opening                                  |
  337 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  338 | bool CSessionManager::IsSessionOpening(ENUM_SESSION session) {
  339 |     switch(session) {
  340 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN: return IsLondonOpening();
  341 |         case SESSION_AMERICAN: return IsNewYorkOpening();
  342 |         default: return false;
  343 |     }
  344 | }
  345 | 
  346 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  347 | //| Get GMT time adjusted for offset                                 |
  348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  349 | datetime CSessionManager::GetAdjustedGMT() {
  350 |     return TimeCurrent() + (m_gmtOffset * 3600);
  351 | }
  352 | 
  353 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  354 | //| Get next session start time                                      |
  355 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  356 | datetime CSessionManager::GetNextSessionStart(ENUM_SESSION session) {
  357 |     datetime currentTime = GetAdjustedGMT();
  358 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  359 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, dt);
  360 |     
  361 |     int nextHour = 0;
  362 |     switch(session) {
  363 |         case SESSION_ASIAN: nextHour = m_asianStart; break;
  364 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN: nextHour = m_londonStart; break;
  365 |         case SESSION_AMERICAN: nextHour = m_newYorkStart; break;
  366 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN: nextHour = m_overlapStart; break;
  367 |         default: return 0;
  368 |     }
  369 |     
  370 |     // Calculate next occurrence
  371 |     MqlDateTime nextDt = dt;
  372 |     nextDt.hour = nextHour;
  373 |     nextDt.min = 0;
  374 |     nextDt.sec = 0;
  375 |     
  376 |     // If time has passed today, move to tomorrow
  377 |     if(dt.hour >= nextHour) {
  378 |         nextDt.day += 1;
  379 |     }
  380 |     
  381 |     return StructToTime(nextDt);
  382 | }
  383 | 
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | //| Get seconds until next session                                   |
  386 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  387 | int CSessionManager::GetSecondsToNextSession(ENUM_SESSION session) {
  388 |     datetime nextStart = GetNextSessionStart(session);
  389 |     datetime currentTime = GetAdjustedGMT();
  390 |     
  391 |     if(nextStart <= currentTime) return 0;
  392 |     
  393 |     return (int)(nextStart - currentTime);
  394 | }
  395 | 
  396 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  397 | //| Update current session based on time                             |
  398 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  399 | void CSessionManager::UpdateCurrentSession() {
  400 |     if(m_isWeekend) {
  401 |         m_currentSession = SESSION_OVERNIGHT;
  402 |         return;
  403 |     }
  404 |     
  405 |     datetime currentTime = GetAdjustedGMT();
  406 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  407 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, dt);
  408 |     
  409 |     int currentHour = dt.hour;
  410 |     
  411 |     // Determine current session
  412 |     if(IsInSession(m_overlapStart, m_overlapEnd)) {
  413 |         m_currentSession = SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN;
  414 |     }
  415 |     else if(IsInSession(m_asianStart, m_asianEnd)) {
  416 |         m_currentSession = SESSION_ASIAN;
  417 |     }
  418 |     else if(IsInSession(m_londonStart, m_londonEnd)) {
  419 |         m_currentSession = SESSION_EUROPEAN;
  420 |     }
  421 |     else if(IsInSession(m_newYorkStart, m_newYorkEnd)) {
  422 |         m_currentSession = SESSION_AMERICAN;
  423 |     }
  424 |     else {
  425 |         m_currentSession = SESSION_CLOSING;
  426 |     }
  427 | }
  428 | 
  429 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  430 | //| Update date information and weekend status                       |
  431 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  432 | void CSessionManager::UpdateDateInfo() {
  433 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  434 |     
  435 |     // Only check date info once per day
  436 |     if(currentTime - m_lastDateCheck < 86400) return;
  437 |     
  438 |     m_lastDateCheck = currentTime;
  439 |     
  440 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  441 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, dt);
  442 |     
  443 |     // Update weekend status
  444 |     m_isWeekend = (dt.day_of_week == 0 || dt.day_of_week == 6);
  445 |     
  446 |     // Update DST if auto-adjust is enabled
  447 |     if(m_autoAdjustDST) {
  448 |         bool wasDST = m_isDST;
  449 |         m_isDST = DetectDST();
  450 |         
  451 |         if(wasDST != m_isDST && m_pLogger != NULL) {
  452 |             LOG_INFO(StringFormat("DST status changed: %s -> %s",
  453 |                                             wasDST ? "Active" : "Inactive",
  454 |                                             m_isDST ? "Active" : "Inactive"));
  455 |             
  456 |             if(m_isDST) {
  457 |                 AdjustSessionTimesForDST();
  458 |             }
  459 |         }
  460 |     }
  461 | }
  462 | 
  463 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  464 | //| Detect Daylight Saving Time                                      |
  465 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  466 | bool CSessionManager::DetectDST() {
  467 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  468 |     TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  469 |     
  470 |     // Simple DST detection (US/EU rules)
  471 |     // DST typically runs from March (2nd Sunday) to November (1st Sunday)
  472 |     if(dt.mon > 3 && dt.mon < 11) {
  473 |         return true;
  474 |     }
  475 |     else if(dt.mon == 3) {
  476 |         // March: DST starts on 2nd Sunday
  477 |         return (dt.day >= 8 && dt.day_of_week == 0) || (dt.day > 14);
  478 |     }
  479 |     else if(dt.mon == 11) {
  480 |         // November: DST ends on 1st Sunday
  481 |         return (dt.day < 8 && dt.day_of_week != 0) || (dt.day < 1);
  482 |     }
  483 |     
  484 |     return false;
  485 | }
  486 | 
  487 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 | //| Adjust session times for DST                                     |
  489 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 | void CSessionManager::AdjustSessionTimesForDST() {
  491 |     // When DST is active, sessions typically start 1 hour earlier
  492 |     // This is handled by the GMT offset adjustment
  493 |     if(m_pLogger != NULL) {
  494 |         LOG_DEBUG("Applied DST adjustments to session times");
  495 |     }
  496 | }
  497 | 
  498 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  499 | //| Check if current time is within session hours                    |
  500 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  501 | bool CSessionManager::IsInSession(int startHour, int endHour) {
  502 |     datetime currentTime = GetAdjustedGMT();
  503 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  504 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, dt);
  505 |     
  506 |     int currentHour = dt.hour;
  507 |     
  508 |     // Handle overnight sessions (e.g., 22:00 - 06:00)
  509 |     if(startHour > endHour) {
  510 |         return (currentHour >= startHour || currentHour < endHour);
  511 |     }
  512 |     
  513 |     // Regular sessions (e.g., 08:00 - 16:00)
  514 |     return (currentHour >= startHour && currentHour < endHour);
  515 | }
  516 | 
  517 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  518 | //| Check if specific session filter is active now                   |
  519 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  520 | bool CSessionManager::IsSessionActiveNow(ENUM_SESSION_FILTER filter) {
  521 |     switch(filter) {
  522 |         case FILTER_ALL_SESSIONS:
  523 |             return IsMarketOpen();
  524 |             
  525 |         case FILTER_ASIAN_ONLY:
  526 |             return (m_currentSession == SESSION_ASIAN);
  527 |             
  528 |         case FILTER_LONDON_ONLY:
  529 |             return (m_currentSession == SESSION_EUROPEAN);
  530 |             
  531 |         case FILTER_NEWYORK_ONLY:
  532 |             return (m_currentSession == SESSION_AMERICAN);
  533 |             
  534 |         case FILTER_OVERLAP_ONLY:
  535 |             return (m_currentSession == SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN);
  536 |             
  537 |         default:
  538 |             return false;
  539 |     }
  540 | }
  541 | 
  542 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  543 | //| Log session changes                                              |
  544 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  545 | void CSessionManager::LogSessionChange(ENUM_SESSION oldSession, ENUM_SESSION newSession) {
  546 |     if(m_pLogger == NULL || !m_verboseLogging) return;
  547 |     
  548 |     string oldName = "Unknown";
  549 |     string newName = GetCurrentSessionName();
  550 |     
  551 |     switch(oldSession) {
  552 |         case SESSION_ASIAN: oldName = "Asian"; break;
  553 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN: oldName = "European"; break;
  554 |         case SESSION_AMERICAN: oldName = "American"; break;
  555 |         case SESSION_EUROPEAN_AMERICAN: oldName = "EUR-USD Overlap"; break;
  556 |         case SESSION_CLOSING: oldName = "Closing"; break;
  557 |         case SESSION_OVERNIGHT: oldName = "Overnight"; break;
  558 |     }
  559 |     
  560 |     LOG_INFO(StringFormat("Session changed: %s -> %s", oldName, newName));
  561 | }
  562 | };
  563 | 
  564 | // End of namespace removal
  565 | 
  566 | #endif // CORE_SESSIONMANAGER_MQH_
  567 |
