    1 | #ifndef CORE_SYMBOLINFO_MQH
    2 | #define CORE_SYMBOLINFO_MQH
    3 | 
    4 | #include "SonicR_CommonStructs.mqh"
    5 | 
    6 | namespace ApexSonicR {
    7 | 
    8 | class CSymbolInfo 
    9 | {
   10 | private:
   11 |     CEaContext*  m_pContext;      // Pointer to the global context
   12 |     bool         m_IsInitialized;
   13 |     string       m_symbol_name;
   14 |     MqlTick      m_latest_tick;
   15 | 
   16 | public:
   17 |     CSymbolInfo() : m_pContext(NULL), m_IsInitialized(false), m_symbol_name("") {}
   18 |     ~CSymbolInfo() {}
   19 | 
   20 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* pContext);
   21 |     void Deinitialize();
   22 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_IsInitialized; }
   23 |     void OnTick();
   24 | 
   25 |     // --- Getters for Symbol Properties ---
   26 |     string   Symbol() const { return m_symbol_name; }
   27 |     double   PipSize() const;
   28 |     double   TickValue() const;
   29 |     int      Digits() const;
   30 |     double   Point() const;
   31 |     double   Spread() const;
   32 |     double   StopLevel() const;
   33 |     double   LotSizeMin() const;
   34 |     double   LotSizeMax() const;
   35 |     double   LotStep() const;
   36 | 
   37 |     // --- Getters for Market Data ---
   38 |     double   Bid() const { return m_latest_tick.bid; }
   39 |     double   Ask() const { return m_latest_tick.ask; }
   40 |     double   Last() const { return m_latest_tick.last; }
   41 |     datetime Time() const { return m_latest_tick.time; }
   42 | };
   43 | 
   44 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   45 | //| Implementation                                                   |
   46 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   47 | bool CSymbolInfo::Initialize(CEaContext* pContext) 
   48 | {
   49 |     m_pContext = pContext;
   50 |     if (m_pContext == NULL)
   51 |     {
   52 |         Print("FATAL: CSymbolInfo received a NULL context during initialization.");
   53 |         return false;
   54 |     }
   55 | 
   56 |     m_symbol_name = ::Symbol(); // Use current chart symbol by default
   57 | 
   58 |     if (!::SymbolSelect(m_symbol_name, true)) 
   59 |     {
   60 |         string msg = "Failed to select symbol: " + m_symbol_name;
   61 |         Print(msg);
   62 |         return false;
   63 |     }
   64 |     
   65 |     OnTick(); // Initial refresh
   66 |     
   67 |     Print("CSymbolInfo initialized for symbol: " + m_symbol_name);
   68 |     m_IsInitialized = true;
   69 |     return true;
   70 | }
   71 | 
   72 | void CSymbolInfo::Deinitialize()
   73 | {
   74 |     m_IsInitialized = false;
   75 |     m_pContext = NULL;
   76 | }
   77 | 
   78 | void CSymbolInfo::OnTick() 
   79 | {
   80 |     if(!m_IsInitialized) return;
   81 |     ::SymbolInfoTick(m_symbol_name, m_latest_tick);
   82 | }
   83 | 
   84 | double CSymbolInfo::PipSize() const 
   85 | {
   86 |     int digits = Digits();
   87 |     if (digits == 3 || digits == 5)
   88 |         return 10 * Point();
   89 |     return Point();
   90 | }
   91 | 
   92 | double CSymbolInfo::TickValue() const {
   93 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
   94 | }
   95 | 
   96 | int CSymbolInfo::Digits() const {
   97 |     return (int)::SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
   98 | }
   99 | 
  100 | double CSymbolInfo::Point() const {
  101 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_POINT);
  102 | }
  103 | 
  104 | double CSymbolInfo::Spread() const {
  105 |     return (double)::SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * Point();
  106 | }
  107 | 
  108 | double CSymbolInfo::StopLevel() const {
  109 |     return (double)::SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL) * Point();
  110 | }
  111 | 
  112 | double CSymbolInfo::LotSizeMin() const {
  113 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  114 | }
  115 | 
  116 | double CSymbolInfo::LotSizeMax() const {
  117 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  118 | }
  119 | 
  120 | double CSymbolInfo::LotStep() const {
  121 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  122 | }
  123 | 
  124 | } // namespace ApexSonicR
  125 | 
  126 | #endif // CORE_SYMBOLINFO_MQH

рҹ“Ҡ Thб»‘ng kГӘ: 99 dГІng, 3367 kГҪ tб»ұ, encoding: utf-8

    1 | #ifndef CORE_TIMEMANAGER_MQH
    2 | #define CORE_TIMEMANAGER_MQH
    3 | 
    4 | #include "Core_Defines.mqh"
    5 | 
    6 | namespace ApexSonicR 
    7 | {
    8 | 
    9 | class CTimeManager 
   10 | {
   11 | private:
   12 |     CEaContext*      m_pContext;         // Pointer to the global EA context
   13 |     bool             m_IsInitialized;    // Flag to indicate if the manager is initialized
   14 |     datetime         m_last_bar_time;    // Time of the last known bar
   15 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES  m_main_timeframe;   // The primary timeframe the EA operates on
   16 | 
   17 | public:
   18 |     CTimeManager() : m_pContext(NULL),
   19 |                      m_IsInitialized(false),
   20 |                      m_last_bar_time(0),
   21 |                      m_main_timeframe(PERIOD_CURRENT) {}
   22 | 
   23 |     ~CTimeManager() {}
   24 | 
   25 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* pContext);
   26 |     void Deinitialize();
   27 |     void OnTick();
   28 | 
   29 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_IsInitialized; }
   30 |     datetime GetCurrentServerTime() const { return ::TimeCurrent(); }
   31 |     datetime GetCurrentLocalTime() const { return ::TimeLocal(); }
   32 |     datetime GetCurrentGMTTime() const { return ::TimeGMT(); }
   33 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES GetMainTimeframe() const { return m_main_timeframe; }
   34 | 
   35 |     // Session detection placeholders
   36 |     bool IsLondonSession() const { return false; } // To be implemented
   37 |     bool IsNewYorkSession() const { return false; } // To be implemented
   38 |     bool IsTokyoSession() const { return false; }   // To be implemented
   39 | };
   40 | 
   41 | bool CTimeManager::Initialize(CEaContext* pContext) 
   42 | {
   43 |     m_pContext = pContext;
   44 |     if (m_pContext == NULL) 
   45 |     {
   46 |         Print("FATAL: CTimeManager received a NULL context during initialization.");
   47 |         return false;
   48 |     }
   49 | 
   50 |     if (m_pContext->pSymbolInfo == NULL || !m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->IsInitialized()) 
   51 |     {
   52 |         Print("ERROR: CTimeManager::Initialize - SymbolInfo is not initialized.");
   53 |         return false;
   54 |     }
   55 | 
   56 |     // For now, we'll hardcode the main timeframe. This will later come from Inputs.
   57 |     m_main_timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT; // Or a specific timeframe like PERIOD_M15
   58 |     if(m_main_timeframe == PERIOD_CURRENT) m_main_timeframe = (ENUM_TIMEFRAMES)::Period();
   59 | 
   60 |     m_last_bar_time = (datetime)::SeriesInfoInteger(m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), m_main_timeframe, SERIES_LASTBAR_DATE);
   61 |     if (m_last_bar_time == 0) 
   62 |     {
   63 |         Print("ERROR: CTimeManager::Initialize - Could not retrieve last bar date for " + m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol() + ". Is chart history available?");
   64 |         return false;
   65 |     }
   66 | 
   67 |     m_IsInitialized = true;
   68 |     Print("CTimeManager initialized for timeframe: " + EnumToString(m_main_timeframe));
   69 |     return true;
   70 | }
   71 | 
   72 | void CTimeManager::Deinitialize()
   73 | {
   74 |     m_IsInitialized = false;
   75 |     m_pContext = NULL;
   76 | }
   77 | 
   78 | void CTimeManager::OnTick() 
   79 | {
   80 |     if (!m_IsInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) return;
   81 | 
   82 |     // Default to resetting the flag each tick
   83 |     m_pContext->IsNewBarEvent = false;
   84 | 
   85 |     datetime current_bar_time = (datetime)::SeriesInfoInteger(m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), m_main_timeframe, SERIES_LASTBAR_DATE);
   86 |     
   87 |     if (current_bar_time > m_last_bar_time) 
   88 |     {
   89 |         m_last_bar_time = current_bar_time;
   90 |         m_pContext->IsNewBarEvent = true; // Set the flag for the entire system
   91 |         
   92 |         // Logging can be added here once logger is available in context
   93 |         // Print("New bar detected on timeframe: " + EnumToString(m_main_timeframe));
   94 |     }
   95 | }
   96 | 
   97 | } // namespace ApexSonicR
   98 | 
   99 | #endif // CORE_TIMEMANAGER_MQH
================================================================================

рҹ”— ДҗЖ°б»қng dбә«n Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\Sonic R_MC\01_SONIC R_MC_FINAL\FairValueGaps.mqh

рҹ“Ҡ Thб»‘ng kГӘ: 145 dГІng, 5363 kГҪ tб»ұ, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                               FairValueGaps.mqh |
    3 | //|                                     Sonic R EA - SMC Engine |
    4 | //|                                     https://www.manus-ai.com |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Manus AI"
    7 | #property version   "1.00"
    8 | #property strict
    9 | 
   10 | #include "SMC_Structures.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| CFairValueGaps Class                                             |
   14 | //| Responsible for detecting Fair Value Gaps (FVG).                 |
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | class CFairValueGaps
   17 | {
   18 | private:
   19 |     // Configuration
   20 |     FVGConfig           m_config;
   21 | 
   22 |     // Context
   23 |     string              m_symbol;
   24 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES     m_timeframe;
   25 | 
   26 |     // Data
   27 |     CArrayObj*          m_fvgs; // Array of FairValueGap
   28 | 
   29 | public:
   30 |     CFairValueGaps(void);
   31 |    ~CFairValueGaps(void);
   32 | 
   33 |     bool Initialize(const FVGConfig &config, string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe);
   34 |     void Update();
   35 |     
   36 |     // Getters
   37 |     int GetFVGsCount() const { return m_fvgs.Total(); }
   38 |     FairValueGap* GetFVG(int index) const { return (FairValueGap*)m_fvgs.At(index); }
   39 | 
   40 | private:
   41 |     void ScanForFVGs();
   42 |     void AddFVG(const MqlRates &candle1, const MqlRates &candle3, FVG_TYPE type);
   43 | };
   44 | 
   45 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   46 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   47 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   48 | CFairValueGaps::CFairValueGaps(void)
   49 | {
   50 |     m_fvgs = new CArrayObj();
   51 | }
   52 | 
   53 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   54 | //| Destructor                                                       |
   55 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   56 | CFairValueGaps::~CFairValueGaps(void)
   57 | {
   58 |     if(CheckPointer(m_fvgs) != POINTER_INVALID) delete m_fvgs;
   59 | }
   60 | 
   61 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   62 | //| Initialize                                                       |
   63 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   64 | bool CFairValueGaps::Initialize(const FVGConfig &config, string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
   65 | {
   66 |     m_config = config;
   67 |     m_symbol = symbol;
   68 |     m_timeframe = timeframe;
   69 |     return true;
   70 | }
   71 | 
   72 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   73 | //| Update                                                           |
   74 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   75 | void CFairValueGaps::Update()
   76 | {
   77 |     ScanForFVGs();
   78 | }
   79 | 
   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | //| ScanForFVGs                                                      |
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | void CFairValueGaps::ScanForFVGs()
   84 | {
   85 |     MqlRates rates[];
   86 |     // Look back a reasonable number of candles to find FVGs
   87 |     if(CopyRates(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, m_config.LookbackPeriod, rates) <= 0)
   88 |     {
   89 |         printf("Failed to copy rates for FVG scan");
   90 |         return;
   91 |     }
   92 | 
   93 |     // Clear previous FVGs to avoid duplicates. A better approach might be to check for existing ones.
   94 |     m_fvgs.Clear();
   95 | 
   96 |     // We need at least 3 candles to identify an FVG.
   97 |     for(int i = ArraySize(rates) - 3; i >= 0; i--)
   98 |     {
   99 |         const MqlRates &candle1 = rates[i+2]; // Most recent candle in the pattern
  100 |         const MqlRates &candle2 = rates[i+1];
  101 |         const MqlRates &candle3 = rates[i];   // Oldest candle in the pattern
  102 | 
  103 |         // Bullish FVG (or BISI - Buyside Imbalance Sellside Inefficiency)
  104 |         // The low of candle 1 is higher than the high of candle 3.
  105 |         if(candle1.low > candle3.high)
  106 |         {
  107 |             // Check if the gap is large enough
  108 |             double gap_size = candle1.low - candle3.high;
  109 |             if(gap_size >= m_config.MinGapSizePoints * _Point)
  110 |             {
  111 |                  AddFVG(candle1, candle3, FVG_BULLISH);
  112 |                  printf("Bullish FVG found at %s", TimeToString(candle2.time));
  113 |             }
  114 |         }
  115 | 
  116 |         // Bearish FVG (or SIBI - Sellside Imbalance Buyside Inefficiency)
  117 |         // The high of candle 1 is lower than the low of candle 3.
  118 |         if(candle1.high < candle3.low)
  119 |         {
  120 |             // Check if the gap is large enough
  121 |             double gap_size = candle3.low - candle1.high;
  122 |             if(gap_size >= m_config.MinGapSizePoints * _Point)
  123 |             {
  124 |                 AddFVG(candle1, candle3, FVG_BEARISH);
  125 |                 printf("Bearish FVG found at %s", TimeToString(candle2.time));
  126 |             }
  127 |         }
  128 |     }
  129 | }
  130 | 
  131 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  132 | //| AddFVG                                                           |
  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | void CFairValueGaps::AddFVG(const MqlRates &candle1, const MqlRates &candle3, FVG_TYPE type)
  135 | {
  136 |     FairValueGap* fvg = new FairValueGap();
  137 |     fvg.type = type;
  138 |     fvg.time_start = candle1.time;
  139 |     fvg.time_end = candle3.time;
  140 |     fvg.price_high = (type == FVG_BULLISH) ? candle1.high : candle3.high;
  141 |     fvg.price_low = (type == FVG_BULLISH) ? candle3.low : candle1.low;
  142 |     fvg.is_filled = false;
  143 | 
  144 |     m_fvgs.Add(fvg);
  145 | }
================================================================================

  491 | (wГ В«ВҚVuВҷВҫГӣ8ВЎEГ…UГіВјВ»ВӘГңeГ”0В…  492 |   493 | ВүВӮГҘ"Г»eГӘГј%ВҲ^-oГҝВіA.В‘zГҡГ©В”ВӯВ—В—Вһ&AВҮВ°]Г·Г’ВіГҰ$Г•ВҸВӨВҸВӯZГұГҺВ№lheГ»9ВҢkГёВҺГҺГ„8ГҖZГ№Г«QГәВёГ”'3ВЈГ·Г•ГҲL~ВҰГЎdГ…BГ¬Г»ВүГ“В“ВҗГұ~ВҠГҪJВӘВӯCxГҖ#RBГҢВӢГ”ГҹxВ’ВҲГҖГҜВҲГқВ©ВҳВЎcR?VВөГ ГҜ.2  494 | Г¬/ГІВ»Г§В‘ГәВўГҢГҰa^ВӯВ§  495 | aГ dГҠГҰEkYВә}ВҗГ„ВҖГұ\Г—\Г '$ВӣГ¬9Вӣ2.Г§lYВһГ…ГҒВӣГ·ВҺГҰГЎ,mГ©XВӢ!Г’ВҪГЁ9Г“ВЁВЈГ Г·ГҚxГјГҷГіВ—ВҘВ°@Вө;bSГ¬ВҲГӘВүВғВҜГ°gВү2ГқВҳГјETВҝВҷВҫLГҺz5B#cГһ[В©  496 | В…  497 | Г»Вҡ^В©tГ¬cВҰuВ¬ВЎГ—ВҙГЁВҶ,ГҲВ§Гіab&  498 | В ВӢ%ВҹГҲ␀7Г–~K:_В«N  499 | &ГЎjU2ГіГЎГ¬tВЎВІГӨU=H,9'ГҰВіВЈВһEgВҢВўВҚГ®]&Вұ2BВ“9QГ«jВҶГғГ’EВҸ:7ГҪВҠsfIВ©4CВ§nГҮQГ“Г„g6\ГҶnГјГҶГіВҚГ„ГҷГ”oГқ2&ГөГјВ‘shkO-ГҒHВңГҝВҗГқГ°;ГҲiPГ’ВҗГ«:]Вҳ0g/!ГҢ|ГўГ—ГқГ…6CГЎВ”ГҫВҮa.vГңГҒs^  500 | `ВҮ_ВҮГӣГҗГіВһ  501 | rГ ГҰMГј

рҹ“„ File: Indicator_Momentum.mq5
рҹ”— ДҗЖ°б»қng dбә«n Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\Sonic R_MC\01_SONIC R_MC_FINAL\Indicator_Momentum.mq5
----------------------------------------
рҹ“Ҡ Thб»‘ng kГӘ: 252 dГІng, 9528 kГҪ tб»ұ, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //| Indicator_Momentum.mq5 - Squeeze Momentum Indicator (Pro v4.0)   |
    3 | //| Copyright 2024, APEX Pullback EA                                |
    4 | //| TradingView PineScript logic ported to MQL5                     |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Copyright 2024, APEX Pullback EA"
    7 | #property link      "https://www.mql5.com"
    8 | #property version   "4.0"
    9 | 
   10 | #include <Indicators/Indicators.mqh>
   11 | 
   12 | #property indicator_separate_window
   13 | #property indicator_buffers 4
   14 | #property indicator_plots   2
   15 | 
   16 | //--- plot momentum histogram
   17 | #property indicator_label1  "Squeeze Momentum"
   18 | #property indicator_type1   DRAW_HISTOGRAM
   19 | #property indicator_color1  clrLawnGreen, clrDarkGreen, clrRed, clrIndianRed
   20 | #property indicator_width1  2
   21 | 
   22 | //--- plot squeeze line
   23 | #property indicator_label2  "Squeeze"
   24 | #property indicator_type2   DRAW_COLOR_LINE
   25 | #property indicator_color2  clrBlue,clrBlack,clrGray
   26 | #property indicator_width2  2
   27 | 
   28 | //--- input parameters
   29 | input int    InpBBLength     = 20;    // Bollinger Bands period
   30 | input double InpBBMult       = 2.0;   // BB StdDev multiplier
   31 | input int    InpKCLength     = 20;    // Keltner Channel period
   32 | input double InpKCMult       = 1.5;   // KC ATR multiplier
   33 | input bool   InpUseTrueRange = true;  // Use TrueRange for KC
   34 | 
   35 | //--- indicator buffers
   36 | double MomentumBuffer[];        // Histogram
   37 | double MomentumColorBuffer[];   // Histogram color index
   38 | double ZeroLineBuffer[];        // Zero line data buffer
   39 | double ZeroLineColorBuffer[];   // Zero line color index
   40 | 
   41 | //--- handles for built-in indicators
   42 | int    ExtBBSmaHandle;  // Handle for BB basis (SMA)
   43 | int    ExtStdDevHandle; // Handle for StdDev
   44 | int    ExtKCSmaHandle;  // Handle for KC basis (SMA)
   45 | int    ExtAtrHandle;    // Handle for ATR
   46 | 
   47 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   48 | //| Custom indicator initialization function                         |
   49 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   50 | int OnInit()
   51 | {
   52 |     //--- Set buffers
   53 |     SetIndexBuffer(0, MomentumBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
   54 |     SetIndexBuffer(1, MomentumColorBuffer, INDICATOR_COLOR_INDEX);
   55 |     SetIndexBuffer(2, ZeroLineBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
   56 |     SetIndexBuffer(3, ZeroLineColorBuffer, INDICATOR_COLOR_INDEX);
   57 |     
   58 |     //--- Set plot properties
   59 |     PlotIndexSetString(0, PLOT_LABEL, "Momentum");
   60 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_DRAW_TYPE, DRAW_HISTOGRAM);
   61 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_WIDTH, 2);
   62 |     PlotIndexSetString(1, PLOT_LABEL, "Squeeze");
   63 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(1, PLOT_DRAW_TYPE, DRAW_COLOR_LINE);
   64 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(1, PLOT_LINE_WIDTH, 2);
   65 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(1, PLOT_LINE_STYLE, STYLE_SOLID);
   66 |     
   67 |     //--- Short name
   68 |     IndicatorSetString(INDICATOR_SHORTNAME, "SqueezeMom(" + (string)InpBBLength + "," + (string)InpKCLength + ")");
   69 |     
   70 |     //--- Initialize zero line
   71 |     ArraySetAsSeries(ZeroLineBuffer, true);
   72 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(ZeroLineBuffer); i++)
   73 |         ZeroLineBuffer[i] = 0.0;
   74 |     
   75 |     //--- Create handles for indicators
   76 |     ExtBBSmaHandle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpBBLength, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   77 |     ExtStdDevHandle = iStdDev(_Symbol, _Period, InpBBLength, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   78 |     ExtKCSmaHandle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpKCLength, 0, MODE_SMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
   79 |     ExtAtrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, _Period, InpKCLength);
   80 |     
   81 |     if(ExtBBSmaHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || ExtStdDevHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || ExtKCSmaHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || ExtAtrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
   82 |     {
   83 |         Print("Error creating indicator handles");
   84 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   85 |     }
   86 |     
   87 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
   88 | }
   89 | 
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | //| Custom indicator deinitialization function                       |
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
   94 | {
   95 |     IndicatorRelease(ExtBBSmaHandle);
   96 |     IndicatorRelease(ExtStdDevHandle);
   97 |     IndicatorRelease(ExtKCSmaHandle);
   98 |     IndicatorRelease(ExtAtrHandle);
   99 | }
  100 | 
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | //| Linear Regression Value                                          |
  103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  104 | double LinRegValue(const double &src[], int length, int position)
  105 | {
  106 |     // Array passed to this function is newest-to-oldest (series).
  107 |     // Linear regression needs oldest-to-newest for a positive time-slope.
  108 |     if(position < length - 1)
  109 |         return 0.0;
  110 |     
  111 |     // The source (src) is already a pre-calculated series of (close-centerline)
  112 |     // We just need to perform regression on the last 'length' elements ending at 'position'
  113 |     double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumXX = 0;
  114 |     for(int i = 0; i < length; i++)
  115 |     {
  116 |         double x = i;
  117 |         // Accessing series from oldest to newest for regression
  118 |         double y = src[position - length + 1 + i];
  119 |         sumX += x;
  120 |         sumY += y;
  121 |         sumXY += x * y;
  122 |         sumXX += x * x;
  123 |     }
  124 | 
  125 |     double D = length * sumXX - sumX * sumX;
  126 |     if(D == 0)
  127 |         return 0.0;
  128 | 
  129 |     double slope = (length * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / D;
  130 |     double intercept = (sumY - slope * sumX) / length;
  131 |     return slope * (length - 1) + intercept;
  132 | }
  133 | 
  134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  135 | //| Custom indicator iteration function                              |
  136 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  137 | int OnCalculate(const int rates_total,
  138 |                 const int prev_calculated,
  139 |                 const datetime &time[],
  140 |                 const double &open[],
  141 |                 const double &high[],
  142 |                 const double &low[],
  143 |                 const double &close[],
  144 |                 const long &tick_volume[],
  145 |                 const long &volume[],
  146 |                 const int &spread[])
  147 | {
  148 |     //--- Check for enough data
  149 |     int required_bars = MathMax(InpBBLength, InpKCLength) + InpKCLength;
  150 |     if(rates_total < required_bars)
  151 |         return 0;
  152 | 
  153 |     //--- Determine calculation range
  154 |     int start_pos = prev_calculated > 0 ? prev_calculated - 1 : 0;
  155 |     if(start_pos == 0)
  156 |     {
  157 |         for(int i = 0; i < required_bars; i++) MomentumBuffer[i] = 0;
  158 |         start_pos = required_bars;
  159 |     }
  160 | 
  161 |     //--- Get indicator values
  162 |     double bbsma[], stdev[], kcsma[], atr[];
  163 |     ArrayResize(bbsma, rates_total);
  164 |     ArrayResize(stdev, rates_total);
  165 |     ArrayResize(kcsma, rates_total);
  166 |     ArrayResize(atr, rates_total);
  167 | 
  168 |     if(CopyBuffer(ExtBBSmaHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, bbsma) <= 0) return 0;
  169 |     if(CopyBuffer(ExtStdDevHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, stdev) <= 0) return 0;
  170 |     if(CopyBuffer(ExtKCSmaHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, kcsma) <= 0) return 0;
  171 |     if(CopyBuffer(ExtAtrHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, atr) <= 0) return 0;
  172 | 
  173 |     //--- Precompute Highest High, Lowest Low
  174 |     double highestHigh[], lowestLow[];
  175 |     ArrayResize(highestHigh, rates_total);
  176 |     ArrayResize(lowestLow, rates_total);
  177 |     for(int i = 1; i < rates_total; i++)
  178 |     {
  179 |         double hh = high[i];
  180 |         for(int j = 1; j < InpKCLength; j++)
  181 |         {
  182 |             if(i - j < 0) break;
  183 |             if(high[i - j] > hh) hh = high[i - j];
  184 |         }
  185 |         highestHigh[i] = hh;
  186 | 
  187 |         double ll = low[i];
  188 |         for(int j = 1; j < InpKCLength; j++)
  189 |         {
  190 |             if(i - j < 0) break;
  191 |             if(low[i - j] < ll) ll = low[i - j];
  192 |         }
  193 |         lowestLow[i] = ll;
  194 |     }
  195 | 
  196 |     //--- Prepare source for linear regression
  197 |     double linreg_src[];
  198 |     ArrayResize(linreg_src, rates_total);
  199 |     for(int i = 1; i < rates_total; i++)
  200 |     {
  201 |         double avgHighLow = (highestHigh[i] + lowestLow[i]) / 2.0;
  202 |         double centerline = (avgHighLow + kcsma[i]) / 2.0;
  203 |         linreg_src[i] = close[i] - centerline;
  204 |     }
  205 |     
  206 |     //--- Main calculation loop
  207 |     for(int i = start_pos; i < rates_total && !IsStopped(); i++)
  208 |     {
  209 |         //--- Calculate Bollinger Bands
  210 |         double upperBB = bbsma[i] + stdev[i] * InpBBMult;
  211 |         double lowerBB = bbsma[i] - stdev[i] * InpBBMult;
  212 | 
  213 |         //--- Calculate Keltner Channel
  214 |         double range = InpUseTrueRange ? atr[i] : (high[i] - low[i]);
  215 |         double kcUpper = kcsma[i] + range * InpKCMult;
  216 |         double kcLower = kcsma[i] - range * InpKCMult;
  217 | 
  218 |         //--- Squeeze detection (Corrected logic from PineScript)
  219 |         bool sqzOn  = (lowerBB > kcLower) && (upperBB < kcUpper);
  220 |         bool sqzOff = (lowerBB < kcLower) && (upperBB > kcUpper);
  221 |         bool noSqz  = !sqzOn && !sqzOff;
  222 | 
  223 |         //--- Calculate momentum
  224 |         MomentumBuffer[i] = LinRegValue(linreg_src, InpKCLength, i);
  225 |         ZeroLineBuffer[i] = 0.0;
  226 | 
  227 |         //--- Histogram color logic
  228 |         if(i > 0)
  229 |         {
  230 |             double prevMom = MomentumBuffer[i - 1];
  231 |             if(MomentumBuffer[i] > 0)
  232 |                 MomentumColorBuffer[i] = (MomentumBuffer[i] > prevMom) ? 0.0 : 1.0; // lime or green
  233 |             else
  234 |                 MomentumColorBuffer[i] = (MomentumBuffer[i] < prevMom) ? 2.0 : 3.0; // red or maroon
  235 |         }
  236 |         else
  237 |         {
  238 |             MomentumColorBuffer[i] = (MomentumBuffer[i] > 0) ? 0.0 : 2.0;
  239 |         }
  240 | 
  241 |         //--- Squeeze line color logic
  242 |         if(noSqz)
  243 |             ZeroLineColorBuffer[i] = 0.0; // blue
  244 |         else if(sqzOn)
  245 |             ZeroLineColorBuffer[i] = 1.0; // black
  246 |         else // sqzOff
  247 |             ZeroLineColorBuffer[i] = 2.0; // gray
  248 |     }
  249 | 
  250 |     return rates_total;
  251 | }
  252 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

   52 | input double InpOB_MinImpulsePips = 10.0;                   // OB: Min Impulse (Pips)
   53 | input int InpOB_MaxImpulseCandles = 5;                      // OB: Max Impulse Candles
   54 | input double InpOB_VolumeThreshold = 1.2;                   // OB: Volume Threshold
   55 | input int InpOB_MinStrength = 30;                           // OB: Min Strength
   56 |

   59 | input double InpFVG_MaxAgeHours = 24.0;                     // FVG: Max Age (Hours)
   60 | input bool InpFVG_RequireVolume = false;                    // FVG: Require Volume
   61 | input double InpFVG_VolumeMultiplier = 1.3;                 // FVG: Volume Multiplier
   62 |

   64 | input int InpMS_SwingStrength = 3;                          // MS: Swing Strength
   65 | input double InpMS_MinBreakPips = 3.0;                      // MS: Min Break Distance (Pips)
   66 | input bool InpMS_RequireVolumeConfirm = true;               // MS: Require Volume Confirmation
   67 | input double InpMS_VolumeThreshold = 1.1;                   // MS: Volume Threshold
   68 | 
   69 | input group "=== Support/Resistance Settings ==="
   70 | input int InpSR_LookbackPeriod = 200;                       // SR: Lookback Period
   71 | input int InpSR_MinTouches = 2;                             // SR: Min Touches
   72 | input double InpSR_TouchTolerance = 2.0;                    // SR: Touch Tolerance (Pips)
   73 | input bool InpSR_ShowPsychological = true;                  // SR: Show Psychological Levels
   74 |

   87 | input bool InpSendNotifications = false;                    // Send Notifications
