   94 | double BufferOrderBlockBull[];
   95 | double BufferOrderBlockBear[];
   96 | double BufferFairValueGapBull[];
   97 | double BufferFairValueGapBear[];
   98 | double BufferStructureBreak[];
   99 | 
  100 | // Hidden buffers for calculations
  101 | double BufferHighs[];
  102 | double BufferLows[];
  103 | double BufferVolumes[];
  104 | double BufferSwings[];
  105 | double BufferSRLevels[];
  106 | 
  107 | // Data arrays
  108 | struct SOrderBlock
  109 | {
  110 |     datetime time;
  111 |     double high;
  112 |     double low;
  113 |     double open;
  114 |     double close;
  115 |     bool is_bullish;
  116 |     int strength;
  117 |     bool is_valid;
  118 |     bool is_touched;
  119 |     datetime touch_time;
  120 | };
  121 | 
  122 | struct SFairValueGap
  123 | {
  124 |     datetime time;
  125 |     double gap_high;
  126 |     double gap_low;
  127 |     bool is_bullish;
  128 |     bool is_valid;
  129 |     bool is_filled;
  130 |     datetime fill_time;
  131 | };
  132 | 
  133 | struct SSwingPoint
  134 | {
  135 |     datetime time;
  136 |     double price;
  137 |     bool is_high;
  138 |     int strength;
  139 |     bool is_broken;
  140 |     datetime break_time;
  141 | };
  142 | 
  143 | struct SSupportResistance
  144 | {
  145 |     double level;
  146 |     int touches;
  147 |     datetime first_touch;
  148 |     datetime last_touch;
  149 |     bool is_support;
  150 |     double strength;
  151 |     bool is_valid;
  152 | };
  153 | 
  154 | // Global arrays
  155 | SOrderBlock g_order_blocks[];
  156 | SFairValueGap g_fair_value_gaps[];
  157 | SSwingPoint g_swing_points[];
  158 | SSupportResistance g_sr_levels[];
  159 | 
  160 | // Status variables
  161 | datetime g_last_update = 0;
  162 | bool g_initialized = false;
  163 | int g_total_bars = 0;
  164 | int g_max_objects = 500;  // Maximum objects on chart
  165 | int g_cleanup_counter = 0; // Counter for periodic cleanup
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| Custom indicator initialization function                         |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | int OnInit()
  171 | {
  172 |     Print("SMC Complete Indicator: Initializing...");
  173 |     
  174 |     // Set up indicator buffers
  175 |     SetIndexBuffer(0, BufferOrderBlockBull, INDICATOR_DATA);
  176 |     SetIndexBuffer(1, BufferOrderBlockBear, INDICATOR_DATA);
  177 |     SetIndexBuffer(2, BufferFairValueGapBull, INDICATOR_DATA);
  178 |     SetIndexBuffer(3, BufferFairValueGapBear, INDICATOR_DATA);
  179 |     SetIndexBuffer(4, BufferStructureBreak, INDICATOR_DATA);
  180 |     
  181 |     // Hidden buffers
  182 |     SetIndexBuffer(5, BufferHighs, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  183 |     SetIndexBuffer(6, BufferLows, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  184 |     SetIndexBuffer(7, BufferVolumes, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  185 |     SetIndexBuffer(8, BufferSwings, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  186 |     SetIndexBuffer(9, BufferSRLevels, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  187 |     
  188 |     // Set arrow codes
  189 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_ARROW, 233); // Up arrow for bullish OB
  190 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(1, PLOT_ARROW, 234); // Down arrow for bearish OB
  191 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(2, PLOT_ARROW, 159); // Up triangle for bullish FVG
  192 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(3, PLOT_ARROW, 160); // Down triangle for bearish FVG
  193 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(4, PLOT_ARROW, 168); // Diamond for structure break
  194 |     
  195 |     // Set empty values
  196 |     for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
  197 |     {
  198 |         PlotIndexSetDouble(i, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, EMPTY_VALUE);
  199 |     }
  200 |     
  201 |     // Initialize arrays as series
  202 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferOrderBlockBull, true);
  203 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferOrderBlockBear, true);
  204 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferFairValueGapBull, true);
  205 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferFairValueGapBear, true);
  206 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferStructureBreak, true);
  207 |     
  208 |     // Initialize data arrays
  209 |     ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, 0);
  210 |     ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, 0);
  211 |     ArrayResize(g_swing_points, 0);
  212 |     ArrayResize(g_sr_levels, 0);
  213 |     
  214 |     g_initialized = true;
  215 |     Print("SMC Complete Indicator: Initialized successfully");
  216 |     
  217 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
  218 | }
  219 | 
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | //| Custom indicator deinitialization function                      |
  222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
  224 | {
  225 |     // Clean up all SMC objects
  226 |     ObjectsDeleteAll(0, "SMC_");
  227 |     
  228 |     // Clear all arrays
  229 |     ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, 0);
  230 |     ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, 0);
  231 |     ArrayResize(g_swing_points, 0);
  232 |     ArrayResize(g_sr_levels, 0);
  233 |     
  234 |     Print("SMC Complete Indicator: Deinitialized");
  235 | }
  236 | 
  237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 | //| Custom indicator iteration function                              |
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | int OnCalculate(const int rates_total,
  241 |                 const int prev_calculated,
  242 |                 const datetime &time[],
  243 |                 const double &open[],
  244 |                 const double &high[],
  245 |                 const double &low[],
  246 |                 const double &close[],
  247 |                 const long &tick_volume[],
  248 |                 const long &volume[],
  249 |                 const int &spread[])
  250 | {
  251 |     if(!g_initialized || rates_total < 10)
  252 |         return prev_calculated;
  253 |     
  254 |     // Check if new bar formed
  255 |     if(rates_total == g_total_bars)
  256 |         return rates_total;
  257 |     
  258 |     g_total_bars = rates_total;
  259 |     
  260 |     // Clear all buffers
  261 |     ClearBuffers();
  262 |     
  263 |     // Periodic cleanup of old objects (every 100 bars)
  264 |     g_cleanup_counter++;
  265 |     if(g_cleanup_counter >= 100)
  266 |     {
  267 |         CleanupOldObjects();
  268 |         g_cleanup_counter = 0;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     // Analyze market structure
  272 |     AnalyzeMarketStructure(rates_total, time, open, high, low, close, tick_volume);
  273 |     
  274 |     // Identify order blocks
  275 |     if(InpShowOrderBlocks)
  276 |         IdentifyOrderBlocks(rates_total, time, open, high, low, close, tick_volume);
  277 |     
  278 |     // Identify fair value gaps
  279 |     if(InpShowFairValueGaps)
  280 |         IdentifyFairValueGaps(rates_total, time, open, high, low, close, tick_volume);
  281 |     
  282 |     // Identify support/resistance levels
  283 |     if(InpShowSupportResistance)
  284 |         IdentifySupportResistance(rates_total, time, high, low, close);
  285 |     
  286 |     // Check for FVG fills
  287 |     CheckFVGFills(rates_total, high, low, close);
  288 |     
  289 |     // Display signals on chart
  290 |     DisplaySignals(rates_total, time, high, low, close);
  291 |     
  292 |     return rates_total;
  293 | }
  294 | 
  295 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  296 | //| Clear All Buffers                                                |
  297 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  298 | void ClearBuffers()
  299 | {
  300 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferOrderBlockBull, EMPTY_VALUE);
  301 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferOrderBlockBear, EMPTY_VALUE);
  302 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferFairValueGapBull, EMPTY_VALUE);
  303 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferFairValueGapBear, EMPTY_VALUE);
  304 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferStructureBreak, EMPTY_VALUE);
  305 | }
  306 | 
  307 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  308 | //| Cleanup Old Objects                                              |
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | void CleanupOldObjects()
  311 | {
  312 |     datetime current_time = TimeCurrent();
  313 |     datetime cleanup_time = current_time - InpFVG_MaxAgeHours * 3600; // Age limit
  314 |     
  315 |     // Clean up old order blocks
  316 |     for(int i = ArraySize(g_order_blocks) - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  317 |     {
  318 |         if(g_order_blocks[i].time < cleanup_time || !g_order_blocks[i].is_valid)
  319 |         {
  320 |             // Delete associated objects
  321 |             string ob_name = g_order_blocks[i].is_bullish ? 
  322 |                 "SMC_OB_Bull_" + TimeToString(g_order_blocks[i].time) :
  323 |                 "SMC_OB_Bear_" + TimeToString(g_order_blocks[i].time);
  324 |             ObjectDelete(0, ob_name);
  325 |             
  326 |             // Remove from array
  327 |             for(int j = i; j < ArraySize(g_order_blocks) - 1; j++)
  328 |             {
  329 |                 g_order_blocks[j] = g_order_blocks[j + 1];
  330 |             }
  331 |             ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, ArraySize(g_order_blocks) - 1);
  332 |         }
  333 |     }
  334 |     
  335 |     // Clean up old fair value gaps
  336 |     for(int i = ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  337 |     {
  338 |         if(g_fair_value_gaps[i].time < cleanup_time || !g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid || g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_filled)
  339 |         {
  340 |             // Delete associated objects
  341 |             string fvg_name = g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_bullish ? 
  342 |                 "SMC_FVG_Bull_" + TimeToString(g_fair_value_gaps[i].time) :
  343 |                 "SMC_FVG_Bear_" + TimeToString(g_fair_value_gaps[i].time);
  344 |             ObjectDelete(0, fvg_name);
  345 |             
  346 |             // Remove from array
  347 |             for(int j = i; j < ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) - 1; j++)
  348 |             {
  349 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[j] = g_fair_value_gaps[j + 1];
  350 |             }
  351 |             ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) - 1);
  352 |         }
  353 |     }
  354 |     
  355 |     // Clean up old structure break labels
  356 |     for(int i = ArraySize(g_swing_points) - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  357 |     {
  358 |         if(g_swing_points[i].time < cleanup_time)
  359 |         {
  360 |             // Delete associated objects
  361 |             string bos_name = "SMC_BOS_" + TimeToString(g_swing_points[i].break_time);
  362 |             ObjectDelete(0, bos_name);
  363 |             
  364 |             // Remove from array
  365 |             for(int j = i; j < ArraySize(g_swing_points) - 1; j++)
  366 |             {
  367 |                 g_swing_points[j] = g_swing_points[j + 1];
  368 |             }
  369 |             ArrayResize(g_swing_points, ArraySize(g_swing_points) - 1);
  370 |         }
  371 |     }
  372 |     
  373 |     // Limit array sizes to prevent memory issues
  374 |     if(ArraySize(g_order_blocks) > 50)
  375 |         ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, 50);
  376 |     if(ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) > 30)
  377 |         ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, 30);
  378 |     if(ArraySize(g_swing_points) > 100)
  379 |         ArrayResize(g_swing_points, 100);
  380 |     if(ArraySize(g_sr_levels) > 20)
  381 |         ArrayResize(g_sr_levels, 20);
  382 | }
  383 | 
  384 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 | //| Check Fair Value Gap Fills                                       |
  386 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  387 | void CheckFVGFills(int rates_total, const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[])
  388 | {
  389 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps); i++)
  390 |     {
  391 |         if(!g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid || g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_filled)
  392 |             continue;
  393 |         
  394 |         // Check current bar for FVG fill
  395 |         int current_bar = rates_total - 1;
  396 |         
  397 |         if(g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_bullish)
  398 |         {
  399 |             // Bullish FVG filled when price goes below gap low
  400 |             if(low[current_bar] <= g_fair_value_gaps[i].gap_low)
  401 |             {
  402 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_filled = true;
  403 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[i].fill_time = TimeCurrent();
  404 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid = false; // Mark for cleanup
  405 |             }
  406 |         }
  407 |         else
  408 |         {
  409 |             // Bearish FVG filled when price goes above gap high
  410 |             if(high[current_bar] >= g_fair_value_gaps[i].gap_high)
  411 |             {
  412 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_filled = true;
  413 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[i].fill_time = TimeCurrent();
  414 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid = false; // Mark for cleanup
  415 |             }
  416 |         }
  417 |     }
  418 | }
  419 | 
  420 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  421 | //| Analyze Market Structure                                         |
  422 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  423 | void AnalyzeMarketStructure(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &open[], 
  424 |                            const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[], 
  425 |                            const long &tick_volume[])
  426 | {
  427 |     // Clear previous swing points
  428 |     ArrayResize(g_swing_points, 0);
  429 |     
  430 |     // Identify swing highs and lows
  431 |     for(int i = InpMS_SwingStrength; i < rates_total - InpMS_SwingStrength - 1; i++)
  432 |     {
  433 |         bool is_swing_high = true;
  434 |         bool is_swing_low = true;
  435 |         
  436 |         // Check for swing high
  437 |         for(int j = i - InpMS_SwingStrength; j <= i + InpMS_SwingStrength; j++)
  438 |         {
  439 |             if(j != i && high[j] >= high[i])
  440 |             {
  441 |                 is_swing_high = false;
  442 |                 break;
  443 |             }
  444 |         }
  445 |         
  446 |         // Check for swing low
  447 |         for(int j = i - InpMS_SwingStrength; j <= i + InpMS_SwingStrength; j++)
  448 |         {
  449 |             if(j != i && low[j] <= low[i])
  450 |             {
  451 |                 is_swing_low = false;
  452 |                 break;
  453 |             }
  454 |         }
  455 |         
  456 |         // Add swing point if found
  457 |         if(is_swing_high || is_swing_low)
  458 |         {
  459 |             SSwingPoint swing;
  460 |             swing.time = time[i];
  461 |             swing.price = is_swing_high ? high[i] : low[i];
  462 |             swing.is_high = is_swing_high;
  463 |             swing.strength = InpMS_SwingStrength;
  464 |             swing.is_broken = false;
  465 |             swing.break_time = 0;
  466 |             
  467 |             ArrayResize(g_swing_points, ArraySize(g_swing_points) + 1);
  468 |             g_swing_points[ArraySize(g_swing_points) - 1] = swing;
  469 |         }
  470 |     }
  471 |     
  472 |     // Check for structure breaks
  473 |     CheckStructureBreaks(rates_total, time, high, low, close, tick_volume);
  474 | }
  475 | 
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | //| Check Structure Breaks                                           |
  478 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  479 | void CheckStructureBreaks(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &high[], 
  480 |                          const double &low[], const double &close[], const long &tick_volume[])
  481 | {
  482 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  483 |     double min_break_distance = InpMS_MinBreakPips * point_value;
  484 |     
  485 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_swing_points); i++)
  486 |     {
  487 |         if(g_swing_points[i].is_broken)
  488 |             continue;
  489 |         
  490 |         // Find the bar index for this swing point
  491 |         int swing_bar = -1;
  492 |         for(int j = 0; j < rates_total; j++)
  493 |         {
  494 |             if(time[j] == g_swing_points[i].time)
  495 |             {
  496 |                 swing_bar = j;
  497 |                 break;
  498 |             }
  499 |         }
  500 |         
  501 |         if(swing_bar == -1)
  502 |             continue;
  503 |         
  504 |         // Check for break from swing_bar to current
  505 |         for(int j = swing_bar + 1; j < rates_total; j++)
  506 |         {
  507 |             bool volume_confirm = true;
  508 |             if(InpMS_RequireVolumeConfirm)
  509 |             {
  510 |                 // Check if volume is above threshold
  511 |                 long avg_volume = 0;
  512 |                 int volume_period = MathMin(20, j);
  513 |                 for(int k = j - volume_period; k < j; k++)
  514 |                 {
  515 |                     if(k >= 0)
  516 |                         avg_volume += tick_volume[k];
  517 |                 }
  518 |                 avg_volume /= volume_period;
  519 |                 volume_confirm = (tick_volume[j] > avg_volume * InpMS_VolumeThreshold);
  520 |             }
  521 |             
  522 |             // Check for structure break
  523 |             if(g_swing_points[i].is_high)
  524 |             {
  525 |                 // Check for break of swing high
  526 |                 if(close[j] > g_swing_points[i].price + min_break_distance && volume_confirm)
  527 |                 {
  528 |                     g_swing_points[i].is_broken = true;
  529 |                     g_swing_points[i].break_time = time[j];
  530 |                     
  531 |                     // Mark structure break on chart
  532 |                     if(InpShowStructureBreaks)
  533 |                     {
  534 |                         int buffer_index = rates_total - 1 - j;
  535 |                         BufferStructureBreak[buffer_index] = high[j] + 20 * point_value;
  536 |                         
  537 |                         if(InpShowLabels)
  538 |                         {
  539 |                             string label_name = "SMC_BOS_" + TimeToString(time[j]);
  540 |                             CreateLabel(label_name, time[j], BufferStructureBreak[buffer_index], "BOSвҶ‘", clrYellow);
  541 |                         }
  542 |                         
  543 |                         if(InpAlertStructureBreaks && InpShowAlerts)
  544 |                         {
  545 |                             Alert("SMC: Bullish Structure Break at ", close[j]);
  546 |                         }
  547 |                     }
  548 |                     break;
  549 |                 }
  550 |             }
  551 |             else
  552 |             {
  553 |                 // Check for break of swing low
  554 |                 if(close[j] < g_swing_points[i].price - min_break_distance && volume_confirm)
  555 |                 {
  556 |                     g_swing_points[i].is_broken = true;
  557 |                     g_swing_points[i].break_time = time[j];
  558 |                     
  559 |                     // Mark structure break on chart
  560 |                     if(InpShowStructureBreaks)
  561 |                     {
  562 |                         int buffer_index = rates_total - 1 - j;
  563 |                         BufferStructureBreak[buffer_index] = low[j] - 20 * point_value;
  564 |                         
  565 |                         if(InpShowLabels)
  566 |                         {
  567 |                             string label_name = "SMC_BOS_" + TimeToString(time[j]);
  568 |                             CreateLabel(label_name, time[j], BufferStructureBreak[buffer_index], "BOSвҶ“", clrYellow);
  569 |                         }
  570 |                         
  571 |                         if(InpAlertStructureBreaks && InpShowAlerts)
  572 |                         {
  573 |                             Alert("SMC: Bearish Structure Break at ", close[j]);
  574 |                         }
  575 |                     }
  576 |                     break;
  577 |                 }
  578 |             }
  579 |         }
  580 |     }
  581 | }
  582 | 
  583 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  584 | //| Identify Order Blocks                                            |
  585 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  586 | void IdentifyOrderBlocks(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &open[], 
  587 |                         const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[], 
  588 |                         const long &tick_volume[])
  589 | {
  590 |     // Clear previous order blocks
  591 |     ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, 0);
  592 |     
  593 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  594 |     double min_impulse = InpOB_MinImpulsePips * point_value;
  595 |     
  596 |     // Look for impulse moves followed by order blocks
  597 |     for(int i = InpOB_MaxImpulseCandles; i < rates_total - 1; i++)
  598 |     {
  599 |         // Check for bullish impulse
  600 |         double impulse_start = low[i - InpOB_MaxImpulseCandles];
  601 |         double impulse_end = high[i];
  602 |         double impulse_size = impulse_end - impulse_start;
  603 |         
  604 |         if(impulse_size >= min_impulse)
  605 |         {
  606 |             // Find the last bearish candle before the impulse
  607 |             for(int j = i - InpOB_MaxImpulseCandles; j < i; j++)
  608 |             {
  609 |                 if(close[j] < open[j]) // Bearish candle
  610 |                 {
  611 |                     // Check volume confirmation
  612 |                     bool volume_confirm = true;
  613 |                     if(InpOB_VolumeThreshold > 1.0)
  614 |                     {
  615 |                         long avg_volume = 0;
  616 |                         int volume_period = MathMin(20, j);
  617 |                         for(int k = j - volume_period; k < j; k++)
  618 |                         {
  619 |                             if(k >= 0)
  620 |                                 avg_volume += tick_volume[k];
  621 |                         }
  622 |                         avg_volume /= volume_period;
  623 |                         volume_confirm = (tick_volume[j] > avg_volume * InpOB_VolumeThreshold);
  624 |                     }
  625 |                     
  626 |                     if(volume_confirm)
  627 |                     {
  628 |                         // Create bullish order block
  629 |                         SOrderBlock ob;
  630 |                         ob.time = time[j];
  631 |                         ob.high = high[j];
  632 |                         ob.low = low[j];
  633 |                         ob.open = open[j];
  634 |                         ob.close = close[j];
  635 |                         ob.is_bullish = true;
  636 |                         ob.strength = (int)(impulse_size / point_value);
  637 |                         ob.is_valid = true;
  638 |                         ob.is_touched = false;
  639 |                         ob.touch_time = 0;
  640 |                         
  641 |                         if(ob.strength >= InpOB_MinStrength)
  642 |                         {
  643 |                             ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, ArraySize(g_order_blocks) + 1);
  644 |                             g_order_blocks[ArraySize(g_order_blocks) - 1] = ob;
  645 |                         }
  646 |                     }
  647 |                     break;
  648 |                 }
  649 |             }
  650 |         }
  651 |         
  652 |         // Check for bearish impulse
  653 |         impulse_start = high[i - InpOB_MaxImpulseCandles];
  654 |         impulse_end = low[i];
  655 |         impulse_size = impulse_start - impulse_end;
  656 |         
  657 |         if(impulse_size >= min_impulse)
  658 |         {
  659 |             // Find the last bullish candle before the impulse
  660 |             for(int j = i - InpOB_MaxImpulseCandles; j < i; j++)
  661 |             {
  662 |                 if(close[j] > open[j]) // Bullish candle
  663 |                 {
  664 |                     // Check volume confirmation
  665 |                     bool volume_confirm = true;
  666 |                     if(InpOB_VolumeThreshold > 1.0)
  667 |                     {
  668 |                         long avg_volume = 0;
  669 |                         int volume_period = MathMin(20, j);
  670 |                         for(int k = j - volume_period; k < j; k++)
  671 |                         {
  672 |                             if(k >= 0)
  673 |                                 avg_volume += tick_volume[k];
  674 |                         }
  675 |                         avg_volume /= volume_period;
  676 |                         volume_confirm = (tick_volume[j] > avg_volume * InpOB_VolumeThreshold);
  677 |                     }
  678 |                     
  679 |                     if(volume_confirm)
  680 |                     {
  681 |                         // Create bearish order block
  682 |                         SOrderBlock ob;
  683 |                         ob.time = time[j];
  684 |                         ob.high = high[j];
  685 |                         ob.low = low[j];
  686 |                         ob.open = open[j];
  687 |                         ob.close = close[j];
  688 |                         ob.is_bullish = false;
  689 |                         ob.strength = (int)(impulse_size / point_value);
  690 |                         ob.is_valid = true;
  691 |                         ob.is_touched = false;
  692 |                         ob.touch_time = 0;
  693 |                         
  694 |                         if(ob.strength >= InpOB_MinStrength)
  695 |                         {
  696 |                             ArrayResize(g_order_blocks, ArraySize(g_order_blocks) + 1);
  697 |                             g_order_blocks[ArraySize(g_order_blocks) - 1] = ob;
  698 |                         }
  699 |                     }
  700 |                     break;
  701 |                 }
  702 |             }
  703 |         }
  704 |     }
  705 | }
  706 | 
  707 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  708 | //| Identify Fair Value Gaps                                         |
  709 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  710 | void IdentifyFairValueGaps(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &open[], 
  711 |                           const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[], 
  712 |                           const long &tick_volume[])
  713 | {
  714 |     // Clear previous fair value gaps
  715 |     ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, 0);
  716 |     
  717 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  718 |     double min_gap = InpFVG_MinGapPips * point_value;
  719 |     
  720 |     // Look for fair value gaps (3-candle pattern)
  721 |     for(int i = 2; i < rates_total - 1; i++)
  722 |     {
  723 |         // Check for bullish FVG (corrected logic)
  724 |         double gap_low = high[i - 2];   // Previous candle high
  725 |         double gap_high = low[i];       // Current candle low
  726 |         
  727 |         if(gap_high > gap_low + min_gap)
  728 |         {
  729 |             // Validate the gap
  730 |             bool valid_gap = true;
  731 |             
  732 |             // Check if middle candle is bullish impulse
  733 |             double middle_body = MathAbs(close[i - 1] - open[i - 1]);
  734 |             double middle_range = high[i - 1] - low[i - 1];
  735 |             if(close[i - 1] <= open[i - 1] || middle_body < 0.5 * middle_range)
  736 |                 valid_gap = false;
  737 |             
  738 |             // Check volume if required
  739 |             if(InpFVG_RequireVolume && valid_gap)
  740 |             {
  741 |                 long avg_volume = 0;
  742 |                 for(int k = i - 10; k < i; k++)
  743 |                 {
  744 |                     if(k >= 0) avg_volume += tick_volume[k];
  745 |                 }
  746 |                 avg_volume /= 10;
  747 |                 valid_gap = (tick_volume[i - 1] > avg_volume * InpFVG_VolumeMultiplier);
  748 |             }
  749 |             
  750 |             if(valid_gap)
  751 |             {
  752 |                 SFairValueGap fvg;
  753 |                 fvg.time = time[i - 1];
  754 |                 fvg.gap_high = gap_high;
  755 |                 fvg.gap_low = gap_low;
  756 |                 fvg.is_bullish = true;
  757 |                 fvg.is_valid = true;
  758 |                 fvg.is_filled = false;
  759 |                 fvg.fill_time = 0;
  760 |                 
  761 |                 ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) + 1);
  762 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) - 1] = fvg;
  763 |             }
  764 |         }
  765 |         
  766 |         // Check for bearish FVG (corrected logic)
  767 |         gap_high = low[i - 2];   // Previous candle low
  768 |         gap_low = high[i];       // Current candle high
  769 |         
  770 |         if(gap_high > gap_low + min_gap)
  771 |         {
  772 |             // Validate the gap
  773 |             bool valid_gap = true;
  774 |             
  775 |             // Check if middle candle is bearish impulse
  776 |             double middle_body = MathAbs(close[i - 1] - open[i - 1]);
  777 |             double middle_range = high[i - 1] - low[i - 1];
  778 |             if(close[i - 1] >= open[i - 1] || middle_body < 0.5 * middle_range)
  779 |                 valid_gap = false;
  780 |             
  781 |             // Check volume if required
  782 |             if(InpFVG_RequireVolume && valid_gap)
  783 |             {
  784 |                 long avg_volume = 0;
  785 |                 for(int k = i - 10; k < i; k++)
  786 |                 {
  787 |                     if(k >= 0) avg_volume += tick_volume[k];
  788 |                 }
  789 |                 avg_volume /= 10;
  790 |                 valid_gap = (tick_volume[i - 1] > avg_volume * InpFVG_VolumeMultiplier);
  791 |             }
  792 |             
  793 |             if(valid_gap)
  794 |             {
  795 |                 SFairValueGap fvg;
  796 |                 fvg.time = time[i - 1];
  797 |                 fvg.gap_high = gap_high;
  798 |                 fvg.gap_low = gap_low;
  799 |                 fvg.is_bullish = false;
  800 |                 fvg.is_valid = true;
  801 |                 fvg.is_filled = false;
  802 |                 fvg.fill_time = 0;
  803 |                 
  804 |                 ArrayResize(g_fair_value_gaps, ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) + 1);
  805 |                 g_fair_value_gaps[ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps) - 1] = fvg;
  806 |             }
  807 |         }
  808 |     }
  809 | }
  810 | 
  811 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  812 | //| Identify Support/Resistance Levels                              |
  813 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  814 | void IdentifySupportResistance(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &high[], 
  815 |                               const double &low[], const double &close[])
  816 | {
  817 |     // Clear previous S/R levels
  818 |     ArrayResize(g_sr_levels, 0);
  819 |     
  820 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  821 |     double touch_tolerance = InpSR_TouchTolerance * point_value;
  822 |     
  823 |     // Use swing points to identify S/R levels
  824 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_swing_points); i++)
  825 |     {
  826 |         double level = g_swing_points[i].price;
  827 |         int touches = 1;
  828 |         datetime first_touch = g_swing_points[i].time;
  829 |         datetime last_touch = g_swing_points[i].time;
  830 |         
  831 |         // Count touches at this level
  832 |         for(int j = 0; j < ArraySize(g_swing_points); j++)
  833 |         {
  834 |             if(i != j && MathAbs(g_swing_points[j].price - level) <= touch_tolerance)
  835 |             {
  836 |                 touches++;
  837 |                 if(g_swing_points[j].time > last_touch)
  838 |                     last_touch = g_swing_points[j].time;
  839 |             }
  840 |         }
  841 |         
  842 |         // Create S/R level if it has enough touches
  843 |         if(touches >= InpSR_MinTouches)
  844 |         {
  845 |             // Check if this level already exists
  846 |             bool exists = false;
  847 |             for(int k = 0; k < ArraySize(g_sr_levels); k++)
  848 |             {
  849 |                 if(MathAbs(g_sr_levels[k].level - level) <= touch_tolerance)
  850 |                 {
  851 |                     exists = true;
  852 |                     break;
  853 |                 }
  854 |             }
  855 |             
  856 |             if(!exists)
  857 |             {
  858 |                 SSupportResistance sr;
  859 |                 sr.level = level;
  860 |                 sr.touches = touches;
  861 |                 sr.first_touch = first_touch;
  862 |                 sr.last_touch = last_touch;
  863 |                 sr.is_support = !g_swing_points[i].is_high;
  864 |                 sr.strength = touches * 10.0;
  865 |                 sr.is_valid = true;
  866 |                 
  867 |                 ArrayResize(g_sr_levels, ArraySize(g_sr_levels) + 1);
  868 |                 g_sr_levels[ArraySize(g_sr_levels) - 1] = sr;
  869 |             }
  870 |         }
  871 |     }
  872 |     
  873 |     // Add psychological levels if enabled
  874 |     if(InpSR_ShowPsychological)
  875 |     {
  876 |         AddPsychologicalLevels(close[rates_total - 1]);
  877 |     }
  878 | }
  879 | 
  880 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  881 | //| Add Psychological Levels                                         |
  882 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  883 | void AddPsychologicalLevels(double current_price)
  884 | {
  885 |     // Add round number levels
  886 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  887 |     int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(Symbol(), SYMBOL_DIGITS);
  888 |     
  889 |     // Calculate psychological levels based on price
  890 |     double base_level = 0;
  891 |     double increment = 0;
  892 |     
  893 |     if(current_price >= 1.0)
  894 |     {
  895 |         base_level = MathFloor(current_price * 100) / 100.0;
  896 |         increment = 0.01;
  897 |     }
  898 |     else if(current_price >= 0.1)
  899 |     {
  900 |         base_level = MathFloor(current_price * 1000) / 1000.0;
  901 |         increment = 0.001;
  902 |     }
  903 |     else
  904 |     {
  905 |         base_level = MathFloor(current_price * 10000) / 10000.0;
  906 |         increment = 0.0001;
  907 |     }
  908 |     
  909 |     // Add levels above and below current price
  910 |     for(int i = -5; i <= 5; i++)
  911 |     {
  912 |         double level = base_level + (i * increment);
  913 |         
  914 |         if(level > 0)
  915 |         {
  916 |             SSupportResistance sr;
  917 |             sr.level = level;
  918 |             sr.touches = 1;
  919 |             sr.first_touch = TimeCurrent();
  920 |             sr.last_touch = TimeCurrent();
  921 |             sr.is_support = (level < current_price);
  922 |             sr.strength = 5.0;
  923 |             sr.is_valid = true;
  924 |             
  925 |             ArrayResize(g_sr_levels, ArraySize(g_sr_levels) + 1);
  926 |             g_sr_levels[ArraySize(g_sr_levels) - 1] = sr;
  927 |         }
  928 |     }
  929 | }
  930 | 
  931 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  932 | //| Display Signals on Chart                                         |
  933 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  934 | void DisplaySignals(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &high[], 
  935 |                    const double &low[], const double &close[])
  936 | {
  937 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  938 |     
  939 |     // Display Order Blocks
  940 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_order_blocks); i++)
  941 |     {
  942 |         if(!g_order_blocks[i].is_valid)
  943 |             continue;
  944 |         
  945 |         // Find the bar index for this order block
  946 |         int ob_bar = -1;
  947 |         for(int j = 0; j < rates_total; j++)
  948 |         {
  949 |             if(time[j] == g_order_blocks[i].time)
  950 |             {
  951 |                 ob_bar = j;
  952 |                 break;
  953 |             }
  954 |         }
  955 |         
  956 |         if(ob_bar == -1)
  957 |             continue;
  958 |         
  959 |         int buffer_index = rates_total - 1 - ob_bar;
  960 |         
  961 |         if(buffer_index >= 0 && buffer_index < rates_total && g_order_blocks[i].is_bullish)
  962 |         {
  963 |             BufferOrderBlockBull[buffer_index] = g_order_blocks[i].low - 10 * point_value;
  964 |             
  965 |             if(InpShowLabels)
  966 |             {
  967 |                 string label_name = "SMC_OB_Bull_" + TimeToString(g_order_blocks[i].time);
  968 |                 CreateLabel(label_name, g_order_blocks[i].time, BufferOrderBlockBull[buffer_index], 
  969 |                            "OB+" + IntegerToString(g_order_blocks[i].strength), clrLimeGreen);
  970 |             }
  971 |             
  972 |             if(InpAlertOrderBlocks && InpShowAlerts)
  973 |             {
  974 |                 Alert("SMC: Bullish Order Block identified at ", g_order_blocks[i].low);
  975 |             }
  976 |         }
  977 |         else if(buffer_index >= 0 && buffer_index < rates_total)
  978 |         {
  979 |             BufferOrderBlockBear[buffer_index] = g_order_blocks[i].high + 10 * point_value;
  980 |             
  981 |             if(InpShowLabels)
  982 |             {
  983 |                 string label_name = "SMC_OB_Bear_" + TimeToString(g_order_blocks[i].time);
  984 |                 CreateLabel(label_name, g_order_blocks[i].time, BufferOrderBlockBear[buffer_index], 
  985 |                            "OB-" + IntegerToString(g_order_blocks[i].strength), clrCrimson);
  986 |             }
  987 |             
  988 |             if(InpAlertOrderBlocks && InpShowAlerts)
  989 |             {
  990 |                 Alert("SMC: Bearish Order Block identified at ", g_order_blocks[i].high);
  991 |             }
  992 |         }
  993 |     }
  994 |     
  995 |     // Display Fair Value Gaps
  996 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps); i++)
  997 |     {
  998 |         if(!g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid || g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_filled)
  999 |             continue;
 1000 |         
 1001 |         // Find the bar index for this FVG
 1002 |         int fvg_bar = -1;
 1003 |         for(int j = 0; j < rates_total; j++)
 1004 |         {
 1005 |             if(time[j] == g_fair_value_gaps[i].time)
 1006 |             {
 1007 |                 fvg_bar = j;
 1008 |                 break;
 1009 |             }
 1010 |         }
 1011 |         
 1012 |         if(fvg_bar == -1)
 1013 |             continue;
 1014 |         
 1015 |         int buffer_index = rates_total - 1 - fvg_bar;
 1016 |         
 1017 |         if(buffer_index >= 0 && buffer_index < rates_total && g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_bullish)
 1018 |         {
 1019 |             BufferFairValueGapBull[buffer_index] = g_fair_value_gaps[i].gap_low - 5 * point_value;
 1020 |             
 1021 |             if(InpShowLabels)
 1022 |             {
 1023 |                 string label_name = "SMC_FVG_Bull_" + TimeToString(g_fair_value_gaps[i].time);
 1024 |                 CreateLabel(label_name, g_fair_value_gaps[i].time, BufferFairValueGapBull[buffer_index], 
 1025 |                            "FVG+", clrDodgerBlue);
 1026 |             }
 1027 |             
 1028 |             if(InpAlertFairValueGaps && InpShowAlerts)
 1029 |             {
 1030 |                 Alert("SMC: Bullish Fair Value Gap at ", g_fair_value_gaps[i].gap_low);
 1031 |             }
 1032 |         }
 1033 |         else if(buffer_index >= 0 && buffer_index < rates_total)
 1034 |         {
 1035 |             BufferFairValueGapBear[buffer_index] = g_fair_value_gaps[i].gap_high + 5 * point_value;
 1036 |             
 1037 |             if(InpShowLabels)
 1038 |             {
 1039 |                 string label_name = "SMC_FVG_Bear_" + TimeToString(g_fair_value_gaps[i].time);
 1040 |                 CreateLabel(label_name, g_fair_value_gaps[i].time, BufferFairValueGapBear[buffer_index], 
 1041 |                            "FVG-", clrOrange);
 1042 |             }
 1043 |             
 1044 |             if(InpAlertFairValueGaps && InpShowAlerts)
 1045 |             {
 1046 |                 Alert("SMC: Bearish Fair Value Gap at ", g_fair_value_gaps[i].gap_high);
 1047 |             }
 1048 |         }
 1049 |     }
 1050 |     
 1051 |     // Draw Support/Resistance lines
 1052 |     DrawSupportResistanceLines();
 1053 | }
 1054 | 
 1055 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1056 | //| Draw Support/Resistance Lines                                    |
 1057 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1058 | void DrawSupportResistanceLines()
 1059 | {
 1060 |     // Clear previous S/R lines
 1061 |     ObjectsDeleteAll(0, "SMC_SR_");
 1062 |     
 1063 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_sr_levels); i++)
 1064 |     {
 1065 |         if(!g_sr_levels[i].is_valid)
 1066 |             continue;
 1067 |         
 1068 |         string line_name = "SMC_SR_" + IntegerToString(i);
 1069 |         color line_color = g_sr_levels[i].is_support ? clrGreen : clrRed;
 1070 |         
 1071 |         ObjectCreate(0, line_name, OBJ_HLINE, 0, 0, g_sr_levels[i].level);
 1072 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, line_name, OBJPROP_COLOR, line_color);
 1073 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, line_name, OBJPROP_STYLE, STYLE_DOT);
 1074 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, line_name, OBJPROP_WIDTH, 1);
 1075 |         ObjectSetString(0, line_name, OBJPROP_TEXT, 
 1076 |                        (g_sr_levels[i].is_support ? "Support " : "Resistance ") + 
 1077 |                        IntegerToString(g_sr_levels[i].touches) + " touches");
 1078 |     }
 1079 | }
 1080 | 
 1081 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1082 | //| Create Label on Chart                                            |
 1083 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1084 | void CreateLabel(string name, datetime time, double price, string text, color clr)
 1085 | {
 1086 |     if(!InpShowLabels)
 1087 |         return;
 1088 |     
 1089 |     if(ObjectFind(0, name) >= 0)
 1090 |         ObjectDelete(0, name);
 1091 |     
 1092 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_TEXT, 0, time, price);
 1093 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, text);
 1094 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, clr);
 1095 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
 1096 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
 1097 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, ANCHOR_CENTER);
 1098 | }
 1099 | 
 1100 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1101 | //| Get Market Analysis Summary                                      |
 1102 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1103 | string GetMarketAnalysisSummary()
 1104 | {
 1105 |     string summary = "=== SMC MARKET ANALYSIS ===\n";
 1106 |     
 1107 |     summary += StringFormat("Order Blocks: %d (Bull: %d, Bear: %d)\n", 
 1108 |                            ArraySize(g_order_blocks),
 1109 |                            CountBullishOrderBlocks(),
 1110 |                            CountBearishOrderBlocks());
 1111 |     
 1112 |     summary += StringFormat("Fair Value Gaps: %d (Bull: %d, Bear: %d)\n", 
 1113 |                            ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps),
 1114 |                            CountBullishFVGs(),
 1115 |                            CountBearishFVGs());
 1116 |     
 1117 |     summary += StringFormat("Swing Points: %d (Highs: %d, Lows: %d)\n", 
 1118 |                            ArraySize(g_swing_points),
 1119 |                            CountSwingHighs(),
 1120 |                            CountSwingLows());
 1121 |     
 1122 |     summary += StringFormat("S/R Levels: %d (Support: %d, Resistance: %d)\n", 
 1123 |                            ArraySize(g_sr_levels),
 1124 |                            CountSupportLevels(),
 1125 |                            CountResistanceLevels());
 1126 |     
 1127 |     // Market bias
 1128 |     int bullish_signals = CountBullishOrderBlocks() + CountBullishFVGs();
 1129 |     int bearish_signals = CountBearishOrderBlocks() + CountBearishFVGs();
 1130 |     
 1131 |     if(bullish_signals > bearish_signals)
 1132 |         summary += "Market Bias: BULLISH\n";
 1133 |     else if(bearish_signals > bullish_signals)
 1134 |         summary += "Market Bias: BEARISH\n";
 1135 |     else
 1136 |         summary += "Market Bias: NEUTRAL\n";
 1137 |     
 1138 |     return summary;
 1139 | }
 1140 | 
 1141 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1142 | //| Helper Functions                                                 |
 1143 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1144 | int CountBullishOrderBlocks()
 1145 | {
 1146 |     int count = 0;
 1147 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_order_blocks); i++)
 1148 |     {
 1149 |         if(g_order_blocks[i].is_valid && g_order_blocks[i].is_bullish)
 1150 |             count++;
 1151 |     }
 1152 |     return count;
 1153 | }
 1154 | 
 1155 | int CountBearishOrderBlocks()
 1156 | {
 1157 |     int count = 0;
 1158 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_order_blocks); i++)
 1159 |     {
 1160 |         if(g_order_blocks[i].is_valid && !g_order_blocks[i].is_bullish)
 1161 |             count++;
 1162 |     }
 1163 |     return count;
 1164 | }
 1165 | 
 1166 | int CountBullishFVGs()
 1167 | {
 1168 |     int count = 0;
 1169 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps); i++)
 1170 |     {
 1171 |         if(g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid && g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_bullish)
 1172 |             count++;
 1173 |     }
 1174 |     return count;
 1175 | }
 1176 | 
 1177 | int CountBearishFVGs()
 1178 | {
 1179 |     int count = 0;
 1180 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_fair_value_gaps); i++)
 1181 |     {
 1182 |         if(g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_valid && !g_fair_value_gaps[i].is_bullish)
 1183 |             count++;
 1184 |     }
 1185 |     return count;
 1186 | }
 1187 | 
 1188 | int CountSwingHighs()
 1189 | {
 1190 |     int count = 0;
 1191 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_swing_points); i++)
 1192 |     {
 1193 |         if(g_swing_points[i].is_high)
 1194 |             count++;
 1195 |     }
 1196 |     return count;
 1197 | }
 1198 | 
 1199 | int CountSwingLows()
 1200 | {
 1201 |     int count = 0;
 1202 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_swing_points); i++)
 1203 |     {
 1204 |         if(!g_swing_points[i].is_high)
 1205 |             count++;
 1206 |     }
 1207 |     return count;
 1208 | }
 1209 | 
 1210 | int CountSupportLevels()
 1211 | {
 1212 |     int count = 0;
 1213 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_sr_levels); i++)
 1214 |     {
 1215 |         if(g_sr_levels[i].is_valid && g_sr_levels[i].is_support)
 1216 |             count++;
 1217 |     }
 1218 |     return count;
 1219 | }
 1220 | 
 1221 | int CountResistanceLevels()
 1222 | {
 1223 |     int count = 0;
 1224 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(g_sr_levels); i++)
 1225 |     {
 1226 |         if(g_sr_levels[i].is_valid && !g_sr_levels[i].is_support)
 1227 |             count++;
 1228 |     }
 1229 |     return count;
 1230 | }
 1231 | 
 1232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

   88 |     datetime    break_time;
   89 |     double      high_price;
   90 |     datetime    high_time;
   91 |     double      low_price;
   92 |     datetime    low_time;
   93 |     datetime    start_time;
   94 | };
   95 | 
   96 | struct OrderBlock
   97 | {
   98 |     int         bar_index;
   99 |     double      high;
  100 |     double      low;
  101 |     datetime    time;
  102 |     bool        is_bullish;
  103 |     bool        is_mitigated;
  104 | };
  105 | 
  106 | struct FairValueGap
  107 | {
  108 |     int         bar_index;
  109 |     double      high;
  110 |     double      low;
  111 |     datetime    time;
  112 |     bool        is_bullish;
  113 |     bool        is_filled;
  114 | };
  115 | 
  116 | struct LiquidityLevel
  117 | {
  118 |     double      price;
  119 |     datetime    start_time;
  120 |     datetime    end_time;
  121 |     string      type;
  122 | };

  152 | input ENUM_LINE_STYLE InpInternalLineStyle = STYLE_DOT; //|Internal structure line style
  153 | input int    InpInternalLineWidth = 1; //|Internal structure line width
  154 | input ENUM_TREND_COLOR_MODE InpInternalTrendType = TREND_COLOR_NONE; //|Color Trend (None, Candles, Background)
  155 | input color InpInternalBullTrendColor = C'46,139,87,180'; //|Internal bullish trend color

  157 |

  162 | input ENUM_LINE_STYLE InpMajorLineStyle = STYLE_SOLID; //|Major structure line style
  163 | input int InpMajorLineWidth = 3; //|Major structure line width
  164 | input ENUM_TREND_COLOR_MODE InpSwingTrendType = TREND_COLOR_NONE; //|Color Trend (None, Candles, Background)

  166 | input color InpSwingBearTrendColor = C'139,0,0,180'; //|Swing bearish trend color

  171 | input int    InpInternalOBBorderWidth = 1; //|Border width for Internal OBs
  172 | input color  InpIntBullishOBColor = (color)0x33228B22;  //|Internal Bullish OB Color
  173 | input color  InpIntBearishOBColor = (color)0x33B22222;  //|Internal Bearish OB Color
  174 | 
  175 | input bool   InpShowSwingOB     = true; //|Show Swing Order Blocks
  176 | input int    InpMaxSwingOB      = 5; //|Max number of Swing OBs to show
  177 | input int    InpSwingOBBorderWidth = 2; //|Border width for Swing OBs
  178 | input color  InpSwingBullishOBColor = (color)0x4D006400;  //|Swing Bullish OB Color

  185 | input color  InpMajorBearishOBColor = (color)0x66FF4500;  //|Major Bearish OB Color
  186 |

  188 | input bool   InpObFilterBySize = true;      //|Filter OBs by size relative to ATR
  189 | input double InpObMinAtrSize = 0.5;         //|Min OB size as a multiple of ATR

  191 | input ENUM_MITIGATION_METHOD InpObMitigationMethod = HIGH_LOW; //|OB Mitigation Method (Wick, High/Low, Close)
  192 | 
  193 | input group "--- Premium/Discount Zones ---"

  195 | input color  InpPremiumColor     = (color)0x1AFF0000; //|Premium zone color
  196 | input color  InpDiscountColor    = (color)0x1A008000; //|Discount zone color

  201 | input int    InpFVGExtendBars   = 50;  //|Number of bars to extend FVG boxes
  202 | input int    InpMaxFVGtoShow    = 10;   //|Max number of FVGs to show

  204 | input bool   InpFVGAutoThreshold = true;              //|Use Auto Threshold for FVG size

  212 | input double InpEQLHThreshold   = 0.2; //|Threshold in ATR multiples for detection
  213 | input color  InpEQLHColor       = clrGold; //|Color for EQH/EQL lines

  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | //| UTILITY FUNCTIONS                                                |
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | template<typename T>
  252 | void ArrayAdd(T &arr[], const T &element)
  253 | {
  254 |     int size = ArraySize(arr);
  255 |     if(ArrayResize(arr, size + 1) < 0) return;
  256 |     arr[size] = element;
  257 | }
  258 | 
  259 | template<typename T>
  260 | void ArrayRemove(T &arr[], int index, int count = 1)
  261 | {
  262 |     int size = ArraySize(arr);
  263 |     if(index < 0 || count <= 0 || index + count > size) return;
  264 |     for(int i = index; i < size - count; i++) arr[i] = arr[i+count];
  265 |     ArrayResize(arr, size - count);
  266 | }
  267 | 
  268 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 | //| FUNCTIONS                                                        |
  270 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  271 | // Functions (to be implemented in next steps)
  272 | void FindSwingPoints(const MqlRates &rates[], const int rates_total, const int depth, const int deviation, const int backstep, SwingPointExt &points[])
  273 | {
  274 |     ArrayFree(points);
  275 |     if(rates_total < depth) return;
  276 | 
  277 |     double high_map[], low_map[];
  278 |     ArrayResize(high_map, rates_total);
  279 |     ArrayResize(low_map, rates_total);
  280 |     
  281 |     // --- Pass 1: Find all potential extrema (peaks and troughs) ---
  282 |     for(int i = rates_total - depth - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  283 |     {
  284 |         // Find highest high in range
  285 |         double high_val = rates[i].high;
  286 |         int high_pos = i;
  287 |         for(int j = 1; j < depth; j++)
  288 |         {
  289 |             if(rates[i+j].high > high_val)
  290 |             {
  291 |                 high_val = rates[i+j].high;
  292 |                 high_pos = i+j;
  293 |             }
  294 |         }
  295 |         
  296 |         // Check deviation and backstep for highs
  297 |         if(high_pos == i)
  298 |         {
  299 |             if((high_val - rates[i].high) < deviation * _Point)
  300 |             {
  301 |                 bool backstep_ok = true;
  302 |                 for(int j = 1; j <= backstep; j++)
  303 |                 {
  304 |                     if(i-j < 0) break;
  305 |                     if(high_map[i-j] != 0 && high_map[i-j] < high_val)
  306 |                     {
  307 |                         high_map[i-j] = 0;
  308 |                     }
  309 |                 }
  310 |                 if(backstep_ok) high_map[i] = high_val;
  311 |             }
  312 |         }
  313 |         
  314 |         // Find lowest low in range
  315 |         double low_val = rates[i].low;
  316 |         int low_pos = i;
  317 |         for(int j = 1; j < depth; j++)
  318 |         {
  319 |             if(rates[i+j].low < low_val)
  320 |             {
  321 |                 low_val = rates[i+j].low;
  322 |                 low_pos = i+j;
  323 |             }
  324 |         }
  325 | 
  326 |         // Check deviation and backstep for lows
  327 |         if(low_pos == i)
  328 |         {
  329 |             if((rates[i].low - low_val) < deviation * _Point)
  330 |             {
  331 |                  bool backstep_ok = true;
  332 |                  for(int j = 1; j <= backstep; j++)
  333 |                  {
  334 |                     if(i-j < 0) break;
  335 |                     if(low_map[i-j] != 0 && low_map[i-j] > low_val)
  336 |                     {
  337 |                         low_map[i-j] = 0;
  338 |                     }
  339 |                  }
  340 |                  if(backstep_ok) low_map[i] = low_val;
  341 |             }
  342 |         }
  343 |     }
  344 | 
  345 |     // --- Pass 2: Select final alternating swing points ---
  346 |     int last_high_pos = -1, last_low_pos = -1;
  347 |     double last_high_val = 0, last_low_val = 0;
  348 |     
  349 |     for(int i = 0; i < rates_total; i++)
  350 |     {
  351 |         if(high_map[i] != 0)
  352 |         {
  353 |             if(last_high_pos != -1) // There is a previous high
  354 |             {
  355 |                 // If new high is higher, replace previous one
  356 |                 if(high_map[i] > last_high_val)
  357 |                 {
  358 |                     // Remove previous high from points array
  359 |                     for(int k=ArraySize(points)-1; k>=0; k--) { if(points[k].bar_index == last_high_pos) { ArrayRemove(points, k, 1); break; } }
  360 |                 }
  361 |                 else // If new high is lower, discard it
  362 |                 {
  363 |                     continue;
  364 |                 }
  365 |             }
  366 |             // Add new high
  367 |             SwingPointExt sp = {i, high_map[i], rates[i].time, SWING_HIGH};
  368 |             ArrayAdd(points, sp);
  369 |             last_high_pos = i;
  370 |             last_high_val = high_map[i];
  371 |             last_low_pos = -1; // Reset low search
  372 |         }
  373 |         
  374 |         if(low_map[i] != 0)
  375 |         {
  376 |              if(last_low_pos != -1) // There is a previous low
  377 |             {
  378 |                 // If new low is lower, replace previous one
  379 |                 if(low_map[i] < last_low_val)
  380 |                 {
  381 |                     // Remove previous low from points array
  382 |                     for(int k=ArraySize(points)-1; k>=0; k--) { if(points[k].bar_index == last_low_pos) { ArrayRemove(points, k, 1); break; } }
  383 |                 }
  384 |                 else // if new low is higher, discard it
  385 |                 {
  386 |                      continue;
  387 |                 }
  388 |             }
  389 |             // Add new low
  390 |             SwingPointExt sp = {i, low_map[i], rates[i].time, SWING_LOW};
  391 |             ArrayAdd(points, sp);
  392 |             last_low_pos = i;
  393 |             last_low_val = low_map[i];
  394 |             last_high_pos = -1; // Reset high search
  395 |         }
  396 |     }
  397 | }
  398 | void FindStructure(const MqlRates &rates[], const int rates_total, const SwingPointExt &swing_points[], Structure &structure_points[], OrderBlock &order_blocks[])
  399 | {
  400 |     ArrayFree(structure_points);
  401 |     ArrayFree(order_blocks);
  402 |     int points_count = ArraySize(swing_points);
  403 |     if (points_count < 2) return;
  404 | 
  405 |     ENUM_TREND current_trend = TREND_NONE;
  406 |     SwingPointExt last_confirmed_high = {0}, last_confirmed_low = {0};
  407 | 
  408 |     // Khб»ҹi tбәЎo trend ban Д‘бә§u
  409 |     if (swing_points[0].type == SWING_HIGH)
  410 |     {
  411 |         last_confirmed_high = swing_points[0];
  412 |         if (points_count > 1 && swing_points[1].type == SWING_LOW)
  413 |         {
  414 |             last_confirmed_low = swing_points[1];
  415 |             current_trend = (last_confirmed_high.price > last_confirmed_low.price) ? TREND_DOWN : TREND_UP;
  416 |         }
  417 |     }
  418 |     else
  419 |     {
  420 |         last_confirmed_low = swing_points[0];
  421 |         if (points_count > 1 && swing_points[1].type == SWING_HIGH)
  422 |         {
  423 |             last_confirmed_high = swing_points[1];
  424 |             current_trend = (last_confirmed_high.price > last_confirmed_low.price) ? TREND_DOWN : TREND_UP;
  425 |         }
  426 |     }
  427 | 
  428 |     for (int i = 2; i < points_count; i++)
  429 |     {
  430 |         SwingPointExt current_sp = swing_points[i];
  431 |         string break_type = "";
  432 |         SwingPointExt broken_sp = {0};
  433 | 
  434 |         if (current_sp.type == SWING_HIGH)
  435 |         {
  436 |             if (current_trend == TREND_UP && current_sp.price > last_confirmed_high.price)
  437 |             {
  438 |                 break_type = "BOS";
  439 |                 broken_sp = last_confirmed_high;
  440 |                 last_confirmed_high = current_sp;
  441 |             }
  442 |             else if (current_trend == TREND_DOWN && current_sp.price > last_confirmed_high.price)
  443 |             {
  444 |                 if (InpFilterInternalConfluence && ArraySize(structure_points) <= ArraySize(ExtMajorStructures))
  445 |                 {
  446 |                     int breakout_bar = current_sp.bar_index;
  447 |                     double open_price = rates[breakout_bar].open, close_price = rates[breakout_bar].close;
  448 |                     double high_price = rates[breakout_bar].high, low_price = rates[breakout_bar].low;
  449 |                     double upper_wick = high_price - MathMax(open_price, close_price);
  450 |                     double lower_wick = MathMin(open_price, close_price) - low_price;
  451 |                     if (upper_wick <= lower_wick) continue; // Bб»Ҹ qua nбәҝu nбәҝn khГҙng mбәЎnh
  452 |                 }
  453 |                 break_type = "CHoCH";
  454 |                 broken_sp = last_confirmed_high;
  455 |                 last_confirmed_high = current_sp;
  456 |                 current_trend = TREND_UP;
  457 |             }
  458 |         }
  459 |         else // SWING_LOW
  460 |         {
  461 |              if (current_trend == TREND_DOWN && current_sp.price < last_confirmed_low.price)
  462 |             {
  463 |                 break_type = "BOS";
  464 |                 broken_sp = last_confirmed_low;
  465 |                 last_confirmed_low = current_sp;
  466 |             }
  467 |             else if (current_trend == TREND_UP && current_sp.price < last_confirmed_low.price)
  468 |             {
  469 |                  if (InpFilterInternalConfluence && ArraySize(structure_points) <= ArraySize(ExtMajorStructures))
  470 |                 {
  471 |                     int breakout_bar = current_sp.bar_index;
  472 |                     double open_price = rates[breakout_bar].open, close_price = rates[breakout_bar].close;
  473 |                     double high_price = rates[breakout_bar].high, low_price = rates[breakout_bar].low;
  474 |                     double upper_wick = high_price - MathMax(open_price, close_price);
  475 |                     double lower_wick = MathMin(open_price, close_price) - low_price;
  476 |                     if (lower_wick <= upper_wick) continue; // Bб»Ҹ qua nбәҝu nбәҝn khГҙng mбәЎnh
  477 |                 }
  478 |                 break_type = "CHoCH";
  479 |                 broken_sp = last_confirmed_low;
  480 |                 last_confirmed_low = current_sp;
  481 |                 current_trend = TREND_DOWN;
  482 |             }
  483 |         }
  484 | 
  485 |         if (break_type != "")
  486 |         {
  487 |             Structure s = {broken_sp.bar_index, broken_sp.time, current_sp.price, break_type, current_trend, broken_sp.price, broken_sp.time,
  488 |                            last_confirmed_high.price, last_confirmed_high.time, last_confirmed_low.price, last_confirmed_low.time,
  489 |                            (current_trend == TREND_UP) ? last_confirmed_low.time : last_confirmed_high.time};
  490 |             ArrayAdd(structure_points, s);
  491 | 
  492 |             if ((break_type == "BOS" && InpAlertOnBOS) || (break_type == "CHoCH" && InpAlertOnCHoCH))
  493 |             {
  494 |                 if (s.bar_index >= rates_total - 2)
  495 |                 {
  496 |                     string trend_str = (s.trend == TREND_UP) ? "Bullish" : "Bearish";
  497 |                     string prefix = (ArraySize(structure_points) > ArraySize(ExtMajorStructures)) ? "Swing " : "Internal ";
  498 |                     Alert(Symbol(), " ", Period(), ": New ", prefix, trend_str, " ", s.type);
  499 |                 }
  500 |             }
  501 | 
  502 |             int start_scan_idx = (current_trend == TREND_UP) ? last_confirmed_low.bar_index : last_confirmed_high.bar_index;
  503 |             int end_scan_idx = broken_sp.bar_index;
  504 |             int ob_candle_idx = -1;
  505 |             if (current_trend == TREND_UP)
  506 |             {
  507 |                 for (int k = end_scan_idx - 1; k > start_scan_idx; k--) { if (rates[k].close < rates[k].open) { ob_candle_idx = k; break; } }
  508 |             }
  509 |             else
  510 |             {
  511 |                 for (int k = end_scan_idx - 1; k > start_scan_idx; k--) { if (rates[k].close > rates[k].open) { ob_candle_idx = k; break; } }
  512 |             }
  513 |             if (ob_candle_idx != -1)
  514 |             {
  515 |                 OrderBlock ob = {ob_candle_idx, rates[ob_candle_idx].high, rates[ob_candle_idx].low, rates[ob_candle_idx].time,
  516 |                                  (current_trend == TREND_UP), false};
  517 |                 ArrayAdd(order_blocks, ob);
  518 |             }
  519 |         }
  520 |     }
  521 | }

  531 |         // ... (logic for MTF with auto threshold)

  535 | void UpdateTrendByBar(const int rates_total, const Structure &structures[], ENUM_TREND &trend_by_bar[]){}
  536 | void FindEqualHighsLows(const SwingPointExt &points[], const int rates_total, LiquidityLevel &levels[]){}

  538 | void DrawSwingStructure(const SwingPointExt &swing_points[], const Structure &structure_points[], color line_color, int line_width, ENUM_LINE_STYLE line_style, const string type_prefix)
  539 | {
  540 |     int start_idx = 0;
  541 |     if(InpDisplayMode == MODE_PRESENT && ArraySize(swing_points) > 2)
  542 |     {
  543 |         start_idx = ArraySize(swing_points) - 2;
  544 |     }
  545 |     
  546 |     for(int i = start_idx + 1; i < ArraySize(swing_points); i++)
  547 |     {
  548 |         // ... drawing logic for lines
  549 |     }
  550 |     
  551 |     int start_structure_idx = 0;
  552 |     if(InpDisplayMode == MODE_PRESENT && ArraySize(structure_points) > 1)
  553 |     {
  554 |         start_structure_idx = ArraySize(structure_points) - 1;
  555 |     }
  556 | 
  557 |     for(int i = start_structure_idx; i < ArraySize(structure_points); i++)
  558 |     {
  559 |         // ... drawing logic for labels (BOS/CHoCH)
  560 |     }
  561 | }

  569 | void CleanupObjects(string prefix){}
  570 | 
  571 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  572 | //| Main Indicator Logic                                             |
  573 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  574 | int OnCalculate(const int rates_total, const int prev_calculated, const datetime &time[], const double &open[],
  575 |                 const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[], const long &tick_volume[],
  576 |                 const long &volume[], const int &spread[])
  577 | {
  578 |     int min_bars_needed = MathMax(InpSwingDepth, MathMax(InpInternalDepth, InpMajorDepth)) * 2;
  579 |     if (rates_total < min_bars_needed) return 0;
  580 | 
  581 |     if (rates_total != prev_calculated || prev_calculated == 0 || InpDisplayMode == MODE_PRESENT)
  582 |     {
  583 |         MqlRates rates[];
  584 |         if (CopyRates(_Symbol, _Period, 0, rates_total, rates) == -1)
  585 |         {
  586 |              Print("Error copying rates history!");
  587 |              return 0;
  588 |         }
  589 | 
  590 |         CleanupObjects(G_OBJECT_PREFIX);
  591 | 
  592 |         AnalyzeAllStructures(rates, rates_total);
  593 |         AnalyzeAndDrawPOIs(rates, rates_total);
  594 |         DrawAllPDZones();
  595 |         DrawMTFLevels();
  596 |         HandleTrendColoring(rates_total, open, high, low, close);
  597 |     }
  598 |     return rates_total;
  599 | }
  600 | void AnalyzeAllStructures(const MqlRates &rates[], const int rates_total){}
  601 | void AnalyzeAndDrawPOIs(const MqlRates &rates[], const int rates_total){}
  602 | void DrawAllPDZones(){}
  603 | 
  604 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  605 | //| Custom indicator initialization function                         |
  606 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  607 | int OnInit()
  608 | {
  609 |     // Buffers mapping
  610 |     SetIndexBuffer(0, ExtDummyBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
  611 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_DRAW_TYPE, DRAW_NONE);
  612 |     SetIndexBuffer(1, OpenBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
  613 |     SetIndexBuffer(2, HighBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
  614 |     SetIndexBuffer(3, LowBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
  615 |     SetIndexBuffer(4, CloseBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
  616 |     SetIndexBuffer(5, ColorBuffer, INDICATOR_COLOR_INDEX);
  617 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(1, PLOT_DRAW_TYPE, DRAW_COLOR_CANDLES);
  618 |     PlotIndexSetString(1, PLOT_LABEL, "Trend");
  619 | 
  620 |     IndicatorSetString(INDICATOR_SHORTNAME, "SMC Structure");
  621 |     MathSrand((int)TimeCurrent());
  622 |     G_OBJECT_PREFIX = "SMC_" + (string)ChartID() + "_" + (string)MathRand() + "_";
  623 | 
  624 |     // ATR Handle
  625 |     ExtAtrHandle = iATR(_Symbol, _Period, 14);
  626 |     if(ExtAtrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  627 |     {
  628 |         Print("Error creating ATR indicator handle - Error: ", GetLastError());
  629 |         return(INIT_FAILED);
  630 |     }
  631 | 
  632 |     G_DefaultBgColor = (color)ChartGetInteger(0, CHART_COLOR_BACKGROUND, 0);
  633 |     return(INIT_SUCCEEDED);
  634 | }
  635 | 
  636 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  637 | //| Custom indicator deinitialization function                       |
  638 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  639 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
  640 | {
  641 |     CleanupObjects(G_OBJECT_PREFIX);
  642 |     ChartSetInteger(0, CHART_COLOR_BACKGROUND, G_DefaultBgColor);
  643 |     if(ExtAtrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE)
  644 |         IndicatorRelease(ExtAtrHandle);
  645 | }

   53 | Вһ-nГҫВҸВ ВҡГ«ВӘГәГә7RВӢynГҹГқГҶГҳ-В ГҺv(0ВҲZГҝГәВі6MГӘ␀В”GГҙГұВЁwВәAГі8В¬NВ…   54 | В ГҘГҝВ¶ГҮ   55 | MВ«ВӘpГЎГҹdqГҹГү@ВӣВҹ7fГўx5ВғxВӯВҲВіUВӯВһГ№ГҺГҠh@В„`ВҗГјeГ’ВҗD>Wi[Вҝ7В“	VГҙВәВҗГҢ<Г•ВЁ.В®ВӣMВӢГқJl;ВҗГј#ВҢВҚВ…   56 | FГ»yeГӨnГҘ:ВўГӨГқВҖВҮГҚВҷВҰВӨ   57 | (Wc/ГіГіВІP   58 | ВҒГёjВғ␀#В№ВҚГҜГІrQK(В”g_`\ГҶВҠГ ГғВ“   59 | ГҜВ§ВҮГҗГҢВ·   60 | В·ГҡВ°В“WВҖas)ВұГҶ   61 | uyВ“2EВіГҚВӢВҗdГјВ»В¶ГӨ^hГј   62 | В«2ВӢВЎГғВҠHВҢГҚВҺ;ГҶГ—ВёВ„Г»ГӮ   63 | ГөВҰ&Гў9В”ГӮr{ГҲВІv{/Г’   64 | GEГңx1'NВҡВҺjВёГүГӢГҸГҳ|В—cВ—ГұГ®ГёГЁГҹ[Г…bВ«hГ„ВҗfВ·Ві   65 | ВғВ«В’Вё4ГўВ°Г„ВҠГјВЎВ—В…   66 | zВҹ␀ГғГ–Г»Г„hyВҖВҷpВғГ·KВҜ?ГөВң0Г“Вҷ]S'ВӨ3pГӨВ AГұ5ГҚГҗВүВҮ#ВҰГ—$J;0>   67 | ВҮ+ГҗВҶВҒВ”Г¬ВҚВ№:	ВһГӯГӢ<PuВҚ6ГҗГ§p.6   68 | ГЎВ»X/Г—␀!AВүГҖ;D\ВҘSВҗГҶВҺВқ;ГіВғГҲ(Г“k1ГҢГ¶ГӢ	RВ”ГҘГұВӮВ‘ГҷaВӘsВ—ГіВ„&Г®В№ВҷV\xГҜFfВҶВӯВӯГјВҖГ·В№ВҢВ»ГҺВ®ВӮlE@w	ГЈВӘВҠ`В·bВҡВңPГҰВІГҮВ“ВҸГј2Г—ВҚ   69 | |D␀.bГҒeВ©Г…Гҫj-+9ГұГҶГ„1Г”ГҸВјsJГ°В§ГЈJ10Вӯ)&ГЈГӮВқГҜ&Г—{Гҗ,7ВҰ+Г„Вө5Г°&ГҚГјS[,KГҘГҳГҖВ«7   70 |    71 | Вҹ*W>{:0<s   72 | fВҳГҰeВӮb0Гҗ3ВЁГЈ7kВҹВҺ␀]В№ВҲВҺВ№eВӢOГ°ГҢ   73 | \В—В§В’ВӢГЈГ·UYГҙpВЈГҫ~To␀ВҲГ§ГҖГЎ"ГқГ–В№g5ГүГҘГҫ   74 | Вқ0tГұГҠГё3g␀wВӨГ”Г®Г©ВәГӣГҡВ ВӣГҖ1KAВүГ”Г•ГҺВЁВұГ№ГҙВӘ-+(Г·ВӣГҒГ…[В»ГҶ%ГҠГ№ГјВҳUГҡ   75 | В®   76 | ГІxГЎВҫIГіГҪkГ”   77 | Г»ВҡAГҙГ°ZВ•xВүO<N(В®Г°PГӮВҜВҒLtГҢ@!4Г’L!ВқГҘГҷ#Г°В–В„В‘Г„GГқВҘ}ВҜ#Г¶Q,ВҹemCГһВҲ3=Г¶ГһsВӮГҶВ—ГҮ&QDВҠ
