  125 | 
  126 |     //--- Create indicator handles
  127 |     DragonHighHandle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpDragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_HIGH);
  128 |     DragonLowHandle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpDragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_LOW);
  129 |     DragonMiddleHandle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpDragonPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  130 |     TrendHandle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpTrendPeriod, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  131 |     EMA200Handle = iMA(_Symbol, _Period, InpEMA200Period, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
  132 | 
  133 |     if (DragonHighHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || DragonLowHandle == INVALID_HANDLE ||
  134 |         DragonMiddleHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || TrendHandle == INVALID_HANDLE || EMA200Handle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  135 |     {
  136 |         printf("Error creating indicator handles");
  137 |         return(INIT_FAILED);
  138 |     }
  139 |     
  140 |     //--- Set empty value for plots
  141 |     PlotIndexSetDouble(0, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, 0.0);
  142 |     PlotIndexSetDouble(1, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, 0.0);
  143 |     PlotIndexSetDouble(2, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, 0.0);
  144 |     PlotIndexSetDouble(3, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, 0.0);
  145 |     PlotIndexSetDouble(4, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, 0.0);
  146 |     PlotIndexSetDouble(5, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, 0.0);
  147 | 
  148 |     //--- Set PVA plot properties
  149 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_DRAW_TYPE, DRAW_COLOR_CANDLES);
  150 |     PlotIndexSetString(6, PLOT_LABEL, "PVA Candles");
  151 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_SHOW_DATA, InpPVAEnable);
  152 |     
  153 |     //--- Define the color palette for PVA candles
  154 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_COLOR_INDEXES, 6);
  155 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 0, InpPVA_NormalBull);
  156 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 1, InpPVA_NormalBear);
  157 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 2, InpPVA_RisingBull);
  158 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 3, InpPVA_RisingBear);
  159 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 4, InpPVA_ClimaxBull);
  160 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(6, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 5, InpPVA_ClimaxBear);
  161 | 
  162 |     //--- Set plot labels and short name
  163 |     string short_name = StringFormat("SonicR Dragon+PVA(%d, %d, %d)", InpDragonPeriod, InpTrendPeriod, InpEMA200Period);
  164 |     IndicatorSetString(INDICATOR_SHORTNAME, short_name);
  165 | 
  166 |     return(INIT_SUCCEEDED);
  167 | }
  168 | 
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | //| Custom indicator deinitialization function                       |
  171 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  172 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
  173 | {
  174 |     //--- Release indicator handles
  175 |     IndicatorRelease(DragonHighHandle);
  176 |     IndicatorRelease(DragonLowHandle);
  177 |     IndicatorRelease(DragonMiddleHandle);
  178 |     IndicatorRelease(TrendHandle);
  179 |     IndicatorRelease(EMA200Handle);
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  183 | //| Custom indicator iteration function                              |
  184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  185 | int OnCalculate(const int rates_total,
  186 |                 const int prev_calculated,
  187 |                 const datetime &time[],
  188 |                 const double &open[],
  189 |                 const double &high[],
  190 |                 const double &low[],
  191 |                 const double &close[],
  192 |                 const long &tick_volume[],
  193 |                 const long &volume[],
  194 |                 const int &spread[])
  195 | {
  196 |     //--- Copy data from indicator handles to buffers
  197 |     if(CopyBuffer(DragonHighHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, DragonUpperBuffer) <= 0) return 0;
  198 |     if(CopyBuffer(DragonLowHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, DragonLowerBuffer) <= 0) return 0;
  199 |     if(CopyBuffer(DragonMiddleHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, DragonMiddleBuffer) <= 0) return 0;
  200 |     if(CopyBuffer(TrendHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, TrendBuffer) <= 0) return 0;
  201 |     if(CopyBuffer(EMA200Handle, 0, 0, rates_total, EMA200Buffer) <= 0) return 0;
  202 | 
  203 |     //--- Copy data to fill buffers
  204 |     if(CopyBuffer(DragonHighHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, FillUpBuffer) <= 0) return 0;
  205 |     if(CopyBuffer(DragonLowHandle, 0, 0, rates_total, FillDownBuffer) <= 0) return 0;
  206 | 
  207 |     //--- PVA Candle Calculation
  208 |     if(InpPVAEnable)
  209 |     {
  210 |         int start_pos = prev_calculated > 0 ? prev_calculated - 1 : 0;
  211 |         for(int i = start_pos; i < rates_total; i++)
  212 |         {
  213 |             // Set candle OHLC data
  214 |             PVACandleOpen[i] = open[i];
  215 |             PVACandleHigh[i] = high[i];
  216 |             PVACandleLow[i] = low[i];
  217 |             PVACandleClose[i] = close[i];
  218 | 
  219 |             // Not enough history for PVA calculation
  220 |             if(i < InpPVAPeriod)
  221 |             {
  222 |                 PVACandleColor[i] = (close[i] >= open[i]) ? 0 : 1; // Normal colors
  223 |                 continue;
  224 |             }
  225 | 
  226 |             // Calculate average volume
  227 |             double avg_vol = 0;
  228 |             for(int j = 1; j <= InpPVAPeriod; j++)
  229 |             {
  230 |                 avg_vol += (double)tick_volume[i - j];
  231 |             }
  232 |             avg_vol /= InpPVAPeriod;
  233 | 
  234 |             // Calculate max (spread * volume)
  235 |             double max_spread_vol = 0;
  236 |             for(int j = 1; j <= InpPVAPeriod; j++)
  237 |             {
  238 |                 double spread_vol = (double)tick_volume[i - j] * (high[i - j] - low[i - j]);
  239 |                 if(spread_vol > max_spread_vol)
  240 |                 {
  241 |                     max_spread_vol = spread_vol;
  242 |                 }
  243 |             }
  244 |             
  245 |             // Check PVA conditions
  246 |             double current_spread_vol = (double)tick_volume[i] * (high[i] - low[i]);
  247 |             bool isClimax = (current_spread_vol >= max_spread_vol && max_spread_vol > 0) || ((double)tick_volume[i] >= InpClimaxVolumeFactor * avg_vol && avg_vol > 0);
  248 |             bool isRising = (double)tick_volume[i] >= InpRisingVolumeFactor * avg_vol && avg_vol > 0;
  249 |             bool isBullish = close[i] >= open[i];
  250 | 
  251 |             // Set candle color index
  252 |             if(isClimax)
  253 |             {
  254 |                 PVACandleColor[i] = isBullish ? 4 : 5; // Climax Bull/Bear
  255 |             }
  256 |             else if(isRising)
  257 |             {
  258 |                 PVACandleColor[i] = isBullish ? 2 : 3; // Rising Bull/Bear
  259 |             }
  260 |             else
  261 |             {
  262 |                 PVACandleColor[i] = isBullish ? 0 : 1; // Normal Bull/Bear
  263 |             }
  264 |         }
  265 |     }
  266 | 
  267 |     //--- Return value of prev_calculated for next call
  268 |     return(rates_total);
  269 | }
  270 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
================================================================================

  298 | TВјГ§MГ®В®Вҹo+ВҰВӨ`ГІГ“Гө4ВҝГ№ВүВҺВҗ  299 | ГӨВ«zb+-ВҷcCiJГүВ«ВәГ•ВҝГ”{ГҠВ–Г’Вҫ:ГұГ·ГӢUВЁaГҒВҰ<ВЈГ‘  300 | Г‘ГӘГіВҷY'~ГҜ7ГўiВ·#ВӮВөВ®5GВ„Г©Г„ВҖВҺ8hВ“GВӘ  301 | PВӯEВӣT@uВҫГӨYВӨ8ВҮВҘВҹВіВҷВ¬wvВҒГҲ0[ГҒВўВңrВҪTГҸГ ВңГӨ&eВіГӯuГ°ВҰmN6ВӘГҗГІ^2 ГЎ;G]	ВҷВ’ВЎВҹВү&])ВҡQГ»#ГӮLYГІNВ®ГҚcГ©В®tAJMВәГҹВӯuВҰQГҳ&Г—6ibГҳ	ГҳSXГЈВҪВҳГңTb  302 | S<g~Гҹ$ВҒГіoГЁ(Г”В“[Г…Г„ВҘeГ№ГүHfdxГҷ^q<;FВҚГө ВҶ'Г§ГҳВЁdГҹГ…ВҒГҙGВҶKГҸГ”ВҝSE  303 | ГӣГғfВҢВҺГәВ»В©ВөВ•ГҠГ–Г¬ВҳВ©(!0.ВөГ¬ВёВҰВ’)Г ВҠВІQГӣГЁВҒГқ=\ГІxВҰ=ГҗГҷ  304 | wcГҺkГңb
  305 | ГҰ4ВҲГ§{tВҶВ·ВҰГ©w|hBqВөXf}Г„ГҲГіВ§

  313 | ГҙВҚ4KS?В№pvВһHГ’ВІKГӮ"aГ·?mq7hqВ…  314 | ГғВ‘Вӣ  315 | U␀ВҮГ•Гҹ_]WГҚГҫГҚHMГ°ГӢВ…  316 | В“=В„mВҳLВҜXВ–ВӘ#2ВҜ(h  317 | Г©+ВҫВҹ_ГұГҒ@^YmГҺSg21<LВөГ F&ГЁGГјВҲyГҠВӨГұuГҗВ”ГҸ_d9Г®Г¶ВҠВқ4(CГ—ГҷВҙВіГәfrГҰВ’Г“R*~hГҶВўnГәГёВҜ*RВҳ"AГҡQВұВ’(Гӣ	ГҢВ’3<?В¬ГӢВҷГ°aГғnГөCГ ?ГёГҡВІГЈВІГө-2ВҪВ—rВ¶.<ГҰ-AГөXВ№Гҫ[ГіГҚIГӮГ®Вҙ#lВІВ’RГҰВ¶5SMaГӮGZ%$/ВҰГ°ГӨВөГ„ГңВ¬В–ГҪВ№%OВҺ9sUZ3В®Г«ВІГҙГң8_ГӢВ¬ВҡГӨГ„ВңВЁГҹВӢГ®m  318 | oY'ГҺГ‘p]ГҙВ«
  319 | hIГҰВһFГҺ\В”.ГҷГ©Г—В’ГјCrВ¬OГҜГӯ  320 | В«OГҮВ¶|Г№В—ВүГіВ§a	В»ВҶВҮГјВҰВҢВәГӨВҳГ»LГӢjГ§`В Гј,Г•zГ®cВ®p@ВҝГҜГқГҪ^ГЈВҶВғГ©ВҗВҒВ¬ГәВәГ…В•!ВңГҠВҶN/OВ…  321 | Вҝ  322 | "MГҲГ’ВҷГ©ГўmГҷГҳГҶВ·В—ВӯВ№ВҪizГ№Г©ГёГ¶Г ВҮ.e1  323 | Г·ВјВҫZВӮ!В«ВёQВӯ

  342 | 7В…  343 | ГүГ–В¶В®Г°ГҖyГё*Вў;ВҳВ«Г¬  344 | Гҫ

  347 | fVВұ  348 | ВҙВ·qГ–aВҰВЈu	iPix9ГЁ+ВЁВ–5?ГӮВһГҘ	
  349 | 7WaВҸmГө+#ВҳuГҲCГ В°d2  350 | oВҮГҺГўbВқ:  351 | :>*ГӮGВ«В®ГІ\Г«В¶]ВҒВ®В®В§Гғ~MВ•В”В’

  362 | ВүВө\В—ВҲBВұ8Г“ВӯYВ—jВ«^ГәГҺeВ¬gGГүВ—ГһRQNВ’Г—Вў/9␀2Г„8ZВҖВұГ·В—  363 | В¶=ВӢ<ВӣГҺГҮ=n=ВҖВіВёC  364 | Г»?В·Г…oВ¶ВҹГҠxГӣ<ВҒГһГ¶ГҗL:zf,В…  365 | ^[;:В®В pГқ6ВҲ

рҹ”— ДҗЖ°б»қng dбә«n Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§: C:\Users\ADMIN\AppData\Roaming\MetaQuotes\Terminal\D0E8209F77C8CF37AD8BF550E51FF075\MQL5\Experts\Sonic R_MC\01_SONIC R_MC_FINAL\Indicator_SonicR_PVA_Volumes.mq5

рҹ“Ҡ Thб»‘ng kГӘ: 139 dГІng, 5449 kГҪ tб»ұ, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                               Indicator_SonicR_PVA_Volumes.mq5 |
    3 | //|               Copyright 2024, APEX EA DEVELOPMENT & CГЎo GiГ  AI   |
    4 | //|      Adapted from 'SonicR PVA Volumes.mq4' for modern MQL5       |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Copyright 2024, APEX EA DEVELOPMENT & CГЎo GiГ  AI"
    7 | #property link      "https://www.your-project-link.com"
    8 | #property version   "1.00"
    9 | 
   10 | #property indicator_separate_window
   11 | #property indicator_buffers 2
   12 | #property indicator_plots   1
   13 | #property indicator_minimum 0
   14 | 
   15 | //--- Plot 1: PVA Volume Histogram
   16 | #property indicator_label1  "PVA Volume"
   17 | #property indicator_type1   DRAW_COLOR_HISTOGRAM
   18 | #property indicator_color1  clrGreen,clrRed,clrDodgerBlue,clrBlueViolet,clrLimeGreen,clrRed // Color palette
   19 | #property indicator_style1  STYLE_SOLID
   20 | #property indicator_width1  3
   21 | 
   22 | //--- Input Parameters
   23 | input group "--- PVA Volume Settings ---"
   24 | input bool   InpIndicatorOn = true;         // Indicator On
   25 | input int    InpPVAPeriod = 10;             // PVA Lookback Period
   26 | input double InpRisingVolumeFactor = 1.5;   // Rising Volume Factor (e.g., 1.5 = 150%)
   27 | input double InpClimaxVolumeFactor = 2.0;   // Climax Volume Factor (e.g., 2.0 = 200%)
   28 | 
   29 | input group "--- Colors ---"
   30 | input color InpPVA_Normal = clrDimGray;          // Normal Volume
   31 | input color InpPVA_RisingBull = clrDodgerBlue;   // Rising Volume Bullish
   32 | input color InpPVA_RisingBear = clrBlueViolet;   // Rising Volume Bearish
   33 | input color InpPVA_ClimaxBull = clrLimeGreen;    // Climax Volume Bullish
   34 | input color InpPVA_ClimaxBear = clrRed;          // Climax Volume Bearish
   35 | 
   36 | //--- Indicator Buffers
   37 | double VolumeBuffer[];
   38 | double ColorBuffer[];
   39 | 
   40 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   41 | //| Custom indicator initialization function                         |
   42 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   43 | int OnInit()
   44 | {
   45 |     //--- Indicator buffers mapping
   46 |     SetIndexBuffer(0, VolumeBuffer, INDICATOR_DATA);
   47 |     SetIndexBuffer(1, ColorBuffer, INDICATOR_COLOR_INDEX);
   48 | 
   49 |     //--- Set plot properties
   50 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_DRAW_TYPE, DRAW_COLOR_HISTOGRAM);
   51 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_WIDTH, 3);
   52 |     
   53 |     //--- Define the color palette for the histogram
   54 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_COLOR_INDEXES, 5);
   55 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 0, InpPVA_Normal);
   56 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 1, InpPVA_RisingBull);
   57 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 2, InpPVA_RisingBear);
   58 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 3, InpPVA_ClimaxBull);
   59 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_LINE_COLOR, 4, InpPVA_ClimaxBear);
   60 |     
   61 |     //--- Indicator ShortName
   62 |     IndicatorSetString(INDICATOR_SHORTNAME, "PVA Volumes(" + IntegerToString(InpPVAPeriod) + ")");
   63 |     
   64 |     return(INIT_SUCCEEDED);
   65 | }
   66 | 
   67 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   68 | //| Custom indicator iteration function                              |
   69 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 | int OnCalculate(const int rates_total,
   71 |                 const int prev_calculated,
   72 |                 const datetime &time[],
   73 |                 const double &open[],
   74 |                 const double &high[],
   75 |                 const double &low[],
   76 |                 const double &close[],
   77 |                 const long &tick_volume[],
   78 |                 const long &volume[],
   79 |                 const int &spread[])
   80 | {
   81 |     if(!InpIndicatorOn)
   82 |         return(rates_total);
   83 | 
   84 |     int start_pos = prev_calculated > 0 ? prev_calculated - 1 : 0;
   85 |     for(int i = start_pos; i < rates_total; i++)
   86 |     {
   87 |         VolumeBuffer[i] = (double)tick_volume[i];
   88 | 
   89 |         // Not enough history for PVA calculation
   90 |         if(i < InpPVAPeriod)
   91 |         {
   92 |             ColorBuffer[i] = 0; // Normal color
   93 |             continue;
   94 |         }
   95 | 
   96 |         // --- PVA Logic ---
   97 |         // Calculate average volume over the lookback period
   98 |         double avg_vol = 0;
   99 |         for(int j = 1; j <= InpPVAPeriod; j++)
  100 |         {
  101 |             avg_vol += (double)tick_volume[i - j];
  102 |         }
  103 |         avg_vol /= InpPVAPeriod;
  104 | 
  105 |         // Calculate max (spread * volume) over the lookback period
  106 |         double max_spread_vol = 0;
  107 |         for(int j = 1; j <= InpPVAPeriod; j++)
  108 |         {
  109 |             double spread_vol = (double)tick_volume[i - j] * (high[i - j] - low[i - j]);
  110 |             if(spread_vol > max_spread_vol)
  111 |             {
  112 |                 max_spread_vol = spread_vol;
  113 |             }
  114 |         }
  115 |         
  116 |         // Check current bar's PVA conditions
  117 |         double current_spread_vol = (double)tick_volume[i] * (high[i] - low[i]);
  118 |         bool isClimax = (current_spread_vol >= max_spread_vol && max_spread_vol > 0) || ((double)tick_volume[i] >= InpClimaxVolumeFactor * avg_vol && avg_vol > 0);
  119 |         bool isRising = (double)tick_volume[i] >= InpRisingVolumeFactor * avg_vol && avg_vol > 0;
  120 |         bool isBullish = close[i] >= open[i];
  121 | 
  122 |         // Set color index based on conditions
  123 |         if(isClimax)
  124 |         {
  125 |             ColorBuffer[i] = isBullish ? 3 : 4; // Climax Bull/Bear
  126 |         }
  127 |         else if(isRising)
  128 |         {
  129 |             ColorBuffer[i] = isBullish ? 1 : 2; // Rising Bull/Bear
  130 |         }
  131 |         else
  132 |         {
  133 |             ColorBuffer[i] = 0; // Normal
  134 |         }
  135 |     }
  136 |     
  137 |     return(rates_total);
  138 | }

    6 | #property copyright "Manus AI"
    7 | #property version   "1.00"
    8 | #property description "Lightweight SMC Indicator for EA Data Feed"
    9 | 
   10 | #property indicator_chart_window
   11 | #property indicator_buffers 8
   12 | #property indicator_plots   4
   13 | 
   14 | // Plot definitions
   15 | #property indicator_label1  "SMC Buy Signal"
   16 | #property indicator_type1   DRAW_ARROW
   17 | #property indicator_color1  clrLimeGreen
   18 | #property indicator_style1  STYLE_SOLID
   19 | #property indicator_width1  2
   20 | 
   21 | #property indicator_label2  "SMC Sell Signal"
   22 | #property indicator_type2   DRAW_ARROW
   23 | #property indicator_color2  clrCrimson
   24 | #property indicator_style2  STYLE_SOLID
   25 | #property indicator_width2  2
   26 | 
   27 | #property indicator_label3  "Order Block"
   28 | #property indicator_type3   DRAW_ARROW
   29 | #property indicator_color3  clrDodgerBlue
   30 | #property indicator_style3  STYLE_SOLID
   31 | #property indicator_width3  1
   32 | 
   33 | #property indicator_label4  "Structure Break"
   34 | #property indicator_type4   DRAW_ARROW
   35 | #property indicator_color4  clrYellow
   36 | #property indicator_style4  STYLE_SOLID
   37 | #property indicator_width4  3
   38 | 
   39 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   40 | //| Input Parameters                                                 |
   41 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   42 | 
   43 | input group "=== SMC Lite Settings ==="
   44 | input int InpLookbackPeriod = 100;                          // Lookback Period
   45 | input int InpSwingStrength = 3;                             // Swing Strength
   46 | input double InpMinImpulsePips = 10.0;                      // Min Impulse (Pips)
   47 | input double InpMinGapPips = 2.0;                           // Min Gap Size (Pips)
   48 | input int InpMinConfidence = 70;                            // Min Confidence Level
   49 | 
   50 | input group "=== Display Settings ==="
   51 | input bool InpShowSignals = true;                           // Show Trading Signals
   52 | input bool InpShowOrderBlocks = true;                       // Show Order Blocks
   53 | input bool InpShowStructureBreaks = true;                   // Show Structure Breaks
   54 | input bool InpShowAlerts = true;                            // Show Alerts
   55 | 
   56 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   57 | //| Global Variables                                                 |
   58 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   59 | 
   60 | // Indicator buffers
   61 | double BufferBuySignal[];
   62 | double BufferSellSignal[];
   63 | double BufferOrderBlock[];
   64 | double BufferStructureBreak[];
   65 | 
   66 | // Hidden buffers
   67 | double BufferCalculation1[];
   68 | double BufferCalculation2[];
   69 | double BufferCalculation3[];
   70 | double BufferCalculation4[];
   71 | 
   72 | // Simple structures for data
   73 | struct SimpleOrderBlock
   74 | {
   75 |     datetime time;
   76 |     double price;
   77 |     bool is_bullish;
   78 |     bool is_valid;
   79 | };
   80 | 
   81 | struct SimpleSignal
   82 | {
   83 |     datetime time;
   84 |     double price;
   85 |     bool is_buy;
   86 |     int confidence;
   87 |     bool is_valid;
   88 | };
   89 | 
   90 | // Data arrays
   91 | SimpleOrderBlock g_order_blocks[50];
   92 | SimpleSignal g_current_signal;
   93 | int g_ob_count = 0;
   94 | 
   95 | // Status variables
   96 | bool g_initialized = false;
   97 | datetime g_last_bar_time = 0;
   98 | 
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | //| Custom indicator initialization function                         |
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | int OnInit()
  103 | {
  104 |     Print("SMC Lite Indicator: Initializing...");
  105 |     
  106 |     // Set up indicator buffers
  107 |     SetIndexBuffer(0, BufferBuySignal, INDICATOR_DATA);
  108 |     SetIndexBuffer(1, BufferSellSignal, INDICATOR_DATA);
  109 |     SetIndexBuffer(2, BufferOrderBlock, INDICATOR_DATA);
  110 |     SetIndexBuffer(3, BufferStructureBreak, INDICATOR_DATA);
  111 |     
  112 |     // Hidden buffers
  113 |     SetIndexBuffer(4, BufferCalculation1, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  114 |     SetIndexBuffer(5, BufferCalculation2, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  115 |     SetIndexBuffer(6, BufferCalculation3, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  116 |     SetIndexBuffer(7, BufferCalculation4, INDICATOR_CALCULATIONS);
  117 |     
  118 |     // Set arrow codes
  119 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(0, PLOT_ARROW, 233); // Up arrow for buy
  120 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(1, PLOT_ARROW, 234); // Down arrow for sell
  121 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(2, PLOT_ARROW, 159); // Triangle for order block
  122 |     PlotIndexSetInteger(3, PLOT_ARROW, 168); // Diamond for structure break
  123 |     
  124 |     // Set empty values
  125 |     for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
  126 |     {
  127 |         PlotIndexSetDouble(i, PLOT_EMPTY_VALUE, EMPTY_VALUE);
  128 |     }
  129 |     
  130 |     // Initialize arrays as series
  131 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferBuySignal, true);
  132 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferSellSignal, true);
  133 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferOrderBlock, true);
  134 |     ArraySetAsSeries(BufferStructureBreak, true);
  135 |     
  136 |     // Initialize data
  137 |     for(int i = 0; i < 50; i++)
  138 |     {
  139 |         g_order_blocks[i].is_valid = false;
  140 |     }
  141 |     g_current_signal.is_valid = false;
  142 |     g_ob_count = 0;
  143 |     
  144 |     g_initialized = true;
  145 |     Print("SMC Lite Indicator: Initialized successfully");
  146 |     
  147 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
  148 | }
  149 | 
  150 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 | //| Custom indicator deinitialization function                      |
  152 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  153 | void OnDeinit(const int reason)
  154 | {
  155 |     Print("SMC Lite Indicator: Deinitialized");
  156 | }
  157 | 
  158 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  159 | //| Custom indicator iteration function                              |
  160 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  161 | int OnCalculate(const int rates_total,
  162 |                 const int prev_calculated,
  163 |                 const datetime &time[],
  164 |                 const double &open[],
  165 |                 const double &high[],
  166 |                 const double &low[],
  167 |                 const double &close[],
  168 |                 const long &tick_volume[],
  169 |                 const long &volume[],
  170 |                 const int &spread[])
  171 | {
  172 |     if(!g_initialized || rates_total < 10)
  173 |         return prev_calculated;
  174 |     
  175 |     // Check if new bar formed
  176 |     if(time[rates_total - 1] == g_last_bar_time)
  177 |         return rates_total;
  178 |     
  179 |     g_last_bar_time = time[rates_total - 1];
  180 |     
  181 |     // Clear all buffers
  182 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferBuySignal, EMPTY_VALUE);
  183 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferSellSignal, EMPTY_VALUE);
  184 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferOrderBlock, EMPTY_VALUE);
  185 |     ArrayInitialize(BufferStructureBreak, EMPTY_VALUE);
  186 |     
  187 |     // Simple SMC analysis
  188 |     AnalyzeSMC(rates_total, time, open, high, low, close, tick_volume);
  189 |     
  190 |     // Display signals
  191 |     DisplaySignals(rates_total, time, high, low, close);
  192 |     
  193 |     return rates_total;
  194 | }
  195 | 
  196 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  197 | //| Simple SMC Analysis                                              |
  198 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  199 | void AnalyzeSMC(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &open[], 
  200 |                const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[], 
  201 |                const long &tick_volume[])
  202 | {
  203 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  204 |     double min_impulse = InpMinImpulsePips * point_value;
  205 |     
  206 |     // Reset current signal
  207 |     g_current_signal.is_valid = false;
  208 |     
  209 |     // Simple swing analysis
  210 |     for(int i = InpSwingStrength; i < rates_total - InpSwingStrength - 1; i++)
  211 |     {
  212 |         bool is_swing_high = true;
  213 |         bool is_swing_low = true;
  214 |         
  215 |         // Check for swing high
  216 |         for(int j = i - InpSwingStrength; j <= i + InpSwingStrength; j++)
  217 |         {
  218 |             if(j != i && high[j] >= high[i])
  219 |             {
  220 |                 is_swing_high = false;
  221 |                 break;
  222 |             }
  223 |         }
  224 |         
  225 |         // Check for swing low
  226 |         for(int j = i - InpSwingStrength; j <= i + InpSwingStrength; j++)
  227 |         {
  228 |             if(j != i && low[j] <= low[i])
  229 |             {
  230 |                 is_swing_low = false;
  231 |                 break;
  232 |             }
  233 |         }
  234 |         
  235 |         // Check for order blocks after swings
  236 |         if(is_swing_high || is_swing_low)
  237 |         {
  238 |             CheckForOrderBlocks(i, rates_total, time, open, high, low, close, tick_volume, is_swing_high);
  239 |         }
  240 |     }
  241 |     
  242 |     // Generate trading signals
  243 |     GenerateSignals(rates_total, time, open, high, low, close, tick_volume);
  244 | }
  245 | 
  246 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  247 | //| Check For Order Blocks                                           |
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | void CheckForOrderBlocks(int swing_bar, int rates_total, const datetime &time[], 
  250 |                         const double &open[], const double &high[], const double &low[], 
  251 |                         const double &close[], const long &tick_volume[], bool is_swing_high)
  252 | {
  253 |     if(g_ob_count >= 49) return; // Prevent overflow
  254 |     
  255 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  256 |     double min_impulse = InpMinImpulsePips * point_value;
  257 |     
  258 |     // Look for impulse before swing
  259 |     int lookback = MathMin(10, swing_bar);
  260 |     
  261 |     for(int i = swing_bar - lookback; i < swing_bar; i++)
  262 |     {
  263 |         if(i < 0) continue;
  264 |         
  265 |         bool is_order_block = false;
  266 |         double ob_price = 0;
  267 |         
  268 |         if(is_swing_high)
  269 |         {
  270 |             // Look for bearish order block (last bullish candle before bearish impulse)
  271 |             if(close[i] > open[i] && close[i + 1] < open[i + 1])
  272 |             {
  273 |                 double impulse_size = high[swing_bar] - low[i];
  274 |                 if(impulse_size >= min_impulse)
  275 |                 {
  276 |                     is_order_block = true;
  277 |                     ob_price = (high[i] + low[i]) / 2;
  278 |                 }
  279 |             }
  280 |         }
  281 |         else
  282 |         {
  283 |             // Look for bullish order block (last bearish candle before bullish impulse)
  284 |             if(close[i] < open[i] && close[i + 1] > open[i + 1])
  285 |             {
  286 |                 double impulse_size = high[i] - low[swing_bar];
  287 |                 if(impulse_size >= min_impulse)
  288 |                 {
  289 |                     is_order_block = true;
  290 |                     ob_price = (high[i] + low[i]) / 2;
  291 |                 }
  292 |             }
  293 |         }
  294 |         
  295 |         if(is_order_block)
  296 |         {
  297 |             g_order_blocks[g_ob_count].time = time[i];
  298 |             g_order_blocks[g_ob_count].price = ob_price;
  299 |             g_order_blocks[g_ob_count].is_bullish = !is_swing_high;
  300 |             g_order_blocks[g_ob_count].is_valid = true;
  301 |             g_ob_count++;
  302 |             break;
  303 |         }
  304 |     }
  305 | }
  306 | 
  307 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  308 | //| Generate Trading Signals                                         |
  309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  310 | void GenerateSignals(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &open[], 
  311 |                     const double &high[], const double &low[], const double &close[], 
  312 |                     const long &tick_volume[])
  313 | {
  314 |     if(rates_total < 5) return;
  315 |     
  316 |     double current_price = close[rates_total - 1];
  317 |     double prev_price = close[rates_total - 2];
  318 |     
  319 |     // Simple signal generation based on order blocks and price action
  320 |     int bullish_factors = 0;
  321 |     int bearish_factors = 0;
  322 |     
  323 |     // Check proximity to order blocks
  324 |     for(int i = 0; i < g_ob_count; i++)
  325 |     {
  326 |         if(!g_order_blocks[i].is_valid) continue;
  327 |         
  328 |         double distance = MathAbs(current_price - g_order_blocks[i].price);
  329 |         double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  330 |         
  331 |         if(distance < 20 * point_value) // Within 20 pips of order block
  332 |         {
  333 |             if(g_order_blocks[i].is_bullish)
  334 |                 bullish_factors++;
  335 |             else
  336 |                 bearish_factors++;
  337 |         }
  338 |     }
  339 |     
  340 |     // Check price momentum
  341 |     if(current_price > prev_price)
  342 |         bullish_factors++;
  343 |     else if(current_price < prev_price)
  344 |         bearish_factors++;
  345 |     
  346 |     // Check volume (simplified)
  347 |     long current_volume = tick_volume[rates_total - 1];
  348 |     long avg_volume = 0;
  349 |     for(int i = rates_total - 10; i < rates_total - 1; i++)
  350 |     {
  351 |         if(i >= 0) avg_volume += tick_volume[i];
  352 |     }
  353 |     avg_volume /= 9;
  354 |     
  355 |     if(current_volume > avg_volume * 1.2)
  356 |     {
  357 |         if(current_price > prev_price)
  358 |             bullish_factors++;
  359 |         else
  360 |             bearish_factors++;
  361 |     }
  362 |     
  363 |     // Generate signal based on factors
  364 |     int confidence = 0;
  365 |     bool is_buy = false;
  366 |     
  367 |     if(bullish_factors >= 2)
  368 |     {
  369 |         is_buy = true;
  370 |         confidence = MathMin(95, 50 + bullish_factors * 15);
  371 |     }
  372 |     else if(bearish_factors >= 2)
  373 |     {
  374 |         is_buy = false;
  375 |         confidence = MathMin(95, 50 + bearish_factors * 15);
  376 |     }
  377 |     
  378 |     if(confidence >= InpMinConfidence)
  379 |     {
  380 |         g_current_signal.time = time[rates_total - 1];
  381 |         g_current_signal.price = current_price;
  382 |         g_current_signal.is_buy = is_buy;
  383 |         g_current_signal.confidence = confidence;
  384 |         g_current_signal.is_valid = true;
  385 |     }
  386 | }
  387 | 
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | //| Display Signals                                                  |
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | void DisplaySignals(int rates_total, const datetime &time[], const double &high[], 
  392 |                    const double &low[], const double &close[])
  393 | {
  394 |     double point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(Symbol(), SYMBOL_POINT);
  395 |     
  396 |     // Display current signal
  397 |     if(g_current_signal.is_valid && InpShowSignals)
  398 |     {
  399 |         int buffer_index = 0; // Current bar
  400 |         
  401 |         if(g_current_signal.is_buy)
  402 |         {
  403 |             BufferBuySignal[buffer_index] = low[rates_total - 1] - 10 * point_value;
  404 |             
  405 |             if(InpShowAlerts)
  406 |             {
  407 |                 Alert("SMC Lite: BUY Signal - Confidence: ", g_current_signal.confidence, "%");
  408 |             }
  409 |         }
  410 |         else
  411 |         {
  412 |             BufferSellSignal[buffer_index] = high[rates_total - 1] + 10 * point_value;
  413 |             
  414 |             if(InpShowAlerts)
  415 |             {
  416 |                 Alert("SMC Lite: SELL Signal - Confidence: ", g_current_signal.confidence, "%");
  417 |             }
  418 |         }
  419 |     }
  420 |     
  421 |     // Display order blocks
  422 |     if(InpShowOrderBlocks)
  423 |     {
  424 |         for(int i = 0; i < g_ob_count; i++)
  425 |         {
  426 |             if(!g_order_blocks[i].is_valid) continue;
  427 |             
  428 |             // Find bar index for this order block
  429 |             for(int j = 0; j < rates_total; j++)
  430 |             {
  431 |                 if(time[j] == g_order_blocks[i].time)
  432 |                 {
  433 |                     int buffer_index = rates_total - 1 - j;
  434 |                     if(buffer_index >= 0 && buffer_index < rates_total)
  435 |                     {
  436 |                         BufferOrderBlock[buffer_index] = g_order_blocks[i].price;
  437 |                     }
  438 |                     break;
  439 |                 }
  440 |             }
  441 |         }
  442 |     }
  443 | }
  444 | 
  445 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  446 | //| Get Current Signal for EA                                        |
  447 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  448 | bool GetSMCSignal(bool &is_buy, double &entry_price, int &confidence)
  449 | {
  450 |     if(!g_current_signal.is_valid)
  451 |         return false;
  452 |     
  453 |     is_buy = g_current_signal.is_buy;
  454 |     entry_price = g_current_signal.price;
  455 |     confidence = g_current_signal.confidence;
  456 |     
  457 |     return true;
  458 | }
  459 | 
  460 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  461 | //| Get Order Block Count                                            |
  462 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  463 | int GetOrderBlockCount()
  464 | {
  465 |     int count = 0;
  466 |     for(int i = 0; i < g_ob_count; i++)
  467 |     {
  468 |         if(g_order_blocks[i].is_valid)
  469 |             count++;
  470 |     }
  471 |     return count;
  472 | }
  473 | 
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | //| Get Market Analysis Summary                                      |
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | string GetSMCAnalysisSummary()
  478 | {
  479 |     string summary = "=== SMC LITE ANALYSIS ===\n";
  480 |     
  481 |     summary += StringFormat("Order Blocks: %d\n", GetOrderBlockCount());
  482 |     
  483 |     if(g_current_signal.is_valid)
  484 |     {
  485 |         summary += StringFormat("Current Signal: %s (Confidence: %d%%)\n", 
  486 |                                g_current_signal.is_buy ? "BUY" : "SELL", 
  487 |                                g_current_signal.confidence);
  488 |     }
  489 |     else
  490 |     {
  491 |         summary += "Current Signal: None\n";
  492 |     }
  493 |     
  494 |     return summary;
  495 | }

  103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  104 | //| ScanInitialStructure                                             |
  105 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  106 | void CMarketStructure::ScanInitialStructure()
  107 | {
  108 |     // Logic to scan historical data and build the initial market structure
  109 |     MqlRates rates[];
  110 |     if(CopyRates(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, m_config.LookbackPeriod, rates) <= 0)
  111 |     {
  112 |         printf("Failed to copy rates for initial structure scan");
  113 |         return;
  114 |     }
  115 | 
  116 |     for(int i = ArraySize(rates) - 1 - m_config.PivotStrength; i >= m_config.PivotStrength; i--)
  117 |     {
  118 |         if(CSMCUtils::IsSwingHigh(rates, i, m_config.PivotStrength))
  119 |         {
  120 |             AddSwingPoint(rates, i, SWING_HIGH);
  121 |         }
  122 |         else if(CSMCUtils::IsSwingLow(rates, i, m_config.PivotStrength))
  123 |         {
  124 |             AddSwingPoint(rates, i, SWING_LOW);
  125 |         }
  126 |     }
  127 | }
  128 | 
  129 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  130 | //| UpdateStructure                                                  |
  131 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  132 | void CMarketStructure::UpdateStructure()
  133 | {
  134 |     // Logic to update structure with the latest candle data
  135 |     MqlRates rates[];
  136 |     if(CopyRates(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, m_config.PivotStrength * 2 + 1, rates) <= 0)
  137 |     {
  138 |         return;
  139 |     }
  140 | 
  141 |     int check_index = m_config.PivotStrength;
  142 | 
  143 |     if(CSMCUtils::IsSwingHigh(rates, check_index, m_config.PivotStrength))
  144 |     {
  145 |         AddSwingPoint(rates, check_index, SWING_HIGH);
  146 |         // Check for BOS/CHOCH after adding a new swing point
  147 |     }
  148 |     else if(CSMCUtils::IsSwingLow(rates, check_index, m_config.PivotStrength))
  149 |     {
  150 |         AddSwingPoint(rates, check_index, SWING_LOW);
  151 |         // Check for BOS/CHOCH after adding a new swing point
  152 |     }
  153 | }
  154 | 
  155 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  156 | //| AddSwingPoint                                                    |
  157 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  158 | void CMarketStructure::AddSwingPoint(const MqlRates &rates[], int index, SWING_POINT_TYPE type)
  159 | {
  160 |     SwingPoint* new_sp = new SwingPoint();
  161 |     new_sp.time = rates[index].time;
  162 |     new_sp.type = type;
  163 |     new_sp.price = (type == SWING_HIGH) ? rates[index].high : rates[index].low;
  164 | 
  165 |     // Avoid adding duplicate points
  166 |     if(m_swing_points.Total() > 0)
  167 |     {
  168 |         SwingPoint* last_sp = (SwingPoint*)m_swing_points.At(m_swing_points.Total() - 1);
  169 |         if(last_sp.time == new_sp.time)
  170 |         {
  171 |             delete new_sp;
  172 |             return;
  173 |         }
  174 |     }
  175 | 
  176 |     m_swing_points.Add(new_sp);
  177 | 
  178 |     // After adding a new point, check for structure changes
  179 |     if(IsBreakOfStructure(new_sp))
  180 |     {
  181 |         // Create and store BOS point
  182 |         MarketStructurePoint* bos_point = new MarketStructurePoint();
  183 |         bos_point.time = new_sp.time;
  184 |         bos_point.price = new_sp.price;
  185 |         bos_point.type = MARKET_STRUCTURE_POINT_TYPE::BOS;
  186 |         bos_point.swing_type = new_sp.type;
  187 |         m_structure_points.Add(bos_point);
  188 |         
  189 |         printf("BOS Detected at %s, Price: %.5f, Type: %s", 
  190 |                TimeToString(bos_point.time),
  191 |                bos_point.price,
  192 |                EnumToString(bos_point.swing_type));
  193 |     }
  194 |     else if(IsChangeOfCharacter(new_sp))
  195 |     {
  196 |         // Create and store CHOCH point
  197 |         MarketStructurePoint* choch_point = new MarketStructurePoint();
  198 |         choch_point.time = new_sp.time;
  199 |         choch_point.price = new_sp.price;
  200 |         choch_point.type = MARKET_STRUCTURE_POINT_TYPE::CHOCH;
  201 |         choch_point.swing_type = new_sp.type;
  202 |         m_structure_points.Add(choch_point);
  203 |         
  204 |         printf("CHOCH Detected at %s, Price: %.5f, Type: %s", 
  205 |                TimeToString(choch_point.time),
  206 |                choch_point.price,
  207 |                EnumToString(choch_point.swing_type));
  208 |     }
  209 | }
  210 | 
  211 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  212 | //| IsBreakOfStructure                                               |
  213 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  214 | bool CMarketStructure::IsBreakOfStructure(SwingPoint* new_sp)
  215 | {
  216 |     if(m_swing_points.Total() < 3) return false;
  217 | 
  218 |     // Find the last swing point of the same type before the new one
  219 |     SwingPoint *last_same_type_sp = NULL;
  220 |     for(int i = m_swing_points.Total() - 2; i >= 0; i--)
  221 |     {
  222 |         SwingPoint* sp = (SwingPoint*)m_swing_points.At(i);
  223 |         if(sp.type == new_sp.type)
  224 |         {
  225 |             last_same_type_sp = sp;
  226 |             break;
  227 |         }
  228 |     }
  229 | 
  230 |     if(last_same_type_sp == NULL) return false;
  231 | 
  232 |     // Bullish BOS: New swing high is higher than the previous swing high.
  233 |     if(m_market_state == BULLISH && new_sp.type == SWING_HIGH && new_sp.price > last_same_type_sp.price)
  234 |     {
  235 |         m_market_state = BULLISH; // Confirm trend
  236 |         return true;
  237 |     }
  238 |     
  239 |     // Bearish BOS: New swing low is lower than the previous swing low.
  240 |     if(m_market_state == BEARISH && new_sp.type == SWING_LOW && new_sp.price < last_same_type_sp.price)
  241 |     {
  242 |         m_market_state = BEARISH; // Confirm trend
  243 |         return true;
  244 |     }
  245 | 
  246 |     return false;
  247 | }
  248 | 
  249 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  250 | //| IsChangeOfCharacter                                              |
  251 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  252 | bool CMarketStructure::IsChangeOfCharacter(SwingPoint* new_sp)
  253 | {
  254 |     if(m_swing_points.Total() < 2) return false;
  255 | 
  256 |     // Find the last significant swing point of the opposite type
  257 |     SwingPoint* last_opposite_sp = NULL;
  258 |      for(int i = m_swing_points.Total() - 2; i >= 0; i--)
  259 |     {
  260 |         SwingPoint* sp = (SwingPoint*)m_swing_points.At(i);
  261 |         if(sp.type != new_sp.type)
  262 |         {
  263 |             last_opposite_sp = sp;
  264 |             break;
  265 |         }
  266 |     }
  267 | 
  268 |     if(last_opposite_sp == NULL) return false;
  269 | 
  270 |     // CHOCH from Bullish to Bearish: A swing low takes out the prior swing low.
  271 |     if(m_market_state == BULLISH && new_sp.type == SWING_LOW && new_sp.price < last_opposite_sp.price)
  272 |     {
  273 |         m_market_state = BEARISH;
  274 |         return true;
  275 |     }
  276 | 
  277 |     // CHOCH from Bearish to Bullish: A swing high takes out the prior swing high.
  278 |     if(m_market_state == BEARISH && new_sp.type == SWING_HIGH && new_sp.price > last_opposite_sp.price)
  279 |     {
  280 |         m_market_state = BULLISH;
  281 |         return true;
  282 |     }
  283 |     
  284 |     // Initial state detection
  285 |     if(m_market_state == UNDEFINED && m_swing_points.Total() >= 2)
  286 |     {
  287 |         SwingPoint* second_last_sp = (SwingPoint*)m_swing_points.At(m_swing_points.Total() - 2);
  288 |         if(new_sp.type == SWING_HIGH && second_last_sp.type == SWING_LOW)
  289 |         {
  290 |             if(new_sp.price > second_last_sp.price) m_market_state = BULLISH; // Higher High
  291 |         }
  292 |         else if(new_sp.type == SWING_LOW && second_last_sp.type == SWING_HIGH)
  293 |         {
  294 |             if(new_sp.price < second_last_sp.price) m_market_state = BEARISH; // Lower Low
  295 |         }
  296 |     }
  297 | 
  298 |     return false;
  299 | }
================================================================================

   55 | 
   56 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   57 | //| Destructor                                                       |
   58 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   59 | COrderBlocks::~COrderBlocks(void)
   60 | {
   61 |     if(CheckPointer(m_order_blocks) != POINTER_INVALID) delete m_order_blocks;
   62 | }
   63 | 
   64 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   65 | //| Initialize                                                       |
   66 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   67 | bool COrderBlocks::Initialize(const OrderBlockConfig &config, string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, CMarketStructure* ms_module)
   68 | {
   69 |     m_config = config;
   70 |     m_symbol = symbol;
   71 |     m_timeframe = timeframe;
   72 |     m_market_structure = ms_module;
   73 | 
   74 |     if(CheckPointer(m_market_structure) == POINTER_INVALID)
   75 |     {
   76 |         printf("OrderBlocks: Market Structure module is not valid!");
   77 |         return false;
   78 |     }
   79 | 
   80 |     return true;
   81 | }
   82 | 
   83 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   84 | //| Update                                                           |
   85 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   86 | void COrderBlocks::Update()
   87 | {
   88 |     // The main logic will be triggered by market structure changes,
   89 |     // so this might be called less frequently or when a new structure point is confirmed.
   90 |     ScanForOrderBlocks();
   91 | }
   92 | 
   93 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   94 | //| ScanForOrderBlocks                                               |
   95 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   96 | void COrderBlocks::ScanForOrderBlocks()
   97 | {
   98 |     if(CheckPointer(m_market_structure) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
   99 | 
  100 |     int last_structure_point_index = m_market_structure->GetStructurePointsCount() - 1;
  101 |     if(last_structure_point_index < 0) return;
  102 | 
  103 |     MarketStructurePoint* last_sp = m_market_structure->GetStructurePoint(last_structure_point_index);
  104 |     if(last_sp == NULL) return;
  105 | 
  106 |     // Check if we have already processed this structure point
  107 |     if(m_order_blocks.Total() > 0)
  108 |     {
  109 |         OrderBlock* last_ob = (OrderBlock*)m_order_blocks.At(m_order_blocks.Total() - 1);
  110 |         // A simple check to avoid re-processing. A more robust mechanism might be needed.
  111 |         if(last_ob.time_start >= last_sp.time) return;
  112 |     }
  113 | 
  114 |     MqlRates rates[];
  115 |     if(CopyRates(m_symbol, m_timeframe, last_sp.time, 1, rates) <= 0) return;
  116 |     int rate_index = 0; // The index of the break candle
  117 | 
  118 |     // Find the candle that created the structure break
  119 |     // We need to look back from the break point
  120 |     MqlRates history_rates[];
  121 |     if(CopyRates(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, rates[rate_index].time, 100, history_rates) <= 0) return;
  122 | 
  123 |     int break_candle_index = -1;
  124 |     for(int i = ArraySize(history_rates) - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  125 |     {
  126 |         if(history_rates[i].time == last_sp.time)
  127 |         {
  128 |             break_candle_index = i;
  129 |             break;
  130 |         }
  131 |     }
  132 | 
  133 |     if(break_candle_index <= 0) return;
  134 | 
  135 |     // Bullish OB: Last bearish candle before a bullish BOS/CHOCH
  136 |     if(last_sp.swing_type == SWING_HIGH) // Breakout was to the upside
  137 |     {
  138 |         for(int i = break_candle_index - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  139 |         {
  140 |             // Find the last down-candle before the up-move
  141 |             if(history_rates[i].close < history_rates[i].open)
  142 |             {
  143 |                 AddOrderBlock(history_rates[i], ORDER_BLOCK_BULLISH);
  144 |                 printf("Bullish Order Block found at %s", TimeToString(history_rates[i].time));
  145 |                 return; // Found the OB, exit
  146 |             }
  147 |         }
  148 |     }
  149 |     // Bearish OB: Last bullish candle before a bearish BOS/CHOCH
  150 |     else if(last_sp.swing_type == SWING_LOW) // Breakout was to the downside
  151 |     {
  152 |         for(int i = break_candle_index - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  153 |         {
  154 |             // Find the last up-candle before the down-move
  155 |             if(history_rates[i].close > history_rates[i].open)
  156 |             {
  157 |                 AddOrderBlock(history_rates[i], ORDER_BLOCK_BEARISH);
  158 |                 printf("Bearish Order Block found at %s", TimeToString(history_rates[i].time));
  159 |                 return; // Found the OB, exit
  160 |             }
  161 |         }
  162 |     }
  163 | }
  164 | 
  165 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  166 | //| AddOrderBlock                                                    |
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | void COrderBlocks::AddOrderBlock(const MqlRates &rate, ORDER_BLOCK_TYPE type)
  169 | {
  170 |     OrderBlock* ob = new OrderBlock();
  171 |     ob.type = type;
  172 |     ob.time_start = rate.time;
  173 |     ob.price_high = rate.high;
  174 |     ob.price_low = rate.low;
  175 |     ob.volume = rate.tick_volume;
  176 |     ob.is_mitigated = false;
  177 | 
  178 |     m_order_blocks.Add(ob);
  179 | }
================================================================================

   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | //| Trade Performance Structure                                       |
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | struct STradePerformance
   19 | {
   20 |     ulong       ticket;
   21 |     double      profit;
   22 |     double      volume;
   23 |     int         type;           // ORDER_TYPE_BUY or ORDER_TYPE_SELL
   24 |     datetime    openTime;
   25 |     datetime    closeTime;
   26 |     double      pips;
   27 |     double      riskReward;
   28 | };
   29 | 
   30 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   31 | //| CPerformanceTracker - Track and analyze trading performance      |
   32 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   33 | class CPerformanceTracker
   34 | {
   35 | private:
   36 |     bool                    m_initialized;
   37 |     CLogger*               m_pLogger;
   38 |     
   39 |     // Performance data
   40 |     STradePerformance      m_trades[];
   41 |     int                    m_totalTrades;
   42 |     int                    m_winningTrades;
   43 |     int                    m_losingTrades;
   44 |     double                 m_totalProfit;
   45 |     double                 m_totalLoss;
   46 |     double                 m_maxProfit;
   47 |     double                 m_maxLoss;
   48 |     double                 m_maxDrawdown;
   49 |     
   50 |     // Statistics
   51 |     double                 m_winRate;
   52 |     double                 m_avgWin;
   53 |     double                 m_avgLoss;
   54 |     double                 m_profitFactor;
   55 |     double                 m_sharpeRatio;
   56 |     
   57 | public:
   58 |     CPerformanceTracker() : m_initialized(false), m_pLogger(NULL),
   59 |                            m_totalTrades(0), m_winningTrades(0), m_losingTrades(0),
   60 |                            m_totalProfit(0), m_totalLoss(0), m_maxProfit(0), m_maxLoss(0),
   61 |                            m_maxDrawdown(0), m_winRate(0), m_avgWin(0), m_avgLoss(0),
   62 |                            m_profitFactor(0), m_sharpeRatio(0)
   63 |     {
   64 |         ArrayResize(m_trades, 0);
   65 |     }
   66 |     
   67 |     ~CPerformanceTracker()
   68 |     {
   69 |         if(m_pLogger) LOG_INFO("CPerformanceTracker deinitialized");
   70 |     }
   71 |     
   72 |     bool Initialize(CLogger* pLogger)
   73 |     {
   74 |         if(!pLogger) {
   75 |             LOG_ERROR("Invalid logger");
   76 |             return false;
   77 |         }
   78 |         
   79 |         m_pLogger = pLogger;
   80 |         m_initialized = true;
   81 |         
   82 |         LOG_INFO("CPerformanceTracker initialized successfully");
   83 |         return true;
   84 |     }
   85 |     
   86 |     void Deinitialize()
   87 |     {
   88 |         if(m_pLogger && m_totalTrades > 0) {
   89 |             LOG_INFO(StringFormat("Performance Summary - Trades: %d, Win Rate: %.1f%%, Profit Factor: %.2f",
   90 |                               m_totalTrades, m_winRate, m_profitFactor));
   91 |         }
   92 |         m_initialized = false;
   93 |     }
   94 |     
   95 |     // Add a completed trade to performance tracking
   96 |     void AddTrade(ulong ticket, double profit, double volume, int type, datetime openTime)
   97 |     {
   98 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
   99 |         
  100 |         // Resize array to accommodate new trade
  101 |         int newSize = ArraySize(m_trades) + 1;
  102 |         ArrayResize(m_trades, newSize);
  103 |         
  104 |         // Fill trade data
  105 |         STradePerformance &trade = m_trades[newSize - 1];
  106 |         trade.ticket = ticket;
  107 |         trade.profit = profit;
  108 |         trade.volume = volume;
  109 |         trade.type = type;
  110 |         trade.openTime = openTime;
  111 |         trade.closeTime = TimeCurrent();
  112 |         
  113 |         // Calculate pips (simplified)
  114 |         double pointValue = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  115 |         trade.pips = (pointValue > 0) ? profit / (volume * pointValue * 10) : 0;
  116 |         
  117 |         // Update statistics
  118 |         UpdateStatistics();
  119 |         
  120 |         if(m_pLogger) {
  121 |             LOG_INFO(StringFormat("Trade recorded - Ticket: %d, Profit: %.2f, Pips: %.1f",
  122 |                               ticket, profit, trade.pips));
  123 |         }
  124 |     }
  125 |     
  126 |     // Update all performance statistics
  127 |     void UpdateStatistics()
  128 |     {
  129 |         if(ArraySize(m_trades) == 0) return;
  130 |         
  131 |         m_totalTrades = ArraySize(m_trades);
  132 |         m_winningTrades = 0;
  133 |         m_losingTrades = 0;
  134 |         m_totalProfit = 0;
  135 |         m_totalLoss = 0;
  136 |         m_maxProfit = 0;
  137 |         m_maxLoss = 0;
  138 |         
  139 |         // Calculate basic statistics
  140 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_totalTrades; i++) {
  141 |             double profit = m_trades[i].profit;
  142 |             
  143 |             if(profit > 0) {
  144 |                 m_winningTrades++;
  145 |                 m_totalProfit += profit;
  146 |                 if(profit > m_maxProfit) m_maxProfit = profit;
  147 |             }
  148 |             else if(profit < 0) {
  149 |                 m_losingTrades++;
  150 |                 m_totalLoss += MathAbs(profit);
  151 |                 if(MathAbs(profit) > m_maxLoss) m_maxLoss = MathAbs(profit);
  152 |             }
  153 |         }
  154 |         
  155 |         // Calculate derived statistics
  156 |         m_winRate = (m_totalTrades > 0) ? (double)m_winningTrades / m_totalTrades * 100.0 : 0.0;
  157 |         m_avgWin = (m_winningTrades > 0) ? m_totalProfit / m_winningTrades : 0.0;
  158 |         m_avgLoss = (m_losingTrades > 0) ? m_totalLoss / m_losingTrades : 0.0;
  159 |         m_profitFactor = (m_totalLoss > 0) ? m_totalProfit / m_totalLoss : 0.0;
  160 |         
  161 |         // Calculate drawdown (simplified)
  162 |         CalculateDrawdown();
  163 |     }
  164 |     
  165 |     // Calculate maximum drawdown
  166 |     void CalculateDrawdown()
  167 |     {
  168 |         if(ArraySize(m_trades) < 2) return;
  169 |         
  170 |         double runningProfit = 0;
  171 |         double peak = 0;
  172 |         double maxDD = 0;
  173 |         
  174 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(m_trades); i++) {
  175 |             runningProfit += m_trades[i].profit;
  176 |             
  177 |             if(runningProfit > peak) {
  178 |                 peak = runningProfit;
  179 |             }
  180 |             
  181 |             double currentDD = peak - runningProfit;
  182 |             if(currentDD > maxDD) {
  183 |                 maxDD = currentDD;
  184 |             }
  185 |         }
  186 |         
  187 |         m_maxDrawdown = maxDD;
  188 |     }
  189 |     
  190 |     // Generate performance report
  191 |     string GetPerformanceReport()
  192 |     {
  193 |         if(!m_initialized) return "Performance Tracker not initialized";
  194 |         
  195 |         string report = "\n=== PERFORMANCE REPORT ===\n";
  196 |         report += StringFormat("Total Trades: %d\n", m_totalTrades);
  197 |         report += StringFormat("Winning Trades: %d (%.1f%%)\n", m_winningTrades, m_winRate);
  198 |         report += StringFormat("Losing Trades: %d\n", m_losingTrades);
  199 |         report += StringFormat("Total Profit: %.2f\n", m_totalProfit - m_totalLoss);
  200 |         report += StringFormat("Gross Profit: %.2f\n", m_totalProfit);
  201 |         report += StringFormat("Gross Loss: %.2f\n", m_totalLoss);
  202 |         report += StringFormat("Profit Factor: %.2f\n", m_profitFactor);
  203 |         report += StringFormat("Average Win: %.2f\n", m_avgWin);
  204 |         report += StringFormat("Average Loss: %.2f\n", m_avgLoss);
  205 |         report += StringFormat("Max Profit: %.2f\n", m_maxProfit);
  206 |         report += StringFormat("Max Loss: %.2f\n", m_maxLoss);
  207 |         report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %.2f\n", m_maxDrawdown);
  208 |         report += "=========================";
  209 |         
  210 |         return report;
  211 |     }
  212 |     
  213 |     // Event handlers
  214 |     void OnTimer() 
  215 |     {
  216 |         // Update statistics periodically
  217 |         if(m_initialized && ArraySize(m_trades) > 0) {
  218 |             UpdateStatistics();
  219 |         }
  220 |     }
  221 |     
  222 |     // Getters
  223 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
  224 |     int GetTotalTrades() const { return m_totalTrades; }
  225 |     int GetWinningTrades() const { return m_winningTrades; }
  226 |     int GetLosingTrades() const { return m_losingTrades; }
  227 |     double GetWinRate() const { return m_winRate; }
  228 |     double GetProfitFactor() const { return m_profitFactor; }
  229 |     double GetTotalProfit() const { return m_totalProfit - m_totalLoss; }
  230 |     double GetMaxDrawdown() const { return m_maxDrawdown; }
  231 |     double GetAverageWin() const { return m_avgWin; }
  232 |     double GetAverageLoss() const { return m_avgLoss; }
  233 | };
  234 | 
  235 | // End of namespace removal

   18 | class CCircuitBreaker
   19 | {
   20 | private:
   21 |     bool                m_initialized;
   22 |     CEaContext*         m_pContext; // Pointer to the global EA context
   23 |     bool               m_tradingEnabled;
   24 |     double             m_dailyLossLimit;
   25 |     double             m_dailyStartBalance;
   26 |     
   27 | public:
   28 |     CCircuitBreaker() : m_initialized(false), m_pContext(NULL), 
   29 |                         m_tradingEnabled(true), m_dailyLossLimit(0), 
   30 |                         m_dailyStartBalance(0) {}
   31 |     
   32 |     ~CCircuitBreaker() {}
   33 |     
   34 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* pContext)
   35 |     {
   36 |         m_pContext = pContext;
   37 |         if(!m_pContext || !m_pContext->pLogger)
   38 |         {
   39 |             // Cannot log if context or logger is invalid
   40 |             return false;
   41 |         }
   42 |         m_tradingEnabled = true;
   43 |         m_dailyStartBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
   44 |         m_dailyLossLimit = m_dailyStartBalance * 0.05; // 5% daily loss limit
   45 |         m_initialized = true;
   46 |         
   47 |         if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Circuit Breaker initialized - Trading enabled");
   48 |         return true;
   49 |     }
   50 |     
   51 |     void PostInitialize()
   52 |     {
   53 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
   54 |         
   55 |         m_dailyStartBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
   56 |         if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Circuit Breaker post-initialization completed");
   57 |     }
   58 |     
   59 |     bool IsTradingAllowed()
   60 |     {
   61 |         if(!m_initialized) return false;
   62 |         
   63 |         // Basic daily loss check
   64 |         double currentBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
   65 |         double dailyLoss = m_dailyStartBalance - currentBalance;
   66 |         
   67 |         if(dailyLoss > m_dailyLossLimit)
   68 |         {
   69 |             m_tradingEnabled = false;
   70 |             string msg = StringFormat("Circuit Breaker TRIGGERED: Daily loss %.2f exceeds limit %.2f", 
   71 |                                     dailyLoss, m_dailyLossLimit);
   72 |             if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning(msg, __FUNCTION__);
   73 |             return false;
   74 |         }
   75 |         
   76 |         return m_tradingEnabled;
   77 |     }
   78 |     
   79 |     bool ValidateTradeRequest(const STradeRequest& request)
   80 |     {
   81 |         if(!m_initialized) return false;
   82 |         if(!IsTradingAllowed()) return false;
   83 |         
   84 |         // Basic validation
   85 |         if(request.Volume <= 0)
   86 |         {
   87 |             if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning("Invalid volume", __FUNCTION__);
   88 |             return false;
   89 |         }
   90 |         
   91 |         return true;
   92 |     }
   93 |     
   94 |     void OnNewDay()
   95 |     {
   96 |         if(!m_initialized) return;
   97 |         
   98 |         m_dailyStartBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
   99 |         m_tradingEnabled = true;
  100 |         if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("New day reset completed");
  101 |     }
  102 |     
  103 |     void EnableTrading() { m_tradingEnabled = true; }
  104 |     void DisableTrading() { m_tradingEnabled = false; }
  105 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
  106 |     bool IsTripped() const { return !m_tradingEnabled; }
