   70 |         // Get symbol specifications
   71 |         m_minLotSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
   72 |         m_maxLotSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
   73 |         m_lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
   74 |         
   75 |         if(m_minLotSize <= 0) m_minLotSize = 0.01;
   76 |         if(m_maxLotSize <= 0) m_maxLotSize = 100.0;
   77 |         if(m_lotStep <= 0) m_lotStep = 0.01;
   78 |         
   79 |         // Initialize volatility parameters
   80 |         m_currentATR = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14, 0);
   81 |         m_normalATR = CalculateNormalATR(); // Calculate 30-day average ATR
   82 |         m_volatilityMultiplier = GetVolatilityMultiplier();
   83 |         
   84 |         // Initialize circuit breaker
   85 |         m_maxDrawdownPercent = MAX_DRAWDOWN_PERCENT;
   86 |         UpdateDrawdownTracking();
   87 |         
   88 |         m_initialized = true;
   89 |         if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("CRiskManager initialized - MinLot: %.2f, MaxLot: %.2f, Step: %.2f, ATR: %.5f, Vol Mult: %.2f",
   90 |                           m_minLotSize, m_maxLotSize, m_lotStep, m_currentATR, m_volatilityMultiplier), __FUNCTION__);
   91 |         return true;
   92 |     }
   93 |     
   94 |     void Deinitialize()
   95 |     {
   96 |         m_initialized = false;
   97 |     }
   98 |     
   99 |     // ACTIVE: Real risk calculation based on signal info and account equity
  100 |     bool CalculateTradeRisk(const SSignalInfo& signalInfo, SRiskInfo& riskInfo)
  101 |     {
  102 |         if(!m_initialized) {
  103 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("CRiskManager not initialized", __FUNCTION__);
  104 |             return false;
  105 |         }
  106 | 
  107 |         // Validate signal info
  108 |         if(signalInfo.EntryPrice <= 0 || signalInfo.StopLoss <= 0)
  109 |         {
  110 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid signal info provided to CalculateTradeRisk.", __FUNCTION__);
  111 |             return false;
  112 |         }
  113 |         
  114 |         // Get account information
  115 |         double accountEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  116 |         double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  117 |         double accountFreeMargin = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE);
  118 |         
  119 |         if(accountEquity <= 0) {
  120 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid account equity", __FUNCTION__);
  121 |             return false;
  122 |         }
  123 |         
  124 |         // Calculate risk amount based on percentage
  125 |         double riskPercent = InpRiskPercent;
  126 |         double maxRiskAmount = accountEquity * (riskPercent / 100.0);
  127 |         
  128 |         // --- DYNAMIC SL CALCULATION ---
  129 |         // Calculate SL distance in points based on the signal's dynamic SL
  130 |         double slDistance = MathAbs(signalInfo.EntryPrice - signalInfo.StopLoss);
  131 | 
  132 |         if(slDistance <= 0)
  133 |         {
  134 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Stop Loss distance is zero or negative.", __FUNCTION__);
  135 |             return false;
  136 |         }
  137 |         
  138 |         // Calculate lot size based on risk
  139 |         double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
  140 |         double tickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
  141 |         
  142 |         if(tickValue <= 0 || tickSize <= 0) {
  143 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid symbol tick specifications", __FUNCTION__);
  144 |             return false;
  145 |         }
  146 |         
  147 |         // Calculate base lot size: Risk Amount / (SL Distance in points * Tick Value)
  148 |         double slDistanceInPoints = slDistance / SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  149 |         double baseLotSize = maxRiskAmount / (slDistanceInPoints * tickValue);
  150 |         
  151 |         // Apply volatility-based adjustment
  152 |         double calculatedLotSize = CalculateVolatilityAdjustedSize(baseLotSize);
  153 |         
  154 |         // Check circuit breaker before proceeding
  155 |         if(!CheckCircuitBreaker()) {
  156 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogWarning("Circuit breaker active - reducing position size by 50%", __FUNCTION__);
  157 |             calculatedLotSize *= 0.5;
  158 |         }
  159 |         
  160 |         // Normalize lot size to symbol specifications
  161 |         calculatedLotSize = NormalizeLotSize(calculatedLotSize);
  162 |         
  163 |         // Check margin requirements
  164 |         double marginRequired = 0;
  165 |         if(!OrderCalcMargin((signalInfo.Type == SIGNAL_BUY ? ORDER_TYPE_BUY : ORDER_TYPE_SELL), 
  166 |                              _Symbol, calculatedLotSize, signalInfo.EntryPrice, marginRequired)) {
  167 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to calculate margin requirements", __FUNCTION__);
  168 |             return false;
  169 |         }
  170 |         
  171 |         // Check if we have enough free margin
  172 |         bool isTradeAllowed = (marginRequired <= accountFreeMargin * 0.8); // Use 80% of free margin
  173 |         
  174 |         if(!isTradeAllowed) {
  175 |             calculatedLotSize = CalculateMaxAffordableLotSize(signalInfo.EntryPrice, accountFreeMargin);
  176 |             isTradeAllowed = (calculatedLotSize >= m_minLotSize);
  177 |         }
  178 |         
  179 |         // Fill risk info structure
  180 |         riskInfo.LotSize = calculatedLotSize;
  181 |         riskInfo.RiskPercent = riskPercent;
  182 |         riskInfo.MaxLoss = maxRiskAmount;
  183 |         riskInfo.RiskReward = (signalInfo.TakeProfit > 0 && slDistance > 0) ? MathAbs(signalInfo.TakeProfit - signalInfo.EntryPrice) / slDistance : 0.0;
  184 |         riskInfo.IsValid = isTradeAllowed;
  185 |         
  186 |         // Log the calculation
  187 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) {
  188 |             m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Risk Calculated - Equity: $%.2f, Risk: %.1f%%, SL Distance: %.5f, Lot: %.2f, R:R: %.2f, Allowed: %s",
  189 |                               accountEquity, riskPercent, slDistance, calculatedLotSize, riskInfo.RiskReward,
  190 |                               isTradeAllowed ? "YES" : "NO"));
  191 |         }
  192 |         
  193 |         return true;
  194 |     }
  195 |     
  196 |     // Normalize lot size according to symbol specifications
  197 |     double NormalizeLotSize(double lotSize)
  198 |     {
  199 |         if(lotSize < m_minLotSize) return m_minLotSize;
  200 |         if(lotSize > m_maxLotSize) return m_maxLotSize;
  201 |         
  202 |         // Round to nearest step
  203 |         double normalizedLot = MathRound(lotSize / m_lotStep) * m_lotStep;
  204 |         
  205 |         // Ensure it's within bounds
  206 |         if(normalizedLot < m_minLotSize) normalizedLot = m_minLotSize;
  207 |         if(normalizedLot > m_maxLotSize) normalizedLot = m_maxLotSize;
  208 |         
  209 |         return normalizedLot;
  210 |     }
  211 |     
  212 |     // Calculate maximum affordable lot size based on available margin
  213 |     double CalculateMaxAffordableLotSize(double price, double availableMargin)
  214 |     {
  215 |         double maxLot = m_minLotSize;
  216 |         double marginRequired = 0;
  217 |         
  218 |         for(double testLot = m_minLotSize; testLot <= m_maxLotSize; testLot += m_lotStep) {
  219 |             if(OrderCalcMargin(ORDER_TYPE_BUY, _Symbol, testLot, price, marginRequired)) {
  220 |                 if(marginRequired <= availableMargin * 0.8) {
  221 |                     maxLot = testLot;
  222 |                 } else {
  223 |                     break;
  224 |                 }
  225 |             }
  226 |         }
  227 |         
  228 |         return maxLot;
  229 |     }
  230 |     
  231 |     // MVP: Basic risk validation stubs
  232 |     bool ValidateAccountSettings()
  233 |     {
  234 |         if(m_pLogger) LOG_INFO("Account validation passed");
  235 |         return true;
  236 |     }
  237 |     
  238 |     bool CanOpenNewPosition()
  239 |     {
  240 |         if(!m_initialized) return false;
  241 |         
  242 |         // Check circuit breaker
  243 |         if(!CheckCircuitBreaker()) {
  244 |             if(m_pLogger) LOG_WARNING("New position blocked by circuit breaker");
  245 |             return false;
  246 |         }
  247 |         
  248 |         // Check daily limits
  249 |         if(!IsWithinDailyLimits()) {
  250 |             if(m_pLogger) LOG_WARNING("Daily trading limits reached");
  251 |             return false;
  252 |         }
  253 |         
  254 |         return true;
  255 |     }
  256 |     
  257 |     bool ValidateTradeRequest(const STradeRequest& request)
  258 |     {
  259 |         if(!m_initialized) return false;
  260 |         
  261 |         // Enhanced validation with circuit breaker
  262 |         if(!CheckCircuitBreaker()) {
  263 |             if(m_pLogger) LOG_WARNING("Trade request rejected by circuit breaker");
  264 |             return false;
  265 |         }
  266 |         
  267 |         if(m_pLogger) LOG_INFO("Trade request validation passed");
  268 |         return true;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     // Enhanced event handlers
  272 |     void OnTimer() 
  273 |     { 
  274 |         if(m_initialized) {
  275 |             UpdateDrawdownTracking();
  276 |             m_currentATR = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14, 0);
  277 |             m_volatilityMultiplier = GetVolatilityMultiplier();
  278 |         }
  279 |     }
  280 |     
  281 |     void OnTrade() 
  282 |     { 
  283 |         if(m_initialized) {
  284 |             UpdateDrawdownTracking();
  285 |             m_lastTradeTime = TimeCurrent();
  286 |         }
  287 |     }
  288 |     
  289 |     // New methods for advanced risk management
  290 |     void ResetCircuitBreaker() 
  291 |     {
  292 |         m_circuitBreakerActive = false;
  293 |         m_consecutiveLosses = 0;
  294 |         if(m_pLogger) LOG_INFO("Circuit breaker reset");
  295 |     }
  296 |     
  297 |     double GetCurrentVolatilityMultiplier() const { return m_volatilityMultiplier; }
  298 |     bool IsCircuitBreakerActive() const { return m_circuitBreakerActive; }
  299 |     double GetCurrentDrawdown() const { return m_currentDrawdown; }
  300 |     
  301 |     // Getters
  302 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
  303 |     double GetMinLotSize() const { return m_minLotSize; }
  304 |     double GetMaxLotSize() const { return m_maxLotSize; }
  305 |     double GetLotStep() const { return m_lotStep; }
  306 | };
  307 | 
  308 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  309 | //| Private Methods Implementation - Advanced Risk Management        |
  310 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  311 | 
  312 | // Calculate volatility-adjusted position size
  313 | double CRiskManager::CalculateVolatilityAdjustedSize(double baseLotSize)
  314 | {
  315 |     if(m_normalATR <= 0 || m_currentATR <= 0) return baseLotSize;
  316 |     
  317 |     // Calculate volatility ratio
  318 |     double volatilityRatio = m_currentATR / m_normalATR;
  319 |     
  320 |     // Adjust position size inversely to volatility
  321 |     // Higher volatility = smaller position, Lower volatility = larger position
  322 |     double adjustedSize = baseLotSize / volatilityRatio;
  323 |     
  324 |     // Apply limits (don't go below 50% or above 150% of base size)
  325 |     adjustedSize = MathMax(adjustedSize, baseLotSize * 0.5);
  326 |     adjustedSize = MathMin(adjustedSize, baseLotSize * 1.5);
  327 |     
  328 |     if(m_pLogger) {
  329 |         LOG_DEBUG(StringFormat("Volatility adjustment: Base=%.2f, ATR Ratio=%.2f, Adjusted=%.2f", 
  330 |                   baseLotSize, volatilityRatio, adjustedSize));
  331 |     }
  332 |     
  333 |     return adjustedSize;
  334 | }
  335 | 
  336 | // Check circuit breaker conditions
  337 | bool CRiskManager::CheckCircuitBreaker()
  338 | {
  339 |     // Check consecutive losses
  340 |     if(m_consecutiveLosses >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES) {
  341 |         m_circuitBreakerActive = true;
  342 |         if(m_pLogger) {
  343 |             LOG_WARNING(StringFormat("Circuit breaker: %d consecutive losses (Max: %d)", 
  344 |                         m_consecutiveLosses, MAX_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES));
  345 |         }
  346 |         return false;
  347 |     }
  348 |     
  349 |     // Check drawdown
  350 |     if(m_currentDrawdown >= m_maxDrawdownPercent) {
  351 |         m_circuitBreakerActive = true;
  352 |         if(m_pLogger) {
  353 |             LOG_WARNING(StringFormat("Circuit breaker: %.2f%% drawdown (Max: %.2f%%)", 
  354 |                         m_currentDrawdown, m_maxDrawdownPercent));
  355 |         }
  356 |         return false;
  357 |     }
  358 |     
  359 |     return true;
  360 | }
  361 | 
  362 | // Update drawdown tracking
  363 | void CRiskManager::UpdateDrawdownTracking()
  364 | {
  365 |     double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  366 |     double accountBalance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  367 |     
  368 |     if(accountBalance > 0) {
  369 |         m_currentDrawdown = ((accountBalance - currentEquity) / accountBalance) * 100.0;
  370 |         
  371 |         // Reset consecutive losses if equity is recovering
  372 |         if(m_currentDrawdown < (m_maxDrawdownPercent * 0.5)) {
  373 |             if(m_consecutiveLosses > 0) {
  374 |                 m_consecutiveLosses = MathMax(0, m_consecutiveLosses - 1);
  375 |             }
  376 |             m_circuitBreakerActive = false;
  377 |         }
  378 |     }
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | // Check daily trading limits
  382 | bool CRiskManager::IsWithinDailyLimits()
  383 | {
  384 |     // Simple implementation: allow trading if last trade was more than 1 hour ago
  385 |     // In full version, this would track daily trade count and volume
  386 |     datetime currentTime = TimeCurrent();
  387 |     return (currentTime - m_lastTradeTime) > 3600; // 1 hour
  388 | }
  389 | 
  390 | // Calculate volatility multiplier
  391 | double CRiskManager::GetVolatilityMultiplier()
  392 | {
  393 |     if(m_normalATR <= 0 || m_currentATR <= 0) return 1.0;
  394 |     
  395 |     double ratio = m_currentATR / m_normalATR;
  396 |     
  397 |     // Return inverse ratio (high volatility = low multiplier)
  398 |     return 1.0 / ratio;
  399 | }
  400 | 
  401 | // Calculate normal ATR (30-day average)
  402 | double CRiskManager::CalculateNormalATR()
  403 | {
  404 |     double totalATR = 0;
  405 |     int validBars = 0;
  406 |     
  407 |     // Calculate average ATR over 30 days (assuming H1 timeframe)
  408 |     for(int i = 0; i < 720; i++) { // 30 days * 24 hours
  409 |         double atr = iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_H1, 14, i);
  410 |         if(atr > 0) {
  411 |             totalATR += atr;
  412 |             validBars++;
  413 |         }
  414 |     }
  415 |     
  416 |     return (validBars > 0) ? (totalATR / validBars) : iATR(_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14, 0);
  417 | }
  418 | 
  419 | // End of namespace removal
  420 | 
  421 | #endif

================================================================================

   17 | class CSignalConfirmation {

   52 |     int                 m_stochK;
   53 |     int                 m_stochD;
   54 |     int                 m_stochSlowing;
   55 |     double              m_stochOverbought;
   56 |     double              m_stochOversold;
   57 |

   60 |     double              m_atrMultiplier;
   61 |     
   62 |     // ADX parameters
   63 |     int                 m_adxPeriod;
   64 |     double              m_adxThreshold;
   65 |     
   66 |     // CCI parameters
   67 |     int                 m_cciPeriod;
   68 |     double              m_cciOverbought;
   69 |     double              m_cciOversold;
   70 |     
   71 |     // Volume parameters
   72 |     int                 m_volumePeriod;
   73 |     double              m_volumeMultiplier;
   74 |     
   75 |     bool                m_isInitialized;
   76 |     
   77 | public:
   78 |     // Constructor
   79 |     CSignalConfirmation() {
   80 |         m_logger = NULL;
   81 |         m_symbol = "";
   82 |         m_timeframe = PERIOD_CURRENT;
   83 |         
   84 |         // Initialize handles
   85 |         m_rsiHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   86 |         m_macdHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   87 |         m_stochHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   88 |         m_atrHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   89 |         m_adxHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   90 |         m_cciHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
   91 |         
   92 |         // Default confirmation settings
   93 |         m_useRSI = true;
   94 |         m_useMACD = true;
   95 |         m_useStochastic = true;
   96 |         m_useATR = true;
   97 |         m_useADX = true;
   98 |         m_useCCI = false;
   99 |         m_useVolumeConfirmation = true;
  100 |         m_useCandlePatterns = true;
  101 |         
  102 |         // Default RSI parameters
  103 |         m_rsiPeriod = 14;
  104 |         m_rsiOverbought = 70.0;
  105 |         m_rsiOversold = 30.0;
  106 |         
  107 |         // Default MACD parameters
  108 |         m_macdFast = 12;
  109 |         m_macdSlow = 26;
  110 |         m_macdSignal = 9;
  111 |         
  112 |         // Default Stochastic parameters
  113 |         m_stochK = 5;
  114 |         m_stochD = 3;
  115 |         m_stochSlowing = 3;
  116 |         m_stochOverbought = 80.0;
  117 |         m_stochOversold = 20.0;
  118 |         
  119 |         // Default ATR parameters
  120 |         m_atrPeriod = 14;
  121 |         m_atrMultiplier = 2.0;
  122 |         
  123 |         // Default ADX parameters
  124 |         m_adxPeriod = 14;
  125 |         m_adxThreshold = 25.0;
  126 |         
  127 |         // Default CCI parameters
  128 |         m_cciPeriod = 14;
  129 |         m_cciOverbought = 100.0;
  130 |         m_cciOversold = -100.0;
  131 |         
  132 |         // Default Volume parameters
  133 |         m_volumePeriod = 20;
  134 |         m_volumeMultiplier = 1.5;
  135 |         
  136 |         m_isInitialized = false;
  137 |     }
  138 |     
  139 |     // Destructor
  140 |     ~CSignalConfirmation() {
  141 |         Deinitialize();
  142 |     }
  143 |     
  144 |     // Initialize signal confirmation
  145 |     bool Initialize(string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, CLogger* logger = NULL) {
  146 |         m_symbol = symbol;
  147 |         m_timeframe = timeframe;
  148 |         m_logger = logger;
  149 |         
  150 |         // Initialize RSI
  151 |         if(m_useRSI) {
  152 |             m_rsiHandle = iRSI(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_rsiPeriod, PRICE_CLOSE);
  153 |             if(m_rsiHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  154 |                 LOG_ERROR("Failed to create RSI indicator");
  155 |                 return false;
  156 |             }
  157 |         }
  158 |         
  159 |         // Initialize MACD
  160 |         if(m_useMACD) {
  161 |             m_macdHandle = iMACD(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_macdFast, m_macdSlow, m_macdSignal, PRICE_CLOSE);
  162 |             if(m_macdHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  163 |                 LOG_ERROR("Failed to create MACD indicator");
  164 |                 return false;
  165 |             }
  166 |         }
  167 |         
  168 |         // Initialize Stochastic
  169 |         if(m_useStochastic) {
  170 |             m_stochHandle = iStochastic(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_stochK, m_stochD, m_stochSlowing, MODE_SMA, STO_LOWHIGH);
  171 |             if(m_stochHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  172 |                 LOG_ERROR("Failed to create Stochastic indicator");
  173 |                 return false;
  174 |             }
  175 |         }
  176 |         
  177 |         // Initialize ATR
  178 |         if(m_useATR) {
  179 |             m_atrHandle = iATR(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_atrPeriod);
  180 |             if(m_atrHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  181 |                 LOG_ERROR("Failed to create ATR indicator");
  182 |                 return false;
  183 |             }
  184 |         }
  185 |         
  186 |         // Initialize ADX
  187 |         if(m_useADX) {
  188 |             m_adxHandle = iADX(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_adxPeriod);
  189 |             if(m_adxHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  190 |                 LOG_ERROR("Failed to create ADX indicator");
  191 |                 return false;
  192 |             }
  193 |         }
  194 |         
  195 |         // Initialize CCI
  196 |         if(m_useCCI) {
  197 |             m_cciHandle = iCCI(m_symbol, m_timeframe, m_cciPeriod, PRICE_TYPICAL);
  198 |             if(m_cciHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  199 |                 LOG_ERROR("Failed to create CCI indicator");
  200 |                 return false;
  201 |             }
  202 |         }
  203 |         
  204 |         m_isInitialized = true;
  205 |         
  206 |         if(m_logger) {
  207 |             m_logger.LogInfo("Signal Confirmation initialized for " + m_symbol);
  208 |             m_logger.LogInfo("Timeframe: " + EnumToString(m_timeframe), __FUNCTION__);
  209 |         }
  210 |         
  211 |         return true;
  212 |     }
  213 |     
  214 |     // Deinitialize
  215 |     void Deinitialize() {
  216 |         if(m_rsiHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  217 |             IndicatorRelease(m_rsiHandle);
  218 |             m_rsiHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  219 |         }
  220 |         
  221 |         if(m_macdHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  222 |             IndicatorRelease(m_macdHandle);
  223 |             m_macdHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  224 |         }
  225 |         
  226 |         if(m_stochHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  227 |             IndicatorRelease(m_stochHandle);
  228 |             m_stochHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  229 |         }
  230 |         
  231 |         if(m_atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  232 |             IndicatorRelease(m_atrHandle);
  233 |             m_atrHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  234 |         }
  235 |         
  236 |         if(m_adxHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  237 |             IndicatorRelease(m_adxHandle);
  238 |             m_adxHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  239 |         }
  240 |         
  241 |         if(m_cciHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  242 |             IndicatorRelease(m_cciHandle);
  243 |             m_cciHandle = INVALID_HANDLE;
  244 |         }
  245 |         
  246 |         m_isInitialized = false;
  247 |         
  248 |         if(m_logger) {
  249 |             m_logger.LogInfo("Signal Confirmation deinitialized", __FUNCTION__);
  250 |         }
  251 |     }
  252 |     
  253 |     // Confirm buy signal
  254 |     bool ConfirmBuySignal(double& confidence) {
  255 |         if(!m_isInitialized) {
  256 |             confidence = 0.0;
  257 |             return false;
  258 |         }
  259 |         
  260 |         int confirmations = 0;
  261 |         int totalChecks = 0;
  262 |         confidence = 0.0;
  263 |         
  264 |         // RSI confirmation
  265 |         if(m_useRSI && IsRSIBullish()) {
  266 |             confirmations++;
  267 |             confidence += 20.0;
  268 |         }
  269 |         if(m_useRSI) totalChecks++;
  270 |         
  271 |         // MACD confirmation
  272 |         if(m_useMACD && IsMACDBullish()) {
  273 |             confirmations++;
  274 |             confidence += 20.0;
  275 |         }
  276 |         if(m_useMACD) totalChecks++;
  277 |         
  278 |         // Stochastic confirmation
  279 |         if(m_useStochastic && IsStochasticBullish()) {
  280 |             confirmations++;
  281 |             confidence += 15.0;
  282 |         }
  283 |         if(m_useStochastic) totalChecks++;
  284 |         
  285 |         // ADX confirmation (trend strength)
  286 |         if(m_useADX && IsADXStrong()) {
  287 |             confirmations++;
  288 |             confidence += 15.0;
  289 |         }
  290 |         if(m_useADX) totalChecks++;
  291 |         
  292 |         // CCI confirmation
  293 |         if(m_useCCI && IsCCIBullish()) {
  294 |             confirmations++;
  295 |             confidence += 10.0;
  296 |         }
  297 |         if(m_useCCI) totalChecks++;
  298 |         
  299 |         // Volume confirmation
  300 |         if(m_useVolumeConfirmation && IsVolumeConfirming()) {
  301 |             confirmations++;
  302 |             confidence += 10.0;
  303 |         }
  304 |         if(m_useVolumeConfirmation) totalChecks++;
  305 |         
  306 |         // Candle pattern confirmation
  307 |         if(m_useCandlePatterns && IsBullishCandlePattern()) {
  308 |             confirmations++;
  309 |             confidence += 10.0;
  310 |         }
  311 |         if(m_useCandlePatterns) totalChecks++;
  312 |         
  313 |         // Calculate final confidence
  314 |         if(totalChecks > 0) {
  315 |             confidence = MathMin(confidence, 100.0);
  316 |         }
  317 |         
  318 |         // Require at least 60% of indicators to confirm
  319 |         bool confirmed = (totalChecks > 0) && ((double)confirmations / totalChecks >= 0.6);
  320 |         
  321 |         if(m_logger && confirmed) {
  322 |             m_logger.LogDebug("Buy signal confirmed. Confirmations: " + IntegerToString(confirmations) + 
  323 |                             "/" + IntegerToString(totalChecks) + 
  324 |                             ", Confidence: " + DoubleToString(confidence, 1) + "%", __FUNCTION__);
  325 |         }
  326 |         
  327 |         return confirmed;
  328 |     }
  329 |     
  330 |     // Confirm sell signal
  331 |     bool ConfirmSellSignal(double& confidence) {
  332 |         if(!m_isInitialized) {
  333 |             confidence = 0.0;
  334 |             return false;
  335 |         }
  336 |         
  337 |         int confirmations = 0;
  338 |         int totalChecks = 0;
  339 |         confidence = 0.0;
  340 |         
  341 |         // RSI confirmation
  342 |         if(m_useRSI && IsRSIBearish()) {
  343 |             confirmations++;
  344 |             confidence += 20.0;
  345 |         }
  346 |         if(m_useRSI) totalChecks++;
  347 |         
  348 |         // MACD confirmation
  349 |         if(m_useMACD && IsMACDBearish()) {
  350 |             confirmations++;
  351 |             confidence += 20.0;
  352 |         }
  353 |         if(m_useMACD) totalChecks++;
  354 |         
  355 |         // Stochastic confirmation
  356 |         if(m_useStochastic && IsStochasticBearish()) {
  357 |             confirmations++;
  358 |             confidence += 15.0;
  359 |         }
  360 |         if(m_useStochastic) totalChecks++;
  361 |         
  362 |         // ADX confirmation (trend strength)
  363 |         if(m_useADX && IsADXStrong()) {
  364 |             confirmations++;
  365 |             confidence += 15.0;
  366 |         }
  367 |         if(m_useADX) totalChecks++;
  368 |         
  369 |         // CCI confirmation
  370 |         if(m_useCCI && IsCCIBearish()) {
  371 |             confirmations++;
  372 |             confidence += 10.0;
  373 |         }
  374 |         if(m_useCCI) totalChecks++;
  375 |         
  376 |         // Volume confirmation
  377 |         if(m_useVolumeConfirmation && IsVolumeConfirming()) {
  378 |             confirmations++;
  379 |             confidence += 10.0;
  380 |         }
  381 |         if(m_useVolumeConfirmation) totalChecks++;
  382 |         
  383 |         // Candle pattern confirmation
  384 |         if(m_useCandlePatterns && IsBearishCandlePattern()) {
  385 |             confirmations++;
  386 |             confidence += 10.0;
  387 |         }
  388 |         if(m_useCandlePatterns) totalChecks++;
  389 |         
  390 |         // Calculate final confidence
  391 |         if(totalChecks > 0) {
  392 |             confidence = MathMin(confidence, 100.0);
  393 |         }
  394 |         
  395 |         // Require at least 60% of indicators to confirm
  396 |         bool confirmed = (totalChecks > 0) && ((double)confirmations / totalChecks >= 0.6);
  397 |         
  398 |         if(m_logger && confirmed) {
  399 |             m_logger.LogDebug("Sell signal confirmed. Confirmations: " + IntegerToString(confirmations) + 
  400 |                             "/" + IntegerToString(totalChecks) + 
  401 |                             ", Confidence: " + DoubleToString(confidence, 1) + "%", __FUNCTION__);
  402 |         }
  403 |         
  404 |         return confirmed;
  405 |     }
  406 |     
  407 | private:
  408 |     // RSI analysis
  409 |     bool IsRSIBullish() {
  410 |         if(m_rsiHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  411 |         
  412 |         double rsi[2];
  413 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_rsiHandle, 0, 0, 2, rsi) != 2) return false;
  414 |         
  415 |         // RSI is bullish if it's above oversold and rising
  416 |         return (rsi[0] > m_rsiOversold && rsi[0] > rsi[1] && rsi[0] < m_rsiOverbought);
  417 |     }
  418 |     
  419 |     bool IsRSIBearish() {
  420 |         if(m_rsiHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  421 |         
  422 |         double rsi[2];
  423 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_rsiHandle, 0, 0, 2, rsi) != 2) return false;
  424 |         
  425 |         // RSI is bearish if it's below overbought and falling
  426 |         return (rsi[0] < m_rsiOverbought && rsi[0] < rsi[1] && rsi[0] > m_rsiOversold);
  427 |     }
  428 |     
  429 |     // MACD analysis
  430 |     bool IsMACDBullish() {
  431 |         if(m_macdHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  432 |         
  433 |         double macdMain[2], macdSignal[2];
  434 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_macdHandle, 0, 0, 2, macdMain) != 2) return false;
  435 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_macdHandle, 1, 0, 2, macdSignal) != 2) return false;
  436 |         
  437 |         // MACD is bullish if main line crosses above signal line
  438 |         return (macdMain[0] > macdSignal[0] && macdMain[1] <= macdSignal[1]);
  439 |     }
  440 |     
  441 |     bool IsMACDBearish() {
  442 |         if(m_macdHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  443 |         
  444 |         double macdMain[2], macdSignal[2];
  445 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_macdHandle, 0, 0, 2, macdMain) != 2) return false;
  446 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_macdHandle, 1, 0, 2, macdSignal) != 2) return false;
  447 |         
  448 |         // MACD is bearish if main line crosses below signal line
  449 |         return (macdMain[0] < macdSignal[0] && macdMain[1] >= macdSignal[1]);
  450 |     }
  451 |     
  452 |     // Stochastic analysis
  453 |     bool IsStochasticBullish() {
  454 |         if(m_stochHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  455 |         
  456 |         double stochMain[2], stochSignal[2];
  457 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_stochHandle, 0, 0, 2, stochMain) != 2) return false;
  458 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_stochHandle, 1, 0, 2, stochSignal) != 2) return false;
  459 |         
  460 |         // Stochastic is bullish if %K crosses above %D in oversold area
  461 |         return (stochMain[0] > stochSignal[0] && stochMain[1] <= stochSignal[1] && 
  462 |                 stochMain[0] < m_stochOverbought);
  463 |     }
  464 |     
  465 |     bool IsStochasticBearish() {
  466 |         if(m_stochHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  467 |         
  468 |         double stochMain[2], stochSignal[2];
  469 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_stochHandle, 0, 0, 2, stochMain) != 2) return false;
  470 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_stochHandle, 1, 0, 2, stochSignal) != 2) return false;
  471 |         
  472 |         // Stochastic is bearish if %K crosses below %D in overbought area
  473 |         return (stochMain[0] < stochSignal[0] && stochMain[1] >= stochSignal[1] && 
  474 |                 stochMain[0] > m_stochOversold);
  475 |     }
  476 |     
  477 |     // ADX analysis
  478 |     bool IsADXStrong() {
  479 |         if(m_adxHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  480 |         
  481 |         double adx[1];
  482 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_adxHandle, 0, 0, 1, adx) != 1) return false;
  483 |         
  484 |         // ADX indicates strong trend if above threshold
  485 |         return (adx[0] > m_adxThreshold);
  486 |     }
  487 |     
  488 |     // CCI analysis
  489 |     bool IsCCIBullish() {
  490 |         if(m_cciHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  491 |         
  492 |         double cci[2];
  493 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_cciHandle, 0, 0, 2, cci) != 2) return false;
  494 |         
  495 |         // CCI is bullish if rising from oversold
  496 |         return (cci[0] > m_cciOversold && cci[0] > cci[1]);
  497 |     }
  498 |     
  499 |     bool IsCCIBearish() {
  500 |         if(m_cciHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  501 |         
  502 |         double cci[2];
  503 |         if(CopyBuffer(m_cciHandle, 0, 0, 2, cci) != 2) return false;
  504 |         
  505 |         // CCI is bearish if falling from overbought
  506 |         return (cci[0] < m_cciOverbought && cci[0] < cci[1]);
  507 |     }
  508 |     
  509 |     // Volume analysis
  510 |     bool IsVolumeConfirming() {
  511 |         long volume[2];
  512 |         if(CopyTickVolume(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 2, volume) != 2) return false;
  513 |         
  514 |         // Calculate average volume
  515 |         long avgVolume[20];
  516 |         if(CopyTickVolume(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, m_volumePeriod, avgVolume) != m_volumePeriod) return false;
  517 |         
  518 |         long totalVolume = 0;
  519 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_volumePeriod; i++) {
  520 |             totalVolume += avgVolume[i];
  521 |         }
  522 |         long averageVolume = totalVolume / m_volumePeriod;
  523 |         
  524 |         // Volume is confirming if current volume is above average
  525 |         return (volume[0] > averageVolume * m_volumeMultiplier);
  526 |     }
  527 |     
  528 |     // Candle pattern analysis
  529 |     bool IsBullishCandlePattern() {
  530 |         double open[3], high[3], low[3], close[3];
  531 |         
  532 |         if(CopyOpen(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, open) != 3) return false;
  533 |         if(CopyHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, high) != 3) return false;
  534 |         if(CopyLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, low) != 3) return false;
  535 |         if(CopyClose(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, close) != 3) return false;
  536 |         
  537 |         // Check for bullish engulfing pattern
  538 |         if(IsBullishEngulfing(open, high, low, close)) return true;
  539 |         
  540 |         // Check for hammer pattern
  541 |         if(IsHammer(open, high, low, close)) return true;
  542 |         
  543 |         // Check for doji at support
  544 |         if(IsDoji(open, high, low, close)) return true;
  545 |         
  546 |         return false;
  547 |     }
  548 |     
  549 |     bool IsBearishCandlePattern() {
  550 |         double open[3], high[3], low[3], close[3];
  551 |         
  552 |         if(CopyOpen(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, open) != 3) return false;
  553 |         if(CopyHigh(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, high) != 3) return false;
  554 |         if(CopyLow(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, low) != 3) return false;
  555 |         if(CopyClose(m_symbol, m_timeframe, 0, 3, close) != 3) return false;
  556 |         
  557 |         // Check for bearish engulfing pattern
  558 |         if(IsBearishEngulfing(open, high, low, close)) return true;
  559 |         
  560 |         // Check for shooting star pattern
  561 |         if(IsShootingStar(open, high, low, close)) return true;
  562 |         
  563 |         // Check for doji at resistance
  564 |         if(IsDoji(open, high, low, close)) return true;
  565 |         
  566 |         return false;
  567 |     }
  568 |     
  569 |     // Candlestick pattern helpers
  570 |     bool IsBullishEngulfing(const double& open[], const double& high[], const double& low[], const double& close[]) {
  571 |         // Previous candle is bearish, current candle is bullish and engulfs previous
  572 |         return (close[1] < open[1] && // Previous bearish
  573 |                 close[0] > open[0] && // Current bullish
  574 |                 open[0] < close[1] && // Current opens below previous close
  575 |                 close[0] > open[1]);  // Current closes above previous open
  576 |     }
  577 |     
  578 |     bool IsBearishEngulfing(const double& open[], const double& high[], const double& low[], const double& close[]) {
  579 |         // Previous candle is bullish, current candle is bearish and engulfs previous
  580 |         return (close[1] > open[1] && // Previous bullish
  581 |                 close[0] < open[0] && // Current bearish
  582 |                 open[0] > close[1] && // Current opens above previous close
  583 |                 close[0] < open[1]);  // Current closes below previous open
  584 |     }
  585 |     
  586 |     bool IsHammer(const double& open[], const double& high[], const double& low[], const double& close[]) {
  587 |         double body = MathAbs(close[0] - open[0]);
  588 |         double lowerShadow = MathMin(open[0], close[0]) - low[0];
  589 |         double upperShadow = high[0] - MathMax(open[0], close[0]);
  590 |         
  591 |         // Hammer: small body, long lower shadow, small upper shadow
  592 |         return (lowerShadow > body * 2 && upperShadow < body * 0.5);
  593 |     }
  594 |     
  595 |     bool IsShootingStar(const double& open[], const double& high[], const double& low[], const double& close[]) {
  596 |         double body = MathAbs(close[0] - open[0]);
  597 |         double lowerShadow = MathMin(open[0], close[0]) - low[0];
  598 |         double upperShadow = high[0] - MathMax(open[0], close[0]);
  599 |         
  600 |         // Shooting star: small body, long upper shadow, small lower shadow
  601 |         return (upperShadow > body * 2 && lowerShadow < body * 0.5);
  602 |     }
  603 |     
  604 |     bool IsDoji(const double& open[], const double& high[], const double& low[], const double& close[]) {
  605 |         double body = MathAbs(close[0] - open[0]);
  606 |         double totalRange = high[0] - low[0];
  607 |         
  608 |         // Doji: very small body relative to total range
  609 |         return (totalRange > 0 && body / totalRange < 0.1);
  610 |     }
  611 |     
  612 | public:
  613 |     // Getters and setters
  614 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_isInitialized; }
  615 |     
  616 |     // Configuration methods
  617 |     void SetRSIParameters(int period, double overbought, double oversold) {
  618 |         m_rsiPeriod = period;
  619 |         m_rsiOverbought = overbought;
  620 |         m_rsiOversold = oversold;
  621 |     }
  622 |     
  623 |     void SetMACDParameters(int fast, int slow, int signal) {
  624 |         m_macdFast = fast;
  625 |         m_macdSlow = slow;
  626 |         m_macdSignal = signal;
  627 |     }
  628 |     
  629 |     void SetStochasticParameters(int k, int d, int slowing, double overbought, double oversold) {
  630 |         m_stochK = k;
  631 |         m_stochD = d;
  632 |         m_stochSlowing = slowing;
  633 |         m_stochOverbought = overbought;
  634 |         m_stochOversold = oversold;
  635 |     }
  636 |     
  637 |     void SetADXParameters(int period, double threshold) {
  638 |         m_adxPeriod = period;
  639 |         m_adxThreshold = threshold;
  640 |     }
  641 |     
  642 |     void SetConfirmationFlags(bool rsi, bool macd, bool stoch, bool atr, bool adx, bool cci, bool volume, bool candles) {
  643 |         m_useRSI = rsi;
  644 |         m_useMACD = macd;
  645 |         m_useStochastic = stoch;
  646 |         m_useATR = atr;
  647 |         m_useADX = adx;
  648 |         m_useCCI = cci;
  649 |         m_useVolumeConfirmation = volume;
  650 |         m_useCandlePatterns = candles;
  651 |     }
  652 | };
  653 | 
  654 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  655 | //| Signal Confirmation Utility Functions                           |
  656 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  657 | 
  658 | // Quick signal strength assessment
  659 | double GetSignalStrength(ENUM_SIGNAL_DIRECTION direction, string symbol, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
  660 |     CSignalConfirmation confirmation;
  661 |     
  662 |     if(!confirmation.Initialize(symbol, timeframe)) {
  663 |         return 0.0;
  664 |     }
  665 |     
  666 |     double confidence = 0.0;
  667 |     bool confirmed = false;
  668 |     
  669 |     if(direction == SIGNAL_BUY) {
  670 |         confirmed = confirmation.ConfirmBuySignal(confidence);
  671 |     } else if(direction == SIGNAL_SELL) {
  672 |         confirmed = confirmation.ConfirmSellSignal(confidence);
  673 |     }
  674 |     
  675 |     return confirmed ? confidence : 0.0;
  676 | }
  677 | 
  678 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  679 |

    2 | //|                 Signal_Engine.mqh - Strategy Orchestrator        |
    3 | //|                  APEX Pullback EA v4.6 - Flat Architecture       |
    4 | //|      "Namespace removed for global scope compatibility"          |

    7 | #ifndef APEX_SIGNAL_ENGINE_MQH_
    8 | #define APEX_SIGNAL_ENGINE_MQH_

   10 | #include "Core_Defines.mqh"
   11 | #include "Core_Logger.mqh"

   13 | #include "Signal_Strategy.mqh"

   16 | // Logging Macros - to reduce dependency visibility
   17 | #define LOG_INFO(message) if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogInfo(message)
   18 | #define LOG_ERROR(message) if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger->LogError(message)
   19 | 
   20 | // Helper to convert ENUM_STRATEGY_TYPE to string
   21 | string EnumToString(ENUM_STRATEGY_TYPE type)
   22 | {
   23 |     switch(type)
   24 |     {
   25 |         case STRATEGY_SONICR_CLASSIC: return "STRATEGY_SONICR_CLASSIC";
   26 |         case STRATEGY_SONICR_ADVANCED: return "STRATEGY_SONICR_ADVANCED";
   27 |         default: return "UNKNOWN_STRATEGY";
   28 |     }
   29 | }
   30 | 
   31 | // Namespace has been removed.
   32 | 
   33 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   34 | //| CSignalEngine - ACTIVE Implementation with Real Signal Logic     |
   35 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   36 | class CSignalEngine {
   37 | private:
   38 |     bool                    m_initialized;
   39 |     CLogger*                m_pLogger;
   40 |     
   41 |     // Strategy Management
   42 |     ISignalStrategy*        m_strategies[10]; // Array to hold strategy pointers
   43 |     int                     m_strategyCount;
   44 |     ISignalStrategy*        m_pCurrentStrategy; // Pointer to the active strategy
   45 |     
   46 |     // Sonic R Specific
   47 |     CSonicRIntegration*     m_pSonicRIntegration; // Direct pointer to the integration module
   48 |     SSonicRUnifiedSignal    m_lastSonicRSignal;   // Stores the last detailed signal from Sonic R
   49 |     bool                    m_isLastSignalFromSonicR; // Flag to indicate the source of the last signal
   50 |     
   51 | public:
   52 |     CSignalEngine() : m_initialized(false), m_pLogger(NULL), m_strategyCount(0), 
   53 |                       m_pCurrentStrategy(NULL), m_pSonicRIntegration(NULL), m_isLastSignalFromSonicR(false)
   54 |     {
   55 |         m_lastSonicRSignal.Reset();
   56 |         for(int i = 0; i < 10; i++) m_strategies[i] = NULL;
   57 |     }
   58 |     
   59 |     ~CSignalEngine() 
   60 |     {
   61 |         Deinitialize();
   62 |     }
   63 |     
   64 |     // The engine is initialized with dependencies
   65 |     bool Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CSonicRIntegration* pSonicRIntegration)
   66 |     {
   67 |         if(!pLogger || !pSonicRIntegration)
   68 |         {
   69 |             LOG_ERROR("NULL pointer received.");
   70 |             return false;
   71 |         }
   72 |         
   73 |         m_pLogger = pLogger;
   74 |         m_pSonicRIntegration = pSonicRIntegration; // Store the Sonic R integration module
   75 |         
   76 |         m_initialized = true;
   77 |         LOG_INFO("CSignalEngine initialized successfully.");
   78 |         return true;
   79 |     }
   80 |     
   81 |     void Deinitialize()
   82 |     {
   83 |         if(m_pLogger) LOG_INFO("Deinitializing Signal Engine...");
   84 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
   85 |         {
   86 |             // We only delete strategies that were created with 'new' inside the EA
   87 |             // Strategies are managed globally, so we don't delete them here.
   88 |         // We just clear the pointers.
   89 |         m_strategies[i] = NULL;
   90 |         }
   91 |         m_strategyCount = 0;
   92 |         m_pCurrentStrategy = NULL;
   93 |         m_pSonicRIntegration = NULL; // Just nullify the pointer, don't delete
   94 |         m_initialized = false;
   95 |     }
   96 |     
   97 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE CheckForSignal()
   98 |     {
   99 |         if(!m_initialized || m_pCurrentStrategy == NULL) 
  100 |         {
  101 |             return SIGNAL_TYPE_NONE;
  102 |         }
  103 | 
  104 |         m_isLastSignalFromSonicR = false; // Reset flag
  105 | 
  106 |         // The current strategy handles all logic, including Sonic R if it's the active one.
  107 |         ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType = m_pCurrentStrategy->CheckForSignal();
  108 | 
  109 |         // If the active strategy is the Sonic R integration, we need to capture its detailed signal.
  110 |         if (m_pCurrentStrategy == m_pSonicRIntegration && signalType != SIGNAL_TYPE_NONE)
  111 |         { 
  112 |             // The integration module should have a way to provide the last signal.
  113 |             if(m_pSonicRIntegration->GetLastSignal(m_lastSonicRSignal))
  114 |             {
  115 |                 m_isLastSignalFromSonicR = true;
  116 |             }
  117 |         }
  118 | 
  119 |         return signalType;
  120 |     }
  121 |     
  122 |     bool GetSignalInfo(SSignalInfo& signalInfo)
  123 |     {
  124 |         if(!m_initialized || m_pCurrentStrategy == NULL) {
  125 |             return false;
  126 |         }
  127 | 
  128 |         // If the last signal was from Sonic R, provide detailed Sonic R signal info
  129 |         if(m_isLastSignalFromSonicR) {
  130 |             signalInfo.Reset();
  131 |             signalInfo.IsValid = true;
  132 |             signalInfo.Direction = m_lastSonicRSignal.signalType;
  133 |             signalInfo.Timestamp = m_lastSonicRSignal.timestamp;
  134 |             signalInfo.sonicConfidenceScore = m_lastSonicRSignal.confidenceScore;
  135 |             signalInfo.sonicReason = m_lastSonicRSignal.reason;
  136 |             signalInfo.Comment = StringFormat("SonicR Signal (Score: %.1f)", m_lastSonicRSignal.confidenceScore);
  137 |             return true;
  138 |         }
  139 | 
  140 |         // Otherwise, let the current strategy provide the signal info
  141 |         return m_pCurrentStrategy->GetSignalInfo(signalInfo);
  142 |     }
  143 |     
  144 |     // Getters
  145 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_initialized; }
  146 |     
  147 |     string GetCurrentStrategyName() const
  148 |     {
  149 |         if(m_pCurrentStrategy != NULL)
  150 |             return m_pCurrentStrategy->GetStrategyName();
  151 |         return "None";
  152 |     }
  153 | 
  154 |     // --- Strategy Management ---
  155 |     bool RegisterStrategy(ENUM_STRATEGY_TYPE type, ISignalStrategy* strategy)
  156 |     {
  157 |         if (m_strategyCount >= 10 || strategy == NULL)
  158 |         {
  159 |             LOG_ERROR("Failed to register strategy: Limit reached or NULL pointer.");
  160 |             return false;
  161 |         }
  162 |         strategy->SetStrategyType(type);
  163 |         m_strategies[m_strategyCount++] = strategy;
  164 |         LOG_INFO("Strategy '" + strategy->GetStrategyName() + "' registered.");
  165 |         return true;
  166 |     }
  167 | 
  168 |     bool SetStrategy(ENUM_STRATEGY_TYPE type)
  169 |     {
  170 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_strategyCount; i++)
  171 |         {
  172 |             if(m_strategies[i]->GetStrategyType() == type)
  173 |             {
  174 |                 m_pCurrentStrategy = m_strategies[i];
  175 |                 LOG_INFO("Active strategy set to: " + m_pCurrentStrategy->GetStrategyName());
  176 |                 return true;
  177 |             }
  178 |         }
  179 |         LOG_ERROR("Could not find strategy of type " + EnumToString(type));
  180 |         return false;
  181 |     }
  182 | };
  183 | 
  184 | // End of namespace removal
  185 | 
  186 | #endif

  158 |     {
  159 |         if (m_initialized) return true;
  160 | 
  161 |         if (!pLogger || !pIndicators || !pWave || !pPVSRA || !pDragon)
  162 |         {
  163 |             printf("CSonicRAdvancedStrategy::Initialize - Critical dependency is NULL");
  164 |             return false;
  165 |         }
  166 |

  169 |         m_pWaveAnalysis = pWave;

  175 |         if (!m_pScoutEntry)
  176 |         {
  177 |             LOG_ERROR("Failed to create Scout Entry system");
  178 |             return false;
  179 |         }
  180 |

  182 |         if (!m_pScoutEntry->Initialize(m_pLogger, m_pDragonBand, m_pWaveAnalysis, m_pPVSRA))
  183 |         {
  184 |             LOG_ERROR("Failed to initialize Scout Entry system");
  185 |             Deinitialize(); // Clean up partially created objects
  186 |             return false;
  187 |         }
  188 | 
  189 |         m_initialized = true;
  190 |         LOG_INFO("CSonicRAdvancedStrategy initialized successfully.");
  191 |         return true;
  192 |     }

  200 |         m_initialized = false;

  203 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  204 |     //| CheckForSignal: Main logic entry point                         |
  205 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  206 |     virtual ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE CheckForSignal() override
  207 |     {
  208 |         if (!m_initialized) return SIGNAL_NONE;
  209 | 
  210 |         // Reset previous signal
  211 |         Reset();
  212 | 
  213 |         // Cooldown check
  214 |         if (TimeCurrent() - m_lastSignalTime < m_config.signalCooldownMinutes * 60)
  215 |         {
  216 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  217 |         }
  218 | 
  219 |         // --- Main Strategy Logic ---
  220 |         // 1. Dragon Band Filter (Trend Direction)
  221 |         if (m_config.enableDragonBandFilter)
  222 |         {
  223 |             // ... Add Dragon Band trend check logic here ...
  224 |         }
  225 | 
  226 |         // 2. Scout Entry System (Primary Signal)
  227 |         if (m_config.enableScoutEntrySystem)
  228 |         {
  229 |             SScoutEntryInfo scoutInfo = m_pScoutEntry->CheckForEntry();
  230 |             if (scoutInfo.direction != SIGNAL_NONE)
  231 |             {
  232 |                 // Translate Scout Info to SSignalInfo
  233 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.Type = scoutInfo.direction;
  234 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice = scoutInfo.entryPrice;
  235 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss = scoutInfo.stopLoss;
  236 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = scoutInfo.takeProfit;
  237 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.Strength = scoutInfo.confidence;
  238 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  239 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.Comment = "Scout Entry Signal";
  240 | 
  241 |                 m_lastSignalTime = TimeCurrent();
  242 |                 return m_lastSignalInfo.Type;
  243 |             }
  244 |         }
  245 | 
  246 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
  247 |     }
  248 | 
  249 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  251 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  253 |     {
  254 |         return m_lastSignalInfo;
  255 |     }

  260 |     virtual void Reset() override
  261 |     {

  263 |     }

   61 | 
   62 |     // --- ISignalStrategy Implementation ---
   63 |     virtual bool Initialize(CLogger* pLogger, CIndicators* pIndicators, CWaveAnalysis* pWave, CPVSRAAnalysis* pPVSRA, CSonicRDragon* pDragon) override
   64 |     {
   65 |         if (!pLogger || !pWave || !pDragon || !pPVSRA)
   66 |         {
   67 |             LOG_ERROR("Received NULL pointers for Classic Strategy.");
   68 |             return false;
   69 |         }
   70 | 
   71 |         m_pLogger = pLogger;
   72 |         m_pWaveAnalysis = pWave;
   73 |         m_pDragonAnalysis = pDragon;
   74 |         m_pPVSRAAnalysis = pPVSRA;
   75 |         // pIndicators is not used in the classic strategy but is part of the interface
   76 |          
   77 |          // Initialize enhanced parameters from inputs
   78 |          m_minDragonAngle = InpMinDragonAngle;
   79 |          m_riskRewardRatio = InpRiskRewardRatio;
   80 |          m_slBufferPips = InpSLBufferPips;
   81 |          
   82 |          // Configure enhanced filtering
   83 |          m_useMultiTimeframeFilter = true;
   84 |          m_useDragonSqueezeFilter = true;
   85 |          m_useVolumeConfirmation = true;
   86 |          m_minWaveQuality = 0.7;
   87 |          m_minWaveStrength = 0.6;
   88 |          m_minDragonStrength = 0.5;
   89 |          
   90 |          m_initialized = true;
   91 |          LOG_INFO("CSonicRClassicStrategy initialized successfully with enhanced Sonic R parameters.");
   92 |          return true;
   93 |      }
   94 |     
   95 |     virtual ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE CheckForSignal() override
   96 |     {
   97 |         if (!m_initialized)
   98 |         {
   99 |             LOG_ERROR("CSonicRClassicStrategy not initialized.");
  100 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  101 |         }
  102 | 
  103 |         // Reset signal info
  104 |         m_lastSignalInfo.Type = SIGNAL_NONE;
  105 |         m_lastSignalInfo.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  106 | 
  107 |         // Step 1: Enhanced Wave Pattern Analysis
  108 |         ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE waveSignal = m_pWaveAnalysis->GetLastWavePattern();
  109 |         if (waveSignal == SIGNAL_NONE)
  110 |         {
  111 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  112 |         }
  113 |         
  114 |         // Check wave quality and strength
  115 |         double waveStrength = m_pWaveAnalysis->GetLastWaveStrength();
  116 |         double waveQuality = m_pWaveAnalysis->GetWaveQualityScore();
  117 |         bool isWaveValid = m_pWaveAnalysis->IsWaveValid();
  118 |         
  119 |         if (!isWaveValid || waveStrength < m_minWaveStrength || waveQuality < m_minWaveQuality)
  120 |         {
  121 |             LOG_DEBUG(StringFormat("Wave validation failed: Valid=%s, Strength=%.3f, Quality=%.3f",
  122 |                      isWaveValid ? "true" : "false", waveStrength, waveQuality));
  123 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  124 |         }
  125 | 
  126 |         // Step 2: Enhanced PVSRA Analysis
  127 |         if (!m_pPVSRAAnalysis->CanTrade(waveSignal))
  128 |         {
  129 |             LOG_DEBUG("Sonic R signal rejected by PVSRA filter.");
  130 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  131 |         }
  132 |         
  133 |         // Volume confirmation if enabled
  134 |         if (m_useVolumeConfirmation)
  135 |         {
  136 |             bool volumeConfirmed = m_pPVSRAAnalysis->IsVolumeConfirmed();
  137 |             if (!volumeConfirmed)
  138 |             {
  139 |                 LOG_DEBUG("Volume confirmation failed");
  140 |                 return SIGNAL_NONE;
  141 |             }
  142 |         }
  143 | 
  144 |         // Step 3: Enhanced Dragon Analysis
  145 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  146 |         double dragonHigh = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonHigh(0);
  147 |         double dragonLow = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonLow(0);
  148 |         double dragonMiddle = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonMiddle(0);
  149 |         double trendLine = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetTrendLine(0);
  150 |         double dragonAngle = m_pDragonAnalysis->CalculateAdaptiveDragonAngle();
  151 |         double dragonStrength = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonStrength();
  152 |         
  153 |         // Check Dragon strength
  154 |         if (dragonStrength < m_minDragonStrength)
  155 |         {
  156 |             LOG_DEBUG(StringFormat("Dragon strength insufficient: %.3f < %.3f", dragonStrength, m_minDragonStrength));
  157 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  158 |         }
  159 |         
  160 |         // Dragon squeeze filter
  161 |         if (m_useDragonSqueezeFilter && m_pDragonAnalysis->IsDragonSqueeze())
  162 |         {
  163 |             LOG_DEBUG("Dragon squeeze detected - waiting for breakout");
  164 |             return SIGNAL_NONE;
  165 |         }
  166 | 
  167 |         // Step 4: Multi-timeframe confirmation
  168 |         bool mtfConfirmation = true;
  169 |         if (m_useMultiTimeframeFilter)
  170 |         {
  171 |             mtfConfirmation = CheckMultiTimeframeConfirmation(waveSignal);
  172 |             if (!mtfConfirmation)
  173 |             {
  174 |                 LOG_DEBUG("Multi-timeframe confirmation failed");
  175 |                 return SIGNAL_NONE;
  176 |             }
  177 |         }
  178 | 
  179 |         // Step 5: Signal Generation with Enhanced Logic
  180 |         ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType = SIGNAL_NONE;
  181 |         
  182 |         // Enhanced BUY signal
  183 |         if (waveSignal == SIGNAL_BUY)
  184 |         {
  185 |             bool dragonBullish = (currentPrice > dragonHigh && currentPrice > trendLine && dragonAngle > m_minDragonAngle);
  186 |             bool dragonBreakout = m_pDragonAnalysis->IsDragonBreakout() && currentPrice > dragonHigh;
  187 |             
  188 |             if (dragonBullish || dragonBreakout)
  189 |             {
  190 |                 signalType = SIGNAL_BUY;
  191 |             }
  192 |         }
  193 |         // Enhanced SELL signal
  194 |         else if (waveSignal == SIGNAL_SELL)
  195 |         {
  196 |             bool dragonBearish = (currentPrice < dragonLow && currentPrice < trendLine && dragonAngle < -m_minDragonAngle);
  197 |             bool dragonBreakout = m_pDragonAnalysis->IsDragonBreakout() && currentPrice < dragonLow;
  198 |             
  199 |             if (dragonBearish || dragonBreakout)
  200 |             {
  201 |                 signalType = SIGNAL_SELL;
  202 |             }
  203 |         }
  204 |         
  205 |         // Finalize signal if detected
  206 |         if (signalType != SIGNAL_NONE)
  207 |         {
  208 |             m_lastSignalInfo.Type = signalType;
  209 |             m_lastSignalInfo.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  210 |             
  211 |             m_lastSignalStrength = CalculateEnhancedSignalStrength(signalType, waveStrength, dragonStrength, dragonAngle);
  212 |             m_lastSignalTime = TimeCurrent();
  213 |             
  214 |             LOG_INFO(StringFormat("%s signal detected: Wave(%.3f), Dragon(%.2fВ°/%.3f), MTF=%s",
  215 |                      signalType == SIGNAL_BUY ? "BUY" : "SELL",
  216 |                      waveStrength, dragonAngle, dragonStrength,
  217 |                      mtfConfirmation ? "true" : "false"));
  218 |             
  219 |             return signalType;
  220 |         }
  221 | 
  222 |         return SIGNAL_NONE;
  223 |     }
  224 |     
  225 |     virtual SSignalInfo GetLastSignalInfo() override
  226 |     {
  227 |         if(m_lastSignalInfo.Type == SIGNAL_NONE) return m_lastSignalInfo;
  228 | 
  229 |         // --- DYNAMIC SL/TP CALCULATION ---
  230 |         double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  231 | 
  232 |         if (m_lastSignalInfo.Type == SIGNAL_BUY)
  233 |         {
  234 |             m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK);
  235 |             SSwingPoint* last_swing_low = m_pWaveAnalysis.GetLastSwing(SWING_LOW);
  236 |             if(last_swing_low == NULL || last_swing_low.time == 0) return m_lastSignalInfo;
  237 | 
  238 |             m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss = last_swing_low.price - (m_slBufferPips * point);
  239 |             double sl_distance = m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice - m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss;
  240 |             if(sl_distance <= 0) return m_lastSignalInfo;
  241 |             m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice + (sl_distance * m_riskRewardRatio);
  242 |         }
  243 |         else if (m_lastSignalInfo.Type == SIGNAL_SELL)
  244 |         {
  245 |             m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  246 |             SSwingPoint* last_swing_high = m_pWaveAnalysis.GetLastSwing(SWING_HIGH);
  247 |             if(last_swing_high == NULL || last_swing_high.time == 0) return m_lastSignalInfo;
  248 | 
  249 |             m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss = last_swing_high.price + (m_slBufferPips * point);
  250 |             double sl_distance = m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss - m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice;
  251 |             if(sl_distance <= 0) return m_lastSignalInfo;
  252 |             m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice - (sl_distance * m_riskRewardRatio);
  253 |         }
  254 |         
  255 |         LOG_DEBUG(StringFormat("Signal Info Prepared - Entry: %.5f, SL: %.5f, TP: %.5f", 
  256 |                                           m_lastSignalInfo.EntryPrice, m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss, m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit));
  257 |         
  258 |         return m_lastSignalInfo;
  259 |     }
  260 | 
  261 |     virtual void Reset() override
  262 |     {
  263 |         m_lastSignalInfo.Reset();
  264 |     }
  265 |      
  266 |      // Enhanced Configuration Methods
  267 |      void SetMinDragonAngle(double angle) { m_minDragonAngle = angle; }
  268 |      void SetMinWaveStrength(double strength) { m_minWaveStrength = strength; }
  269 |      void SetMinDragonStrength(double strength) { m_minDragonStrength = strength; }
  270 |      void SetRiskRewardRatio(double ratio) { m_riskRewardRatio = ratio; }
  271 |      void SetSLBufferPips(int pips) { m_slBufferPips = pips; }
  272 |      void SetMinWaveQuality(double quality) { m_minWaveQuality = quality; }
  273 |      
  274 |      void EnableMultiTimeframeFilter(bool enable) { m_useMultiTimeframeFilter = enable; }
  275 |      void EnableDragonSqueezeFilter(bool enable) { m_useDragonSqueezeFilter = enable; }
  276 |      void EnableVolumeConfirmation(bool enable) { m_useVolumeConfirmation = enable; }
  277 |      
  278 |      // Enhanced Getters
  279 |      double GetMinDragonAngle() const { return m_minDragonAngle; }
  280 |      double GetMinWaveStrength() const { return m_minWaveStrength; }
  281 |      double GetMinDragonStrength() const { return m_minDragonStrength; }
  282 |      double GetLastSignalStrength() const { return m_lastSignalStrength; }
  283 |      datetime GetLastSignalTime() const { return m_lastSignalTime; }
  284 |      
  285 |      bool IsMultiTimeframeFilterEnabled() const { return m_useMultiTimeframeFilter; }
  286 |      bool IsDragonSqueezeFilterEnabled() const { return m_useDragonSqueezeFilter; }
  287 |      bool IsVolumeConfirmationEnabled() const { return m_useVolumeConfirmation; }
  288 | 
  289 | private:
  290 |     // Enhanced Helper Methods
  291 |     double CalculateEnhancedSignalStrength(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType, double waveStrength, 
  292 |                                          double dragonStrength, double dragonAngle)
  293 |     {
  294 |         double strength = 0.3; // Base strength
  295 |         
  296 |         // Wave strength contribution (40%)
  297 |         strength += waveStrength * 0.4;
  298 |         
  299 |         // Dragon strength contribution (30%)
  300 |         strength += dragonStrength * 0.3;
  301 |         
  302 |         // Dragon angle contribution (20%)
  303 |         double angleStrength = MathMin(MathAbs(dragonAngle) / 45.0, 1.0); // Normalize to 0-1 (45В° = max)
  304 |         strength += angleStrength * 0.2;
  305 |         
  306 |         // Dragon breakout bonus (10%)
  307 |         if (m_pDragonAnalysis.IsDragonBreakout())
  308 |         {
  309 |             strength += 0.1;
  310 |         }
  311 |         
  312 |         return MathMin(strength, 1.0);
  313 |     }
  314 |     
  315 |     double CalculateSignalConfidence(double waveQuality, double dragonStrength, bool mtfConfirmation)
  316 |     {
  317 |         double confidence = 0.0;
  318 |         
  319 |         // Wave quality contribution (40%)
  320 |         confidence += waveQuality * 0.4;
  321 |         
  322 |         // Dragon strength contribution (35%)
  323 |         confidence += dragonStrength * 0.35;
  324 |         
  325 |         // Multi-timeframe confirmation (25%)
  326 |         if (mtfConfirmation)
  327 |         {
  328 |             confidence += 0.25;
  329 |         }
  330 |         
  331 |         return MathMin(confidence, 1.0);
  332 |     }
  333 |     
  334 |     bool CheckMultiTimeframeConfirmation(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType)
  335 |     {
  336 |         // Get higher timeframe trend from Dragon analysis
  337 |         ENUM_TIMEFRAMES higherTf = GetHigherTimeframe();
  338 |         if (higherTf == PERIOD_CURRENT)
  339 |         {
  340 |             return true; // Skip if no higher timeframe available
  341 |         }
  342 |         
  343 |         // Check higher timeframe Dragon trend
  344 |         double htfTrendAngle = m_pDragonAnalysis.GetHigherTimeframeTrend();
  345 |         
  346 |         if (signalType == SIGNAL_BUY)
  347 |         {
  348 |             return htfTrendAngle > 0; // Higher TF should be bullish
  349 |         }
  350 |         else if (signalType == SIGNAL_SELL)
  351 |         {
  352 |             return htfTrendAngle < 0; // Higher TF should be bearish
  353 |         }
  354 |         
  355 |         return false;
  356 |     }
  357 |     
  358 |     void CalculateEnhancedStopLossAndTakeProfit(ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE signalType)
  359 |     {
  360 |         double currentPrice = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
  361 |         double point = SymbolInfoDouble(_Symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  362 |         int digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(_Symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
  363 |         
  364 |         // Get Dragon levels for enhanced SL/TP calculation
  365 |         double dragonHigh = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonHigh(0);
  366 |         double dragonLow = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonLow(0);
  367 |         double dragonMiddle = m_pDragonAnalysis->GetDragonMiddle(0);
  368 |         
  369 |         if (signalType == SIGNAL_BUY)
  370 |         {
  371 |             // Enhanced BUY SL: Use the lower of swing low or Dragon low
  372 |             SSwingPoint* lastSwingLow = m_pWaveAnalysis->GetLastSwing(SWING_LOW);
  373 |             double swingLow = (lastSwingLow != NULL) ? lastSwingLow->price : dragonLow;
  374 |             double dragonSL = dragonLow - (m_slBufferPips * point);
  375 |             double swingSL = swingLow - (m_slBufferPips * point);
  376 |             
  377 |             m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss = MathMin(dragonSL, swingSL);
  378 |             
  379 |             // Enhanced TP: Consider Dragon width for dynamic targets
  380 |             double dragonWidth = dragonHigh - dragonLow;
  381 |             double riskPips = (currentPrice - m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss) / point;
  382 |             double baseRewardPips = riskPips * m_riskRewardRatio;
  383 |             
  384 |             // Adjust TP based on Dragon width (wider Dragon = higher targets)
  385 |             double widthMultiplier = MathMax(1.0, dragonWidth / (100 * point)); // Normalize width
  386 |             double adjustedRewardPips = baseRewardPips * MathMin(widthMultiplier, 2.0); // Cap at 2x
  387 |             
  388 |             m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = currentPrice + (adjustedRewardPips * point);
  389 |             
  390 |             // Alternative TP at next Dragon resistance
  391 |             double dragonTP = dragonHigh + (dragonWidth * 0.5);
  392 |             if (dragonTP > m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit)
  393 |             {
  394 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = dragonTP;
  395 |             }
  396 |         }
  397 |         else if (signalType == SIGNAL_SELL)
  398 |         {
  399 |             // Enhanced SELL SL: Use the higher of swing high or Dragon high
  400 |             SSwingPoint* lastSwingHigh = m_pWaveAnalysis->GetLastSwing(SWING_HIGH);
  401 |             double swingHigh = (lastSwingHigh != NULL) ? lastSwingHigh->price : dragonHigh;
  402 |             double dragonSL = dragonHigh + (m_slBufferPips * point);
  403 |             double swingSL = swingHigh + (m_slBufferPips * point);
  404 |             
  405 |             m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss = MathMax(dragonSL, swingSL);
  406 |             
  407 |             // Enhanced TP: Consider Dragon width for dynamic targets
  408 |             double dragonWidth = dragonHigh - dragonLow;
  409 |             double riskPips = (m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss - currentPrice) / point;
  410 |             double baseRewardPips = riskPips * m_riskRewardRatio;
  411 |             
  412 |             // Adjust TP based on Dragon width
  413 |             double widthMultiplier = MathMax(1.0, dragonWidth / (100 * point));
  414 |             double adjustedRewardPips = baseRewardPips * MathMin(widthMultiplier, 2.0);
  415 |             
  416 |             m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = currentPrice - (adjustedRewardPips * point);
  417 |             
  418 |             // Alternative TP at next Dragon support
  419 |             double dragonTP = dragonLow - (dragonWidth * 0.5);
  420 |             if (dragonTP < m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit)
  421 |             {
  422 |                 m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = dragonTP;
  423 |             }
  424 |         }
  425 |         
  426 |         // Ensure proper precision
  427 |         m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss = NormalizeDouble(m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss, digits);
  428 |         m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit = NormalizeDouble(m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit, digits);
  429 |         
  430 |         // Calculate final risk-reward ratio
  431 |         double risk = MathAbs(currentPrice - m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss);
  432 |         double reward = MathAbs(m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit - currentPrice);
  433 |         double riskReward = (risk > 0) ? reward / risk : 0.0;
  434 |         
  435 |         LOG_DEBUG(StringFormat("Enhanced SL/TP: Entry=%.5f, SL=%.5f, TP=%.5f, RR=%.2f",
  436 |                  currentPrice, m_lastSignalInfo.StopLoss, m_lastSignalInfo.TakeProfit, riskReward));
  437 |     }
  438 |     
  439 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES GetHigherTimeframe()
  440 |     {
  441 |         ENUM_TIMEFRAMES currentTf = Period();
  442 |         
  443 |         switch(currentTf)
  444 |         {
  445 |             case PERIOD_M1:  return PERIOD_M5;
  446 |             case PERIOD_M5:  return PERIOD_M15;
  447 |             case PERIOD_M15: return PERIOD_H1;
  448 |             case PERIOD_H1:  return PERIOD_H4;
  449 |             case PERIOD_H4:  return PERIOD_D1;
  450 |             case PERIOD_D1:  return PERIOD_W1;
  451 |             case PERIOD_W1:  return PERIOD_MN1;
  452 |             default:         return PERIOD_CURRENT;
  453 |         }
  454 |     }
  455 | };
  456 | 
  457 | #endif // APEX_SIGNAL_SONICR_CLASSIC_STRATEGY_MQH_
