   94 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   95 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   96 | //| Initialize                                                       |
   97 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   98 | bool CSonicRIntegration::Initialize(CMarketAnalysisManager* pManager, CSonicRScoutEntry* pScoutEntry)
   99 | {
  100 |     if(!pManager || !pScoutEntry)
  101 |     {
  102 |         printf("Error: MarketAnalysisManager or ScoutEntry is NULL in CSonicRIntegration::Initialize");
  103 |         return false;
  104 |     }
  105 |     m_pMarketAnalysisManager = pManager;
  106 |     m_pScoutEntry = pScoutEntry;
  107 |     
  108 |     // Get dependencies from the manager
  109 |     CEaContext* context = pManager.GetContext();
  110 |     if(CheckPointer(context) == POINTER_INVALID)
  111 |     {
  112 |         printf("Error: Failed to get EA Context in CSonicRIntegration");
  113 |         return false;
  114 |     }
  115 |     m_pLogger = context.pLogger;
  116 |     if(CheckPointer(m_pLogger) == POINTER_INVALID)
  117 |     {
  118 |         printf("Error: Failed to get Logger from EA Context in CSonicRIntegration");
  119 |         return false;
  120 |     }
  121 | 
  122 |     if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger.LogInfo("CSonicRIntegration initialized successfully with Scout Entry module.");
  123 |     return true;
  124 | }
  125 | 
  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  128 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  129 | void CSonicRIntegration::Deinitialize()
  130 | {
  131 |     // Pointers are managed externally, just log.
  132 |     if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger.LogInfo("CSonicRIntegration deinitialized.");
  133 | }
  134 | 
  135 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  136 | //| GenerateSignal                                                   |
  137 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  138 | bool CSonicRIntegration::GenerateSignal(SSonicRUnifiedSignal &unifiedSignal)
  139 | {
  140 |     unifiedSignal.Reset();
  141 | 
  142 |     if(CheckPointer(m_pMarketAnalysisManager) == POINTER_INVALID)
  143 |     {
  144 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger.LogWarn(__FUNCTION__ + ": Market Analysis Manager is not set.");
  145 |         return false;
  146 |     }
  147 | 
  148 |     // --- 1. Get the consolidated market context --- 
  149 |     // The manager has already updated all modules.
  150 |     const SMarketContext* context = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketContext();
  151 |     if(CheckPointer(context) == POINTER_INVALID)
  152 |     {
  153 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger.LogWarn(__FUNCTION__ + ": Failed to get Market Context.");
  154 |         return false;
  155 |     }
  156 | 
  157 |     // --- 2. Check for a Scout Entry first ---
  158 |     if (m_pScoutEntry)
  159 |     {
  160 |         SScoutEntryInfo scoutInfo;
  161 |         if (m_pScoutEntry->ScanForScoutEntries(scoutInfo))
  162 |         {
  163 |             // A scout signal was found, let's use it as the base
  164 |             unifiedSignal.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  165 |             unifiedSignal.signalType = scoutInfo.direction == DIRECTION_BUY ? SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY : SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL;
  166 |             unifiedSignal.isScoutEntry = true;
  167 |             // The rest of the logic will add confidence to this scout signal
  168 |         }
  169 |     }
  170 | 
  171 |     // --- 3. If no scout, check for classic Dragon Breakout ---
  172 |     if (unifiedSignal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_NONE)
  173 |     {
  174 |         if(context.dragon_band != NULL && context.dragon_band.breakoutState == DRAGON_BREAKOUT_UP) unifiedSignal.signalType = SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY;
  175 |         else if(context.dragon_band != NULL && context.dragon_band.breakoutState == DRAGON_BREAKOUT_DOWN) unifiedSignal.signalType = SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL;
  176 |         else return false; // No base signal, no need to continue
  177 |         unifiedSignal.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  178 |     }
  179 | 
  180 |     // --- 3. Calculate Confidence Score --- 
  181 |     if(context.dragon_band == NULL || context.oscillator == NULL || context.pvsra == NULL || context.wave_pattern == NULL)
  182 |     {
  183 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger.LogWarn(__FUNCTION__ + ": One or more analysis contexts are NULL, cannot calculate confidence score.");
  184 |         return false;
  185 |     }
  186 |     unifiedSignal.confidenceScore = CalculateConfidenceScore(unifiedSignal, *context.dragon_band, *context.oscillator, *context.pvsra, *context.wave_pattern);
  187 | 
  188 |     // --- 4. Final Decision --- 
  189 |     if(unifiedSignal.confidenceScore >= m_minConfidenceThreshold)
  190 |     {
  191 |         unifiedSignal.isValid = true;
  192 |         unifiedSignal.reason = BuildSignalReason(unifiedSignal, *context.dragon_band, *context.oscillator, *context.pvsra, *context.wave_pattern);
  193 |         m_lastSignal = unifiedSignal;
  194 |         if(m_pLogger) m_pLogger.LogInfo(StringFormat("Unified Signal Generated: %s, Score: %.1f, Reason: %s", 
  195 |             EnumToString(unifiedSignal.signalType), unifiedSignal.confidenceScore, unifiedSignal.reason));
  196 |         return true;
  197 |     }
  198 | 
  199 |     return false;
  200 | }
  201 | 
  202 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  203 | //| ISignalStrategy::CheckForSignal                                  |
  204 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  205 | ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE CSonicRIntegration::CheckForSignal()
  206 | {
  207 |     SSonicRUnifiedSignal unifiedSignal;
  208 |     if (GenerateSignal(unifiedSignal))
  209 |     {
  210 |         return unifiedSignal.signalType;
  211 |     }
  212 |     return SIGNAL_TYPE_NONE;
  213 | }
  214 | 
  215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  216 | //| ISignalStrategy::GetSignalInfo                                   |
  217 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  218 | bool CSonicRIntegration::GetSignalInfo(SSignalInfo &signalInfo)
  219 | {
  220 |     if (!m_lastSignal.isValid)
  221 |         return false;
  222 | 
  223 |     signalInfo.Reset();
  224 |     signalInfo.IsValid = true;
  225 |     signalInfo.Direction = m_lastSignal.signalType;
  226 |     signalInfo.Timestamp = m_lastSignal.timestamp;
  227 |     signalInfo.sonicConfidenceScore = m_lastSignal.confidenceScore;
  228 |     signalInfo.sonicReason = m_lastSignal.reason;
  229 |     signalInfo.Comment = StringFormat("SonicR Signal (Score: %.1f)", m_lastSignal.confidenceScore);
  230 |     
  231 |     // You might want to map some unified signal details to the standard SSignalInfo fields
  232 |     // For example, if you have a concept of entry price in the unified signal:
  233 |     // signalInfo.EntryPrice = m_lastSignal.suggestedEntry;
  234 | 
  235 |     return true;
  236 | }
  237 | 
  238 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  239 | //| CalculateConfidenceScore                                         |
  240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 | double CSonicRIntegration::CalculateConfidenceScore(SSonicRUnifiedSignal &signal, 
  242 |                                                     const SDragonBandInfo &band,
  243 |                                                     const SOscillatorInfo &osc,
  244 |                                                     const SVPSRAInfo &pvsra,
  245 |                                                     const CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePattern &wave)
  246 | {
  247 |     double score = 0.0;
  248 |     
  249 |     // Get market profile data
  250 |     if(CheckPointer(m_pMarketAnalysisManager) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile()) == POINTER_INVALID) return 0.0;
  251 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetCurrentRegime();
  252 |     double poc = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetPointOfControl();
  253 |     double vah = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetValueAreaHigh();
  254 |     double val = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetValueAreaLow();
  255 |     double currentPrice = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetContext().pSymbolInfo.Bid(); // Hoбә·c Ask tГ№y hЖ°б»ӣng
  256 |     
  257 |     // Base Score from Dragon Band Breakout
  258 |     if(band.breakoutState == DRAGON_BREAKOUT_UP || band.breakoutState == DRAGON_BREAKOUT_DOWN)
  259 |         score += 50.0;
  260 |         
  261 |     // Market Regime Score
  262 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY && 
  263 |         (currentRegime == REGIME_TRENDING_BULL || currentRegime == REGIME_BULL_PULLBACK)) {
  264 |         score += 15.0; // Bonus lб»ӣn cho tГӯn hiб»Үu hб»Јp xu hЖ°б»ӣng
  265 |     } 
  266 |     else if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL && 
  267 |              (currentRegime == REGIME_TRENDING_BEAR || currentRegime == REGIME_BEAR_PULLBACK)) {
  268 |         score += 15.0;
  269 |     } 
  270 |     else if (currentRegime == REGIME_RANGING_STABLE || currentRegime == REGIME_VOLATILE_EXPANSION) {
  271 |         score -= 20.0; // PhбәЎt nбә·ng nбәҝu tГӯn hiб»Үu trong sideway khГҙng phГ№ hб»Јp
  272 |     }
  273 |     
  274 |     // Value Area Score
  275 |     double priceToPocDist = MathAbs(currentPrice - poc) / m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetContext().pSymbolInfo.GetPipSize();
  276 |     if (priceToPocDist < 10) { // Trong vГІng 10 pips cб»§a POC
  277 |         score += 10.0; // Bonus cho tГӯn hiб»Үu gбә§n POC
  278 |     }
  279 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY && currentPrice < val && 
  280 |         MathAbs(currentPrice - val) < 10) { // Buy gбә§n VAL
  281 |         score += 5.0;
  282 |     } 
  283 |     else if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL && currentPrice > vah && 
  284 |              MathAbs(currentPrice - vah) < 10) { // Sell gбә§n VAH
  285 |         score += 5.0;
  286 |     }
  287 |     
  288 |     if(signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY)
  289 |     {
  290 |         if(pvsra.rhythmState == RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BULLISH) score += 20.0;
  291 |         // Divergence is now part of the oscillator info
  292 |         if(osc.divergence.isActive && osc.divergence.type == DIV_BULLISH_REGULAR) score += 30.0;
  293 |         if(wave.isImpulsePattern && (wave.currentWave == CSonicRWavePattern::WAVE_IMPULSE_3 || wave.currentWave == CSonicRWavePattern::WAVE_IMPULSE_5)) score += 15.0;
  294 |         if(pvsra.rhythmState == RHYTHM_DIVERGENCE_BEARISH) score -= 20.0; // Warning
  295 |     }
  296 |     else if(signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL)
  297 |     {
  298 |         if(pvsra.rhythmState == RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BEARISH) score += 20.0;
  299 |         // Divergence is now part of the oscillator info
  300 |         if(osc.divergence.isActive && osc.divergence.type == DIV_BEARISH_REGULAR) score += 30.0;
  301 |         if(wave.isImpulsePattern && (wave.currentWave == CSonicRWavePattern::WAVE_IMPULSE_3 || wave.currentWave == CSonicRWavePattern::WAVE_IMPULSE_5)) score += 15.0;
  302 |         if(pvsra.rhythmState == RHYTHM_DIVERGENCE_BULLISH) score -= 20.0; // Warning
  303 |     }
  304 | 
  305 |     return MathMax(0, score);
  306 | }
  307 | 
  308 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  309 | //| BuildSignalReason                                                |
  310 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  311 | string CSonicRIntegration::BuildSignalReason(const SSonicRUnifiedSignal &signal, 
  312 |                                              const SDragonBandInfo &band,
  313 |                                              const SOscillatorInfo &osc,
  314 |                                              const SVPSRAInfo &pvsra,
  315 |                                              const CSonicRWavePattern::SWavePattern &wave)
  316 | {
  317 |     string reason = "";
  318 |     //--- Market Profile Analysis
  319 |     if(CheckPointer(m_pMarketAnalysisManager) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile()) == POINTER_INVALID) return "";
  320 |     ENUM_MARKET_REGIME currentRegime = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetCurrentRegime();
  321 |     double poc = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetPointOfControl();
  322 |     double vah = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetValueAreaHigh();
  323 |     double val = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetMarketProfile().GetValueAreaLow();
  324 |     double currentPrice = m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetContext().pSymbolInfo.Bid();
  325 | 
  326 |     reason += "MP(" + EnumToString(currentRegime) + "); ";
  327 |     if (MathAbs(currentPrice - poc) / m_pMarketAnalysisManager.GetContext().pSymbolInfo.GetPipSize() < 10) reason += "NearPOC; ";
  328 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY && currentPrice < val) reason += "BelowVAL; ";
  329 |     if (signal.signalType == SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL && currentPrice > vah) reason += "AboveVAH; ";
  330 | 
  331 |     //--- Original Reasons
  332 |     if(band.breakoutState == DRAGON_BREAKOUT_UP) reason += "DB_Break(Up); ";
  333 |     if(band.breakoutState == DRAGON_BREAKOUT_DOWN) reason += "DB_Break(Down); ";
  334 |     if(pvsra.rhythmState == RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BULLISH) reason += "PVSRA(BullConv); ";
  335 |     if(pvsra.rhythmState == RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BEARISH) reason += "PVSRA(BearConv); ";
  336 |     if(osc.divergence.isActive && osc.divergence.type == DIV_BULLISH_REGULAR) reason += "Div(Bull); ";
  337 |     if(osc.divergence.isActive && osc.divergence.type == DIV_BEARISH_REGULAR) reason += "Div(Bear); ";
  338 |     if(wave.isImpulsePattern) reason += StringFormat("Wave(%s); ", wave.GetWaveTypeString(wave.currentWave));
  339 |     return reason;
  340 | }
  341 | 
  342 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  343 | //| GetLastSignal                                                    |
  344 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  345 | bool CSonicRIntegration::GetLastSignal(SSonicRUnifiedSignal &signal)
  346 | {
  347 |     if(m_lastSignal.isValid)
  348 |     {
  349 |         signal = m_lastSignal;
  350 |         return true;
  351 |     }
  352 |     return false;
  353 | }

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|        Signal_SonicR_ScoutEntry.mqh - Scout Entry System         |
    3 | //|                  APEX Pullback EA v4.6 - Refactored              |
    4 | //|      "Refactored for Flat Architecture and DSI Pattern"          |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | 
    7 | #ifndef APEX_SIGNAL_SONICR_SCOUTENTRY_MQH_
    8 | #define APEX_SIGNAL_SONICR_SCOUTENTRY_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | // Dependencies are managed by Includes.mqh
   11 | 
   12 | // Note: All relevant enums and structs (SScoutEntryConfig, SScoutEntryInfo, etc.)
   13 | // have been moved to Core_Defines.mqh for global access.
   14 | 
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | //| CSonicRScoutEntry - Refactored Scout Entry System                |
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | class CSonicRScoutEntry
   19 | {
   20 | private:
   21 |     bool                        m_initialized;
   22 |     CLogger*                    m_pLogger;
   23 |     CAppSymbolInfo*             m_pSymbolInfo;
   24 |     CSonicRDragonBand*          m_pDragonBand;
   25 |     CSonicRWavePattern*         m_pWavePattern;
   26 |     CSonicRPVSRA*               m_pPVSRA;
   27 |     
   28 |     SScoutEntryConfig           m_config;
   29 |     SScoutEntryInfo             m_activeScouts[];
   30 |     int                         m_maxScouts;
   31 |     
   32 | public:
   33 |     CSonicRScoutEntry() : m_initialized(false), m_pLogger(NULL), m_pSymbolInfo(NULL), 
   34 |                           m_pDragonBand(NULL), m_pWavePattern(NULL), m_pPVSRA(NULL),
   35 |                           m_maxScouts(10)
   36 |     {
   37 |         // Default config values will be set via SetConfig method
   38 |     }
   39 |     
   40 |     ~CSonicRScoutEntry() {}
   41 |     
   42 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   43 |     //| Initialize Scout Entry System                                    |
   44 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   45 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* context, CMarketAnalysisManager* pManager)
   46 |     {
   47 |         if(!context || !pManager)
   48 |         {
   49 |             printf("Error: Null context or manager in ScoutEntry Initialize");
   50 |             return false;
   51 |         }
   52 | 
   53 |         m_pLogger = context->pLogger;
   54 |         m_pSymbolInfo = context->pSymbolInfo;
   55 | 
   56 |         if(!m_pLogger || !m_pSymbolInfo)
   57 |         {
   58 |             printf("Error: Failed to get Logger or SymbolInfo from context");
   59 |             return false;
   60 |         }
   61 | 
   62 |         // Get analysis modules from the central manager
   63 |         m_pDragonBand = pManager->GetDragonBandModule();
   64 |         m_pWavePattern = pManager->GetWavePatternModule();
   65 |         m_pPVSRA = pManager->GetPVSRAModule();
   66 | 
   67 |         if(!m_pDragonBand || !m_pWavePattern || !m_pPVSRA)
   68 |         {
   69 |             m_pLogger->LogError("Failed to get one or more analysis modules from MarketAnalysisManager in ScoutEntry");
   70 |             return false;
   71 |         }
   72 |         
   73 |         m_initialized = true;
   74 |         m_pLogger->Log(LOG_INFO, "CSonicRScoutEntry initialized successfully.");
   75 |         return true;
   76 |     }
   77 |     
   78 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 |     //| Set configuration                                                |
   80 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 |     void SetConfig(const SScoutEntryConfig& config)
   82 |     {
   83 |         m_config = config;
   84 |     }
   85 | 
   86 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   87 |     //| Main analysis method - Scan for scout entries                   |
   88 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   89 |     bool ScanForScoutEntries(SScoutEntryInfo &foundScout)
   90 |     {
   91 |         if(!m_initialized) return false;
   92 | 
   93 |         // Reset the output struct
   94 |         foundScout.Reset();
   95 | 
   96 |         // 1. Scan for "Scout Before Classic" (High-risk, counter-trend)
   97 |         if(m_config.enableScoutBeforeClassic)
   98 |         {
   99 |             if(ScanForScoutBeforeClassic(foundScout))
  100 |             {
  101 |                 return ValidateScoutEntry(foundScout.direction, foundScout);
  102 |             }
  103 |         }
  104 | 
  105 |         // 2. Scan for "Scout During Classic" (Lower-risk, trend-following addition)
  106 |         if(m_config.enableScoutDuringClassic)
  107 |         {
  108 |             if(ScanForScoutDuringClassic(foundScout))
  109 |             {
  110 |                 return ValidateScoutEntry(foundScout.direction, foundScout);
  111 |             }
  112 |         }
  113 | 
  114 |         return false;
  115 |     }
  116 | 
  117 | private:
  118 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  119 |     //| Scan for "Scout Before Classic" opportunities                   |
  120 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  121 |     bool ScanForScoutBeforeClassic(SScoutEntryInfo &scout)
  122 |     {
  123 |         // This is a high-risk, counter-trend entry based on volume at S/R.
  124 |         // Requires strong PVSRA confirmation.
  125 |         SVPSRAInfo pvsraInfo;
  126 |         if(!m_pPVSRA->AnalyzeRhythm(0, pvsraInfo)) return false;
  127 | 
  128 |         // Look for signs of a trend ending with high volume (Climax)
  129 |         if(pvsraInfo.volumeType == VOLUME_TYPE_CLIMAX_UP)
  130 |         {
  131 |             // Potential short setup (reversal)
  132 |             scout.direction = DIRECTION_SELL;
  133 |             scout.patternDescription = "Scout Before Classic: Up Climax Volume at Resistance";
  134 |             return true;
  135 |         }
  136 |         
  137 |         if(pvsraInfo.volumeType == VOLUME_TYPE_CLIMAX_DOWN)
  138 |         {
  139 |             // Potential long setup (reversal)
  140 |             scout.direction = DIRECTION_BUY;
  141 |             scout.patternDescription = "Scout Before Classic: Down Climax Volume at Support";
  142 |             return true;
  143 |         }
  144 | 
  145 |         return false;
  146 |     }
  147 | 
  148 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  149 |     //| Scan for "Scout During Classic" opportunities                   |
  150 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 |     bool ScanForScoutDuringClassic(SScoutEntryInfo &scout)
  152 |     {
  153 |         // This is an addition to an existing, profitable Classic trade.
  154 |         // It looks for pullbacks to the Dragon band.
  155 |         SDragonBandInfo bandInfo;
  156 |         if(!m_pDragonBand->Analyze(0, bandInfo)) return false;
  157 | 
  158 |         // Check for pullbacks during a confirmed trend
  159 |         if(bandInfo.trendState == DRAGON_TREND_UP && bandInfo.priceLocation == PRICE_LOCATION_IN_BAND)
  160 |         {
  161 |             // Potential long entry on pullback
  162 |             scout.direction = DIRECTION_BUY;
  163 |             scout.patternDescription = "Scout During Classic: Pullback to Dragon Band in Uptrend";
  164 |             return true;
  165 |         }
  166 |         
  167 |         if(bandInfo.trendState == DRAGON_TREND_DOWN && bandInfo.priceLocation == PRICE_LOCATION_IN_BAND)
  168 |         {
  169 |             // Potential short entry on pullback
  170 |             scout.direction = DIRECTION_SELL;
  171 |             scout.patternDescription = "Scout During Classic: Pullback to Dragon Band in Downtrend";
  172 |             return true;
  173 |         }
  174 | 
  175 |         return false;
  176 |     }
  177 | 
  178 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  179 |     //| Validate a potential scout entry                                 |
  180 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  181 |     bool ValidateScoutEntry(ENUM_SIGNAL_DIRECTION direction, SScoutEntryInfo &scout)
  182 |     {
  183 |         // The scout struct is already partially populated by the Scan methods.
  184 |         // This function adds final validation checks.
  185 |         bool isDragonValid = true;
  186 |         bool isPvsraValid = true;
  187 |         bool isWaveValid = true;
  188 | 
  189 |         // --- Get latest analysis data ---
  190 |         SDragonBandInfo bandInfo;
  191 |         if(!m_pDragonBand->Analyze(0, bandInfo)) return false;
  192 |         
  193 |         SVPSRAInfo pvsraInfo;
  194 |         if(!m_pPVSRA->AnalyzeRhythm(0, pvsraInfo)) return false;
  195 | 
  196 |         // --- Apply Validation Rules ---
  197 |         if(m_config.useDragonBandFilter)
  198 |         {
  199 |             // For 'During Classic', trend must align. For 'Before Classic', this is a counter-trend check.
  200 |             if(scout.patternDescription.Find("During Classic") != -1) {
  201 |                 if(direction == DIRECTION_BUY && bandInfo.trendState != DRAGON_TREND_UP) isDragonValid = false;
  202 |                 if(direction == DIRECTION_SELL && bandInfo.trendState != DRAGON_TREND_DOWN) isDragonValid = false;
  203 |             }
  204 |         }
  205 |         scout.dragonBandConfirmed = isDragonValid;
  206 | 
  207 |         if(m_config.usePVSRAConfirmation)
  208 |         {
  209 |             // 'Before Classic' relies heavily on PVSRA climax signals.
  210 |             if(scout.patternDescription.Find("Before Classic") != -1) {
  211 |                  if(direction == DIRECTION_BUY && pvsraInfo.volumeType != VOLUME_TYPE_CLIMAX_DOWN) isPvsraValid = false;
  212 |                  if(direction == DIRECTION_SELL && pvsraInfo.volumeType != VOLUME_TYPE_CLIMAX_UP) isPvsraValid = false;
  213 |             }
  214 |             // 'During Classic' looks for convergence.
  215 |             else {
  216 |                 if(direction == DIRECTION_BUY && pvsraInfo.rhythmState != RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BULLISH) isPvsraValid = false;
  217 |                 if(direction == DIRECTION_SELL && pvsraInfo.rhythmState != RHYTHM_CONVERGENCE_BEARISH) isPvsraValid = false;
  218 |             }
  219 |         }
  220 |         scout.pvsraConfirmed = isPvsraValid;
  221 | 
  222 |         // Wave confirmation is complex and will be a future enhancement.
  223 |         // For now, we assume it's valid if other conditions are met.
  224 |         scout.wavePatternConfirmed = isWaveValid; 
  225 |         scout.volumeConfirmed = isPvsraValid; // Volume confirmation is part of PVSRA
  226 | 
  227 |         bool finalValidation = isDragonValid && isPvsraValid && isWaveValid;
  228 | 
  229 |         if(finalValidation)
  230 |         {
  231 |              // Populate the rest of the scout info
  232 |             scout.state = SCOUT_STATE_CONFIRMED;
  233 |             scout.entryQuality = CalculateEntryQuality(scout); // Calculate quality based on confirmations
  234 |         }
  235 | 
  236 |         return finalValidation;
  237 |     }
  238 | 
  239 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 |     //| Calculate the quality of the scout entry                         |
  241 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 |     double CalculateEntryQuality(const SScoutEntryInfo &scout)
  243 |     {
  244 |         double quality = 0.0;
  245 |         if(scout.dragonBandConfirmed) quality += 33.3;
  246 |         if(scout.pvsraConfirmed) quality += 33.4;
  247 |         if(scout.wavePatternConfirmed) quality += 33.3;
  248 |         
  249 |         // Add bonus for specific strong patterns
  250 |         if(scout.patternDescription.Find("Climax") != -1) {
  251 |             quality += 10.0; // Climax patterns are strong indicators
  252 |         }
  253 | 
  254 |         return MathMin(quality, 100.0); // Cap at 100
  255 |     }
  256 | };
  257 | 
  258 | #endif // APEX_SIGNAL_SONICR_SCOUTENTRY_MQH_

    9 |

   22 | struct SSignalInfo
   23 | {
   24 |     ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE    Type;               // Signal type (BUY, SELL, NONE)
   25 |     double              EntryPrice;         // Recommended entry price
   26 |     double              StopLoss;           // Stop loss price
   27 |     double              TakeProfit;         // Take profit price
   28 |     double              Strength;           // Signal strength (0.0 to 1.0)
   29 |     datetime            Timestamp;          // Time of signal generation
   30 |     string              Comment;            // Signal description
   31 | 
   32 |     void SSignalInfo() { Reset(); }
   33 |     void Reset()
   34 |     {
   35 |         Type = SIGNAL_NONE;
   36 |         EntryPrice = 0;
   37 |         StopLoss = 0;
   38 |         TakeProfit = 0;
   39 |         Strength = 0;
   40 |         Timestamp = 0;
   41 |         Comment = "";
   42 |     }
   43 | };
   44 |

   55 |     virtual ENUM_SIGNAL_TYPE CheckForSignal() = 0;
   56 |     virtual SSignalInfo GetLastSignalInfo() = 0;

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                               SMC_Structures.mqh |
    3 | //|                                    Smart Money Concepts Indicator |
    4 | //|                                             Data Structures & Enums |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Manus AI"
    7 | #property version   "1.00"
    8 | #property strict
    9 | 
   10 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   11 | //| Enumerations                                                     |
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | 
   14 | // Signal types for EA integration
   15 | enum SMC_SIGNAL_TYPE
   16 | {
   17 |     SIGNAL_NONE = 0,
   18 |     SIGNAL_OB_BULLISH = 1,
   19 |     SIGNAL_OB_BEARISH = 2,
   20 |     SIGNAL_FVG_BULLISH = 3,
   21 |     SIGNAL_FVG_BEARISH = 4,
   22 |     SIGNAL_BOS_BULLISH = 5,
   23 |     SIGNAL_BOS_BEARISH = 6,
   24 |     SIGNAL_CHOCH_BULLISH = 7,
   25 |     SIGNAL_CHOCH_BEARISH = 8,
   26 |     SIGNAL_SR_BREAK_UP = 9,
   27 |     SIGNAL_SR_BREAK_DOWN = 10,
   28 |     SIGNAL_LIQUIDITY_SWEEP = 11
   29 | };
   30 | 
   31 | // Market structure states
   32 | enum MARKET_STRUCTURE_STATE
   33 | {
   34 |     STRUCTURE_UNKNOWN = 0,
   35 |     STRUCTURE_UPTREND = 1,
   36 |     STRUCTURE_DOWNTREND = 2,
   37 |     STRUCTURE_RANGING = 3,
   38 |     STRUCTURE_TRANSITION = 4
   39 | };
   40 | 
   41 | // Order block types
   42 | enum ORDER_BLOCK_TYPE
   43 | {
   44 |     OB_NONE = 0,
   45 |     OB_BULLISH = 1,
   46 |     OB_BEARISH = 2,
   47 |     OB_BREAKER_BULLISH = 3,
   48 |     OB_BREAKER_BEARISH = 4
   49 | };
   50 | 
   51 | // Fair Value Gap types
   52 | enum FVG_TYPE
   53 | {
   54 |     FVG_NONE = 0,
   55 |     FVG_BULLISH = 1,
   56 |     FVG_BEARISH = 2,
   57 |     FVG_BALANCED = 3
   58 | };
   59 | 
   60 | // Support/Resistance level types
   61 | enum SR_LEVEL_TYPE
   62 | {
   63 |     SR_NONE = 0,
   64 |     SR_SUPPORT = 1,
   65 |     SR_RESISTANCE = 2,
   66 |     SR_FLIP_ZONE = 3
   67 | };
   68 | 
   69 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 | //| Core Data Structures                                             |
   71 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 | 
   73 | // Basic price point structure
   74 | struct PricePoint
   75 | {
   76 |     datetime time;              // Timestamp
   77 |     double   price;             // Price level
   78 |     double   volume;            // Volume at this point
   79 |     int      bar_index;         // Bar index
   80 |     
   81 |     void Reset()
   82 |     {
   83 |         time = 0;
   84 |         price = 0.0;
   85 |         volume = 0.0;
   86 |         bar_index = -1;
   87 |     }
   88 |     
   89 |     double GetMidPrice() { return price; }
   90 | };
   91 | 
   92 | // Swing point structure
   93 | struct SwingPoint
   94 | {
   95 |     PricePoint point;           // Basic price point data
   96 |     int        type;            // 1 = High, -1 = Low
   97 |     int        strength;        // Swing strength (1-10)
   98 |     bool       is_broken;       // Has been broken
   99 |     datetime   break_time;      // When it was broken
  100 |     double     break_volume;    // Volume on break
  101 |     
  102 |     void Reset()
  103 |     {
  104 |         point.Reset();
  105 |         type = 0;
  106 |         strength = 0;
  107 |         is_broken = false;
  108 |         break_time = 0;
  109 |         break_volume = 0.0;
  110 |     }
  111 | };
  112 | 
  113 | // Order Block structure
  114 | struct OrderBlock
  115 | {
  116 |     datetime formation_time;    // When block was formed
  117 |     double   high_price;        // Block high boundary
  118 |     double   low_price;         // Block low boundary
  119 |     double   impulse_start;     // Start price of impulse
  120 |     double   impulse_end;       // End price of impulse
  121 |     double   impulse_volume;    // Volume during impulse
  122 |     int      impulse_candles;   // Number of candles in impulse
  123 |     int      strength;          // Block strength (1-100)
  124 |     ORDER_BLOCK_TYPE type;      // Block type
  125 |     bool     is_tested;         // Has been retested
  126 |     int      test_count;        // Number of retests
  127 |     datetime last_test_time;    // Last retest time
  128 |     bool     is_valid;          // Current validity status
  129 |     bool     is_mitigated;      // Has been mitigated
  130 |     double   mitigation_price;  // Price where mitigated
  131 |     datetime mitigation_time;   // When mitigated
  132 |     int      bar_index;         // Formation bar index
  133 |     
  134 |     void Reset()
  135 |     {
  136 |         formation_time = 0;
  137 |         high_price = 0.0;
  138 |         low_price = 0.0;
  139 |         impulse_start = 0.0;
  140 |         impulse_end = 0.0;
  141 |         impulse_volume = 0.0;
  142 |         impulse_candles = 0;
  143 |         strength = 0;
  144 |         type = OB_NONE;
  145 |         is_tested = false;
  146 |         test_count = 0;
  147 |         last_test_time = 0;
  148 |         is_valid = false;
  149 |         is_mitigated = false;
  150 |         mitigation_price = 0.0;
  151 |         mitigation_time = 0;
  152 |         bar_index = -1;
  153 |     }
  154 |     
  155 |     bool IsActive()
  156 |     {
  157 |         return is_valid && !is_mitigated;
  158 |     }
  159 |     
  160 |     bool IsBullish()
  161 |     {
  162 |         return (type == OB_BULLISH || type == OB_BREAKER_BULLISH);
  163 |     }
  164 |     
  165 |     bool IsBearish()
  166 |     {
  167 |         return (type == OB_BEARISH || type == OB_BREAKER_BEARISH);
  168 |     }
  169 |     
  170 |     double GetMidPrice()
  171 |     {
  172 |         return (high_price + low_price) / 2.0;
  173 |     }
  174 | };
  175 | 
  176 | // Fair Value Gap structure
  177 | struct FairValueGap
  178 | {
  179 |     datetime creation_time;     // Gap formation time
  180 |     double   gap_high;          // Upper boundary
  181 |     double   gap_low;           // Lower boundary
  182 |     double   gap_size;          // Size in points
  183 |     FVG_TYPE type;              // Gap type
  184 |     double   fill_percentage;   // How much has been filled (0-100)
  185 |     bool     is_filled;         // Completely filled status
  186 |     bool     is_partially_filled; // Partially filled status
  187 |     datetime fill_time;         // When completely filled
  188 |     int      priority;          // Gap priority (1-5)
  189 |     bool     is_active;         // Currently active
  190 |     double   creation_volume;   // Volume when created
  191 |     int      bar_index;         // Creation bar index
  192 |     double   expected_fill_price; // Expected fill target
  193 |     
  194 |     void Reset()
  195 |     {
  196 |         creation_time = 0;
  197 |         gap_high = 0.0;
  198 |         gap_low = 0.0;
  199 |         gap_size = 0.0;
  200 |         type = FVG_NONE;
  201 |         fill_percentage = 0.0;
  202 |         is_filled = false;
  203 |         is_partially_filled = false;
  204 |         fill_time = 0;
  205 |         priority = 0;
  206 |         is_active = false;
  207 |         creation_volume = 0.0;
  208 |         bar_index = -1;
  209 |         expected_fill_price = 0.0;
  210 |     }
  211 |     
  212 |     bool IsBullish()
  213 |     {
  214 |         return type == FVG_BULLISH;
  215 |     }
  216 |     
  217 |     bool IsBearish()
  218 |     {
  219 |         return type == FVG_BEARISH;
  220 |     }
  221 |     
  222 |     double GetMidPrice()
  223 |     {
  224 |         return (gap_high + gap_low) / 2.0;
  225 |     }
  226 | };
  227 | 
  228 | // Market Structure Point (BOS/CHOCH)
  229 | struct MarketStructurePoint
  230 | {
  231 |     datetime time;
  232 |     double   price;
  233 |     int      bar_index;
  234 |     SMC_SIGNAL_TYPE type; // BOS_BULLISH, BOS_BEARISH, CHOCH_BULLISH, CHOCH_BEARISH
  235 |     int      strength; // Strength of the break
  236 |     
  237 |     void Reset()
  238 |     {
  239 |         time = 0;
  240 |         price = 0.0;
  241 |         bar_index = -1;
  242 |         type = SIGNAL_NONE;
  243 |         strength = 0;
  244 |     }
  245 | };
  246 | 
  247 | // Support/Resistance Level
  248 | struct SR_Level
  249 | {
  250 |     double   price_high;
  251 |     double   price_low;
  252 |     SR_LEVEL_TYPE type;
  253 |     int      strength; // Number of touches, etc.
  254 |     datetime first_touch_time;
  255 |     datetime last_touch_time;
  256 |     bool     is_active;
  257 |     bool     is_broken;
  258 |     
  259 |     void Reset()
  260 |     {
  261 |         price_high = 0.0;
  262 |         price_low = 0.0;
  263 |         type = SR_NONE;
  264 |         strength = 0;
  265 |         first_touch_time = 0;
  266 |         last_touch_time = 0;
  267 |         is_active = false;
  268 |         is_broken = false;
  269 |     }
  270 |     
  271 |     double GetMidPrice()
  272 |     {
  273 |         return (price_high + price_low) / 2.0;
  274 |     }
  275 | };
  276 | 
  277 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  278 | //| Array Structures for Management                                  |
  279 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  280 | #define DYNAMIC_ARRAY_INCREMENT 10
  281 | 
  282 | // Dynamic Array for Order Blocks
  283 | class OrderBlockArray
  284 | {
  285 | private:
  286 |     OrderBlock m_blocks[];
  287 |     int        m_total_blocks;
  288 |     int        m_array_size;
  289 | 
  290 | public:
  291 |     void OrderBlockArray() { m_total_blocks = 0; m_array_size = 0; }
  292 |     
  293 |     void Initialize(int initial_size = DYNAMIC_ARRAY_INCREMENT)
  294 |     {
  295 |         ArrayResize(m_blocks, initial_size);
  296 |         m_array_size = initial_size;
  297 |         m_total_blocks = 0;
  298 |     }
  299 |     
  300 |     void Clear()
  301 |     {
  302 |         m_total_blocks = 0;
  303 |     }
  304 |     
  305 |     int Total() const { return m_total_blocks; }
  306 |     
  307 |     bool Add(const OrderBlock &block)
  308 |     {
  309 |         if(m_total_blocks >= m_array_size)
  310 |         {
  311 |             int new_size = m_array_size + DYNAMIC_ARRAY_INCREMENT;
  312 |             if(ArrayResize(m_blocks, new_size) != new_size)
  313 |                 return false;
  314 |             m_array_size = new_size;
  315 |         }
  316 |         m_blocks[m_total_blocks] = block;
  317 |         m_total_blocks++;
  318 |         return true;
  319 |     }
  320 |     
  321 |     OrderBlock* At(int index)
  322 |     {
  323 |         if(index < 0 || index >= m_total_blocks)
  324 |             return NULL;
  325 |         return &m_blocks[index];
  326 |     }
  327 |     
  328 |     void Delete(int index)
  329 |     {
  330 |         if(index < 0 || index >= m_total_blocks)
  331 |             return;
  332 |             
  333 |         for(int i = index; i < m_total_blocks - 1; i++)
  334 |         {
  335 |             m_blocks[i] = m_blocks[i+1];
  336 |         }
  337 |         m_total_blocks--;
  338 |     }
  339 | };
  340 | 
  341 | // Dynamic Array for Fair Value Gaps
  342 | class FVGArray
  343 | {
  344 | private:
  345 |     FairValueGap m_gaps[];
  346 |     int          m_total_gaps;
  347 |     int          m_array_size;
  348 | 
  349 | public:
  350 |     void FVGArray() { m_total_gaps = 0; m_array_size = 0; }
  351 |     
  352 |     void Initialize(int initial_size = DYNAMIC_ARRAY_INCREMENT)
  353 |     {
  354 |         ArrayResize(m_gaps, initial_size);
  355 |         m_array_size = initial_size;
  356 |         m_total_gaps = 0;
  357 |     }
  358 |     
  359 |     void Clear()
  360 |     {
  361 |         m_total_gaps = 0;
  362 |     }
  363 |     
  364 |     int Total() const { return m_total_gaps; }
  365 |     
  366 |     bool Add(const FairValueGap &gap)
  367 |     {
  368 |         if(m_total_gaps >= m_array_size)
  369 |         {
  370 |             int new_size = m_array_size + DYNAMIC_ARRAY_INCREMENT;
  371 |             if(ArrayResize(m_gaps, new_size) != new_size)
  372 |                 return false;
  373 |             m_array_size = new_size;
  374 |         }
  375 |         m_gaps[m_total_gaps] = gap;
  376 |         m_total_gaps++;
  377 |         return true;
  378 |     }
  379 |     
  380 |     FairValueGap* At(int index)
  381 |     {
  382 |         if(index < 0 || index >= m_total_gaps)
  383 |             return NULL;
  384 |         return &m_gaps[index];
  385 |     }
  386 |     
  387 |     void Delete(int index)
  388 |     {
  389 |         if(index < 0 || index >= m_total_gaps)
  390 |             return;
  391 |             
  392 |         for(int i = index; i < m_total_gaps - 1; i++)
  393 |         {
  394 |             m_gaps[i] = m_gaps[i+1];
  395 |         }
  396 |         m_total_gaps--;
  397 |     }
  398 | };
  399 | 
  400 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  401 | //| Configuration Structures                                         |
  402 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  403 |

  405 | struct OrderBlockConfig
  406 | {
  407 |     int lookback_period;        // How many bars to scan
  408 |     int min_impulse_pips;       // Minimum impulse move size in pips
  409 |     int max_impulse_candles;    // Max candles for an impulse move
  410 |     double volume_threshold;    // Volume must be X times average
  411 |     bool use_breaker_logic;     // Detect breaker blocks
  412 |     
  413 |     void SetDefaults()
  414 |     {
  415 |         lookback_period = 200;
  416 |         min_impulse_pips = 15;
  417 |         max_impulse_candles = 5;
  418 |         volume_threshold = 1.5;
  419 |         use_breaker_logic = true;
  420 |     }
  421 | };
  422 |

  424 | struct FVGConfig
  425 | {
  426 |     int min_gap_pips;           // Minimum gap size in pips
  427 |     bool require_volume;        // Require high volume on gap candle
  428 |     double volume_multiplier;   // Volume multiplier for validation
  429 |     bool auto_fill_gaps;        // Automatically detect when gaps are filled
  430 |     
  431 |     void SetDefaults()
  432 |     {
  433 |         min_gap_pips = 2;
  434 |         require_volume = true;

  446 |

  470 | };

рҹ“Ҡ Thб»‘ng kГӘ: 259 dГІng, 8434 kГҪ tб»ұ, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                                    SMC_Utils.mqh |
    3 | //|                                    Smart Money Concepts Indicator |
    4 | //|                                                  Utility Functions |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Manus AI"
    7 | #property version   "1.00"
    8 | #property strict
    9 | 
   10 | #include "SMC_Structures.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   13 | //| Utility Functions Class                                          |
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | class CSMCUtils
   16 | {
   17 | private:
   18 |     static double m_point_value;
   19 |     static int    m_digits;
   20 |     static string m_symbol;
   21 |     
   22 | public:
   23 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   24 |     //| Initialization                                                   |
   25 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   26 |     static void Initialize(string symbol = "")
   27 |     {
   28 |         if(symbol == "")
   29 |             m_symbol = Symbol();
   30 |         else
   31 |             m_symbol = symbol;
   32 |             
   33 |         m_point_value = SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
   34 |         m_digits = (int)SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
   35 |     }
   36 |     
   37 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   38 |     //| Price Conversion Functions                                       |
   39 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   40 |     static double PipsToPoints(double pips)
   41 |     {
   42 |         if(m_digits == 5 || m_digits == 3)
   43 |             return pips * 10 * m_point_value;
   44 |         else
   45 |             return pips * m_point_value;
   46 |     }
   47 |     
   48 |     static double PointsToPips(double points)
   49 |     {
   50 |         if(m_digits == 5 || m_digits == 3)
   51 |             return points / (10 * m_point_value);
   52 |         else
   53 |             return points / m_point_value;
   54 |     }
   55 |     
   56 |     static double NormalizePrice(double price)
   57 |     {
   58 |         return NormalizeDouble(price, m_digits);
   59 |     }
   60 |     
   61 |     static double GetSpread()
   62 |     {
   63 |         return SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * m_point_value;
   64 |     }
   65 |     
   66 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   67 |     //| Time Functions                                                   |
   68 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   69 |     static bool IsNewBar(datetime &last_bar_time)
   70 |     {
   71 |         datetime current_bar_time = iTime(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 0);
   72 |         if(current_bar_time != last_bar_time)
   73 |         {
   74 |             last_bar_time = current_bar_time;
   75 |             return true;
   76 |         }
   77 |         return false;
   78 |     }
   79 |     
   80 |     static int GetBarIndex(datetime time)
   81 |     {
   82 |         return iBarShift(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, time);
   83 |     }
   84 |     
   85 |     static datetime GetBarTime(int index)
   86 |     {
   87 |         return iTime(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
   88 |     }
   89 |     
   90 |     static bool IsMarketOpen()
   91 |     {
   92 |         return SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE) == SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE_FULL;
   93 |     }
   94 |     
   95 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   96 |     //| Price Data Functions                                             |
   97 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   98 |     static double GetHigh(int index)
   99 |     {
  100 |         return iHigh(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  101 |     }
  102 |     
  103 |     static double GetLow(int index)
  104 |     {
  105 |         return iLow(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  106 |     }
  107 |     
  108 |     static double GetOpen(int index)
  109 |     {
  110 |         return iOpen(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  111 |     }
  112 |     
  113 |     static double GetClose(int index)
  114 |     {
  115 |         return iClose(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  116 |     }
  117 |     
  118 |     static long GetVolume(int index)
  119 |     {
  120 |         return iVolume(m_symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, index);
  121 |     }
  122 |     
  123 |     static double GetTypicalPrice(int index)
  124 |     {
  125 |         return (GetHigh(index) + GetLow(index) + GetClose(index)) / 3.0;
  126 |     }
  127 |     
  128 |     static double GetRange(int index)
  129 |     {
  130 |         return GetHigh(index) - GetLow(index);
  131 |     }
  132 |     
  133 |     static bool IsBullishCandle(int index)
  134 |     {
  135 |         return GetClose(index) > GetOpen(index);
  136 |     }
  137 |     
  138 |     static bool IsBearishCandle(int index)
  139 |     {
  140 |         return GetClose(index) < GetOpen(index);
  141 |     }
  142 |     
  143 |     static bool IsDojiCandle(int index, double doji_threshold = 0.1)
  144 |     {
  145 |         double body_size = MathAbs(GetClose(index) - GetOpen(index));
  146 |         double range = GetRange(index);
  147 |         return (range > 0) ? (body_size / range) < doji_threshold : false;
  148 |     }
  149 |     
  150 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  151 |     //| Volume Analysis Functions                                        |
  152 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  153 |     static double GetAverageVolume(int period, int start_index = 1)
  154 |     {
  155 |         if(period <= 0) return 0.0;
  156 |         
  157 |         double total_volume = 0.0;
  158 |         for(int i = start_index; i < start_index + period; i++)
  159 |         {
  160 |             total_volume += (double)GetVolume(i);
  161 |         }
  162 |         return total_volume / period;
  163 |     }
  164 |     
  165 |     static bool IsHighVolume(int index, double multiplier = 1.5, int avg_period = 20)
  166 |     {
  167 |         double current_volume = (double)GetVolume(index);
  168 |         double average_volume = GetAverageVolume(avg_period, index + 1);
  169 |         return current_volume > (average_volume * multiplier);
  170 |     }
  171 |     
  172 |     static bool IsLowVolume(int index, double multiplier = 0.7, int avg_period = 20)
  173 |     {
  174 |         double current_volume = (double)GetVolume(index);
  175 |         double average_volume = GetAverageVolume(avg_period, index + 1);
  176 |         return current_volume < (average_volume * multiplier);
  177 |     }
  178 |     
  179 |     static double GetVolumeRatio(int index, int avg_period = 20)
  180 |     {
  181 |         double current_volume = (double)GetVolume(index);
  182 |         double average_volume = GetAverageVolume(avg_period, index + 1);
  183 |         return (average_volume > 0) ? current_volume / average_volume : 0.0;
  184 |     }
  185 |     
  186 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  187 |     //| Swing Point Detection                                            |
  188 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 |     static bool IsSwingHigh(int index, int strength = 5)
  190 |     {
  191 |         if(index < strength || index >= Bars(Symbol(), PERIOD_CURRENT) - strength)
  192 |             return false;
  193 |             
  194 |         double center_high = GetHigh(index);
  195 |         
  196 |         // Check left side
  197 |         for(int i = 1; i <= strength; i++)
  198 |         {
  199 |             if(GetHigh(index + i) >= center_high)
  200 |                 return false;
  201 |         }
  202 |         
  203 |         // Check right side
  204 |         for(int i = 1; i <= strength; i++)
  205 |         {
  206 |             if(GetHigh(index - i) > center_high)
  207 |                 return false;
  208 |         }
  209 |         
  210 |         return true;
  211 |     }
  212 |     
  213 |     static bool IsSwingLow(int index, int strength = 5)
  214 |     {
  215 |         if(index < strength || index >= Bars(Symbol(), PERIOD_CURRENT) - strength)
  216 |             return false;
  217 |             
  218 |         double center_low = GetLow(index);
  219 |         
  220 |         // Check left side
  221 |         for(int i = 1; i <= strength; i++)
  222 |         {
  223 |             if(GetLow(index + i) <= center_low)
  224 |                 return false;
  225 |         }
  226 |         
  227 |         // Check right side
  228 |         for(int i = 1; i <= strength; i++)
  229 |         {
  230 |             if(GetLow(index - i) < center_low)
  231 |                 return false;
  232 |         }
  233 |         
  234 |         return true;
  235 |     }
  236 |     
  237 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 |     //| Impulse Detection                                                |
  239 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 |     static bool DetectImpulse(int start_index, int end_index, double min_pips, int max_candles, bool &is_bullish)
  241 |     {
  242 |         if(start_index <= end_index || start_index - end_index > max_candles)
  243 |             return false;
  244 |             
  245 |         double start_price = GetClose(start_index);
  246 |         double end_price = GetClose(end_index);
  247 |         double move_pips = PointsToPips(MathAbs(start_price - end_price));
  248 |         
  249 |         if(move_pips < min_pips)
  250 |             return false;
  251 |             
  252 |         is_bullish = end_price > start_price;
  253 |         
  254 |         // Optional: Check for momentum (e.g., no significant counter-moves)
  255 |         // ...
  256 |         
  257 |         return true;
  258 |     }
  259 | };
================================================================================

   11 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   12 | //| Expert initialization function                                   |
   13 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   14 | int OnInit()
   15 | {
   16 |     // Test if all classes can be instantiated
   17 |     CLogger* logger = new CLogger();
   18 |         CErrorHandler* errorHandler = new CErrorHandler();
   19 |     CSettings* settings = new CSettings();
   20 |     CEaContext* context = new CEaContext();
   21 |     context.pLogger = logger;
   22 |     
   23 |     // Test initialization
   24 |     if(!logger->Initialize(LOG_LEVEL_INFO, "Test", "test.log"))
   25 |     {
   26 |         Print("Logger init failed");
   27 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   28 |     }
   29 |     
   30 |     if(!errorHandler->Initialize(context))
   31 |     {
   32 |         Print("ErrorHandler init failed");
   33 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   34 |     }
   35 |     
   36 |     if(!settings->Initialize(GetPointer(logger)))
   37 |     {
   38 |         Print("Settings init failed");
   39 |         return INIT_FAILED;
   40 |     }
   41 |     
   42 |     // Cleanup
   43 |     delete settings;
   44 |     delete errorHandler;
   45 |     delete logger;
   46 |     
   47 |     return INIT_SUCCEEDED;
   48 | }

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                               Trade_Manager.mqh |
    3 | //|                        APEX Pullback EA v5 - Trade Management   |
    4 | //|                                                                  |
    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | #property copyright "Copyright 2024, APEX Trading Systems"
    7 | #property link      "https://apex-trading.com"
    8 | #property version   "5.00"
    9 | 
   10 | #include "Core_Defines.mqh"
   11 | #include "Core_Context.mqh"
   12 | #include <Trade\Trade.mqh>
   13 | #include <Trade\SymbolInfo.mqh>
   14 | #include <Trade\PositionInfo.mqh>
   15 | #include <Trade\OrderInfo.mqh>
   16 | 
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | //| Trade Manager Class                                              |
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | class CTradeManager {
   21 | private:
   22 |     CEaContext*         m_pContext; // Pointer to the global EA context
   23 |     CTrade              m_trade;
   24 |     CSymbolInfo         m_symbolInfo;
   25 |     CPositionInfo       m_positionInfo;
   26 |     COrderInfo          m_orderInfo;
   27 |     
   28 |     // Trade settings
   29 |     string              m_symbol;
   30 |     double              m_lotSize;
   31 |     int                 m_slippage;
   32 |     int                 m_magicNumber;
   33 |     string              m_comment;
   34 |     
   35 |     // Risk management
   36 |     double              m_maxRiskPercent;
   37 |     double              m_maxLotSize;
   38 |     double              m_minLotSize;
   39 |     
   40 |     // Trade statistics
   41 |     int                 m_totalTrades;
   42 |     int                 m_winningTrades;
   43 |     int                 m_losingTrades;
   44 |     double              m_totalProfit;
   45 |     double              m_totalLoss;
   46 |     
   47 |     bool                m_isInitialized;
   48 |     
   49 | public:
   50 |     // Constructor
   51 |     CTradeManager() {
   52 |         m_pContext = NULL;
   53 |         m_symbol = "";
   54 |         m_lotSize = 0.01;
   55 |         m_slippage = 3;
   56 |         m_magicNumber = 12345;
   57 |         m_comment = "APEX_EA";
   58 |         m_maxRiskPercent = 2.0;
   59 |         m_maxLotSize = 10.0;
   60 |         m_minLotSize = 0.01;
   61 |         m_totalTrades = 0;
   62 |         m_winningTrades = 0;
   63 |         m_losingTrades = 0;
   64 |         m_totalProfit = 0.0;
   65 |         m_totalLoss = 0.0;
   66 |         m_isInitialized = false;
   67 |     }
   68 |     
   69 |     // Destructor
   70 |     ~CTradeManager() {
   71 |         // Cleanup if needed
   72 |     }
   73 |     
   74 |     // Initialize trade manager
   75 |     bool Initialize(CEaContext* context) {
   76 |         m_pContext = context;
   77 |         if (!m_pContext) return false;
   78 | 
   79 |         m_symbol = m_pContext->pSymbol->Symbol();
   80 |         m_magicNumber = m_pContext->pSettings->MagicNumber();
   81 |         
   82 |         // Initialize symbol info
   83 |         if(!m_symbolInfo.Name(m_symbol)) {
   84 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to initialize symbol: " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
   85 |             return false;
   86 |         }
   87 |         
   88 |         // Set trade parameters
   89 |         m_trade.SetExpertMagicNumber(m_magicNumber);
   90 |         m_trade.SetMarginMode();
   91 |         m_trade.SetTypeFillingBySymbol(m_symbol);
   92 |         m_trade.SetDeviationInPoints(m_slippage);
   93 |         
   94 |         // Refresh symbol info
   95 |         if(!m_symbolInfo.RefreshRates()) {
   96 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to refresh rates for: " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
   97 |             return false;
   98 |         }
   99 |         
  100 |         m_isInitialized = true;
  101 |         
  102 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Trade Manager initialized for " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  103 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Magic Number: " + IntegerToString(m_magicNumber), __FUNCTION__);
  104 |         
  105 |         return true;
  106 |     }
  107 |     
  108 |     // Open buy position
  109 |     bool OpenBuy(double volume, double price = 0.0, double sl = 0.0, double tp = 0.0, string comment = "") {
  110 |         if(!m_isInitialized) {
  111 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Trade Manager not initialized", __FUNCTION__);
  112 |             return false;
  113 |         }
  114 |         
  115 |         // Validate volume
  116 |         volume = NormalizeVolume(volume);
  117 |         if(volume <= 0) {
  118 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid volume: " + DoubleToString(volume, 2), __FUNCTION__);
  119 |             return false;
  120 |         }
  121 |         
  122 |         // Use market price if not specified
  123 |         if(price <= 0.0) {
  124 |             price = m_symbolInfo.Ask();
  125 |         }
  126 |         
  127 |         // Normalize prices
  128 |         price = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(price);
  129 |         if(sl > 0) sl = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(sl);
  130 |         if(tp > 0) tp = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(tp);
  131 |         
  132 |         // Set comment
  133 |         string tradeComment = (comment == "") ? m_comment : comment;
  134 |         
  135 |         // Execute trade
  136 |         bool result = m_trade.Buy(volume, m_symbol, price, sl, tp, tradeComment);
  137 |         
  138 |         if(result) {
  139 |             m_totalTrades++;
  140 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogTrade("BUY", m_symbol, volume, price, tradeComment);
  141 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Buy order executed successfully. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultOrder()), __FUNCTION__);
  142 |         } else {
  143 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to open buy position. Error: " + IntegerToString(GetLastError()), __FUNCTION__);
  144 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment(), __FUNCTION__);
  145 |         }
  146 |         
  147 |         return result;
  148 |     }
  149 |     
  150 |     // Open sell position
  151 |     bool OpenSell(double volume, double price = 0.0, double sl = 0.0, double tp = 0.0, string comment = "") {
  152 |         if(!m_isInitialized) {
  153 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Trade Manager not initialized", __FUNCTION__);
  154 |             return false;
  155 |         }
  156 |         
  157 |         // Validate volume
  158 |         volume = NormalizeVolume(volume);
  159 |         if(volume <= 0) {
  160 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Invalid volume: " + DoubleToString(volume, 2), __FUNCTION__);
  161 |             return false;
  162 |         }
  163 |         
  164 |         // Use market price if not specified
  165 |         if(price <= 0.0) {
  166 |             price = m_symbolInfo.Bid();
  167 |         }
  168 |         
  169 |         // Normalize prices
  170 |         price = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(price);
  171 |         if(sl > 0) sl = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(sl);
  172 |         if(tp > 0) tp = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(tp);
  173 |         
  174 |         // Set comment
  175 |         string tradeComment = (comment == "") ? m_comment : comment;
  176 |         
  177 |         // Execute trade
  178 |         bool result = m_trade.Sell(volume, m_symbol, price, sl, tp, tradeComment);
  179 |         
  180 |         if(result) {
  181 |             m_totalTrades++;
  182 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogTrade("SELL", m_symbol, volume, price, tradeComment);
  183 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("Sell order executed successfully. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultOrder()), __FUNCTION__);
  184 |         } else {
  185 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Failed to open sell position. Error: " + IntegerToString(GetLastError()), __FUNCTION__);
  186 |             if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogError("Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment(), __FUNCTION__);
  187 |         }
  188 |         
  189 |         return result;
  190 |     }
  191 | 
  192 |     // Execute a trade based on a signal
  193 |     bool ExecuteTrade(const SSignalInfo &signal, double volume) {
  194 |         if(signal.Direction == SIGNAL_TYPE_BUY) {
  195 |             return OpenBuy(volume, 0, signal.StopLoss, signal.TakeProfit, signal.Comment);
  196 |         }
  197 |         if(signal.Direction == SIGNAL_TYPE_SELL) {
  198 |             return OpenSell(volume, 0, signal.StopLoss, signal.TakeProfit, signal.Comment);
  199 |         }
  200 |         return false;
  201 |     }
  202 | 
  203 |     // Manage all open positions
  204 |     void ManagePositions() {
  205 |         // This is a placeholder for more complex position management logic,
  206 |         // such as trailing stops, breakeven, etc.
  207 |     }
  208 |     
  209 |     // Close position by ticket
  210 |     bool ClosePosition(ulong ticket) {
  211 |         if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  212 |             if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Position not found: " + IntegerToString(ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  213 |             return false;
  214 |         }
  215 |         
  216 |         bool result = m_trade.PositionClose(ticket);
  217 |         
  218 |         if(result) {
  219 |             if(m_logger) {
  220 |                 m_logger->LogInfo("Position closed successfully. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  221 |             }
  222 |         } else {
  223 |             if(m_logger) {
  224 |                 m_logger->LogError("Failed to close position: " + IntegerToString(ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  225 |                 m_logger->LogError("Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment(), __FUNCTION__);
  226 |             }
  227 |         }
  228 |         
  229 |         return result;
  230 |     }
  231 |     
  232 |     // Close all positions for this symbol and magic number
  233 |     int CloseAllPositions() {
  234 |         int closedCount = 0;
  235 |         
  236 |         for(int i = PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  237 |             if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  238 |                 if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  239 |                     if(ClosePosition(m_positionInfo.Ticket())) {
  240 |                         closedCount++;
  241 |                     }
  242 |                 }
  243 |             }
  244 |         }
  245 |         
  246 |         if(m_logger && closedCount > 0) {
  247 |             m_logger.LogInfo("Closed " + IntegerToString(closedCount) + " positions", __FUNCTION__);
  248 |         }
  249 |         
  250 |         return closedCount;
  251 |     }
  252 |     
  253 |     // Modify position
  254 |     bool ModifyPosition(ulong ticket, double sl, double tp) {
  255 |         if(!m_positionInfo.SelectByTicket(ticket)) {
  256 |             if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Position not found: " + IntegerToString(ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  257 |             return false;
  258 |         }
  259 |         
  260 |         // Normalize prices
  261 |         if(sl > 0) sl = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(sl);
  262 |         if(tp > 0) tp = m_symbolInfo.NormalizePrice(tp);
  263 |         
  264 |         bool result = m_trade.PositionModify(ticket, sl, tp);
  265 |         
  266 |         if(result) {
  267 |             if(m_logger) {
  268 |                 m_logger->LogInfo("Position modified. Ticket: " + IntegerToString(ticket) + 
  269 |                                ", SL: " + DoubleToString(sl, _Digits) + 
  270 |                                ", TP: " + DoubleToString(tp, _Digits), __FUNCTION__);
  271 |             }
  272 |         } else {
  273 |             if(m_logger) {
  274 |                 m_logger->LogError("Failed to modify position: " + IntegerToString(ticket), __FUNCTION__);
  275 |                 m_logger->LogError("Trade result: " + IntegerToString(m_trade.ResultRetcode()) + " - " + m_trade.ResultComment(), __FUNCTION__);
  276 |             }
  277 |         }
  278 |         
  279 |         return result;
  280 |     }
  281 |     
  282 |     // Calculate position size based on risk
  283 |     double CalculatePositionSize(double riskPercent, double entryPrice, double stopLoss) {
  284 |         if(riskPercent <= 0 || entryPrice <= 0 || stopLoss <= 0) {
  285 |             return m_minLotSize;
  286 |         }
  287 |         
  288 |         double balance = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_BALANCE);
  289 |         double riskAmount = balance * (riskPercent / 100.0);
  290 |         
  291 |         double pointValue = m_symbolInfo.TickValue();
  292 |         double stopLossPoints = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLoss) / m_symbolInfo.Point();
  293 |         
  294 |         double lotSize = riskAmount / (stopLossPoints * pointValue);
  295 |         
  296 |         // Normalize and validate lot size
  297 |         lotSize = NormalizeVolume(lotSize);
  298 |         
  299 |         if(m_logger) {
  300 |             m_logger.LogDebug("Position size calculation: Risk=" + DoubleToString(riskPercent, 2) + 
  301 |                             "%, Amount=" + DoubleToString(riskAmount, 2) + 
  302 |                             ", Lots=" + DoubleToString(lotSize, 2), __FUNCTION__);
  303 |         }
  304 |         
  305 |         return lotSize;
  306 |     }
  307 |     
  308 |     // Normalize volume according to symbol specifications
  309 |     double NormalizeVolume(double volume) {
  310 |         double minLot = m_symbolInfo.LotsMin();
  311 |         double maxLot = m_symbolInfo.LotsMax();
  312 |         double stepLot = m_symbolInfo.LotsStep();
  313 |         
  314 |         if(volume < minLot) volume = minLot;
  315 |         if(volume > maxLot) volume = maxLot;
  316 |         if(volume > m_maxLotSize) volume = m_maxLotSize;
  317 |         
  318 |         // Round to step
  319 |         volume = MathRound(volume / stepLot) * stepLot;
  320 |         
  321 |         return volume;
  322 |     }
  323 |     
  324 |     // Get current positions count
  325 |     int GetPositionsCount() {
  326 |         int count = 0;
  327 |         
  328 |         for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  329 |             if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  330 |                 if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  331 |                     count++;
  332 |                 }
  333 |             }
  334 |         }
  335 |         
  336 |         return count;
  337 |     }
  338 |     
  339 |     // Get total profit of open positions
  340 |     double GetTotalProfit() {
  341 |         double totalProfit = 0.0;
  342 |         
  343 |         for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  344 |             if(m_positionInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  345 |                 if(m_positionInfo.Symbol() == m_symbol && m_positionInfo.Magic() == m_magicNumber) {
  346 |                     totalProfit += m_positionInfo.Profit();
  347 |                 }
  348 |             }
  349 |         }
  350 |         
  351 |         return totalProfit;
  352 |     }
  353 |     
  354 |     // Check if trading is allowed
  355 |     bool IsTradingAllowed() {
  356 |         if(!m_isInitialized) return false;
  357 |         
  358 |         // Check if trading is allowed for the account
  359 |         if(!AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED)) {
  360 |             if(m_logger) m_logger.LogWarning("Trading not allowed for account", __FUNCTION__);
  361 |             return false;
  362 |         }
  363 |         
  364 |         // Check if trading is allowed for the symbol
  365 |         if(!m_symbolInfo.IsTradingAllowed()) {
  366 |             if(m_logger) m_logger.LogWarning("Trading not allowed for symbol: " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  367 |             return false;
  368 |         }
  369 |         
  370 |         // Check market hours
  371 |         if(!m_symbolInfo.IsTradeAllowed()) {
  372 |             if(m_logger) m_logger.LogWarning("Market closed for symbol: " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  373 |             return false;
  374 |         }
  375 |         
  376 |         return true;
  377 |     }
  378 |     
  379 |     // Getters
  380 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_isInitialized; }
  381 |     string GetSymbol() const { return m_symbol; }
  382 |     int GetMagicNumber() const { return m_magicNumber; }
  383 |     int GetTotalTrades() const { return m_totalTrades; }
  384 |     int GetWinningTrades() const { return m_winningTrades; }
  385 |     int GetLosingTrades() const { return m_losingTrades; }
  386 |     double GetTotalProfitAmount() const { return m_totalProfit; }
  387 |     double GetTotalLossAmount() const { return m_totalLoss; }
  388 |     
  389 |     // Setters
  390 |     void SetLotSize(double lotSize) { m_lotSize = NormalizeVolume(lotSize); }
  391 |     void SetSlippage(int slippage) { m_slippage = slippage; m_trade.SetDeviationInPoints(slippage); }
  392 |     void SetComment(string comment) { m_comment = comment; }
  393 |     void SetMaxRisk(double riskPercent) { m_maxRiskPercent = riskPercent; }
  394 |     void SetMaxLotSize(double maxLot) { m_maxLotSize = maxLot; }
  395 | };
  396 | 
  397 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  398 | //| Trade Manager Utility Functions                                 |
  399 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  400 | 
  401 | // Quick position check
  402 | bool HasOpenPositions(string symbol, int magicNumber) {
  403 |     CPositionInfo posInfo;
  404 |     
  405 |     for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  406 |         if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  407 |             if(posInfo.Symbol() == symbol && posInfo.Magic() == magicNumber) {
  408 |                 return true;
  409 |             }
  410 |         }
  411 |     }
  412 |     
  413 |     return false;
  414 | }
  415 | 
  416 | // Get position type
  417 | ENUM_POSITION_TYPE GetPositionType(string symbol, int magicNumber) {
  418 |     CPositionInfo posInfo;
  419 |     
  420 |     for(int i = 0; i < PositionsTotal(); i++) {
  421 |         if(posInfo.SelectByIndex(i)) {
  422 |             if(posInfo.Symbol() == symbol && posInfo.Magic() == magicNumber) {
  423 |                 return posInfo.PositionType();
  424 |             }
  425 |         }
  426 |     }
  427 |     
  428 |     return WRONG_VALUE;
  429 | }

   52 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   53 | //| Main update function to be called on each tick/bar               |

   55 | void CDashboardManager::Update(const SwingPoint &major_structure[], const SwingPoint &primary_structure[], const SwingPoint &sub_structure[], const OrderBlock &order_blocks[], const FairValueGap &fvgs[])
   56 | {
   57 |     // 1. Collect all necessary data
   58 |     CollectStructureData(major_structure, primary_structure, sub_structure);
   59 |     CollectTrendData(); // Placeholder
   60 |     CollectVolatilityData(); // Placeholder
   61 |     CollectKeyLevelsData(major_structure);
   62 | 
   63 |     // 2. Update the renderer with the new state
   64 |     if(CheckPointer(m_renderer) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
   65 |         m_renderer->Update(m_state);
   66 | }
   67 | 
   68 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   69 | //| Collect Market Structure Data                                    |
   70 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   71 | void CDashboardManager::CollectStructureData(const SwingPoint &major[], const SwingPoint &primary[], const SwingPoint &sub[])
   72 | {
   73 |     // Determine bias from the last two points of each structure
   74 |     m_state.majorStructure = GetStructureState(major);
   75 |     m_state.primaryStructure = GetStructureState(primary);
   76 |     m_state.subStructure = GetStructureState(sub);
   77 | }
