   96 | 
   97 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   98 | //| Collect Key Levels Data                                          |
   99 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  100 | void CDashboardManager::CollectKeyLevelsData(const SwingPoint &major[])
  101 | {
  102 |     SwingPoint last_high, last_low;
  103 |     GetLastSwingHighAndLow(major, last_high, last_low);
  104 |     m_state.nextMajorHigh = last_high.price;
  105 |     m_state.nextMajorLow = last_low.price;
  106 | }
  107 | 
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | //| Helper to determine structure state (Bullish/Bearish)            |
  110 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  111 | ENUM_MARKET_STATE GetStructureState(const SwingPoint &points[])
  112 | {
  113 |     int size = ArraySize(points);
  114 |     if(size < 4) return UNCERTAIN; // Need at least 4 points to compare two highs and two lows
  115 | 
  116 |     SwingPoint p1 = points[size-1]; // Last point
  117 |     SwingPoint p2 = points[size-2]; // Previous point
  118 |     SwingPoint p3 = points[size-3]; // Point before previous
  119 |     SwingPoint p4 = points[size-4]; // Point before that
  120 | 
  121 |     // Looking for HH and HL for Bullish trend
  122 |     if(p1.type == SWING_HIGH && p2.type == SWING_LOW && p3.type == SWING_HIGH && p4.type == SWING_LOW)
  123 |     {
  124 |         if(p1.price > p3.price && p2.price > p4.price) return BULLISH;
  125 |     }
  126 | 
  127 |     // Looking for LL and LH for Bearish trend
  128 |     if(p1.type == SWING_LOW && p2.type == SWING_HIGH && p3.type == SWING_LOW && p4.type == SWING_HIGH)
  129 |     {
  130 |         if(p1.price < p3.price && p2.price < p4.price) return BEARISH;
  131 |     }
  132 | 
  133 |     return SIDEWAYS; // Otherwise, it's ranging or in a complex pullback
  134 | }
  135 | 
  136 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  137 | //| Helper to get the last swing high and low                        |
  138 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  139 | void GetLastSwingHighAndLow(const SwingPoint &points[], SwingPoint &last_high, SwingPoint &last_low)
  140 | {
  141 |     for(int i = ArraySize(points) - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  142 |     {
  143 |         if(points[i].type == SWING_HIGH && last_high.time == 0) last_high = points[i];
  144 |         if(points[i].type == SWING_LOW && last_low.time == 0) last_low = points[i];
  145 |         if(last_high.time != 0 && last_low.time != 0) break;
  146 |     }
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | //| Clear all dashboard objects                                      |
  151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 | void CDashboardManager::Clear()
  153 | {
  154 |     if(CheckPointer(m_renderer) == POINTER_DYNAMIC)
  155 |         m_renderer.Clear();
  156 | }
  157 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
================================================================================

   62 |

   71 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 | //| Helper to convert market state enum to string and color          |
   73 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   74 | void GetStateStringAndColor(ENUM_MARKET_STATE state, string &text, color &clr)
   75 | {
   76 |     switch(state)
   77 |     {
   78 |         case BULLISH:   text = "BULLISH";   clr = clrLimeGreen; break;
   79 |         case BEARISH:   text = "BEARISH";   clr = clrIndianRed; break;
   80 |         case SIDEWAYS:  text = "SIDEWAYS";  clr = clrGoldenrod; break;
   81 |         case UNCERTAIN: text = "UNCERTAIN"; clr = clrGray;      break;
   82 |     }
   83 | }
   84 | 
   85 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   86 | //| Draw the main panel background                                   |
   87 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   88 | void CDashboardRenderer::DrawPanel()
   89 | {
   90 |     string name = m_obj_prefix + "_Panel";
   91 |     ObjectCreate(m_chart_id, name, OBJ_RECTANGLE_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
   92 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, m_x_pos);
   93 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, m_y_pos);
   94 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XSIZE, m_width);
   95 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YSIZE, m_height);
   96 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, clrBlack);
   97 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_COLOR, clrGray);
   98 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
   99 | }
  100 | 
  101 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  102 | //| Draw Market Structure Section                                    |
  103 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  104 | void CDashboardRenderer::DrawStructureSection()

  106 |     int y_offset = m_y_pos + 30;

  111 |     GetStateStringAndColor(m_state.majorStructure, label_text, state_color);

  113 |     DrawLabel(m_obj_prefix + "_MajorValue", m_x_pos + 80, y_offset, label_text, state_color);
  114 |     y_offset += 20;
  115 | 
  116 |     // Primary Structure
  117 |     GetStateStringAndColor(m_state.primaryStructure, label_text, state_color);
  118 |     DrawLabel(m_obj_prefix + "_PrimaryLabel", m_x_pos + 10, y_offset, "Primary:");
  119 |     DrawLabel(m_obj_prefix + "_PrimaryValue", m_x_pos + 80, y_offset, label_text, state_color);
  120 |     y_offset += 20;
  121 | 
  122 |     // Sub Structure
  123 |     GetStateStringAndColor(m_state.subStructure, label_text, state_color);
  124 |     DrawLabel(m_obj_prefix + "_SubLabel", m_x_pos + 10, y_offset, "Sub:");
  125 |     DrawLabel(m_obj_prefix + "_SubValue", m_x_pos + 80, y_offset, label_text, state_color);
  126 | }

  171 | {
  172 |     ObjectCreate(m_chart_id, name, OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
  173 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, x);
  174 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, y);
  175 |     ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, text);
  176 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, clr);
  177 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, font_size);
  178 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  179 |     ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_SELECTABLE, false);
  180 | }

   34 |     double              nextPrimaryLow;

   49 |         volatilityLevel = "N/A";
   50 |         nextMajorHigh = 0.0;

   52 |         nextPrimaryHigh = 0.0;
   53 |         nextPrimaryLow = 0.0;
   54 |         currentSession = "N/A";
   55 |         timeToNextSession = 0;

# рҹ”§ Hб»Ү Thб»‘ng Compile APEX Pullback EA v4 (PhiГӘn bбәЈn 2.0)

> **рҹ“ҳ Tham khбәЈo chГӯnh thб»©c:** [SГЎch TrбәҜng - Compilation Standards](../APEX_PULLBACK_EA_v4_WhitePaper.md#333-quy-trГ¬nh-compilation--debug-compilation-standards)
> 
> **TбәҘt cбәЈ thГ nh viГӘn team (ДҗбәЎi BГ ng & CГЎo GiГ ) Bбә®T BUб»ҳC tuГўn thб»§ quy trГ¬nh nГ y.**

## **рҹҺҜ Sб»ӯ Dб»Ҙng ДҗЖЎn GiбәЈn**

### **вҡЎ Script ChГӯnh (Khuyбәҝn khГӯch):**

```powershell
# Compile EA (mбә·c Д‘б»Ӣnh)
.\compile.ps1

# Compile tбәҘt cбәЈ files
.\compile.ps1 -Target all

# Compile 1 file cб»Ҙ thб»ғ 
.\compile.ps1 -Target Core_Logger

# Xem hЖ°б»ӣng dбә«n
.\compile.ps1 -Help
```

### **рҹ”§ TГ№y Chб»Қn:**

| TГ№y chб»Қn | MГҙ tбәЈ |
|----------|-------|
| `-Silent` | Chб»ү hiб»Үn kбәҝt quбәЈ quan trб»Қng |
| `-Quick` | Hiб»Үn tГіm tбәҜt + 3 lб»—i Д‘бә§u |
| `-StopOnError` | Dб»«ng khi gбә·p lб»—i (chб»ү dГ№ng vб»ӣi `-Target all`) |

## **рҹ“Ӯ CбәҘu TrГәc Hб»Ү Thб»‘ng**

```
APEX_PULLBACK_EA_v4/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ compile.ps1                    # рҹҸҶ SCRIPT CHГҚNH (wrapper)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Compile/                       # рҹ“Ғ ThЖ° mб»Ҙc compile scripts
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ compile-ea.ps1            # Compile file EA chГӯnh  
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ compile-single.ps1        # Compile 1 file cб»Ҙ thб»ғ
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ compile-all.ps1           # Compile tбәҘt cбәЈ files
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ COMPILE_GUIDE.md          # HЖ°б»ӣng dбә«n nГ y
в””в”Җв”Җ [MQ files...]                  # CГЎc file .mq5, .mqh
```

## **рҹҺҜ CГЎc TrЖ°б»қng Hб»Јp Sб»ӯ Dб»Ҙng**

### **рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ Debug Nhanh:**
```powershell
.\compile.ps1 -Quick                 # EA nhanh
.\compile.ps1 -Target Core_Settings  # Test file cГі lб»—i
```

### **рҹ”Қ TГ¬m File Lб»—i:**
```powershell
.\compile.ps1 -Target all -Quick     # Xem tб»•ng quan
.\compile.ps1 -Target all -StopOnError  # Dб»«ng б»ҹ file Д‘бә§u tiГӘn cГі lб»—i
```

### **рҹӨ– Automation:**
```powershell
.\compile.ps1 -Silent                # CI/CD EA
.\compile.ps1 -Target all -Silent    # CI/CD tбәҘt cбәЈ
```

### **рҹ“Ҡ Debug Chi Tiбәҝt:**
```powershell
.\compile.ps1                        # EA Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§
.\compile.ps1 -Target Analysis_Indicators  # File cб»Ҙ thб»ғ Д‘бә§y Д‘б»§
```
